    if (!targetPanel.handle) throw new Error('Target directory not selected');
    if (item.sourceType === 'storage') {
      const sourceHandle = item.item.handle;
      const sourceParentHandle = item.parentHandle;
      if (!sourceParentHandle) throw new Error('Missing source parent handle for storage item');
      if (operation === 'copy') {
        await fileSystemBackend.copyEntry(sourceHandle, targetPanel.handle);
      } else {
        await fileSystemBackend.moveEntry(sourceHandle, sourceParentHandle, targetPanel.handle);
      }
    } else if (item.sourceType === 'terminal') {
      await copyTerminalToStorage(item.item, targetPanel.handle);
      if (operation === 'move') {
        await deleteTerminalItem(item.item);
      }
    } else {
      throw new Error(`Copy from ${item.sourceType} to storage not implemented`);
    }
  };

  const handleTerminalTarget = async (item: any, operation: 'copy' | 'move', targetPanel: any) => {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');
    if (!isValidPath(targetPanel.path)) throw new Error('Invalid target path');
    const targetPath = targetPanel.path === '/' ? '' : targetPanel.path;

    if (item.sourceType === 'storage') {
      await copyStorageToTerminal(item.item, targetPath);
      if (operation === 'move') {
        const sourceParentHandle = item.parentHandle;
        if (!sourceParentHandle) throw new Error('Missing source parent handle for storage item');
        await fileSystemBackend.deleteEntry(sourceParentHandle, item.item.name, item.item.kind === 'directory');
      }
    } else if (item.sourceType === 'terminal') {
      const sourcePath = item.item.path;
      if (!isValidPath(sourcePath)) throw new Error('Invalid source path');
      const destPath = targetPath ? `${targetPath}/${item.item.name}` : `/${item.item.name}`;
      if (operation === 'copy') {
        await copyTerminalToTerminal(sourcePath, destPath);
      } else {
        await terminal.fs.rename(sourcePath, destPath);
      }
    } else {
      throw new Error(`Copy from ${item.sourceType} to terminal not implemented`);
    }
  };

  async function copyStorageToTerminal(sourceItem: any, targetDirPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    if (!isValidPath(targetDirPath)) throw new Error('Invalid target path');
    if (!sourceItem?.name) throw new Error('Invalid source item');
    const targetFullPath = targetDirPath ? `${targetDirPath}/${sourceItem.name}` : `/${sourceItem.name}`;
    if (sourceItem.kind === 'directory') {
      await terminal.fs.mkdir(targetFullPath, { recursive: true });
      await copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(sourceItem.handle, targetFullPath);
    } else {
      const file = await sourceItem.handle.getFile();
      const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
      await terminal.fs.writeFile(targetFullPath, new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer));
    }
  }

  async function copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(sourceDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, targetPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    for await (const [name, entry] of (sourceDirHandle as any).entries()) {
      if (!name || typeof name !== 'string' || name.includes('..')) {
        console.warn('Skipping invalid entry name:', name);
        continue;
      }
      const entryPath = `${targetPath}/${name}`;
      if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
        await terminal.fs.mkdir(entryPath, { recursive: true });
        await copyStorageDirectoryToTerminal(entry, entryPath);
      } else {
        const file = await entry.getFile();
        const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
        await terminal.fs.writeFile(entryPath, new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer));
      }
    }
  }

  async function copyTerminalToStorage(sourceItem: any, targetDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    const sourcePath = sourceItem.path;
    if (!isValidPath(sourcePath)) throw new Error('Invalid source path');
    if (sourceItem.type === 'directory') {
      const newDirHandle = await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(targetDirHandle, sourceItem.name);
      await copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(sourcePath, newDirHandle);
    } else {
      const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(sourcePath);
      const blob = uint8ToBlob(content);
      await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(targetDirHandle, sourceItem.name, blob);
    }
  }

  async function copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(sourceDirPath: string, targetDirHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    if (!isValidPath(sourceDirPath)) throw new Error('Invalid source directory path');
    const entries = await terminal.fs.readdir(sourceDirPath, { withFileTypes: true });
    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (!entry.name || entry.name.includes('..')) {
        console.warn('Skipping invalid entry:', entry.name);
        continue;
      }
      const srcPath = `${sourceDirPath}/${entry.name}`;
      if (entry.isDirectory()) {
        const newSubDir = await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(targetDirHandle, entry.name);
        await copyTerminalDirectoryToStorage(srcPath, newSubDir);
      } else {
        const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(srcPath);
        const blob = uint8ToBlob(content);
        await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(targetDirHandle, entry.name, blob);
      }
    }
  }

  async function deleteTerminalItem(item: any) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    const path = item.path;
    if (!isValidPath(path)) throw new Error('Invalid path for deletion');
    try {
      await terminal.fs.rm(path, { recursive: true });
    } catch {
      await terminal.fs.rm(path, { recursive: true, force: true });
    }
  }

  async function copyTerminalToTerminal(sourcePath: string, destPath: string) {
    const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
    if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
    if (!isValidPath(sourcePath) || !isValidPath(destPath)) throw new Error('Invalid paths for copy operation');
    try {
      if (typeof (terminal.fs as any).cp === 'function') {
        await (terminal.fs as any).cp(sourcePath, destPath, { recursive: true });
      } else {
        const entries = await terminal.fs.readdir(sourcePath, { withFileTypes: true });
        await terminal.fs.mkdir(destPath, { recursive: true });
        for (const entry of entries) {
          const srcEntry = `${sourcePath}/${entry.name}`;
          const destEntry = `${destPath}/${entry.name}`;
          if (entry.isDirectory()) {
            await copyTerminalToTerminal(srcEntry, destEntry);
          } else {
            const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(srcEntry);
            await terminal.fs.writeFile(destEntry, content);
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Copy failed, using fallback', err);
      const entries = await terminal.fs.readdir(sourcePath, { withFileTypes: true });
      await terminal.fs.mkdir(destPath, { recursive: true });
      for (const entry of entries) {
        const srcEntry = `${sourcePath}/${entry.name}`;
        const destEntry = `${destPath}/${entry.name}`;
        if (entry.isDirectory()) {
          await copyTerminalToTerminal(srcEntry, destEntry);
        } else {
          const content = await terminal.fs.readFile(srcEntry);
          await terminal.fs.writeFile(destEntry, content);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return null;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/CreateFolderDialog.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface CreateFolderDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  panelId: string;
}

export function CreateFolderDialog({ open, onOpenChange, panelId }: CreateFolderDialogProps) {
  const [folderName, setFolderName] = useState('');
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    if (!folderName.trim() || !panel?.handle) return;
    
    setIsCreating(true);
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(panel.handle, folderName.trim());
      // Refresh will happen via parent component
      onOpenChange(false);
      setFolderName('');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to create folder:', err);
    } finally {
      setIsCreating(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Create New Folder</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            Enter a name for the new folder.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        
        <div className="py-4">
          <Input
            placeholder="Folder name"
            value={folderName}
            onChange={(e) => setFolderName(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCreate();
            }}
            autoFocus
          />
        </div>

        <DialogFooter>
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button 
            onClick={handleCreate} 
            disabled={!folderName.trim() || isCreating}
          >
            {isCreating ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}
          </Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileList.tsx =====

import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen } from 'lucide-react';
import { memo, useCallback, useRef, useEffect, useState, useMemo, forwardRef } from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface FileListProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
  isLiveMode?: boolean;
}

// ==========================================
// CONFIGURATION
// ==========================================
const ITEM_HEIGHT = 56;
const OVERSCAN = 5;
const CONTAINER_ESTIMATE = 800;

// ==========================================
// MEMOIZED FORMATTERS
// ==========================================
const formatExactDate = (() => {
  const cache = new Map<number, string>();
  return (date: Date | undefined): string => {
    if (!date) return 'Unknown';
    const time = date.getTime();
    if (cache.has(time)) return cache.get(time)!;
    
    const d = new Date(date);
    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Invalid';
    
    const formatted = `${d.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0')}/${(d.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0')}/${d.getFullYear()} ${d.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${d.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${d.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
    
    if (cache.size > 1000) cache.delete(cache.keys().next().value);
    cache.set(time, formatted);
    return formatted;
  };
})();

const formatMobileSize = (() => {
  const fmt = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { maximumFractionDigits: 1 });
  return (bytes: number): string => {
    if (bytes === 0) return '-';
    if (bytes < 1024) return `${bytes} B`;
    
    const units = ['KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
    let size = bytes / 1024;
    let unitIndex = 0;
    
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    
    return `${fmt.format(size)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  };
})();

// ==========================================
// ITEM COMPONENT
// ==========================================
interface FileListItemProps {
  entry: FileSystemEntry;
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  style: React.CSSProperties;
}

const FileListItem = memo(forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, FileListItemProps>(
  ({ entry, onNavigate, style }, ref) => {
    const isDirectory = entry.kind === 'directory';

    const handleClick = useCallback(() => {
      if (isDirectory) {
        onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
      }
    }, [isDirectory, entry, onNavigate]);

    return (
      <div
        ref={ref}
        style={style}
        className={cn(
          "flex items-center px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent/60 cursor-pointer",
          "border-b border-border/50 transition-colors duration-150",
          "active:bg-accent/80"
        )}
        onClick={handleClick}
        role="listitem"
        aria-label={`${isDirectory ? 'Folder' : 'File'} ${entry.name}`}
      >
        <div className="shrink-0 mr-3">
          {isDirectory ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="text-sm font-medium truncate leading-tight">
            {entry.name}
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-2">
            <span>{isDirectory ? 'Folder' : formatMobileSize(entry.size)}</span>
            <span className="w-1 h-1 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground/50" />
            <span>{formatExactDate(entry.lastModified)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }
));
FileListItem.displayName = 'FileListItem';

// ==========================================
// MAIN VIRTUALIZED LIST
// ==========================================
export const FileList = memo(function FileList({ entries, onNavigate, panelId }: FileListProps) {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [viewport, setViewport] = useState({
    startIndex: 0,
    endIndex: 50,
    height: Math.max(entries.length * ITEM_HEIGHT, CONTAINER_ESTIMATE)
  });

  const totalHeight = useMemo(() => entries.length * ITEM_HEIGHT, [entries.length]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!container) return;

    let rafId: number;
    
    const updateViewport = () => {
      if (rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
      
      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        const scrollTop = container.scrollTop;
        const clientHeight = container.clientHeight;
        
        const startIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(scrollTop / ITEM_HEIGHT) - OVERSCAN);
        const endIndex = Math.min(
          entries.length,
          Math.ceil((scrollTop + clientHeight) / ITEM_HEIGHT) + OVERSCAN
        );
        
        setViewport(prev => {
          if (prev.startIndex !== startIndex || prev.endIndex !== endIndex) {
            return { startIndex, endIndex, height: totalHeight };
          }
          return prev;
        });
      });
    };

    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(updateViewport);
    resizeObserver.observe(container);
    container.addEventListener('scroll', updateViewport, { passive: true });
    
    updateViewport();

    return () => {
      if (rafId) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
      resizeObserver.disconnect();
      container.removeEventListener('scroll', updateViewport);
    };
  }, [entries.length, totalHeight]);

  const visibleItems = useMemo(() => {
    return entries.slice(viewport.startIndex, viewport.endIndex);
  }, [entries, viewport.startIndex, viewport.endIndex]);

  if (entries.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground" role="status">
        <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-30" />
        <p className="text-sm font-medium">Empty folder</p>
        <p className="text-xs mt-1 opacity-70">No items to display</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div 
      ref={containerRef} 
      className="h-full w-full overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden relative"
      style={{ 
        contain: 'strict',
        willChange: 'scroll-position'
      }}
      role="list"
      aria-label="File list"
    >
      <div style={{ height: `${totalHeight}px`, position: 'relative' }}>
        {visibleItems.map((entry, index) => {
          const actualIndex = viewport.startIndex + index;
          const top = actualIndex * ITEM_HEIGHT;

          return (
            <FileListItem
              key={`${entry.name}-${actualIndex}`}
              entry={entry}
              onNavigate={onNavigate}
              style={{
                position: 'absolute',
                top: 0,
                transform: `translateY(${top}px)`,
                left: 0,
                right: 0,
                height: ITEM_HEIGHT,
                willChange: 'transform'
              }}
            />
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
});


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/FileGrid.tsx =====

import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { File, FolderOpen, Pencil, Home } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState, memo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';

interface FileGridProps {
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  panelId: string;
  isLiveMode?: boolean;
}

// Format exact datetime: 14/04/2026 19:23:45
function formatExactDate(date: Date | undefined): string {
  if (!date) return 'Unknown';
  const d = new Date(date);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Invalid';
  
  const day = d.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const month = (d.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const year = d.getFullYear();
  const hours = d.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const minutes = d.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const seconds = d.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  
  return `${day}/${month}/${year} ${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`;
}

// Format size like mobile: 3.4 MB, 14 KB, etc
function formatMobileSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  if (bytes < 1024) return `${bytes} B`;
  
  const units = ['KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes / 1024;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

interface GridItemProps {
  entry: FileSystemEntry;
  onNavigate: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => void;
  onHomeDoubleClick: () => void;
  onRename: (entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  isRenaming: boolean;
  renameValue: string;
  setRenameValue: (val: string) => void;
  onRenameComplete: () => void;
  onRenameCancel: () => void;
}

const GridItem = memo(function GridItem({ 
  entry, 
  onNavigate, 
  onHomeDoubleClick,
  onRename,
  isRenaming,
  renameValue,
  setRenameValue,
  onRenameComplete,
  onRenameCancel
}: GridItemProps) {
  const handleClick = useCallback(() => {
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      onNavigate(entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry);
    }
  }, [entry, onNavigate]);

  return (
    <div className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative">
      {/* Rename button */}
      <button
        onClick={(e) => onRename(entry, e)}
        className="absolute top-2 right-2 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-accent rounded transition-opacity z-10"
      >
        <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
      </button>

      {/* Double-click home indicator */}
      <div className="absolute top-2 left-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 z-10">
        <Home className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground" />
      </div>

      {/* FULL TILE CLICKABLE AREA */}
      <div
        className="flex flex-col items-center w-full cursor-pointer"
        onClick={handleClick}
        onDoubleClick={onHomeDoubleClick}
      >
        <div className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
          {entry.kind === 'directory' ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-10 h-10" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-10 h-10" />
          )}
        </div>

        {isRenaming ? (
          <div className="w-full" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <input
              type="text"
              value={renameValue}
              onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full text-xs border rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-center"
              autoFocus
              onKeyDown={(e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') onRenameComplete();
                if (e.key === 'Escape') onRenameCancel();
              }}
              onBlur={onRenameCancel}
            />
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center" title={entry.name}>
              {entry.name}
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1 text-center">
              {entry.kind === 'file' ? formatMobileSize(entry.size) : 'Folder'}
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
              {formatExactDate(entry.lastModified)}
            </p>
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
});

export const FileGrid = memo(function FileGrid({ entries, onNavigate, panelId, isLiveMode }: FileGridProps) {
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelHandle = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelHandle);
  const panel = usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(panelId));

  const handleDoubleClickHome = useCallback(() => {
    if (panel) {
      if (panel.source === 'storage') {
        setPanelHandle(panelId, null);
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      } else if (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github' || panel.source === 'terminal') {
        setPanelPath(panelId, '/');
      }
    }
  }, [panel, panelId, setPanelHandle, setPanelPath]);

  const startRename = useCallback((entry: FileSystemEntry, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setRenamingId(entry.name);
    setRenameValue(entry.name);
  }, []);

  const handleRenameComplete = useCallback(() => {
    setRenamingId(null);
    setRenameValue('');
  }, []);

  const handleRenameCancel = useCallback(() => {
    setRenamingId(null);
    setRenameValue('');
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-3 overflow-y-auto h-full">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <GridItem
          key={entry.name}
          entry={entry}
          onNavigate={onNavigate}
          onHomeDoubleClick={handleDoubleClickHome}
          onRename={startRename}
          isRenaming={renamingId === entry.name}
          renameValue={renameValue}
          setRenameValue={setRenameValue}
          onRenameComplete={handleRenameComplete}
          onRenameCancel={handleRenameCancel}
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
});


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/PlusButton.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, FolderPlus, FilePlus, UserPlus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider';

interface PlusButtonProps {
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentPath: string;
  isRoot: boolean;
  handle?: any;
  accountId?: string;
  onSuccess?: () => void;
}

interface ActionOption {
  type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount';
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  allowed: boolean;
}

const INVALID_FILENAME_CHARS = /[<>:"/\\|?*\x00-\x1f]/;
const RESERVED_NAMES = /^(con|prn|aux|nul|com[0-9]|lpt[0-9])$/i;
const MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH = 255;

function validateFileName(name: string): { valid: boolean; error?: string } {
  const trimmed = name.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return { valid: false, error: 'Name is required' };
  if (trimmed.length > MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH) return { valid: false, error: `Name too long (max ${MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH} characters)` };
  if (INVALID_FILENAME_CHARS.test(trimmed)) return { valid: false, error: 'Name contains invalid characters: < > : " / \\ | ? *' };
  if (RESERVED_NAMES.test(trimmed)) return { valid: false, error: 'Name is reserved by system' };
  if (trimmed === '.' || trimmed === '..') return { valid: false, error: 'Invalid name' };
  if (trimmed.includes('..') || trimmed.startsWith('/') || trimmed.startsWith('\\')) return { valid: false, error: 'Name cannot contain path traversal sequences' };
  return { valid: true };
}

function sanitizeTerminalPath(currentPath: string, name: string): string {
  const safeCurrent = currentPath.replace(/\x00/g, '');
  const safeName = name.replace(/\x00/g, '');
  const normalizedPath = safeCurrent.replace(/\\/g, '/');
  const normalizedName = safeName.replace(/\\/g, '/');
  const segments = normalizedPath.split('/').filter(s => s && s !== '.');
  const nameSegments = normalizedName.split('/').filter(s => s && s !== '.');
  if (nameSegments.some(s => s === '..')) throw new Error('Path traversal detected');
  if (normalizedPath === '/') return `/${normalizedName}`;
  return `${normalizedPath}/${normalizedName}`;
}

export function PlusButton({ panelId, sourceType, currentPath, isRoot, handle, accountId, onSuccess }: PlusButtonProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [actionType, setActionType] = useState<'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount' | null>(null);
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const { login } = useGoogleDriveAuth();

  const getOptions = (): ActionOption[] => {
    const options: ActionOption[] = [];
    if (isRoot && (sourceType === 'drive' || sourceType === 'github')) {
      options.push({ type: 'addAccount', label: 'Add Account', icon: UserPlus, allowed: true });
    }
    if (!isRoot) {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId && !isRoot) {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
      if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        options.push({ type: 'folder', label: 'Create Folder', icon: FolderPlus, allowed: true });
        options.push({ type: 'file', label: 'Create File', icon: FilePlus, allowed: true });
      }
    }
    return options;
  };

  const options = getOptions();
  const allowedOptions = options.filter(opt => opt.allowed);
  if (allowedOptions.length === 0) return null;

  const handleActionClick = (type: 'folder' | 'file' | 'addAccount') => {
    if (type === 'addAccount') {
      executeAddAccount();
    } else {
      setActionType(type);
      setIsOpen(true);
      setError('');
      setName('');
    }
  };

  const executeAddAccount = async () => {
    if (sourceType === 'drive') {
      try {
        await login();
        onSuccess?.();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Drive login error:', err);
        setError('Failed to initiate Google login');
      }
    } else if (sourceType === 'github') {
      setActionType('addAccount');
      setIsOpen(true);
    }
  };

  const handleCreate = async () => {
    const validation = validateFileName(name);
    if (!validation.valid) {
      setError(validation.error || 'Invalid name');
      return;
    }
    const safeName = name.trim();
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      if (sourceType === 'storage' && handle) {
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(handle, safeName);
        } else {
          const emptyBlob = new Blob([''], { type: 'text/plain' });
          await fileSystemBackend.writeFile(handle, safeName, emptyBlob);
        }
      } else if (sourceType === 'drive' && accountId) {
        // Drive operations...
      } else if (sourceType === 'github' && accountId) {
        await createGitHubItemSecure(accountId, currentPath, safeName, actionType === 'folder');
      } else if (sourceType === 'terminal') {
        const terminal = webcontainerApi.getInstance();
        if (!terminal) throw new Error('WebContainer not available');
        const fullPath = sanitizeTerminalPath(currentPath, safeName);
        if (actionType === 'folder') {
          await terminal.fs.mkdir(fullPath, { recursive: true });
        } else {
          await terminal.fs.writeFile(fullPath, '');
        }
      }
      setIsOpen(false);
      setName('');
      setActionType(null);
      onSuccess?.();
    } catch (err) {
      const errorMsg = (err as Error).message || 'Unknown error';
      setError(errorMsg.replace(/[<>]/g, ''));
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const createGitHubItemSecure = async (accountId: string, path: string, name: string, isFolder: boolean) => {
    const account = useGitHubStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
    if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');
    const { Octokit } = await import('@octokit/rest');
    const octokit = new Octokit({ auth: account.token });
    const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    const repo = parts[1];
    if (!repo) throw new Error('Invalid repository path');
    const repoPath = parts.slice(2).join('/');
    const fullPath = repoPath ? `${repoPath}/${name}` : name;
    if (fullPath.includes('..')) throw new Error('Invalid path');
    const content = isFolder ? '' : '';
    const message = isFolder ? `Create folder ${name}` : `Create file ${name}`;
    const pathToCreate = isFolder ? `${fullPath}/.gitkeep` : fullPath;
    await octokit.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner: accountId,
      repo,
      path: pathToCreate,
      message,
      content: Buffer.from(content).toString('base64'),
    });
  };

  const showMenu = allowedOptions.length > 1;

  if (!showMenu) {
    const opt = allowedOptions[0];
    return (
      <>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-8" onClick={() => handleActionClick(opt.type)}>
          <opt.icon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          {opt.label}
        </Button>
        <CreationDialog
          isOpen={isOpen}
          onClose={() => { setIsOpen(false); setError(''); setName(''); }}
          type={actionType}
          name={name}
          setName={setName}
          isLoading={isLoading}
          error={error}
          onCreate={handleCreate}
          panelId={panelId}
        />
      </>
    );
  }

  return (
    <>
      <div className="relative">
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-8" onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          New
        </Button>
        {isOpen && (
          <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 rounded-md shadow-lg bg-popover border border-border z-50">
            <div className="py-1">
              {allowedOptions.map(opt => (
                <button
                  key={opt.type}
                  className="flex items-center w-full px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
                  onClick={() => { handleActionClick(opt.type); setIsOpen(false); }}
                >
                  <opt.icon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  {opt.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <CreationDialog
        isOpen={isOpen && actionType !== null && actionType !== 'addAccount'}
        onClose={() => { setIsOpen(false); setError(''); setName(''); }}
        type={actionType}
        name={name}
        setName={setName}
        isLoading={isLoading}
        error={error}
        onCreate={handleCreate}
        panelId={panelId}
      />
    </>
  );
}

function CreationDialog({ isOpen, onClose, type, name, setName, isLoading, error, onCreate, panelId }: any) {
  if (!isOpen || !type) return null;
  const title = type === 'folder' ? 'Create Folder' : 'Create File';
  const placeholder = type === 'folder' ? 'MyFolder' : 'file.txt';
  return (
    <PanelDialog isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} panelId={panelId} title={title}>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <Label htmlFor="filename">Name</Label>
          <Input
            id="filename"
            value={name}
            onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={placeholder}
            autoFocus
            onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !isLoading) onCreate(); }}
            autoComplete="off"
            spellCheck={false}
          />
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            Max 255 chars. Cannot contain: &lt; &gt; : &quot; / \ | ? *
          </p>
        </div>
        {error && <div className="text-sm text-destructive bg-destructive/10 p-2 rounded">{error}</div>}
        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isLoading}>Cancel</Button>
          <Button onClick={onCreate} disabled={isLoading || !name.trim()}>{isLoading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create'}</Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </PanelDialog>
  );
}

async function createDriveFolder(accessToken: string, parentId: string, name: string) {
  if (!accessToken || !parentId || !name) throw new Error('Missing required parameters');
  const validation = validateFileName(name);
  if (!validation.valid) throw new Error(validation.error);
  const metadata = { name: name.trim(), mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder', parents: [parentId] };
  const res = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify(metadata),
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to create Drive folder: ${await res.text()}`);
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/Toolbar.tsx =====

import { 
  Grid3X3, 
  List, 
  ArrowLeft, 
  RefreshCw,
  ChevronDown,
  ArrowUpDown,
  Settings2,
  Activity
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { PlusButton } from './PlusButton';
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';

interface ToolbarProps {
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  canGoBack: boolean;
  isLoading: boolean;
  currentPath: string;
  panelId: string;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelHandle?: any;
  accountId?: string;
  onRefreshComplete?: () => void;
  sortingScope?: 'current' | 'full';
  onSortingScopeChange?: (scope: 'current' | 'full') => void;
  // Live mode props
  isLiveMode?: boolean;
  onToggleLiveMode?: (interval?: number) => void;
  pollInterval?: number;
}

const sortLabels: Record<SortBy, string> = {
  'name-asc': 'Name (A-Z)',
  'name-desc': 'Name (Z-A)',
  'date': 'Date Modified',
  'size': 'Size',
};

export function Toolbar({ 
  viewMode, 
  onViewModeChange, 
  sortBy, 
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  canGoBack,
  isLoading,
  currentPath,
  panelId,
  sourceType,
  panelHandle,
  accountId,
  onRefreshComplete,
  sortingScope = 'current',
  onSortingScopeChange,
  isLiveMode,
  onToggleLiveMode,
  pollInterval = 5000,
}: ToolbarProps) {
  const [showAutoRefreshDialog, setShowAutoRefreshDialog] = useState(false);
  const [autoRefreshSeconds, setAutoRefreshSeconds] = useState(Math.max(5, Math.floor(pollInterval / 1000)));
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const isLongPress = useRef(false);

  // Handle long press detection
  const handleMouseDown = () => {
    isLongPress.current = false;
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      isLongPress.current = true;
      setShowAutoRefreshDialog(true);
    }, 500); // 500ms for long press
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleRefreshClick = () => {
    // If it was a long press, don't trigger normal refresh
    if (isLongPress.current) return;
    onRefresh();
    onRefreshComplete?.();
  };

  const startAutoRefresh = () => {
    const intervalMs = autoRefreshSeconds * 1000;
    onToggleLiveMode?.(intervalMs);
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
  };

  const stopAutoRefresh = () => {
    onToggleLiveMode?.(0); // 0 means stop
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
  };

  const handleSortChangeWithScope = (sort: SortBy) => {
    onSortChange(sort);
    if (sortingScope === 'full') {
      localStorage.setItem(`sort_${panelId}`, sort);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      {/* Left: Navigation */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="icon"
          onClick={onNavigateBack}
          disabled={!canGoBack}
          className="h-8 w-8 shrink-0"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-2 min-w-0">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground truncate">
            {currentPath === '/' ? 'Root' : currentPath}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right: Actions */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
        {/* Context-aware Plus Button */}
        <PlusButton
          panelId={panelId}
          sourceType={sourceType}
          currentPath={currentPath}
          isRoot={currentPath === '/'}
          handle={panelHandle}
          accountId={accountId}
          onSuccess={() => {
            onRefresh();
            onRefreshComplete?.();
          }}
        />

        {/* Refresh button with long-press for live mode */}
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          onClick={handleRefreshClick}
          onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
          onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
          onMouseLeave={handleMouseUp}
          onTouchStart={handleMouseDown}
          onTouchEnd={handleMouseUp}
          disabled={isLoading}
          className="h-8 w-8 relative"
          title={isLiveMode ? `Live mode ON (${pollInterval/1000}s) - Long press to change` : 'Refresh (Long press for auto-refresh)'}
        >
          <RefreshCw className={`h-4 w-4 ${isLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
          {isLiveMode && (
            <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
          )}
        </Button>

        {/* Sorting dropdown */}
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-asc')}>
              Name (A-Z)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('name-desc')}>
              Name (Z-A)
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('date')}>
              Date Modified
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleSortChangeWithScope('size')}>
              Size
            </DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            <DropdownMenuSub>
              <DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
                <Settings2 className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                Sorting Scope
              </DropdownMenuSubTrigger>
              <DropdownMenuSubContent>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('current')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Current folder only</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'current' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">Ō£ō</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortingScopeChange?.('full')}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full">
                    <span>Full panel (persistent)</span>
                    {sortingScope === 'full' && <span className="text-primary ml-2">Ō£ō</span>}
                  </div>
                </DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuSubContent>
            </DropdownMenuSub>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        {/* View mode toggle */}
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md ml-1">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="Grid view"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
            aria-label="List view"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Live Mode / Auto-refresh dialog */}
      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showAutoRefreshDialog}
        onClose={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}
        panelId={panelId}
        title="Live Auto-Refresh Mode"
      >
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Activity className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span>Monitor Termux filesystem changes in real-time</span>
          </div>
          
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="interval">Refresh Interval (seconds)</Label>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
              <Input
                id="interval"
                type="number"
                value={autoRefreshSeconds}
                onChange={(e) => setAutoRefreshSeconds(Math.max(5, Number(e.target.value)))}
                min={5}
                className="flex-1"
              />
              <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">seconds</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
              Minimum: 5 seconds ŌĆó No maximum limit
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {isLiveMode ? (
              <Button variant="destructive" onClick={stopAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Stop Live Mode
              </Button>
            ) : (
              <Button onClick={startAutoRefresh} className="flex-1">
                Start Live Mode
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/FileManager/index.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Toolbar } from './Toolbar';
import { FileGrid } from './FileGrid';
import { FileList } from './FileList';
import { CreateFolderDialog } from './CreateFolderDialog';
import { useFileSystemStore, useEntries, useViewMode, useSortBy, useCurrentHandle } from '@/stores/fileSystemStore';
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';

export function FileManager({ panelId }: { panelId: string }) {
  const [createDialogOpen, setCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  
  const entries = useEntries();
  const viewMode = useViewMode();
  const sortBy = useSortBy();
  const currentHandle = useCurrentHandle();
  const setViewMode = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setViewMode);
  const setSortBy = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.setSortBy);
  const initMountPoints = useFileSystemStore((s) => s.initMountPoints);

  useEffect(() => {
    initMountPoints();
  }, [initMountPoints]);

  const handleViewModeChange = (mode: ViewMode) => setViewMode(mode);
  const handleSortChange = (sort: SortBy) => setSortBy(sort);

  if (!currentHandle) {
    return <div>Select a mount point</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <Toolbar
        viewMode={viewMode}
        onViewModeChange={handleViewModeChange}
        sortBy={sortBy}
        onSortChange={handleSortChange}
        onNavigateBack={() => {}}
        onRefresh={() => {}}
        canGoBack={false}
        isLoading={false}
        currentPath="/"
        panelId={panelId}
        sourceType="storage"
      />
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {entries.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p>Empty folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <FileGrid entries={entries} onNavigate={() => {}} panelId={panelId} />
        ) : (
          <FileList entries={entries} onNavigate={() => {}} panelId={panelId} />
        )}
      </div>
      <CreateFolderDialog open={createDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setCreateDialogOpen} panelId={panelId} />
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Format/FormatDialog.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { AlertTriangle, Clock, Key, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';

interface FormatDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  itemName: string;
  itemType: 'account' | 'storage' | 'github' | 'drive' | 'terminal';
  itemId: string;
  onFormat: () => Promise<void>;
}

export function FormatDialog({ isOpen, onClose, itemName, itemType, itemId, onFormat }: FormatDialogProps) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'confirm' | 'timer' | 'password' | 'executing'>('confirm');
  const [timer, setTimer] = useState(30);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const verifyActionPassword = useAuthStore((s) => s.verifyActionPassword);

  // Load timer from settings (default 30)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      const settings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('settings') || '{}');
      const formatTimer = settings.formatTimer || 30;
      setTimer(formatTimer);
      setStep('confirm');
      setPassword('');
      setError('');
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval: NodeJS.Timeout;
    if (step === 'timer' && timer > 0) {
      interval = setInterval(() => setTimer(prev => prev - 1), 1000);
    } else if (step === 'timer' && timer === 0) {
      setStep('password');
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [step, timer]);

  const handleConfirm = () => setStep('timer');
  const handlePasswordSubmit = async () => {
    if (!verifyActionPassword('format', password)) {
      setError('Invalid password');
      return;
    }
    setStep('executing');
    try {
      await onFormat();
      onClose();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setStep('password');
    }
  };

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-destructive/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-destructive" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-destructive">Format {itemType}</h2>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4">
          {step === 'confirm' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <p className="text-sm">
                You are about to <span className="font-bold text-destructive">PERMANENTLY DELETE</span> all data in:
              </p>
              <div className="p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg">
                <p className="font-mono text-sm break-all">{itemName}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Type: {itemType}</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">This action is <span className="font-bold">IRREVERSIBLE</span>.</p>
              <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleConfirm}>Continue</Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'timer' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />
              <p className="text-sm">Wait {timer} seconds to confirm format</p>
              <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-2">
                <div
                  className="bg-destructive h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000"
                  style={{ width: `${((30 - timer) / 30) * 100}%` }}
                />
              </div>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'password' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Key className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                <p className="text-sm">Enter format password to continue</p>
              </div>
              <Input
                type="password"
                value={password}
                onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Format password"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handlePasswordSubmit()}
              />
              {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
                <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handlePasswordSubmit} disabled={!password}>
                  Confirm Format
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {step === 'executing' && (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-center">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
              <p className="text-sm">Formatting {itemName}...</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">This may take a few moments</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/AccountSelector.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Github, MoreVertical, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

export function AccountSelector() {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  // SECURITY: Validate GitHub username format
  const validateUsername = (name: string): boolean => {
    // GitHub usernames: alphanumeric with hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, 
    // not starting/ending with hyphen, max 39 chars
    const usernameRegex = /^[a-zA-Z0-9](?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,37}[a-zA-Z0-9])?$/;
    return usernameRegex.test(name) && name.length <= 39;
  };

  // SECURITY: Validate token format (GitHub PATs are typically ghp_... or github_pat_...)
  const validateToken = (tok: string): boolean => {
    if (!tok || tok.length < 10) return false;
    // Basic check for common GitHub token prefixes
    const validPrefixes = ['ghp_', 'github_pat_', 'gho_', 'ghu_', 'ghs_', 'ghr_'];
    return validPrefixes.some(prefix => tok.startsWith(prefix)) || 
           /^[a-f0-9]{40}$/.test(tok); // Legacy 40-char hex tokens
  };

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    // SECURITY: Validate inputs before submission
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) {
      setError('Username and token are required');
      return;
    }

    const trimmedUsername = username.trim();
    const trimmedToken = token.trim();

    if (!validateUsername(trimmedUsername)) {
      setError('Invalid GitHub username format');
      return;
    }

    if (!validateToken(trimmedToken)) {
      setError('Invalid token format. GitHub tokens should start with ghp_, github_pat_, etc.');
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');

    try {
      // SECURITY: Test token before saving (optional but recommended)
      const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user', {
        headers: {
          'Authorization': `Bearer ${trimmedToken}`,
          'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'
        }
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        if (response.status === 401) {
          throw new Error('Invalid token or unauthorized');
        }
        throw new Error(`GitHub API error: ${response.status}`);
      }

      const userData = await response.json();
      
      // SECURITY: Verify username matches
      if (userData.login.toLowerCase() !== trimmedUsername.toLowerCase()) {
        throw new Error('Token does not match the specified username');
      }

      await addAccount(trimmedUsername, trimmedToken);
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
          <Github className="h-5 w-5" />
          GitHub Accounts
        </h2>
        <Button size="sm" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          Add
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        {accounts.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center text-muted-foreground">
            <Github className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <p>No accounts connected</p>
            <Button 
              variant="outline" 
              size="sm" 
              onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}
              className="mt-4"
            >
              Add Account
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div
                key={account.id}
                onClick={() => setActiveAccount(account.id)}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors group"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.avatarUrl ? (
                    <img
                      src={account.avatarUrl}
                      alt={account.id}
                      className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full"
                      onError={(e) => {
                        (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none';
                      }}
                    />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Github className="h-5 w-5" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      Click to browse repositories
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <DropdownMenu>
                  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-8 w-8 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                      onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    >
                      <MoreVertical className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                  <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                    <DropdownMenuItem 
                      className="text-destructive focus:text-destructive"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        removeAccount(account.id);
                      }}
                    >
                      Remove Account
                    </DropdownMenuItem>
                  </DropdownMenuContent>
                </DropdownMenu>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* SECURITY: Custom dialog instead of prompt() for sensitive input */}
      <Dialog open={showAddForm} onOpenChange={setShowAddForm}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Add GitHub Account</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              Enter your GitHub username and Personal Access Token.
              Tokens are stored in memory only and never persisted to disk.
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          
          <div className="space-y-4 py-4">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="username">Username</Label>
              <Input
                id="username"
                value={username}
                onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="octocat"
                autoComplete="off"
                spellCheck={false}
              />
            </div>
            
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="token">Personal Access Token</Label>
              <Input
                id="token"
                type="password"
                value={token}
                onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
                autoComplete="new-password"
                // SECURITY: Prevent browser password managers from storing this
                data-lpignore="true"
                data-1p-ignore="true"
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                Token needs <code>repo</code> and <code>read:user</code> scopes.
                Get one at GitHub Settings ŌåÆ Developer settings ŌåÆ Personal access tokens
              </p>
            </div>
            
            {error && (
              <div className="text-sm text-destructive bg-destructive/10 p-2 rounded">
                {error}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => {
              setShowAddForm(false);
              setError('');
              setUsername('');
              setToken('');
            }}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>
              {isLoading ? 'Verifying...' : 'Add Account'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/FileViewer.tsx =====

import { X, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

interface FileViewerProps {
  content: string | null;
  fileName: string | null;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function FileViewer({ content, fileName, onClose }: FileViewerProps) {
  if (!content || !fileName) return null;

  const isText = fileName.match(/\.(txt|js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|md|css|html|xml|sh|py|rb|go|java|c|cpp|h|hpp|yml|yaml)$/i);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col border-l border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{fileName}</span>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={onClose}>
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
        {isText ? (
          <pre className="text-sm font-mono whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
            {content}
          </pre>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">Preview not available for binary files</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/ContentList.tsx =====

import { GitHubContent } from '@/types/github';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { DFOLMenu } from '../DFOL/DFOLMenu';
import { TreeIconButton } from '../Tree/TreeIconButton';

interface ContentListProps {
  contents: GitHubContent[];
  onFileClick?: (file: GitHubContent) => void;
  onFolderClick?: (folder: GitHubContent) => void;
}

export function ContentList({ contents, onFileClick, onFolderClick }: ContentListProps) {
  const handleClick = (item: GitHubContent) => {
    if (item.type === 'dir') {
      onFolderClick?.(item);
    } else {
      onFileClick?.(item);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {contents.map((item) => (
        <div
          key={item.path}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => handleClick(item)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {item.type === 'dir' ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{item.name}</span>
            {item.type === 'file' && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(item.size)}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
            <TreeIconButton
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              className="h-7 w-7 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
            />
            <DFOLMenu
              item={item}
              sourceType="github"
              panelId="github-panel"
              onRename={() => {}}
              onDelete={() => {}}
              onTreeView={() => {}}
            />
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/GitHubPanel.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { AccountSelector } from './AccountSelector';
import { RepoList } from './RepoList';
import { ContentList } from './ContentList';
import { FileViewer } from './FileViewer';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubRepositories, useGitHubContentsForPanel, useGitHubViewModeForPanel, useGitHubSortByForPanel, useGitHubCurrentRepoForPanel, useGitHubFileContentForPanel, useGitHubErrorForPanel, useGitHubIsLoadingForPanel } from '@/stores/githubStore';

interface GitHubPanelProps {
  panelId: string;
}

function GitHubPanelContent({ panelId }: GitHubPanelProps) {
  const repos = useGitHubRepositories();
  const contents = useGitHubContentsForPanel(panelId);
  const viewMode = useGitHubViewModeForPanel(panelId);
  const sortBy = useGitHubSortByForPanel(panelId);
  const activeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
  const currentRepo = useGitHubCurrentRepoForPanel(panelId);
  const fileContent = useGitHubFileContentForPanel(panelId);
  const fileName = useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).fileName);
  const error = useGitHubErrorForPanel(panelId);
  const isLoading = useGitHubIsLoadingForPanel(panelId);
  
  const {
    initPanelState,
    loadAccounts,
    loadRepositories,
    selectRepositoryForPanel,
    navigateToPathForPanel,
    refreshCurrentForPanel,
    setActiveAccount,
    openFileForPanel,
    closeFileForPanel,
  } = useGitHubStore();

  useEffect(() => {
    initPanelState(panelId);
  }, [panelId, initPanelState]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadAccounts();
  }, [loadAccounts]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeAccount && repos.length === 0 && !currentRepo) {
      loadRepositories();
    }
  }, [activeAccount, repos.length, currentRepo, loadRepositories]);

  // Sort repos/contents based on sortBy
  const sortedRepos = useMemo(() => {
    const sorted = [...repos];
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      default:
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    }
  }, [repos, sortBy]);

  const sortedContents = useMemo(() => {
    const sorted = [...contents];
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      default:
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    }
  }, [contents, sortBy]);

  if (!activeAccount) {
    return <AccountSelector />;
  }

  const currentView = currentRepo ? 'contents' : 'repos';

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      {error && (
        <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm text-center">
          {error}
          <button 
            onClick={() => refreshCurrentForPanel(panelId)}
            className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline"
          >
            Retry
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-auto flex">
        <div className={`flex-1 ${fileContent ? 'hidden md:block md:w-1/2' : 'w-full'}`}>
          {currentView === 'repos' ? (
            repos.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
                <p className="text-sm">No repositories found</p>
              </div>
            ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4">
                {sortedRepos.map((repo) => (
                  <div
                    key={repo.id}
                    onClick={() => selectRepositoryForPanel(panelId, repo)}
                    className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
                  >
                    <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center mb-2">
                      <span className="text-lg font-bold text-primary">{repo.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={repo.name}>{repo.name}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{repo.private ? 'Private' : 'Public'}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <RepoList 
                repos={sortedRepos} 
                onRepoClick={(repo) => selectRepositoryForPanel(panelId, repo)} 
              />
            )
          ) : (
            sortedContents.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
                <p className="text-sm">Empty folder</p>
              </div>
            ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4">
                {sortedContents.map((item) => (
                  <div
                    key={item.path}
                    onClick={() => item.type === 'dir' ? navigateToPathForPanel(panelId, item.path) : openFileForPanel(panelId, item)}
                    className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
                  >
                    <div className="text-3xl mb-2">{item.type === 'dir' ? '­¤ōü' : '­¤ōä'}</div>
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={item.name}>{item.name}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{item.type === 'file' ? formatBytes(item.size) : 'Folder'}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <ContentList 
                contents={sortedContents} 
                onFolderClick={(folder) => navigateToPathForPanel(panelId, folder.path)}
                onFileClick={(file) => openFileForPanel(panelId, file)}
              />
            )
          )}
        </div>

        {fileContent && fileName && (
          <div className="w-full md:w-1/2 h-full">
            <FileViewer 
              content={fileContent} 
              fileName={fileName} 
              onClose={() => closeFileForPanel(panelId)} 
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (!bytes || bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

export function GitHubPanel({ panelId }: { panelId: string }) {
  return <GitHubPanelContent panelId={panelId} />;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/GitHubToolbar.tsx =====

import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, ArrowUpDown, LogOut } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { GitHubViewMode, GitHubSortBy } from '@/types/github';

interface GitHubToolbarProps {
  viewMode: GitHubViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: GitHubSortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  onLogout: () => void;
  currentView: 'repos' | 'contents';
}

export function GitHubToolbar({
  viewMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  sortBy,
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  onLogout,
  currentView,
}: GitHubToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        {currentView === 'contents' && (
          <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onNavigateBack} className="h-8 w-8">
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        )}
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onRefresh} className="h-8 w-8">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-desc')}>Name (Z-A)</DropdownMenuItem>
            {currentView === 'repos' && (
              <>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('updated')}>Recently Updated</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('stars')}>Stars</DropdownMenuItem>
              </>
            )}
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>

        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onLogout} className="h-8 w-8" title="Switch Account">
          <LogOut className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/RepoList.tsx =====

import { GitHubRepository } from '@/types/github';
import { Star, Clock, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface RepoListProps {
  repos: GitHubRepository[];
  onRepoClick?: (repo: GitHubRepository) => void;
}

export function RepoList({ repos, onRepoClick }: RepoListProps) {
  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {repos.map((repo) => (
        <div
          key={repo.id}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => onRepoClick?.(repo)}
        >
          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{repo.name}</span>
              {repo.private && (
                <span className="text-xs bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Private</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {repo.description && (
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 line-clamp-1">{repo.description}</p>
            )}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              {repo.language && (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <span className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-blue-500" />
                  {repo.language}
                </span>
              )}
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Star className="w-3 h-3" />
                {repo.stargazers_count}
              </span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(repo.updated_at), { addSuffix: true })}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GitHub/UsernameList.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
