import { Github, Plus, X, ChevronRight, Key } from 'lucide-react';
import { useGitHubStore, useGitHubAccounts } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface UsernameListProps {
  onUsernameSelect: (username: string) => void;
}

export function UsernameList({ onUsernameSelect }: UsernameListProps) {
  const accounts = useGitHubAccounts();
  const addAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const removeAccount = useGitHubStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [token, setToken] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    if (!username.trim() || !token.trim()) { setError('Username and token required'); return; }
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError('');
    try {
      await addAccount(username.trim(), token.trim());
      setShowAddForm(false);
      setUsername('');
      setToken('');
    } catch (err) { setError((err as Error).message); }
    finally { setIsLoading(false); }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">GitHub Accounts</h2>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{accounts.length} account{accounts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} connected</p>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        {accounts.length === 0 && !showAddForm ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center">
            <Github className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-3" />
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">No GitHub accounts connected</p>
            <button onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)} className="mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg text-sm">Add Account</button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div key={account.id} onClick={() => onUsernameSelect(account.id)} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-all group">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.avatarUrl ? <img src={account.avatarUrl} alt="" className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full" /> : <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center"><Github className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" /></div>}
                  <div><p className="font-medium">{account.id}</p><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground capitalize">{account.permissions}</p></div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                  <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (confirm(`Remove account ${account.id}?`)) removeAccount(account.id); }} className="p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"><X className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {showAddForm && (
              <div className="p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card space-y-3">
                <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">GitHub Username</label><Input value={username} onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)} placeholder="username" className="mt-1" /></div>
                <div><label className="text-sm font-medium">Personal Access Token</label><Input type="password" value={token} onChange={(e) => setToken(e.target.value)} placeholder="ghp_..." className="mt-1" /><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Needs <code>repo</code> and <code>read:user</code> scopes</p></div>
                {error && <p className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</p>}
                <div className="flex gap-2"><Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}>Cancel</Button><Button onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>{isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}</Button></div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      {accounts.length > 0 && !showAddForm && (
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border"><button onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)} className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors"><Plus className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-sm">Add Account</span></button></div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/AccountSelector.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Mail, MoreVertical, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useDriveStore, useDriveAccounts } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from './GoogleDriveProvider';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

interface AccountSelectorProps {
  onAccountSelect?: (accountId: string) => void;
}

export function AccountSelector({ onAccountSelect }: AccountSelectorProps) {
  const accounts = useDriveAccounts();
  const removeAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const setActiveAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const { login, isLoading } = useGoogleDriveAuth();

  const getDisplayName = (email: string) => email.split('@')[0];

  const handleAccountClick = (accountId: string) => {
    setActiveAccount(accountId);
    onAccountSelect?.(accountId);
  };

  const handleAddAccount = async () => {
    await login();
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="p-4 border-b border-border flex items-center justify-between">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
          <Mail className="h-5 w-5" />
          Google Drive Accounts
        </h2>
        <Button size="sm" onClick={handleAddAccount} disabled={isLoading}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
          {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Add'}
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4">
        {accounts.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center text-muted-foreground">
            <Mail className="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <p>No accounts connected</p>
            <Button 
              variant="outline" 
              size="sm" 
              onClick={handleAddAccount}
              disabled={isLoading}
              className="mt-4"
            >
              {isLoading ? 'Connecting...' : 'Add Account'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {accounts.map((account) => (
              <div
                key={account.id}
                onClick={() => handleAccountClick(account.id)}
                className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors group"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {account.picture ? (
                    <img src={account.picture} alt="" className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full" />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Mail className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-medium">{getDisplayName(account.id)}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{account.id}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <DropdownMenu>
                  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-8 w-8 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                      onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                    >
                      <MoreVertical className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
                  <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                    <DropdownMenuItem 
                      className="text-destructive focus:text-destructive"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        if (confirm(`Remove account ${getDisplayName(account.id)}?`)) {
                          removeAccount(account.id);
                        }
                      }}
                    >
                      Remove Account
                    </DropdownMenuItem>
                  </DropdownMenuContent>
                </DropdownMenu>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveFileGrid.tsx =====

import { DriveFile } from '@/types/drive';
import { FolderOpen, File } from 'lucide-react';

interface DriveFileGridProps {
  files: DriveFile[];
  onFolderClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
  onFileClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
}

export function DriveFileGrid({ files, onFolderClick, onFileClick }: DriveFileGridProps) {
  const isFolder = (file: DriveFile) => file.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder';

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 p-4">
      {files.map((file) => (
        <div
          key={file.id}
          className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
          onClick={() => (isFolder(file) ? onFolderClick(file) : onFileClick(file))}
        >
          {isFolder(file) ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 text-primary mb-2" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-2" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={file.name}>
            {file.name}
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            {isFolder(file) ? 'Folder' : formatBytes(parseInt(file.size || '0'))}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveFileList.tsx =====

import { DriveFile } from '@/types/drive';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface DriveFileListProps {
  files: DriveFile[];
  onFolderClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
  onFileClick: (file: DriveFile) => void;
}

export function DriveFileList({ files, onFolderClick, onFileClick }: DriveFileListProps) {
  const isFolder = (file: DriveFile) => file.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder';

  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {files.map((file) => (
        <div
          key={file.id}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => (isFolder(file) ? onFolderClick(file) : onFileClick(file))}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {isFolder(file) ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{file.name}</span>
            {!isFolder(file) && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(parseInt(file.size || '0'))}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
            <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(file.modifiedTime), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DrivePanel.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useRef, useMemo } from 'react';
import { AccountSelector } from './AccountSelector';
import { DriveFileGrid } from './DriveFileGrid';
import { DriveFileList } from './DriveFileList';
import { useDriveStore, useDriveFilesForPanel, useDriveViewModeForPanel, useDriveSortByForPanel, useDriveActiveAccount, useDriveErrorForPanel, useDriveAuthReady, useDriveIsLoadingForPanel } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { DriveFile, DriveSortBy } from '@/types/drive';
import { GoogleDriveProvider, useGoogleDriveAuth } from './GoogleDriveProvider';
import { login } from '@/lib/googleAuth';

interface DrivePanelProps {
  panelId: string;
}

function DrivePanelContent({ panelId }: DrivePanelProps) {
  const files = useDriveFilesForPanel(panelId);
  const viewMode = useDriveViewModeForPanel(panelId);
  const sortBy = useDriveSortByForPanel(panelId);
  const activeAccount = useDriveActiveAccount();
  const error = useDriveErrorForPanel(panelId);
  const authReady = useDriveAuthReady();
  const isLoading = useDriveIsLoadingForPanel(panelId);
  
  const {
    initPanelState,
    navigateToFolderForPanel,
    refreshCurrentForPanel,
    setActiveAccount,
    removeAccount,
    restoreToken,
  } = useDriveStore();

  const { login: oauthLogin, isLoading: authLoading } = useGoogleDriveAuth();
  const hasAttemptedAutoRefresh = useRef(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    initPanelState(panelId);
  }, [panelId, initPanelState]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!authReady) restoreToken();
  }, [authReady, restoreToken]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (authReady && activeAccount && !isLoading && files.length === 0 && !error && !hasAttemptedAutoRefresh.current) {
      hasAttemptedAutoRefresh.current = true;
      refreshCurrentForPanel(panelId);
    }
  }, [authReady, activeAccount, isLoading, files.length, error, refreshCurrentForPanel, panelId]);

  // Sort files based on sortBy
  const sortedFiles = useMemo(() => {
    const sorted = [...files];
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'modifiedTime':
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.modifiedTime).getTime() - new Date(a.modifiedTime).getTime());
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => (parseInt(b.size || '0') - parseInt(a.size || '0')));
      default:
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    }
  }, [files, sortBy]);

  if (!authReady) return <div className="h-full flex items-center justify-center">Loading Drive...</div>;
  if (!activeAccount) return <AccountSelector />;

  const handleFolderClick = (file: DriveFile) => navigateToFolderForPanel(panelId, file);
  const handleFileClick = (file: DriveFile) => { if (file.webViewLink) window.open(file.webViewLink, '_blank'); };
  const handleReauthenticate = async () => {
    if (activeAccount) {
      removeAccount(activeAccount.id);
      await oauthLogin();
    } else login();
  };
  const isTokenError = error && (error.includes('expired') || error.includes('invalid_token') || error.includes('401'));

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      {error && (
        <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-sm text-center">
          {error}
          {isTokenError ? (
            <button onClick={handleReauthenticate} disabled={authLoading} className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline font-medium">
              {authLoading ? 'Re-authenticating...' : 'Re-authenticate'}
            </button>
          ) : (
            <button onClick={() => refreshCurrentForPanel(panelId)} className="ml-2 underline hover:no-underline">Retry</button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {sortedFiles.length === 0 && !error ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-sm">Empty folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <DriveFileGrid files={sortedFiles} onFolderClick={handleFolderClick} onFileClick={handleFileClick} />
        ) : (
          <DriveFileList files={sortedFiles} onFolderClick={handleFolderClick} onFileClick={handleFileClick} />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function DrivePanel({ panelId }: { panelId: string }) {
  return (
    <GoogleDriveProvider>
      <DrivePanelContent panelId={panelId} />
    </GoogleDriveProvider>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/DriveToolbar.tsx =====

import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowUpDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,

  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { DriveViewMode, DriveSortBy } from '@/types/drive';

interface DriveToolbarProps {
  viewMode: DriveViewMode;
  sortBy: DriveSortBy;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: DriveViewMode) => void;
  onSortChange: (sort: DriveSortBy) => void;
}

export function DriveToolbar({ viewMode, sortBy, onViewModeChange, onSortChange }: DriveToolbarProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 border-b border-border">
      <Button
        variant={viewMode === 'grid' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
        size="icon"
        onClick={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
      >
        <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
      </Button>
      <Button
        variant={viewMode === 'list' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
        size="icon"
        onClick={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
      >
        <List className="w-4 h-4" />
      </Button>

      <DropdownMenu>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon">
            <ArrowUpDown className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>

          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('modifiedTime')}>Modified Time</DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('size')}>Size</DropdownMenuItem>
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>
    </div>
  );

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { GoogleOAuthProvider, useGoogleLogin } from '@react-oauth/google';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { driveApi } from '@/lib/googleDriveApi';

const CLIENT_ID = (import.meta as any).env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || '';

interface GoogleDriveProviderProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}

export function GoogleDriveProvider({ children }: GoogleDriveProviderProps) {
  return (
    <GoogleOAuthProvider clientId={CLIENT_ID}>
      {children}
    </GoogleOAuthProvider>
  );
}

// Hook for Google Login
export function useGoogleDriveAuth() {
  const addAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.addAccount);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const login = useGoogleLogin({
    onSuccess: async (tokenResponse) => {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        // Fetch user info
        const userInfoResponse = await fetch(
          'https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo',
          {
            headers: {
              Authorization: `Bearer ${tokenResponse.access_token}`,
            },
          }
        );
        
        if (!userInfoResponse.ok) {
          throw new Error('Failed to fetch user info');
        }

        const userInfo = await userInfoResponse.json();

        const account = {
          id: userInfo.email,
          name: userInfo.name,
          picture: userInfo.picture,
          accessToken: tokenResponse.access_token,
          expiresAt: Date.now() + (tokenResponse.expires_in || 3600) * 1000,
        };

        addAccount(account);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Login error:', err);
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    },
    onError: (error) => {
      console.error('Login Failed:', error);
    },
    scope: 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.file',
  });

  return { login, isLoading };
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Link/LinkButton.tsx =====

import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link, Copy, Check, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';

interface LinkOption {
  type: string;
  label: string;
  url: string;
}

interface LinkButtonProps {
  item: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    path: string;
    sourceType: 'drive' | 'github';
    accountId?: string;
    repo?: string;
    fileSha?: string;
    mimeType?: string;
  };
  panelId: string;
  onCopy?: (url: string) => void;
}

export function LinkButton({ item, panelId, onCopy }: LinkButtonProps) {
  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false);
  const [copiedType, setCopiedType] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [defaultLinkType, setDefaultLinkType] = useState<string>('view');
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(`default_link_${item.sourceType}_${item.id}`);
    if (saved) setDefaultLinkType(saved);
  }, [item.sourceType, item.id]);

  const generateLinks = (): LinkOption[] => {
    if (item.sourceType === 'drive') {
      const fileId = item.id;
      return [
        { type: 'view', label: 'View Link', url: `https://drive.google.com/file/d/${fileId}/view` },
        { type: 'download', label: 'Download Link', url: `https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=${fileId}` },
        { type: 'share', label: 'Share Link (with permissions)', url: `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${fileId}` },
      ];
    }
    if (item.sourceType === 'github') {
      // Extract repo and path from item.path (format: /github/username/repo/rest/of/path)
      const parts = item.path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      const username = parts[1];
      const repo = parts[2];
      const filePath = parts.slice(3).join('/');
      const repoFull = `${username}/${repo}`;
      return [
        { type: 'view', label: 'File URL', url: `https://github.com/${repoFull}/blob/main/${filePath}` },
        { type: 'raw', label: 'Raw File Link', url: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${repoFull}/main/${filePath}` },
        { type: 'repo', label: 'Repository Link', url: `https://github.com/${repoFull}` },
      ];
    }
    return [];
  };

  const links = generateLinks();
  const defaultLink = links.find(l => l.type === defaultLinkType) || links[0];
  if (!defaultLink) return null;

  const handleSingleTap = async () => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(defaultLink.url);
    setCopiedType(defaultLink.type);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedType(null), 2000);
    onCopy?.(defaultLink.url);
  };

  const handleTouchStart = () => {
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      setShowMenu(true);
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleTouchEnd = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    if (e.button === 0) {
      longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setShowMenu(true);
      }, 500);
    }
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const selectLink = async (option: LinkOption) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(option.url);
    setCopiedType(option.type);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedType(null), 2000);
    setShowMenu(false);
    onCopy?.(option.url);
  };

  const setAsDefault = (type: string) => {
    setDefaultLinkType(type);
    localStorage.setItem(`default_link_${item.sourceType}_${item.id}`, type);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <button
        onClick={handleSingleTap}
        onTouchStart={handleTouchStart}
        onTouchEnd={handleTouchEnd}
        onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
        onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
        className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent transition-colors group relative"
        title={copiedType ? `Copied ${copiedType} link!` : `Tap to copy ${defaultLink.label}, long press for options`}
      >
        {copiedType ? (
          <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
        ) : (
          <Link className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
        )}
      </button>

      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showMenu}
        onClose={() => setShowMenu(false)}
        panelId={panelId}
        title="Select Link Type"
      >
        <div className="space-y-1">
          {links.map(link => (
            <div
              key={link.type}
              className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
              onClick={() => selectLink(link)}
            >
              <span className="text-sm">{link.label}</span>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                {defaultLinkType === link.type && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-primary font-medium">Default</span>
                )}
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    setAsDefault(link.type);
                  }}
                  className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary"
                >
                  Set default
                </button>
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Log/LiveLogPanel.tsx =====

import { X, Settings, Download, Trash2, Filter, Terminal, Bug, Info, AlertTriangle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Switch } from '@/components/ui/switch';
import { useLogStore, useLogFilteredLogs, useLogIsLiveLogOpen } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

const levelIcons = {
  debug: <Bug className="w-3 h-3" />,
  info: <Info className="w-3 h-3" />,
  warn: <AlertTriangle className="w-3 h-3" />,
  error: <AlertCircle className="w-3 h-3" />,
};

const levelColors = {
  debug: 'text-muted-foreground',
  info: 'text-blue-500',
  warn: 'text-yellow-500',
  error: 'text-destructive',
};

const categoryColors = {
  auth: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
  file: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  system: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  network: 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800',
  ui: 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800',
};

export function LiveLogPanel() {
  const isOpen = useLogIsLiveLogOpen();
  const logs = useLogFilteredLogs();
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const setLogLevel = useLogStore((s) => s.setLogLevel);
  const clearLogs = useLogStore((s) => s.clearLogs);
  const exportLogs = useLogStore((s) => s.exportLogs);
  const logLevel = useLogStore((s) => s.logLevel);
  const logCategories = useLogStore((s) => s.logCategories);
  const toggleCategory = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleCategory);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const handleExport = async () => {
    const blob = await exportLogs();
    saveAs(blob, `logs-${new Date().toISOString()}.json`);
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 h-80 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl z-50 flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Terminal className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          <h3 className="font-semibold">Live Log</h3>
          <Badge variant="outline">{logs.length} entries</Badge>
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {/* Level filter */}
          <select
            value={logLevel}
            onChange={(e) => setLogLevel(e.target.value as any)}
            className="text-xs border rounded px-2 py-1 bg-background"
          >
            <option value="debug">Debug</option>
            <option value="info">Info</option>
            <option value="warn">Warn</option>
            <option value="error">Error</option>
          </select>

          {/* Category toggles */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
            {(['auth', 'file', 'system', 'network', 'ui'] as const).map(cat => (
              <button
                key={cat}
                onClick={() => toggleCategory(cat)}
                className={cn(
                  "px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded capitalize",
                  logCategories.includes(cat) ? categoryColors[cat] : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                )}
              >
                {cat}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={handleExport}>
            <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={clearLogs}>
            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Log entries */}
      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-2 font-mono text-xs">
        <div className="space-y-1">
          {logs.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-muted-foreground text-center py-8">No logs to display</p>
          ) : (
            logs.map((log) => (
              <div
                key={log.id}
                className="flex items-start gap-2 p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-accent/50"
              >
                <span className={cn("shrink-0", levelColors[log.level])}>
                  {levelIcons[log.level]}
                </span>
                
                <span className="text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                  {new Date(log.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}
                </span>
                
                <Badge 
                  variant="secondary" 
                  className={cn("shrink-0 text-[10px] px-1", categoryColors[log.category])}
                >
                  {log.category}
                </Badge>
                
                <span className="text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                  [{(log as any).userId?.slice(0, 8) || 'system'}]
                </span>
                
                <span className={cn("font-medium", levelColors[log.level])}>
                  {log.action}
                </span>
                
                {Object.keys(log.details).length > 0 && (
                  <span className="text-muted-foreground truncate">
                    {JSON.stringify(log.details)}
                  </span>
                )}
                
                {(log as any).duration && (
                  <span className="text-muted-foreground ml-auto">
                    {(log as any).duration}ms
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Log/LogActionWrapper.tsx =====

import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useCallback } from 'react';

export function useLoggedAction() {
  const logAction = useLogStore((s) => s.logAction);

  const wrapAction = useCallback(<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
    actionName: string,
    fn: T,
    category?: Parameters<typeof logAction>[2]
  ): T => {
    return (async (...args: any[]) => {
      const startTime = performance.now();
      
      logAction(`${actionName}_start`, { args }, category);
      
      try {
        const result = await fn(...args);
        const duration = Math.round(performance.now() - startTime);
        
        logAction(`${actionName}_complete`, { 
          args, 
          result: typeof result === 'object' ? 'success' : result,
          duration 
        }, category);
        
        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        const duration = Math.round(performance.now() - startTime);
        
        logAction(`${actionName}_error`, { 
          args, 
          error: (error as Error).message,
          duration 
        }, category || 'system');
        
        throw error;
      }
    }) as T;
  }, [logAction]);

  return { wrapAction, logAction };
}

// Hook for component-level logging
export function useComponentLogger(componentName: string) {
  const logAction = useLogStore((s) => s.logAction);

  const logEvent = useCallback((event: string, details?: Record<string, any>) => {
    logAction(`${componentName}_${event}`, details || {}, 'ui');
  }, [logAction, componentName]);

  const logMount = useCallback(() => {
    logEvent('mount');
  }, [logEvent]);

  const logUnmount = useCallback(() => {
    logEvent('unmount');
  }, [logEvent]);

  const logClick = useCallback((element: string, details?: Record<string, any>) => {
    logEvent(`click_${element}`, details);
  }, [logEvent]);

  return { logEvent, logMount, logUnmount, logClick };
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Menu/RootThreeDotsMenu.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { MoreVertical, EyeOff, Eye, Trash2, HardDrive, Link as LinkIcon } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
import { IdentityMask } from '@/components/Authority/IdentityMask';
import { FormatDialog } from '@/components/Format/FormatDialog';
import { DeleteDialog } from '@/components/Delete/DeleteDialog';

interface RootThreeDotsMenuProps { itemType: 'drive-account'|'github-username'|'storage-mount'|'terminal-root'; itemId: string; itemName: string; originalIdentity?: string; onFormat?: () => Promise<void>; onDelete?: () => Promise<void>; onCopyLink?: () => void; }

export function RootThreeDotsMenu({ itemType, itemId, itemName, originalIdentity, onFormat, onDelete, onCopyLink }: RootThreeDotsMenuProps) {
  const [showFormatDialog, setShowFormatDialog] = useState(false);
  const [showDeleteDialog, setShowDeleteDialog] = useState(false);
  const handleFormat = async () => { if (onFormat) { await onFormat(); setShowFormatDialog(false); } };
  const handleDelete = async () => { if (onDelete) { await onDelete(); setShowDeleteDialog(false); } };
  return (
    <>
      <DropdownMenu>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild><Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7"><MoreVertical className="w-4 h-4" /></Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
          {(itemType === 'drive-account' || itemType === 'github-username') && originalIdentity && (
            <DropdownMenuItem asChild><div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full"><span className="text-sm">Hide Identity</span><IdentityMask originalId={originalIdentity} type={itemType === 'drive-account' ? 'drive' : 'github'} /></div></DropdownMenuItem>
          )}
          {onCopyLink && <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onCopyLink}><LinkIcon className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Copy Link</DropdownMenuItem>}
          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
          {onFormat && <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowFormatDialog(true)} className="text-destructive"><HardDrive className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Format {itemType === 'storage-mount' ? 'Drive' : 'Account'}</DropdownMenuItem>}
          {onDelete && <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => setShowDeleteDialog(true)} className="text-destructive"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Delete</DropdownMenuItem>}
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>
      {showFormatDialog && <FormatDialog isOpen={showFormatDialog} onClose={() => setShowFormatDialog(false)} itemName={itemName} itemType={itemType === 'drive-account' ? 'drive' : itemType === 'github-username' ? 'github' : 'storage'} itemId={itemId} onFormat={handleFormat} />}
      {showDeleteDialog && <DeleteDialog isOpen={showDeleteDialog} onClose={() => setShowDeleteDialog(false)} itemName={itemName} itemPath={itemId} onDelete={handleDelete} />}
    </>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Notification/NotificationCenter.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Bell, Check, AlertCircle, Info, X, Clock, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLNotifications } from '@/stores/dfolStore';

interface BackgroundTask { id: string; title: string; message: string; status: 'running'|'completed'|'failed'; progress: number; startTime: Date; }

export function NotificationCenter() {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [backgroundTasks, setBackgroundTasks] = useState<BackgroundTask[]>([]);
  const dfolNotifications = useDFOLNotifications();
  const dismissNotification = useDFOLStore((s) => s.dismissNotification);
  const clearNotifications = useDFOLStore((s) => s.clearNotifications);
  useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setBackgroundTasks(prev => prev.map(task => ({ ...task, progress: task.status === 'running' ? Math.min(task.progress+5,100) : task.progress, status: task.progress >= 100 ? 'completed' : task.status }))); }, 1000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []);
  const allNotifications = [...dfolNotifications.map(n => ({ ...n, type: 'dfol' })), ...backgroundTasks.map(t => ({ id: t.id, message: t.title, type: 'task', status: t.status, progress: t.progress }))];
  const unreadCount = dfolNotifications.length;
  const getIcon = (type: string, status?: string) => { if (status === 'completed') return <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />; if (status === 'failed') return <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" />; if (status === 'running') return <div className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />; return <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-500" />; };
  return (
    <div className="fixed bottom-6 left-6 z-50">
      <button onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)} className="relative p-3 bg-card border border-border rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors"><Bell className="w-5 h-5" />{unreadCount > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-destructive text-white text-xs rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">{unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}</span>}</button>
      {isOpen && (<><div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} /><div className="absolute bottom-full left-0 mb-2 w-96 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50"><div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border"><h3 className="font-semibold">Notifications</h3><Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={clearNotifications}>Clear all</Button></div><ScrollArea className="h-80">{allNotifications.length === 0 ? (<div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground p-8"><Bell className="w-8 h-8 mb-2 opacity-50" /><p className="text-sm">No notifications</p></div>) : (<div className="divide-y divide-border">{allNotifications.map((notif: any) => (<div key={notif.id} className="p-3 hover:bg-accent"><div className="flex items-start gap-3">{getIcon(notif.type, notif.status)}<div className="flex-1 min-w-0"><p className="text-sm">{notif.message}</p>{notif.progress !== undefined && notif.status === 'running' && (<div className="mt-2"><div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-1"><div className="bg-primary h-1 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${notif.progress}%` }} /></div><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{notif.progress}%</p></div>)}{notif.status === 'completed' && <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1">Completed successfully</p>}{notif.status === 'failed' && <p className="text-xs text-destructive mt-1">Failed - retry?</p>}</div><button onClick={() => dismissNotification(notif.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><X className="w-3 h-3" /></button></div></div>))}</div>)}</ScrollArea></div></>)}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Notification/NotificationBell.tsx =====

import { Bell, Check, AlertCircle, Info, X, Clock, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { useDFOLStore, useDFOLNotifications } from '@/stores/dfolStore';
import { useTokenExpiry } from '@/hooks/useTokenExpiry';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export function NotificationBell() {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const notifications = useDFOLNotifications();
  const clearNotifications = useDFOLStore((s) => s.clearNotifications);
  const dismissNotification = useDFOLStore((s) => s.dismissNotification);
  const operations = useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
  const globalProgress = useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
  const isExecuting = useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);

  // Activate token expiry monitoring
  useTokenExpiry();

  const unreadCount = notifications.length;

  const getIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'success': return <Check className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />;
      case 'warning': return <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-500" />;
      case 'error': return <X className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" />;
      default: return <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-500" />;
    }
  };

  // Background task indicator
  const runningCount = operations.filter(o => o.status === 'running').length;
  const showBackgroundTask = isExecuting || runningCount > 0;

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <Button
        variant="ghost"
        size="icon"
        className="relative"
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
      >
        {showBackgroundTask ? (
          <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-primary" />
        ) : (
          <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
        )}
        {unreadCount > 0 && (
          <Badge
            variant="destructive"
            className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 h-5 w-5 flex items-center justify-center p-0 text-xs"
          >
            {unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount}
          </Badge>
        )}
      </Button>

      {isOpen && (
        <>
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} />
          <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-96 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50">
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
              <h3 className="font-semibold">Notifications</h3>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                {showBackgroundTask && (
                  <span className="text-xs text-primary flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
                    {Math.round(globalProgress)}%
                  </span>
                )}
                {notifications.length > 0 && (
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={clearNotifications}>
                    Clear all
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <ScrollArea className="h-80">
              {notifications.length === 0 && !showBackgroundTask ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
                  <Bell className="w-8 h-8 mb-2 opacity-50" />
                  <p className="text-sm">No notifications</p>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="divide-y divide-border">
                  {/* Active background task indicator */}
                  {showBackgroundTask && (
                    <div className="p-3 bg-primary/5 border-l-4 border-primary">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-primary" />
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium">DFOL Execution in progress</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="mt-2">
                        <div className="w-full bg-muted rounded-full h-1">
                          <div
                            className="bg-primary h-1 rounded-full transition-all"
                            style={{ width: `${globalProgress}%` }}
                          />
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                          {runningCount} operations running, {operations.filter(o => o.status === 'pending').length} pending
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}

                  {notifications.map((notif) => (
                    <div
                      key={notif.id}
                      className="p-3 hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        {getIcon(notif.type)}
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                          <p className="text-sm">{notif.message}</p>
                          {notif.operationId && (
                            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                              Operation: {notif.operationId.slice(0, 8)}...
                            </p>
                          )}
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
                            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1">
                              <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                              {new Date(notif.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="icon"
                          className="h-6 w-6 shrink-0"
                          onClick={() => dismissNotification(notif.id)}
                        >
                          <X className="w-3 h-3" />
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </ScrollArea>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/FileGrid.tsx =====

import { Folder, File } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface FileGridProps {
  files?: Array<{ id: string; name: string; type: 'file' | 'folder'; size?: number }>;
  onFileClick?: (file: any) => void;
}

export function FileGrid({ files = [], onFileClick }: FileGridProps) {
  if (files.length === 0) {
    return <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64 text-muted-foreground">No files found</div>;
  }
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4">
      {files.map((file) => (
        <button key={file.id} onClick={() => onFileClick?.(file)} className={cn("flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors")}>
          {file.type === 'folder' ? <Folder className="w-12 h-12 text-blue-500 mb-2" /> : <File className="w-12 h-12 text-gray-500 mb-2" />}
          <span className="text-sm text-center truncate w-full">{file.name}</span>
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/EmptyPanel.tsx =====

import { HardDrive, FolderGit, Github, Terminal } from 'lucide-react';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { useRecentSourcesStore } from '@/stores/recentSourcesStore';

interface EmptyPanelProps {
  panelId: string;
}

const SOURCES: { type: SourceType; label: string; icon: React.ElementType; color: string }[] = [
  { type: 'storage', label: 'Storage', icon: HardDrive, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { type: 'drive', label: 'Google Drive', icon: FolderGit, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { type: 'github', label: 'GitHub', icon: Github, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  { type: 'terminal', label: 'Terminal', icon: Terminal, color: 'text-orange-500' },
];

export function EmptyPanel({ panelId }: EmptyPanelProps) {
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const addRecent = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.addRecent);

  const handleSourceClick = (source: SourceType) => {
    setPanelSource(panelId, source);
    // Add to recent for quick access
    addRecent(panelId, {
      type: source,
      id: source,
      label: source === 'storage' ? 'Storage' : source === 'drive' ? 'Drive' : source === 'github' ? 'GitHub' : 'Terminal',
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-background">
      <div className="text-center mb-8">
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Select a Source</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Choose a storage source to start browsing
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-md w-full">
        {SOURCES.map((source) => {
          const Icon = source.icon;
          return (
            <button
              key={source.type}
              onClick={() => handleSourceClick(source.type)}
              className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all group"
            >
              <div className={`p-3 rounded-full bg-primary/10 ${source.color} group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              </div>
              <span className="font-medium text-sm">{source.label}</span>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div className="mt-8 text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">
        Each panel works independently ŌĆó Add up to 4 panels total
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/NewPanelContainer.tsx =====

import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { NewResizablePanel } from './NewResizablePanel';

export function NewPanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { setActivePanel, removePanel } = usePanelStore();

  // Ensure exactly 4 panels for 2x2 grid
  const displayPanels = panels.slice(0, 4);

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* 2x2 Grid Layout */}
      <div className="flex-1 grid grid-cols-2 grid-rows-2 gap-0 p-0 overflow-hidden">
        {displayPanels.map((panel, index) => (
          <div
            key={panel.id}
            className="h-full w-full overflow-hidden"
          >
            <NewResizablePanel
              panel={panel}
              isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
              isLast={index === displayPanels.length - 1}
              onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
              onClose={() => removePanel(panel.id)}
            />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/NewPanelFooter.tsx =====

import { useRef, useState } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useGoogleDriveAuth } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/GoogleDriveProvider';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { resolvePanelPath } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { 
  ArrowLeft,
  Home,
  Plus,
  MoreVertical,
  X,
  FolderPlus,
  FilePlus
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

// API endpoint for Termux backend
const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:3001';

interface NewPanelFooterProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  onBack?: () => void;
  onHome?: () => void;
  onHomeLongPress?: () => void;
  onPlus?: () => void;
  onThreeDot?: () => void;
  onClose?: () => void;
  onRefresh?: () => void;
}

export function NewPanelFooter({ 
  panel, 
  onBack,
  onHome,
  onHomeLongPress,
  onPlus,
  onThreeDot,
  onClose,
  onRefresh
}: NewPanelFooterProps) {
  const { navigatePanelBack, setPanelPath, setPanelAccountId, setPanelHandle } = usePanelStore();
  const { login: driveLogin } = useGoogleDriveAuth();
  
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const [showPlusMenu, setShowPlusMenu] = useState(false);
  const [showGitHubDialog, setShowGitHubDialog] = useState(false);
  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');
  const [createType, setCreateType] = useState<'folder' | 'file' | null>(null);

  // Get current context
  const getCurrentContext = () => {
    const currentPath = panel.path || '/';
    const isDriveRoot = panel.source === 'drive' && !panel.accountId;
    const isGitHubRoot = panel.source === 'github' && !panel.accountId;
    const isStorageRoot = panel.source === 'storage' && (currentPath === '/' || currentPath === '/storage');
    // Terminal category root is /terminal, specific terminal is /terminal/termux
    const isTerminalCategoryRoot = panel.source === 'terminal' && (currentPath === '/' || currentPath === '/terminal');
    const isTerminalRoot = panel.source === 'terminal' && currentPath === '/terminal/termux';
    const isRoot = isDriveRoot || isGitHubRoot || isStorageRoot || isTerminalCategoryRoot || currentPath === '/';
    
    return { currentPath, isRoot, isDriveRoot, isGitHubRoot, isStorageRoot, isTerminalRoot, isTerminalCategoryRoot };
  };

  // Handle back button
  const handleBack = () => {
    if (onBack) {
      onBack();
    } else {
      navigatePanelBack(panel.id);
    }
  };

  // Handle home button (single click = terminal home /terminal/termux)
  const handleHome = () => {
    if (onHome) {
      onHome();
    }
  };

  // Handle home long press (source root = category level /terminal)
  const startHomeLongPress = () => {
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      if (onHomeLongPress) {
        onHomeLongPress();
      }
    }, 800);
  };

  const clearHomeLongPress = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  // Check if we can create in current path
  const canCreateInPath = () => {
    const { isRoot, isTerminalCategoryRoot } = getCurrentContext();
    if (isTerminalCategoryRoot) return false; // Can't create at category root, only inside specific terminal
    if (isRoot) return false; // Can't create at source roots
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') return true; // Can create in any Termux path
    if (panel.source === 'storage' && panel.handle) return true; // Native storage with handle
    return false;
  };

  // Handle plus button based on context
  const handlePlus = async () => {
    const { isRoot, isDriveRoot, isGitHubRoot, isStorageRoot, isTerminalCategoryRoot } = getCurrentContext();

    if (isRoot || isTerminalCategoryRoot) {
      if (isDriveRoot) {
        driveLogin();
      } else if (isGitHubRoot) {
        setShowGitHubDialog(true);
      } else if (isStorageRoot) {
        // Show mount options: pick directory for SD/USB/PC
        try {
          const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
          if (handle) {
            setPanelHandle(panel.id, handle);
            setPanelPath(panel.id, `/${handle.name}`);
            onRefresh?.();
          }
        } catch (err) {
          console.error('Failed to pick directory:', err);
        }
      } else if (isTerminalCategoryRoot) {
        // At Terminal category root, selecting Termux terminal type
        setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal/termux');
        onRefresh?.();
      }
    } else {
      // In a directory, show create options
      if (canCreateInPath()) {
        setShowPlusMenu(true);
      }
    }

    if (onPlus) onPlus();
  };

  // Handle create folder in Termux
  const handleCreateFolder = async () => {
    if (!newItemName.trim()) return;
    
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      try {
        const resolvedPath = resolvePanelPath(panel.path || '/terminal/termux');
        const url = `${API_BASE}/api/mkdir`;
        const response = await fetch(url, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ path: resolvedPath, name: newItemName.trim() }),
        });
        
        if (!response.ok) {
          const err = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
          throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to create folder');
        }
        
        onRefresh?.();
      } catch (err: any) {
        console.error('Failed to create folder:', err);
        alert(err.message);
      }
    }
    
    setCreateType(null);
    setNewItemName('');
    setShowPlusMenu(false);
  };

  // Handle create file in Termux
  const handleCreateFile = async () => {
    if (!newItemName.trim()) return;
    
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      try {
        const resolvedPath = resolvePanelPath(panel.path || '/terminal/termux');
        const url = `${API_BASE}/api/write`;
        const response = await fetch(url, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ 
            path: resolvedPath, 
            name: newItemName.trim(), 
            content: '' 
          }),
        });
        
        if (!response.ok) {
          const err = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
          throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to create file');
        }
        
        onRefresh?.();
      } catch (err: any) {
        console.error('Failed to create file:', err);
        alert(err.message);
      }
    }
    
    setCreateType(null);
    setNewItemName('');
    setShowPlusMenu(false);
  };

  // Get plus button tooltip
  const getPlusTooltip = () => {
    const { isRoot, isDriveRoot, isGitHubRoot, isStorageRoot, isTerminalCategoryRoot } = getCurrentContext();
    if (isRoot || isTerminalCategoryRoot) {
      if (isDriveRoot) return 'Add Google Account';
      if (isGitHubRoot) return 'Add GitHub Account';
      if (isStorageRoot) return 'Mount Storage (SD/USB/PC)';
      if (isTerminalCategoryRoot) return 'Open Termux';
      return 'Add';
    }
    return canCreateInPath() ? 'Create New' : 'Cannot create here';
  };

  // FIXED: Determine if back button should be enabled
  // Now allows going back from /terminal/termux to /terminal
  const canGoBack = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const path = panel.path || '/terminal/termux';
      // Can go back if not at terminal category root /terminal or source root /
      return path !== '/terminal' && path !== '/';
    }
    return panel.history && panel.history.length > 0;
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-t border-border bg-card">
      {/* Back Button - Left - Icon Only */}
      <button
        onClick={handleBack}
        disabled={!canGoBack()}
        className={cn(
          "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
          canGoBack() ? "hover:bg-accent" : "opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed"
        )}
        title="Back"
      >
        <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
      </button>

      {/* Center Buttons: 3-dot, Plus, X - Icon Only */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
        {/* 3-Dot Menu Button */}
        <button
          onClick={onThreeDot}
          className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
          title="More options"
        >
          <MoreVertical className="w-5 h-5" />
        </button>

        {/* Plus Button */}
        <div className="relative">
          <button
            onClick={handlePlus}
            disabled={!canCreateInPath() && !getCurrentContext().isRoot && !getCurrentContext().isTerminalCategoryRoot}
            className={cn(
              "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
              canCreateInPath() || getCurrentContext().isRoot || getCurrentContext().isTerminalCategoryRoot
                ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90"
                : "opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed"
            )}
            title={getPlusTooltip()}
          >
            <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>

          {/* Plus Menu for create options */}
          {showPlusMenu && (
            <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 w-48 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1">
              {createType === null ? (
                <>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setCreateType('folder')}
                    className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
                  >
                    <FolderPlus className="w-4 h-4" />
                    Create Folder
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setCreateType('file')}
                    className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
                  >
                    <FilePlus className="w-4 h-4" />
                    Create File
                  </button>
                </>
              ) : (
                <div className="p-2">
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={newItemName}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder={`New ${createType} name...`}
                    className="w-full px-2 py-1 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded mb-2"
                    autoFocus
                    onKeyDown={(e) => {
                      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                        if (createType === 'folder') {
                          handleCreateFolder();
                        } else {
                          handleCreateFile();
                        }
                      }
                      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                        setCreateType(null);
                        setNewItemName('');
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                  <div className="flex gap-1">
                    <button
                      onClick={createType === 'folder' ? handleCreateFolder : handleCreateFile}
                      className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded hover:bg-primary/90"
                    >
                      Create
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        setCreateType(null);
                        setNewItemName('');
                      }}
                      className="flex-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-muted rounded hover:bg-muted/80"
                    >
                      Cancel
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* X Button */}
        <button
          onClick={onClose}
          className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors text-destructive"
          title="Close Panel"
        >
          <X className="w-5 h-5" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Home Button - Right - Icon Only */}
      <button
        onClick={handleHome}
        onMouseDown={startHomeLongPress}
        onMouseUp={clearHomeLongPress}
        onMouseLeave={clearHomeLongPress}
        onTouchStart={startHomeLongPress}
        onTouchEnd={clearHomeLongPress}
        className="p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
        title="Home: /terminal/termux (long press for Terminal category)"
      >
        <Home className="w-5 h-5" />
      </button>

      {/* GitHub Add Account Dialog - Placeholder */}
      {showGitHubDialog && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50">
          <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-lg p-4 w-80">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-medium mb-2">Add GitHub Account</h3>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
              GitHub account addition will be implemented here.
            </p>
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowGitHubDialog(false)}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg"
            >
              Close
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/NewPanelHeader.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useRecentSourcesStore, RecentSource } from '@/stores/recentSourcesStore';
import { useSearchStore } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { PanelFilterOverlay } from './PanelFilterOverlay';
import {
  HardDrive,
  FolderGit,
  Github,
  Terminal,
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronRight,
  Grid3X3,
  List,
  Globe,
  ArrowRight,
  ArrowUpDown,
  RefreshCw,
  Lock,
  Unlock,
  X,
  Pin
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

const sourceIcons: Record<SourceType, React.ElementType> = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const sourceLabels: Record<SourceType, string> = {
  storage: 'Storage',
  drive: 'Drive',
  github: 'GitHub',
  terminal: 'Termux',
};

const storageTypes = [
  { id: 'internal', label: 'Android Storage', icon: HardDrive },
  { id: 'sdcard', label: 'SD Card', icon: HardDrive },
  { id: 'usb', label: 'USB / OTG', icon: HardDrive },
  { id: 'pc', label: 'PC / Others', icon: HardDrive },
];

interface PinnedItem {
  type: SourceType;
  id: string;
  label: string;
  subType?: string;
}

type SortMode = 'name-asc' | 'name-desc' | 'date' | 'size';

interface NewPanelHeaderProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onRefresh?: () => void;
  onPathChange?: (path: string) => void;
  viewMode?: 'grid' | 'list';
  sortMode?: SortMode;
  onViewModeChange?: (mode: 'grid' | 'list') => void;
  onSortChange?: (sort: SortMode) => void;
}

export function NewPanelHeader({
  panel,
  isActive,
  onActivate,
  onRefresh,
  onPathChange,
  viewMode: externalViewMode,
  sortMode: externalSortMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  onSortChange
}: NewPanelHeaderProps) {
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelAccountId = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelAccountId);
  const setPanelViewMode = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelViewMode);
  const setPanelSortBy = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSortBy);

  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const setDriveViewMode = useDriveStore((s) => s.setViewModeForPanel);
  const setDriveSortBy = useDriveStore((s) => s.setSortByForPanel);
  const refreshDrive = useDriveStore((s) => s.refreshCurrentForPanel);

  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const setGitHubViewMode = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setViewModeForPanel);
  const setGitHubSortBy = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setSortByForPanel);
  const refreshGitHub = useGitHubStore((s) => s.refreshCurrentForPanel);

  const recentSources = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.getRecentsForPanel(panel.id));
  const addRecent = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.addRecent);
  const removeRecent = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.removeRecent);
  const toggleLock = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.toggleLock);

  const setGlobalSearchQuery = useSearchStore((s) => s.setQuery);
  const executeSearch = useSearchStore((s) => s.executeSearch);

  const [showMainDropdown, setShowMainDropdown] = useState(false);
  const [activeSubmenu, setActiveSubmenu] = useState<SourceType | null>(null);
  const [submenuPosition, setSubmenuPosition] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });
  const [pinnedItems, setPinnedItems] = useState<Record<string, PinnedItem[]>>({
    storage: [],
    drive: [],
    github: [],
    terminal: []
  });
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({
    storage: false,
    drive: false,
    github: false,
    terminal: false
  });
  const [sortScope, setSortScope] = useState<'current' | 'full'>('current');
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [showFilter, setShowFilter] = useState(false);
  const [showSortMenu, setShowSortMenu] = useState(false);
  const [autoRefreshInterval, setAutoRefreshInterval] = useState<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const [autoRefreshSeconds, setAutoRefreshSeconds] = useState(30);
  const [autoRefreshEnabled, setAutoRefreshEnabled] = useState(false);
  const [showAutoRefreshDialog, setShowAutoRefreshDialog] = useState(false);
  const [showAccountPopup, setShowAccountPopup] = useState<{type: SourceType, x: number, y: number} | null>(null);
  const [showRecentMenu, setShowRecentMenu] = useState<{source: RecentSource, index: number, x: number, y: number} | null>(null);

  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const dropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const searchInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const recentClickTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const recentClickCount = useRef(0);

  const viewMode = externalViewMode ?? panel.viewMode ?? 'list';
  const sortMode = externalSortMode ?? panel.sortBy ?? 'name-asc';

  useEffect(() => {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem(`pinnedItems_${panel.id}`);
    if (stored) {
      setPinnedItems(JSON.parse(stored));
    }
  }, [panel.id]);

  const savePinnedItems = (items: Record<string, PinnedItem[]>) => {
    localStorage.setItem(`pinnedItems_${panel.id}`, JSON.stringify(items));
    setPinnedItems(items);
  };

  const toggleSection = (section: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setExpandedSections(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [section]: !prev[section]
    }));
  };

  const handlePinToggle = (section: string, item: PinnedItem, e?: React.MouseEvent | React.TouchEvent) => {
    e?.preventDefault();
    e?.stopPropagation();

    const currentPinned = pinnedItems[section] || [];
    const isPinned = currentPinned.some(p => p.id === item.id);

    let newPinned: PinnedItem[];
    if (isPinned) {
      newPinned = currentPinned.filter(p => p.id !== item.id);
    } else {
      newPinned = [item, ...currentPinned];
    }

    const newPinnedItems = { ...pinnedItems, [section]: newPinned };
    savePinnedItems(newPinnedItems);
  };

  const getSortedAccounts = (section: string, accounts: {id: string, label?: string}[]) => {
    const pinned = pinnedItems[section] || [];
    const pinnedIds = new Set(pinned.map(p => p.id));

    const pinnedAccounts = pinned.map(p => ({ id: p.id, label: p.label, isPinned: true }));
    const unpinnedAccounts = accounts
      .filter(a => !pinnedIds.has(a.id))
      .sort((a, b) => a.label?.localeCompare(b.label || '') || 0)
      .map(a => ({ ...a, isPinned: false }));

    return [...pinnedAccounts, ...unpinnedAccounts];
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {
        setShowMainDropdown(false);
        setActiveSubmenu(null);
        setShowAccountPopup(null);
      }
      if (showRecentMenu && !(e.target as Element).closest('.recent-menu')) {
        setShowRecentMenu(null);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);
  }, [showRecentMenu]);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (autoRefreshInterval) clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    };
  }, [autoRefreshInterval]);

  const handleSourceSelect = (type: SourceType, accountId?: string, subType?: string) => {
    setPanelSource(panel.id, type);

    if (type === 'drive' && accountId) {
      setPanelAccountId(panel.id, accountId);
      setPanelPath(panel.id, `/drive/${accountId}`);
      addRecent(panel.id, {
        type: 'drive',
        id: accountId,
        label: accountId.split('@')[0],
      });
    } else if (type === 'github' && accountId) {
      setPanelAccountId(panel.id, accountId);
      setPanelPath(panel.id, `/github/${accountId}`);
      addRecent(panel.id, {
        type: 'github',
        id: accountId,
        label: accountId,
      });
    } else if (type === 'storage' && subType) {
      setPanelPath(panel.id, `/storage/${subType}`);
      addRecent(panel.id, {
        type: 'storage',
        id: subType,
        label: storageTypes.find(s => s.id === subType)?.label || subType,
        subType,
      });
    } else if (type === 'terminal') {
      setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal/termux');
      addRecent(panel.id, {
        type: 'terminal',
        id: 'termux',
        label: 'Termux',
      });
    }

    setShowMainDropdown(false);
    setActiveSubmenu(null);
    setShowAccountPopup(null);
  };

  const showSubmenu = (type: SourceType, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    const rect = (e.currentTarget as HTMLElement).getBoundingClientRect();
    setSubmenuPosition({ x: rect.right + 5, y: rect.top });
    setActiveSubmenu(type);
  };

  const handleRecentClick = (source: RecentSource, index: number, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();

    recentClickCount.current += 1;

    if (recentClickCount.current === 1) {
      recentClickTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
        handleSourceSelect(source.type, source.id, source.subType);
        recentClickCount.current = 0;
      }, 300);
    } else if (recentClickCount.current === 2) {
      if (recentClickTimer.current) clearTimeout(recentClickTimer.current);
      recentClickCount.current = 0;
      toggleLock(panel.id, index);
    }
  };

  const handleRecentContextMenu = (e: React.MouseEvent, source: RecentSource, index: number) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    setShowRecentMenu({
      source,
      index,
      x: e.clientX,
      y: e.clientY
    });
  };

  const handleRemoveRecent = (e: React.MouseEvent, source: RecentSource) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    removeRecent(panel.id, source.type, source.id);
    setShowRecentMenu(null);
  };

  const toggleViewMode = () => {
    const newMode = viewMode === 'grid' ? 'list' : 'grid';

    if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      setDriveViewMode(panel.id, newMode);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
      setGitHubViewMode(panel.id, newMode);
    } else {
      setPanelViewMode(panel.id, newMode);
    }

    onViewModeChange?.(newMode);
  };

  const getCurrentPath = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      return panel.path || `/drive/${panel.accountId}`;
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      return panel.path || `/github/${panel.accountId}`;
    }
    return panel.path || '/';
  };

  const getPathSegments = () => {
    const path = getCurrentPath();

    if (path === '/storage/emulated/0' || path.startsWith('/storage/emulated/0/')) {
      const remainingPath = path.replace('/storage/emulated/0', '');
      const parts = remainingPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      const segments: { label: string; path: string; isRoot?: boolean }[] = [
        { label: 'Android Storage', path: '/storage/internal', isRoot: true }
      ];

      let currentPath = '/storage/emulated/0';
      parts.forEach((part) => {
        currentPath += `/${part}`;
        segments.push({
          label: part,
          path: currentPath
        });
      });

      return segments;
    }

    const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    const segments: { label: string; path: string; isRoot?: boolean }[] = [];

    let currentPath = '';
    parts.forEach((part) => {
      currentPath += `/${part}`;
      segments.push({
        label: part,
        path: currentPath
      });
    });

    return segments;
  };

  const handleBreadcrumbClick = (path: string, isRoot?: boolean) => {
    if (isRoot) {
      setPanelPath(panel.id, '/');
      onPathChange?.('/');
    } else {
      setPanelPath(panel.id, path);
      onPathChange?.(path);
    }
  };

  const handleSearchChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const query = e.target.value;
    setSearchQuery(query);

    clearTimeout((window as any).searchTimeout);
    (window as any).searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
      setGlobalSearchQuery(query);
      if (query.trim()) {
        executeSearch();
      }
    }, 150);
  };

  const clearSearch = () => {
    setSearchQuery('');
    setGlobalSearchQuery('');
  };

  const handleSortChange = (mode: SortMode) => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      setDriveSortBy(panel.id, mode as any);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
      setGitHubSortBy(panel.id, mode as any);
    } else {
      setPanelSortBy(panel.id, mode);
    }

    onSortChange?.(mode);
