    setShowSortMenu(false);
  };

  const handleRefresh = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      refreshDrive(panel.id);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
      refreshGitHub(panel.id);
    }

    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        fetchDirectory();
      }
    }

    onRefresh?.();
  };

  const fetchDirectory = () => {
    onRefresh?.();
  };

  const handleRefreshLongPress = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        setShowAutoRefreshDialog(true);
        return;
      }
    }
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(true);
  };

  const startAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (autoRefreshInterval) {
      clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
    }

    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        termuxPanel.startAutoRefresh(autoRefreshSeconds);
        setAutoRefreshEnabled(true);
        setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
        return;
      }
    }

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      handleRefresh();
    }, autoRefreshSeconds * 1000);
    
    setAutoRefreshInterval(interval);
    setAutoRefreshEnabled(true);
    setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
  };

  const stopAutoRefresh = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        termuxPanel.stopAutoRefresh();
        setAutoRefreshEnabled(false);
        return;
      }
    }

    if (autoRefreshInterval) {
      clearInterval(autoRefreshInterval);
      setAutoRefreshInterval(null);
    }
    setAutoRefreshEnabled(false);
  };

  const clearRecentLongPress = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const isTermuxAutoRefreshActive = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        return termuxPanel.isEnabled();
      }
    }
    return autoRefreshEnabled;
  };

  const getAutoRefreshSeconds = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
      if (termuxPanel) {
        return termuxPanel.getSeconds();
      }
    }
    return autoRefreshSeconds;
  };

  const uniqueRecentSources = useMemo(() => {
    const seen = new Set();
    return recentSources.filter(source => {
      const key = `${source.type}-${source.id}`;
      if (seen.has(key)) return false;
      seen.add(key);
      return true;
    }).slice(0, 5);
  }, [recentSources]);

  const CurrentIcon = sourceIcons[panel.source];

  const getAccountsForPopup = () => {
    if (!showAccountPopup) return [];

    switch (showAccountPopup.type) {
      case 'drive':
        return driveAccounts.map(a => ({ id: a.id, label: a.id.split('@')[0] }));
      case 'github':
        return githubAccounts.map(a => ({ id: a.id, label: a.id }));
      case 'storage':
        return storageTypes.map(s => ({ id: s.id, label: s.label }));
      case 'terminal':
        return [{ id: 'termux', label: 'Termux' }];
      default:
        return [];
    }
  };

  const getSubmenuItems = () => {
    if (!activeSubmenu) return [];

    switch (activeSubmenu) {
      case 'storage':
        return getSortedAccounts('storage', storageTypes.map(s => ({ id: s.id, label: s.label })));
      case 'drive':
        return getSortedAccounts('drive', driveAccounts.map(a => ({ id: a.id, label: a.id.split('@')[0] })));
      case 'github':
        return getSortedAccounts('github', githubAccounts.map(a => ({ id: a.id, label: a.id })));
      case 'terminal':
        return getSortedAccounts('terminal', [{ id: 'termux', label: 'Termux' }]);
      default:
        return [];
    }
  };

  const handleSubmenuPinToggle = (item: any) => {
    if (activeSubmenu) {
      handlePinToggle(activeSubmenu, {
        type: activeSubmenu,
        id: item.id,
        label: item.label
      });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col bg-card border-b border-border relative" onClick={onActivate}>
      {/* Row 1: Source Dropdown + Recent Sources */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 border-b border-border/50">
        {/* PC-Style Dropdown */}
        <div className="relative" ref={dropdownRef}>
          <button
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              setShowMainDropdown(!showMainDropdown);
              setActiveSubmenu(null);
              setShowAccountPopup(null);
            }}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary/20 transition-colors"
          >
            <CurrentIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">{sourceLabels[panel.source]}</span>
            <ChevronDown className={cn("w-3 h-3 transition-transform", showMainDropdown && "rotate-180")} />
          </button>

          {showMainDropdown && (
            <div className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-1 w-48 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1">
              <button
                onClick={(e) => showSubmenu('storage', e)}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => showSubmenu('storage', e)}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
              >
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <HardDrive className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Storage
                </span>
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>

              <button
                onClick={(e) => showSubmenu('drive', e)}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => showSubmenu('drive', e)}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
              >
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Drive
                </span>
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>

              <button
                onClick={(e) => showSubmenu('github', e)}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => showSubmenu('github', e)}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
              >
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Github className="w-4 h-4" />
                  GitHub
                </span>
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>

              <button
                onClick={(e) => showSubmenu('terminal', e)}
                onMouseEnter={(e) => showSubmenu('terminal', e)}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
              >
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Terminal className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Terminal
                </span>
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSubmenu && (
            <div
              className="fixed w-56 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto"
              style={{ left: submenuPosition.x, top: submenuPosition.y }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setActiveSubmenu(activeSubmenu)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setActiveSubmenu(null)}
            >
              <div className="px-2 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase border-b border-border mb-1">
                {activeSubmenu === 'storage' ? 'Storage Locations' :
                 activeSubmenu === 'drive' ? 'Google Accounts' :
                 activeSubmenu === 'github' ? 'GitHub Accounts' : 'Terminals'}
              </div>

              {activeSubmenu === 'drive' && driveAccounts.length === 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => handleSourceSelect('drive')}
                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent text-muted-foreground"
                >
                  <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Add Google Account...
                </button>
              )}

              {activeSubmenu === 'github' && githubAccounts.length === 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => handleSourceSelect('github')}
                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent text-muted-foreground"
                >
                  <Github className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Add GitHub Account...
                </button>
              )}

              {getSubmenuItems().map((item: any) => (
                <button
                  key={item.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSourceSelect(activeSubmenu, item.id, item.id)}
                  onContextMenu={(e) => handleSubmenuPinToggle(item)}
                  className={cn(
                    "w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent relative group",
                    item.isPinned && "bg-primary/10"
                  )}
                >
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    {activeSubmenu === 'storage' ? <HardDrive className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                     activeSubmenu === 'drive' ? <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                     activeSubmenu === 'github' ? <Github className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Terminal className="w-4 h-4" />}
                    {item.label}
                  </span>
                  {item.isPinned && <Pin className="w-3 h-3 text-primary" />}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Recent Sources */}
        <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-2 overflow-hidden">
          {uniqueRecentSources.map((source, index) => {
            const Icon = sourceIcons[source.type];
            return (
              <div key={`${source.type}-${source.id}`} className="relative group flex-shrink-0">
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => handleRecentClick(source, index, e)}
                  onContextMenu={(e) => handleRecentContextMenu(e, source, index)}
                  className={cn(
                    "relative p-2 rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center",
                    source.locked ? "bg-primary/20 ring-1 ring-primary" : "bg-accent/50 hover:bg-accent"
                  )}
                  title={`${source.label}${source.locked ? ' (Locked)' : ''} - Double click to ${source.locked ? 'unlock' : 'lock'}`}
                >
                  <Icon className="w-6 h-6" />
                  {source.locked && (
                    <Lock className="w-3 h-3 absolute -top-1 -right-1 text-primary fill-primary bg-card rounded-full" />
                  )}
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => handleRemoveRecent(e, source)}
                  className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground rounded-full flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:scale-110"
                >
                  <X className="w-3 h-3" />
                </button>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        <div className="w-px h-8 bg-border mx-2 flex-shrink-0" />
      </div>

      {/* Recent Context Menu */}
      {showRecentMenu && (
        <div
          className="recent-menu fixed bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1 w-48"
          style={{ left: showRecentMenu.x, top: showRecentMenu.y }}
        >
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              toggleLock(panel.id, showRecentMenu.index);
              setShowRecentMenu(null);
            }}
            className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent"
          >
            {showRecentMenu.source.locked ? <Unlock className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Lock className="w-4 h-4" />}
            {showRecentMenu.source.locked ? 'Unlock' : 'Lock'}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              removeRecent(panel.id, showRecentMenu.source.type, showRecentMenu.source.id);
              setShowRecentMenu(null);
            }}
            className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent text-destructive"
          >
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
            Remove
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Account Popup */}
      {showAccountPopup && (
        <div
          className="fixed bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1 w-56 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto"
          style={{ left: showAccountPopup.x, top: showAccountPopup.y }}
        >
          <div className="px-2 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase border-b border-border mb-1">
            {showAccountPopup.type === 'storage' ? 'Storage Locations' :
             showAccountPopup.type === 'drive' ? 'Google Accounts' :
             showAccountPopup.type === 'github' ? 'GitHub Accounts' : 'Terminals'}
          </div>

          {(() => {
            const items = getAccountsForPopup();
            const pinned = pinnedItems[showAccountPopup.type] || [];
            const pinnedIds = new Set(pinned.map(p => p.id));
            const pinnedItemsList = items.filter(i => pinnedIds.has(i.id));
            const unpinnedItems = items.filter(i => !pinnedIds.has(i.id));

            return (
              <>
                {pinnedItemsList.length > 0 && (
                  <>
                    <div className="px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] text-primary uppercase bg-primary/5">Pinned</div>
                    {pinnedItemsList.map(acc => (
                      <button
                        key={`pinned-${acc.id}`}
                        onClick={() => handleSourceSelect(showAccountPopup.type, acc.id, acc.id)}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent text-left bg-primary/5"
                      >
                        <Pin className="w-3 h-3 text-primary" />
                        {showAccountPopup.type === 'storage' ? <HardDrive className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                         showAccountPopup.type === 'drive' ? <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                         showAccountPopup.type === 'github' ? <Github className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Terminal className="w-4 h-4" />}
                        {acc.label}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                    {unpinnedItems.length > 0 && <div className="border-t border-border my-1" />}
                  </>
                )}

                {unpinnedItems.map(acc => (
                  <button
                    key={acc.id}
                    onClick={() => handleSourceSelect(showAccountPopup.type, acc.id, acc.id)}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-accent text-left"
                  >
                    {showAccountPopup.type === 'storage' ? <HardDrive className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                     showAccountPopup.type === 'drive' ? <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" /> :
                     showAccountPopup.type === 'github' ? <Github className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Terminal className="w-4 h-4" />}
                    {acc.label}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </>
            );
          })()}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Row 2: View Toggle + Search + Filter + Sort + Refresh */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2">
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            toggleViewMode();
          }}
          className={cn(
            "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
            viewMode === 'grid' ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "hover:bg-accent"
          )}
          title={viewMode === 'grid' ? 'Grid View' : 'List View'}
        >
          {viewMode === 'grid' ? <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" /> : <List className="w-4 h-4" />}
        </button>

        <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-1">
          <button
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              setShowSearch(!showSearch);
            }}
            className={cn(
              "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
              showSearch ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "hover:bg-accent"
            )}
            title="Toggle Search"
          >
            <Globe className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>

          <div className="flex-1 relative">
            <input
              ref={searchInputRef}
              type="text"
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={handleSearchChange}
              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
              placeholder="Search files..."
              className="w-full px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary"
            />
            {searchQuery && (
              <button
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  clearSearch();
                }}
                className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"
              >
                <X className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
            )}
          </div>

          <button
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              setShowFilter(!showFilter);
              setShowSortMenu(false);
              setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
            }}
            className={cn(
              "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors relative",
              showFilter ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "hover:bg-accent"
            )}
            title="Filters"
          >
            <ArrowRight className={cn("w-4 h-4 transition-transform", showFilter && "rotate-90")} />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="relative">
          <button
            onClick={(e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              setShowSortMenu(!showSortMenu);
              setShowFilter(false);
              setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false);
            }}
            onMouseDown={() => {
              longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
                setSortScope(prev => prev === 'current' ? 'full' : 'current');
              }, 800);
            }}
            onMouseUp={clearRecentLongPress}
            onMouseLeave={clearRecentLongPress}
            className={cn(
              "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors relative",
              showSortMenu ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" : "hover:bg-accent"
            )}
            title={`Sort (${sortScope === 'current' ? 'Current Path' : 'Full Panel'}) - Long press to toggle scope`}
          >
            <ArrowUpDown className="w-4 h-4" />
            {sortScope === 'full' && (
              <span className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 w-2 h-2 bg-primary rounded-full border border-card" />
            )}
          </button>

          {showSortMenu && (
            <div className="absolute top-full right-0 mt-1 w-48 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 py-1">
              <button
                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleSortChange('name-asc'); }}
                className={cn("w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center justify-between", sortMode === 'name-asc' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary")}
              >
                Name (A-Z)
                {sortMode === 'name-asc' && <ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3 rotate-90" />}
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleSortChange('name-desc'); }}
                className={cn("w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center justify-between", sortMode === 'name-desc' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary")}
              >
                Name (Z-A)
                {sortMode === 'name-desc' && <ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3 rotate-90" />}
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleSortChange('date'); }}
                className={cn("w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center justify-between", sortMode === 'date' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary")}
              >
                Date Modified
                {sortMode === 'date' && <ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3 rotate-90" />}
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleSortChange('size'); }}
                className={cn("w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm text-left hover:bg-accent flex items-center justify-between", sortMode === 'size' && "bg-primary/10 text-primary")}
              >
                Size
                {sortMode === 'size' && <ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3 rotate-90" />}
              </button>
              <div className="border-t border-border my-1" />
              <div className="px-3 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                Scope: {sortScope === 'current' ? 'Current Path' : 'Full Panel'}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* REFRESH BUTTON WITH LONG PRESS - SAME POSITION, SAME UI */}
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            handleRefresh();
          }}
          onMouseDown={() => {
            longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
              handleRefreshLongPress();
            }, 800);
          }}
          onMouseUp={clearRecentLongPress}
          onMouseLeave={clearRecentLongPress}
          onTouchStart={() => {
            longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
              handleRefreshLongPress();
            }, 800);
          }}
          onTouchEnd={clearRecentLongPress}
          className={cn(
            "p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors relative",
            isTermuxAutoRefreshActive() ? "text-green-500 bg-green-500/10" : "hover:bg-accent"
          )}
          title={isTermuxAutoRefreshActive() ? `Auto-refresh: ${getAutoRefreshSeconds()}s (long press to configure)` : "Refresh (long press for auto)"}
        >
          <RefreshCw className={cn("w-4 h-4", isTermuxAutoRefreshActive() && "animate-spin")} />
          {isTermuxAutoRefreshActive() && (
            <span className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full border border-card" />
          )}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Row 3: Path Bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2 pb-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
        <button
          onClick={() => handleBreadcrumbClick('/', true)}
          className="hover:text-primary hover:underline transition-colors"
        >
          /
        </button>
        {getPathSegments().map((segment, index) => (
          <span key={segment.path} className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
            <button
              onClick={() => handleBreadcrumbClick(segment.path, segment.isRoot)}
              className={cn(
                "hover:text-primary hover:underline transition-colors font-medium",
                segment.isRoot && "text-primary"
              )}
            >
              {segment.label}
            </button>
            {index < getPathSegments().length - 1 && (
              <span className="text-muted-foreground/50">/</span>
            )}
          </span>
        ))}
      </div>

      {showFilter && (
        <PanelFilterOverlay
          panel={panel}
          isOpen={showFilter}
          onClose={() => setShowFilter(false)}
        />
      )}

      {/* AUTO REFRESH DIALOG - SAME POSITION AS BEFORE */}
      {showAutoRefreshDialog && (
        <div className="absolute top-full right-0 mt-1 w-64 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 p-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">Auto Refresh</span>
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowAutoRefreshDialog(false)}
              className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
            >
              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div>
              <label className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Interval (seconds)</label>
              <input
                type="number"
                value={getAutoRefreshSeconds()}
                onChange={(e) => {
                  const seconds = Math.max(5, parseInt(e.target.value) || 5);
                  setAutoRefreshSeconds(seconds);
                  if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
                    const termuxPanel = (window as any).__termuxFilePanel;
                    if (termuxPanel) {
                      termuxPanel.setSeconds(seconds);
                    }
                  }
                }}
                min={5}
                className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg"
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Minimum: 5 seconds</p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              {isTermuxAutoRefreshActive() ? (
                <button
                  onClick={stopAutoRefresh}
                  className="flex-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-destructive/90"
                >
                  Stop
                </button>
              ) : (
                <button
                  onClick={startAutoRefresh}
                  className="flex-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90"
                >
                  Start
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/NewResizablePanel.tsx =====

import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { PanelContent } from './PanelContent';
import { NewPanelHeader } from './NewPanelHeader';
import { NewPanelFooter } from './NewPanelFooter';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

interface NewResizablePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  isLast: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function NewResizablePanel({ panel, isActive, isLast, onActivate, onClose }: NewResizablePanelProps) {
  const { navigatePanelBack, setPanelPath, setPanelAccountId } = usePanelStore();
  const [refreshKey, setRefreshKey] = useState(0);
  
  // Subscribe to store changes to get live viewMode and sortBy updates
  const drivePanelState = useDriveStore((s) => (s as any).panels?.[panel.id]);
  const gitHubPanelState = useGitHubStore((s) => (s as any).panels?.[panel.id]);
  
  // Determine current view/sort based on source - reactive to store changes
  const getViewMode = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      return drivePanelState?.viewMode ?? panel.viewMode ?? 'list';
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github') {
      return gitHubPanelState?.viewMode ?? panel.viewMode ?? 'list';
    }
    return panel.viewMode ?? 'list';
  };

  const getSortMode = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      return drivePanelState?.sortBy ?? panel.sortBy ?? 'name-asc';
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github') {
      return gitHubPanelState?.sortBy ?? panel.sortBy ?? 'name-asc';
    }
    return panel.sortBy ?? 'name-asc';
  };

  // Force re-render when panel config changes
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState(getViewMode());
  const [sortMode, setSortMode] = useState(getSortMode());

  useEffect(() => {
    setViewMode(getViewMode());
    setSortMode(getSortMode());
  }, [panel.source, drivePanelState?.viewMode, drivePanelState?.sortBy, gitHubPanelState?.viewMode, gitHubPanelState?.sortBy, panel.viewMode, panel.sortBy]);

  const handleRefresh = useCallback(() => {
    setRefreshKey(k => k + 1);
  }, []);

  // FIXED: Handle back navigation - allows going back from /terminal/termux to /terminal
  const handleBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal' || (panel.source === 'storage' && !panel.handle)) {
      // Path-based navigation for Termux and backend storage
      const currentPath = panel.path || '/terminal/termux';
      const parts = currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      
      // For terminal: /terminal/termux/sub ŌåÆ /terminal/termux ŌåÆ /terminal ŌåÆ /
      if (parts.length > 2 && parts[0] === 'terminal' && parts[1] === 'termux') {
        // Inside termux filesystem, remove last segment
        const newPath = '/' + parts.slice(0, -1).join('/');
        setPanelPath(panel.id, newPath);
      } else if (currentPath === '/terminal/termux') {
        // FIXED: At termux root, go back to terminal category /terminal (NOT disabled)
        setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal');
      } else if (currentPath === '/terminal') {
        // At terminal category, go to source root
        setPanelPath(panel.id, '/');
      } else if (parts.length > 0) {
        // Generic path-based back
        const newPath = '/' + parts.slice(0, -1).join('/');
        setPanelPath(panel.id, newPath === '/' ? '' : newPath);
      }
    } else {
      // Handle-based navigation for native storage
      navigatePanelBack(panel.id);
    }
    handleRefresh();
  }, [panel.id, panel.path, panel.source, panel.handle, navigatePanelBack, setPanelPath, handleRefresh]);

  // FIXED: Home goes to /terminal/termux for Terminal source (specific terminal)
  const handleHome = useCallback(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      // Single click: go to specific terminal root /terminal/termux
      setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal/termux');
    } else if (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github') {
      const currentPath = panel.path || '/';
      const parts = currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      if (parts.length >= 2) {
        const newPath = '/' + parts.slice(0, 2).join('/');
        setPanelPath(panel.id, newPath);
      }
    } else {
      // Storage - go to first segment
      const currentPath = panel.path || '/';
      const parts = currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      if (parts.length > 0) {
        setPanelPath(panel.id, '/' + parts[0]);
      }
    }
    handleRefresh();
  }, [panel.path, panel.source, panel.id, setPanelPath, handleRefresh]);

  // FIXED: Long press home goes to Terminal category root (/terminal) for Terminal source
  const handleHomeLongPress = useCallback(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      // Long press: go to Terminal category level (where user can see termux entry)
      setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal');
    } else {
      // Other sources: go to root
      setPanelPath(panel.id, '/');
      setPanelAccountId(panel.id, null as any);
    }
    handleRefresh();
  }, [panel.id, panel.source, setPanelPath, setPanelAccountId, handleRefresh]);

  const handlePathChange = useCallback((path: string) => {
    setPanelPath(panel.id, path);
    handleRefresh();
  }, [panel.id, setPanelPath, handleRefresh]);

  return (
    <div
      className={cn(
        'flex flex-col h-full border-r border-border bg-card',
        isActive && 'ring-2 ring-primary',
        isLast && 'border-r-0'
      )}
      style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}
      onClick={onActivate}
    >
      <NewPanelHeader
        panel={panel}
        isActive={isActive}
        onActivate={onActivate}
        onRefresh={handleRefresh}
        onPathChange={handlePathChange}
        viewMode={viewMode}
        sortMode={sortMode}
      />

      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden relative">
        <PanelContent 
          key={`${panel.id}-${refreshKey}`} 
          panel={panel}
        />
      </div>

      <NewPanelFooter
        panel={panel}
        onBack={handleBack}
        onHome={handleHome}
        onHomeLongPress={handleHomeLongPress}
        onClose={onClose}
        onRefresh={handleRefresh}
      />
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelContainer.tsx =====

import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { ResizablePanel } from './ResizablePanel';
import { GlobalSearchBar } from '@/components/Search/GlobalSearchBar';
import { FilterPanel } from '@/components/Search/FilterPanel';
import { SearchResultsOverlay } from '@/components/Search/SearchResultsOverlay';
import { Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { MAX_PANELS } from '@/types/panel';
import { RootView } from '@/components/Storage/RootView';
import { StoragePanel } from './StoragePanel';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

export function PanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { addPanel, removePanel, setActivePanel, setPanelHandle, setPanelPath } = usePanelStore();

  // Left panel is always index 0, fixed as storage root
  const leftPanel = panels[0];
  const rightPanels = panels.slice(1);
  const canAddPanel = rightPanels.length < MAX_PANELS - 1; // Max total 4, so right max 3

  const [leftEntries, setLeftEntries] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [isLeftLoading, setIsLeftLoading] = useState(false);

  const handleMountSelect = (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => {
    if (leftPanel) {
      setPanelHandle(leftPanel.id, handle);
      setPanelPath(leftPanel.id, `/${name}`);
      refreshLeftPanel();
    }
  };

  const refreshLeftPanel = async () => {
    if (!leftPanel?.handle) {
      setLeftEntries([]);
      return;
    }
    setIsLeftLoading(true);
    try {
      const items = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(leftPanel.handle);
      setLeftEntries(items);
    } finally {
      setIsLeftLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    refreshLeftPanel();
  }, [leftPanel?.handle]);

  // Ensure left panel always exists and is storage root
  if (!leftPanel || leftPanel.source !== 'storage') {
    return <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center">Loading...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* Top bar with search */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <GlobalSearchBar />
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          onClick={addPanel}
          disabled={!canAddPanel}
          className="shrink-0 gap-2"
        >
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
          Add Panel
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Global overlays */}
      <FilterPanel />
      <SearchResultsOverlay />

      {/* Panels layout */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden">
        {/* LEFT FIXED PANEL - Always Storage Root */}
        <div className="flex-shrink-0 h-full border-r border-border" style={{ width: leftPanel.width }}>
          <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
            {/* Custom header for left panel - no source switcher, no close button */}
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border bg-card/50">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-primary" />
                <span className="text-sm font-medium">Storage</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{leftPanel.path}</span>
              </div>
              {/* Left panel has no close button and no source dropdown */}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="h-6 w-6"
                  onClick={() => usePanelStore.getState().togglePanelMinimize(leftPanel.id)}
                >
                  <span className="text-xs">ŌłÆ</span>
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Left panel content - always storage */}
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
              {!leftPanel.handle ? (
                <RootView panelId={leftPanel.id} onMountSelect={handleMountSelect} />
              ) : (
                <StoragePanel
                  panel={leftPanel}
                  entries={leftEntries}
                  isLoading={isLeftLoading}
                  onRefresh={refreshLeftPanel}
                />
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* RIGHT FLEXIBLE PANELS */}
        {rightPanels.map((panel, index) => (
          <ResizablePanel
            key={panel.id}
            panel={panel}
            isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
            isLast={index === rightPanels.length - 1}
            onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
            onClose={() => removePanel(panel.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelContent.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, memo } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { StoragePanel } from './StoragePanel';
import { RootView } from '@/components/Storage/RootView';
import { AccountSelector as DriveAccountSelector } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/AccountSelector';
import { AccountSelector as GitHubAccountSelector } from '@/components/GitHub/AccountSelector';
import { TermuxFilePanel } from '@/components/Terminal/TermuxFilePanel';
import { GitHubPanel } from '@/components/GitHub/GitHubPanel';
import { DrivePanel } from '@/components/GoogleDrive/DrivePanel';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { useRecentSourcesStore } from '@/stores/recentSourcesStore';
import { Terminal } from 'lucide-react';
import { FileSystemEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { LRUCache } from 'lru-cache';

// Global LRU cache for backend directories
const backendCache = new LRUCache<string, FileSystemEntry[]>({
  max: 50,
  ttl: 1000 * 60 * 2, // 2 minutes
});

interface PanelContentProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  onRefresh?: () => void;
}

// Helper to create a minimal mock handle
function createMockHandle(item: any): FileSystemFileHandle | FileSystemDirectoryHandle {
  const baseHandle = {
    name: item.name,
    isSameEntry: async () => false,
  };
  
  if (item.kind === 'directory') {
    return {
      ...baseHandle,
      kind: 'directory' as const,
      getDirectoryHandle: async () => { throw new Error('Not implemented'); },
      getFileHandle: async () => { throw new Error('Not implemented'); },
      removeEntry: async () => { throw new Error('Not implemented'); },
      resolve: async () => null,
      [Symbol.asyncIterator]: async function* () { yield* []; },
      keys: async function* () { yield* []; },
      values: async function* () { yield* []; },
      entries: async function* () { yield* []; },
    } as unknown as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
  } else {
    return {
      ...baseHandle,
      kind: 'file' as const,
      getFile: async () => new File([], item.name),
      createWritable: async () => { throw new Error('Not implemented'); },
    } as unknown as FileSystemFileHandle;
  }
}

export const PanelContent = memo(function PanelContent({ panel, onRefresh }: PanelContentProps) {
  const [isRootView, setIsRootView] = useState(false);
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState<FileSystemEntry[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  const setPanelHandle = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelHandle);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const setPanelAccountId = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelAccountId);
  const setActiveAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const setActiveAccountGitHub = useGitHubStore((s) => s.setActiveAccount);
  const githubActiveAccountId = useGitHubStore((s) => s.activeAccountId);
  const loadRepositories = useGitHubStore((s) => s.loadRepositories);
  const addRecent = useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.addRecent);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      if (githubActiveAccountId !== panel.accountId) {
        setActiveAccountGitHub(panel.accountId);
      }
      loadRepositories();
    }
  }, [panel.source, panel.accountId, githubActiveAccountId, setActiveAccountGitHub, loadRepositories]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (panel.source === 'storage') {
      const path = panel.path || '/';
      setIsRootView(path === '/' || path === '');
    } else if (panel.source === 'drive') {
      setIsRootView(panel.path === '/' || !panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github') {
      setIsRootView(panel.path === '/' || !panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
      const path = panel.path || '/terminal/termux';
      setIsRootView(path === '/' || path === '/terminal');
    } else {
      setIsRootView(false);
    }
  }, [panel.source, panel.handle, panel.path, panel.accountId]);

  // Optimized backend loading with caching
  const loadBackendEntries = useCallback(async () => {
    if (panel.source !== 'storage') return;
    if (panel.handle) return; // Has native handle, let StoragePanel handle it
    if (!panel.path || panel.path === '/') return;
    if (panel.path.startsWith('/storage/emulated')) return;

    const cacheKey = `${panel.id}-${panel.path}`;
    const cached = backendCache.get(cacheKey);
    
    if (cached) {
      setEntries(cached);
      setIsLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    
    try {
      const data = await fileSystemBackend.listBackendDirectory(panel.path);
      const mappedData: FileSystemEntry[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
        name: item.name,
        kind: item.kind === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 'file',
        size: item.size || 0,
        lastModified: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : new Date(),
        path: item.path || `${panel.path}/${item.name}`.replace(/\/+/g, '/'),
        handle: createMockHandle(item),
        permissions: item.permissions,
        owner: item.owner,
        group: item.group,
        isSymlink: item.isSymlink,
        symlinkTarget: item.symlinkTarget,
        isHidden: item.isHidden,
        mimeType: item.mimeType,
        createdAt: item.createdAt ? new Date(item.createdAt) : undefined,
        accessedAt: item.accessedAt ? new Date(item.accessedAt) : undefined,
        inode: item.inode,
        hardLinks: item.hardLinks,
        blocks: item.blocks,
        blockSize: item.blockSize,
      }));
      
      backendCache.set(cacheKey, mappedData);
      setEntries(mappedData);
      onRefresh?.();
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Failed to load backend directory:', err);
      setError(err.message);
      setEntries([]);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }, [panel.source, panel.handle, panel.path, panel.id, onRefresh]);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadBackendEntries();
  }, [loadBackendEntries]);

  const handleStorageMountSelect = (handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => {
    setPanelHandle(panel.id, handle);
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/${name}`);
    setIsRootView(false);
    addRecent(panel.id, {
      type: 'storage',
      id: name,
      label: name,
      subType: name,
    });
  };

  const handleAndroidStorageSelect = () => {
    setPanelHandle(panel.id, null);
    setPanelPath(panel.id, '/storage/emulated/0');
    setIsRootView(false);
    addRecent(panel.id, {
      type: 'storage',
      id: 'internal',
      label: 'Android Storage',
      subType: 'internal',
    });
  };

  const handleDriveAccountSelect = (accountId: string) => {
    setActiveAccount(accountId);
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'drive');
    setPanelAccountId(panel.id, accountId);
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/drive/${accountId}`);
    addRecent(panel.id, {
      type: 'drive',
      id: accountId,
      label: accountId.split('@')[0],
    });
  };

  const handleGitHubAccountSelect = (accountId: string) => {
    setActiveAccountGitHub(accountId);
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'github');
    setPanelAccountId(panel.id, accountId);
    setPanelPath(panel.id, `/github/${accountId}`);
    addRecent(panel.id, {
      type: 'github',
      id: accountId,
      label: accountId,
    });
  };

  const handleTermuxEntry = () => {
    setPanelPath(panel.id, '/terminal/termux');
    setIsRootView(false);
    addRecent(panel.id, {
      type: 'terminal',
      id: 'termux',
      label: 'Termux',
    });
  };

  const handleRefresh = useCallback(() => {
    const cacheKey = `${panel.id}-${panel.path}`;
    backendCache.delete(cacheKey);
    loadBackendEntries();
  }, [panel.id, panel.path, loadBackendEntries]);

  if (panel.source === 'storage' && isRootView) {
    return <RootView panelId={panel.id} onMountSelect={handleStorageMountSelect} onAndroidStorageSelect={handleAndroidStorageSelect} />;
  }

  if (panel.source === 'drive' && isRootView) {
    return <DriveAccountSelector onAccountSelect={handleDriveAccountSelect} />;
  }

  if (panel.source === 'github' && isRootView) {
    const AccountSelectorComponent = GitHubAccountSelector as any;
    return <AccountSelectorComponent onAccountSelect={handleGitHubAccountSelect} />;
  }

  if (panel.source === 'terminal' && isRootView) {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background p-4">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
          <button
            onClick={handleTermuxEntry}
            className="group flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent transition-all text-left relative"
          >
            <div className="mb-2 text-primary group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
              <Terminal className="w-12 h-12" />
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate w-full text-center">
              Termux
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
              Local Terminal
            </p>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  switch (panel.source) {
    case 'storage':
      return (
        <StoragePanel 
          panel={panel} 
          entries={entries} 
          isLoading={isLoading} 
          onRefresh={handleRefresh} 
        />
      );
    case 'terminal':
      return <TermuxFilePanel panel={panel} onRefresh={onRefresh} />;
    case 'github':
      return <GitHubPanel panelId={panel.id} />;
    case 'drive':
      return <DrivePanel panelId={panel.id} />;
    default:
      return null;
  }
});


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelFilterOverlay.tsx =====


import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { useSearchStore } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { getCategorizedExtensions, getCategoryDisplayName } from '@/lib/extensionScanner';
import { ExtensionStats } from '@/types/search';
import { 
  X, 
  HardDrive, 
  Github, 
  FolderGit, 
  Terminal,
  Search,
  Check,
  Lock,
  Unlock
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';

interface PanelFilterOverlayProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
}

const sourceIcons = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const storageSubTypes = [
  { id: 'internal', label: 'Internal Storage' },
  { id: 'sdcard', label: 'SD Card' },
  { id: 'usb', label: 'USB / OTG' },
  { id: 'pc', label: 'PC / Others' },
];

export function PanelFilterOverlay({ panel, isOpen, onClose }: PanelFilterOverlayProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'sources' | 'accounts' | 'extensions'>('sources');
  const [extensionSearch, setExtensionSearch] = useState('');
  const [selectedSources, setSelectedSources] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [selectedAccounts, setSelectedAccounts] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [selectedExtensions, setSelectedExtensions] = useState<string[]>([]);
  
  const filters = useSearchStore((s) => s.filters);
  const setFilters = useSearchStore((s) => s.setFilters);
  const availableExtensions = useSearchStore((s) => s.availableExtensions);
  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);

  const categorizedExtensions = useMemo(() => getCategorizedExtensions(), [availableExtensions]);

  const filteredExtensions = useMemo(() => {
    if (!extensionSearch) return [];
    return availableExtensions.filter((e: ExtensionStats) => 
      e.extension.toLowerCase().includes(extensionSearch.toLowerCase())
    ).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count).slice(0, 20);
  }, [availableExtensions, extensionSearch]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const toggleSource = (source: string) => {
    setSelectedSources(prev => 
      prev.includes(source) 
        ? prev.filter(s => s !== source)
        : [...prev, source]
    );
  };

  const toggleAccount = (account: string) => {
    setSelectedAccounts(prev => 
      prev.includes(account) 
        ? prev.filter(a => a !== account)
        : [...prev, account]
    );
  };

  const toggleExtension = (ext: string) => {
    setSelectedExtensions(prev => 
      prev.includes(ext) 
        ? prev.filter(e => e !== ext)
        : [...prev, ext]
    );
  };

  const applyFilters = () => {
    setFilters({
      sources: selectedSources as any,
      accounts: selectedAccounts,
      extensions: selectedExtensions,
    });
    onClose();
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setSelectedSources([]);
    setSelectedAccounts([]);
    setSelectedExtensions([]);
    setFilters({
      sources: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
      accounts: [],
      extensions: [],
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="absolute inset-x-0 top-full mt-1 bg-card/95 backdrop-blur-md border border-border rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 max-h-[70vh] flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <span className="font-medium">Filters</span>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button 
            onClick={clearFilters}
            className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
          >
            Clear All
          </button>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tabs */}
      <div className="flex border-b border-border">
        {(['sources', 'accounts', 'extensions'] as const).map(tab => (
          <button
            key={tab}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
            className={cn(
              "flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm capitalize transition-colors",
              activeTab === tab ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary border-b-2 border-primary" : "hover:bg-accent"
            )}
          >
            {tab}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-3">
        {/* Sources Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'sources' && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {/* Main Sources */}
            <div>
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">Sources</span>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mt-2">
                {(Object.keys(sourceIcons) as Array<keyof typeof sourceIcons>).map(source => {
                  const Icon = sourceIcons[source];
                  const isSelected = selectedSources.includes(source);
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={source}
                      onClick={() => toggleSource(source)}
                      className={cn(
                        "flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg border transition-all",
                        isSelected 
                          ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary" 
                          : "border-border hover:bg-accent"
                      )}
                    >
                      <Icon className="w-4 h-4" />
                      <span className="text-sm capitalize">{source}</span>
                      {isSelected && <Check className="w-3 h-3 ml-auto" />}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Storage Sub-types */}
            <div className="border-t border-border pt-3">
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">Storage Locations</span>
              <div className="space-y-1 mt-2">
                {storageSubTypes.map(st => (
                  <button
                    key={st.id}
                    onClick={() => toggleSource(`storage:${st.id}`)}
                    className={cn(
                      "w-full flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
                      selectedSources.includes(`storage:${st.id}`) ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent"
                    )}
                  >
                    <span className="text-sm">{st.label}</span>
                    {selectedSources.includes(`storage:${st.id}`) && <Check className="w-3 h-3" />}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Accounts Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'accounts' && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {/* Drive Accounts */}
            {driveAccounts.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">Google Drive</span>
                <div className="space-y-1 mt-2">
                  {driveAccounts.map(acc => (
                    <button
                      key={acc.id}
                      onClick={() => toggleAccount(acc.id)}
                      className={cn(
                        "w-full flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
                        selectedAccounts.includes(acc.id) ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent"
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <FolderGit className="w-4 h-4" />
                        <span className="text-sm">{acc.id.split('@')[0]}</span>
                      </div>
                      {selectedAccounts.includes(acc.id) && <Check className="w-3 h-3" />}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* GitHub Accounts */}
            {githubAccounts.length > 0 && (
              <div className={cn(driveAccounts.length > 0 && "border-t border-border pt-3")}>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">GitHub</span>
                <div className="space-y-1 mt-2">
                  {githubAccounts.map(acc => (
                    <button
                      key={acc.id}
                      onClick={() => toggleAccount(acc.id)}
                      className={cn(
                        "w-full flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors",
                        selectedAccounts.includes(acc.id) ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary" : "hover:bg-accent"
                      )}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Github className="w-4 h-4" />
                        <span className="text-sm">{acc.id}</span>
                      </div>
                      {selectedAccounts.includes(acc.id) && <Check className="w-3 h-3" />}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {driveAccounts.length === 0 && githubAccounts.length === 0 && (
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center py-4">
                No accounts connected
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Extensions Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'extensions' && (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {/* Extension Search */}
            <div>
              <Input
                placeholder="Search extensions..."
                value={extensionSearch}
                onChange={(e) => setExtensionSearch(e.target.value)}
                className="text-sm"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Search Results */}
            {extensionSearch && filteredExtensions.length > 0 && (
              <div className="border-b border-border pb-3">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Search Results</span>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1">
                  {filteredExtensions.map((ext: ExtensionStats) => (
                    <button
                      key={ext.extension}
                      onClick={() => toggleExtension(ext.extension)}
                      className={cn(
                        "px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-full border transition-colors",
                        selectedExtensions.includes(ext.extension)
                          ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                          : "border-border hover:bg-accent"
                      )}
                    >
                      {ext.extension} ({ext.count})
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Categorized Extensions */}
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {categorizedExtensions.map(([category, data]) => (
                <div key={category}>
                  <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase">
                    {data.name} ({data.count})
                  </span>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mt-1">
                    {data.extensions.slice(0, 10).map((ext: ExtensionStats) => (
                      <button
                        key={ext.extension}
                        onClick={() => toggleExtension(ext.extension)}
                        className={cn(
                          "px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-full border transition-colors",
                          selectedExtensions.includes(ext.extension)
                            ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                            : "border-border hover:bg-accent"
                        )}
                      >
                        {ext.extension}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                    {data.extensions.length > 10 && (
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground px-1">
                        +{data.extensions.length - 10} more
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}

              {categorizedExtensions.length === 0 && (
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center py-4">
                  No extensions scanned yet. Connect sources to build extension list.
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-t border-border">
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          {selectedSources.length + selectedAccounts.length + selectedExtensions.length} filters active
        </span>
        <div className="flex gap-2">
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="px-3 py-1.5 text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
          >
            Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={applyFilters}
            className="px-3 py-1.5 text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors"
          >
            Apply
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PanelHeader.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { HardDrive, FolderGit, Github, Terminal, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { RootThreeDotsMenu } from '@/components/Menu/RootThreeDotsMenu';
import { FormatDialog } from '@/components/Format/FormatDialog';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';

const sourceIcons: Record<SourceType, React.ElementType> = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const sourceLabels: Record<SourceType, string> = {
  storage: 'Storage',
  drive: 'Drive',
  github: 'GitHub',
  terminal: 'Terminal',
};

interface PanelHeaderProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onClose: () => void; // kept for compatibility but not used (no close button)
}

export function PanelHeader({ panel, isActive, onActivate }: PanelHeaderProps) {
  const setPanelSource = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelSource);
  const [showFormatDialog, setShowFormatDialog] = useState(false);
  const [showSourceMenu, setShowSourceMenu] = useState(false);
  const Icon = sourceIcons[panel.source];
  const isRoot = panel.path === '/' || (panel.source === 'drive' && !panel.accountId) || (panel.source === 'github' && !panel.accountId);

  const handleFormat = async () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      console.log('Formatting Drive account:', panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      console.log('Formatting GitHub account:', panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'storage' && panel.handle) {
      console.log('Formatting storage:', panel.path);
    }
    setShowFormatDialog(false);
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      useDriveStore.getState().removeAccount(panel.accountId);
    } else if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      useGitHubStore.getState().removeAccount(panel.accountId);
    }
    setPanelSource(panel.id, 'storage');
  };

  const getRootItemName = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find(a => a.id === panel.accountId);
      return account ? account.id.split('@')[0] : panel.accountId;
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) return panel.accountId;
    if (panel.source === 'storage' && panel.handle) return panel.path.replace('/', '');
    return panel.source;
  };

  const getDisplayIdentity = () => {
    if (panel.source === 'drive' && panel.accountId) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_drive_${panel.accountId}`);
      if (saved) {
        const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved);
        if (masked && name) return name;
      }
      return panel.accountId.split('@')[0];
    }
    if (panel.source === 'github' && panel.accountId) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(`mask_github_${panel.accountId}`);
      if (saved) {
        const { masked, name } = JSON.parse(saved);
        if (masked && name) return name;
      }
      return panel.accountId;
    }
    return getRootItemName();
  };

  const handleSourceSelect = (newSource: SourceType) => {
    setPanelSource(panel.id, newSource);
    setShowSourceMenu(false);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div
        className={cn('flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border bg-card/50 cursor-pointer', isActive && 'bg-primary/5')}
        onClick={onActivate}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0">
          {/* Source switcher dropdown */}
          <div className="relative shrink-0 ml-1">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              className="h-8 w-8"
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                setShowSourceMenu(!showSourceMenu);
              }}
            >
              <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
            {showSourceMenu && (
              <>
                <div
                  className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
                  onClick={() => setShowSourceMenu(false)}
                />
                <div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-1 bg-card border rounded shadow-lg z-50 min-w-[140px]">
                  {(['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'] as SourceType[]).map((src) => (
                    <button
                      key={src}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        handleSourceSelect(src);
                      }}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-left text-sm hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2"
                    >
                      {React.createElement(sourceIcons[src], { className: 'w-4 h-4' })}
                      <span>{sourceLabels[src]}</span>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>

          <Icon className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{sourceLabels[panel.source]}</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{panel.path}</span>
          {isRoot && (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github') && (
            <span className="text-xs text-primary/70 ml-1">({getDisplayIdentity()})</span>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
          {/* Three dots menu for root items */}
          {isRoot && (panel.source === 'drive' || panel.source === 'github' || panel.source === 'storage') && (
            <RootThreeDotsMenu
              itemType={panel.source === 'drive' ? 'drive-account' : panel.source === 'github' ? 'github-username' : 'storage-mount'}
              itemId={panel.accountId || panel.id}
              itemName={getRootItemName()}
              originalIdentity={panel.accountId || undefined}
              onFormat={async () => setShowFormatDialog(true)}
              onDelete={handleDelete}
            />
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Format Dialog */}
      {showFormatDialog && (
        <FormatDialog
          isOpen={showFormatDialog}
          onClose={() => setShowFormatDialog(false)}
          itemName={getRootItemName()}
          itemType={panel.source === 'drive' ? 'drive' : panel.source === 'github' ? 'github' : 'storage'}
          itemId={panel.accountId || panel.id}
          onFormat={handleFormat}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}

import React from 'react';


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/PlaceholderPanel.tsx =====

import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { 
  HardDrive, 
  FolderGit, 
  Github, 
  Terminal,
  CheckCircle
} from 'lucide-react';

const sourceIcons: Record<SourceType, React.ElementType> = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

const sourceLabels: Record<SourceType, string> = {
  storage: 'Storage',
  drive: 'Google Drive',
  github: 'GitHub',
  terminal: 'Terminal',
};

interface PlaceholderPanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  source: SourceType;
}

export function PlaceholderPanel({ panel, source }: PlaceholderPanelProps) {
  const Icon = sourceIcons[source];
  const label = sourceLabels[source];

  // Terminal is now fully implemented, shouldn't show placeholder
  if (source === 'terminal') {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center">
        <CheckCircle className="w-12 h-12 text-green-500 mb-4" />
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Terminal Ready</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Click the Terminal button in the panel header to initialize WebContainer.
        </p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center">
      <div className="p-4 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 text-primary mb-4">
        <Icon className="w-12 h-12" />
      </div>
      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2">{label}</h3>
      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground max-w-xs">
        This {label} panel is independent from other panels.
        <br />
        Source: <span className="font-medium capitalize">{panel.source}</span>
      </p>
      <div className="mt-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        Panel ID: {panel.id}
        <br />
        Path: {panel.path}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/ResizablePanel.tsx =====

import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { PanelContent } from './PanelContent';
import { PanelHeader } from './PanelHeader';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ArrowLeft, Home, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { PlusButton } from '@/components/FileManager/PlusButton';

interface ResizablePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  isActive: boolean;
  isLast: boolean;
  onActivate: () => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function ResizablePanel({ panel, isActive, isLast, onActivate, onClose }: ResizablePanelProps) {
  const { navigatePanelBack, setPanelPath } = usePanelStore();
  const [refreshKey, setRefreshKey] = useState(0);

  const handleBack = () => {
    navigatePanelBack(panel.id);
    setRefreshKey(k => k + 1);
  };

  const handleHome = () => {
    setPanelPath(panel.id, '/');
    setRefreshKey(k => k + 1);
  };

  const canGoBack = panel.history.length > 0;

  return (
    <div
      className={cn(
        'flex flex-col h-full border-r border-border bg-card',
        isActive && 'ring-2 ring-primary',
        isLast && 'border-r-0'
      )}
      style={{ width: panel.width }}
      onClick={onActivate}
    >
      <PanelHeader
        panel={panel}
        isActive={isActive}
        onActivate={onActivate}
        onClose={onClose}
      />
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden">
        <PanelContent key={`${panel.id}-${refreshKey}`} panel={panel} />
      </div>
      {/* Fixed bottom action bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 border-t border-border bg-muted/30 shrink-0">
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="sm"
          onClick={handleBack}
          disabled={!canGoBack}
          className="h-8 gap-1"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="text-xs">Back</span>
        </Button>
        <PlusButton
          panelId={panel.id}
          sourceType={panel.source}
          currentPath={panel.path}
          isRoot={panel.path === '/' || !panel.accountId}
          handle={panel.handle}
          accountId={panel.accountId}
          onSuccess={() => setRefreshKey(k => k + 1)}
        />
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="sm"
          onClick={handleHome}
          className="h-8 gap-1"
        >
          <Home className="h-4 w-4" />
          <span className="text-xs">Home</span>
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Panel/StoragePanel.tsx =====

import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { FileGrid } from '../FileManager/FileGrid';
import { FileList } from '../FileManager/FileList';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { useMemo, memo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { toVirtualPath } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';

interface StoragePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  isLoading: boolean;
  onRefresh: () => void;
}

export const StoragePanel = memo(function StoragePanel({ 
  panel, 
  entries, 
  isLoading, 
  onRefresh 
}: StoragePanelProps) {
  const navigatePanelForward = usePanelStore((s) => s.navigatePanelForward);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  const refreshPanelDirectory = usePanelStore((s) => s.refreshPanelDirectory);

  const handleNavigateTo = useCallback(async (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => {
    if (entry.kind !== 'directory') return;
    
    const entryWithPath = entry as FileSystemDirectoryEntry & { path?: string };
    const isRealHandle = entry.handle && 
      typeof (entry.handle as any).getDirectoryHandle === 'function';
    
    if (isRealHandle) {
      try {
        await navigatePanelForward(panel.id, entry.handle, entry.name);
        await refreshPanelDirectory(panel.id);
        onRefresh();
        return;
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Native navigation failed, falling back to path-based:', err);
      }
    }
    
    if (entryWithPath.path) {
      const virtualPath = toVirtualPath(entryWithPath.path);
      setPanelPath(panel.id, virtualPath);
      return;
    }
    
    if (panel.path) {
      const newPath = `${panel.path}/${entry.name}`.replace(/\/+/g, '/');
      setPanelPath(panel.id, newPath);
      return;
    }
    
    console.error('No handle or path available for directory:', entry.name);
  }, [panel.id, panel.path, navigatePanelForward, refreshPanelDirectory, setPanelPath, onRefresh]);

  // Memoize sorting - prevents re-sort on every render
  const sortedEntries = useMemo(() => {
    if (!entries?.length) return [];
    const sorted = [...entries];
    const sortMode = panel.sortBy || 'name-asc';
    
    switch (sortMode) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => 
          (b.lastModified?.getTime() || 0) - (a.lastModified?.getTime() || 0)
        );
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => (b.size || 0) - (a.size || 0));
      default:
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    }
  }, [entries, panel.sortBy]);

  const viewMode = panel.viewMode || 'list';

  if (isLoading && !entries.length) {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex items-center justify-center">
        <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden">
        {entries.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <p className="text-lg font-medium">Empty folder</p>
            <p className="text-sm">Create a new folder or file using the + button</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <FileGrid
            entries={sortedEntries}
            onNavigate={handleNavigateTo}
            panelId={panel.id}
          />
        ) : (
          <FileList
            entries={sortedEntries}
            onNavigate={handleNavigateTo}
            panelId={panel.id}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
});

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Permission/PermissionIndicator.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Shield, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, ShieldX, ChevronDown, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

export type PermissionLevel = 'none' | 'read' | 'write' | 'execute' | 'full';

interface PermissionConfig {
  level: PermissionLevel;
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  color: string;
}

const DRIVE_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: 'No Access', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'Viewer', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'Editor', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { level: 'full', label: 'Full Control', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

const GITHUB_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: 'No Access', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'Read', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'Triage', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-yellow-500' },
  { level: 'full', label: 'Admin', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

const TERMINAL_PERMISSIONS: PermissionConfig[] = [
  { level: 'none', label: '---', icon: ShieldX, color: 'text-destructive' },
  { level: 'read', label: 'r--', icon: Shield, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  { level: 'write', label: 'rw-', icon: ShieldCheck, color: 'text-green-500' },
  { level: 'execute', label: 'rwx', icon: ShieldAlert, color: 'text-primary' },
];

interface PermissionIndicatorProps {
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  currentLevel: PermissionLevel;
  itemPath: string;
  itemId?: string;
  onChange?: (newLevel: PermissionLevel) => Promise<void>;
  showLabel?: boolean;
}

export function PermissionIndicator({
  sourceType,
  currentLevel,
  itemPath,
  itemId,
  onChange,
  showLabel = false,
}: PermissionIndicatorProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [localLevel, setLocalLevel] = useState<PermissionLevel>(currentLevel);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const permissions = sourceType === 'drive' ? DRIVE_PERMISSIONS
    : sourceType === 'github' ? GITHUB_PERMISSIONS
    : sourceType === 'terminal' ? TERMINAL_PERMISSIONS
    : DRIVE_PERMISSIONS;

  const currentConfig = permissions.find(p => p.level === localLevel) || permissions[0];
  const Icon = currentConfig.icon;

  const handleSelect = async (level: PermissionLevel) => {
    if (!onChange) return;
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      await onChange(level);
