      setLocalLevel(level);
      setIsOpen(false);
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
      setTimeout(() => setError(null), 3000);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    setLocalLevel(currentLevel);
  }, [currentLevel]);

  return (
    <div className="relative inline-block">
      <button
        onClick={() => onChange && setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className={cn(
          "flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs transition-colors",
          currentConfig.color,
          isLoading && "opacity-50",
          onChange && "hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer"
        )}
        disabled={isLoading || !onChange}
        title={`Current permission: ${currentConfig.label}. Click to change.`}
      >
        {isLoading ? (
          <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />
        ) : (
          <Icon className="w-3 h-3" />
        )}
        {showLabel && <span>{currentConfig.label}</span>}
        {onChange && !isLoading && <ChevronDown className="w-2.5 h-2.5" />}
      </button>

      {error && (
        <div className="absolute bottom-full left-0 mb-1 px-2 py-1 bg-destructive text-white text-xs rounded whitespace-nowrap z-50">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {isOpen && onChange && (
        <>
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-40" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} />
          <div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-1 z-50 bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-lg p-1 min-w-[120px]">
            {permissions.map(perm => (
              <button
                key={perm.level}
                onClick={() => handleSelect(perm.level)}
                className={cn(
                  "w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs rounded hover:bg-accent",
                  localLevel === perm.level && "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                )}
              >
                <perm.icon className={cn("w-3 h-3", perm.color)} />
                <span>{perm.label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptFileArea.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Folder, File, Plus, Pencil, Trash2, Archive, X, Check, Grid3X3, List } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { usePromptStore } from '@/stores/promptStore';

interface PromptFileAreaProps { panelId: string; }

export function PromptFileArea({ panelId }: PromptFileAreaProps) {
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid'|'list'>('list');
  const [newFolderName, setNewFolderName] = useState('');
  const [showNewFolderInput, setShowNewFolderInput] = useState(false);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string|null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const currentSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.currentSession);
  const addFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.addFile);
  const deleteFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFile);
  const renameFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFile);
  const createFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.createFolder);
  const deleteFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFolder);
  const renameFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFolder);
  const compressFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.compressFile);
  const files = currentSession?.files || [];

  const handleCreateFolder = () => { if (newFolderName.trim()) { createFolder(newFolderName.trim(), '/'); setNewFolderName(''); setShowNewFolderInput(false); } };
  const handleRename = (id: string, isFolder: boolean, currentName: string) => { if (renameValue.trim() && renameValue !== currentName) { if (isFolder) renameFolder(id, renameValue.trim()); else renameFile(id, renameValue.trim()); } setRenamingId(null); setRenameValue(''); };
  const handleCompress = (fileId: string) => { const profile = prompt('Select compression profile: zip, 7z, tar.gz', 'zip'); if (profile) compressFile(fileId, [profile]); };
  const renderFileItem = (file: any) => {
    const isRenaming = renamingId === file.id;
    return (
      <div key={file.id} className={cn("flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent group", viewMode === 'grid' ? "flex-col text-center" : "")}>
        <div className={cn("flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0", viewMode === 'grid' && "flex-col")}>
          {file.type === 'folder' ? <Folder className="w-8 h-8 text-primary" /> : <File className="w-8 h-8 text-muted-foreground" />}
          {isRenaming ? (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><Input value={renameValue} onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)} className="h-8 text-sm" autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(file.id, file.type === 'folder', file.name); if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null); }} /><button onClick={() => handleRename(file.id, file.type === 'folder', file.name)} className="p-1 text-green-500"><Check className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="p-1 text-destructive"><X className="w-4 h-4" /></button></div>
          ) : ( <><span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{file.name}</span>{file.size && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{formatBytes(file.size)}</span>}</> )}
        </div>
        {!isRenaming && (<div className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100", viewMode === 'grid' && "mt-2")}><button onClick={() => { setRenamingId(file.id); setRenameValue(file.name); }} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><Pencil className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => handleCompress(file.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><Archive className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => { if (confirm('Delete?')) deleteFile(file.id); }} className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button></div>)}
      </div>
    );
  };
  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border"><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(true)}><Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> New Folder</Button></div><div className="flex items-center border rounded-md"><button onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')} className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-l-md", viewMode === 'grid' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}><Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-r-md", viewMode === 'list' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}><List className="w-4 h-4" /></button></div></div>
      {showNewFolderInput && (<div className="p-3 border-b border-border"><div className="flex gap-2"><Input placeholder="Folder name" value={newFolderName} onChange={(e) => setNewFolderName(e.target.value)} autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleCreateFolder()} /><Button size="sm" onClick={handleCreateFolder}>Create</Button><Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(false)}>Cancel</Button></div></div>)}
      <div className={cn("flex-1 overflow-auto p-3", viewMode === 'grid' ? "grid grid-cols-2 gap-3" : "space-y-2")}>
        {files.length === 0 ? (<div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground"><Folder className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" /><p className="text-sm">No files or folders</p><p className="text-xs">Drag & drop from main panels or create a folder</p></div>) : files.map(renderFileItem)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
function formatBytes(bytes: number): string { if (bytes === 0) return '0 B'; const units = ['B','KB','MB','GB']; let size=bytes; let i=0; while(size>=1024 && i<units.length-1) { size/=1024; i++; } return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`; }

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/LinkListPanel.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Plus, Copy, Share2, Trash2, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';

interface LinkItem { id: string; name: string; link: string; note: string; }
interface LinkListPanelProps { onClose: () => void; onLinksChange?: (links: LinkItem[]) => void; }

export function LinkListPanel({ onClose, onLinksChange }: LinkListPanelProps) {
  const [links, setLinks] = useState<LinkItem[]>([]);
  const [newLink, setNewLink] = useState({ name: '', link: '', note: '' });
  const addLink = () => {
    if (!newLink.name.trim() || !newLink.link.trim()) return;
    const id = Date.now().toString();
    const updated = [...links, { ...newLink, id }];
    setLinks(updated);
    setNewLink({ name: '', link: '', note: '' });
    onLinksChange?.(updated);
  };
  const deleteLink = (id: string) => { const updated = links.filter(l => l.id !== id); setLinks(updated); onLinksChange?.(updated); };
  const copyAllLinks = async () => { const text = links.map(l => `${l.name}\n${l.link}\n${l.note || 'No note'}\n---`).join('\n\n'); await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); alert('All links copied'); };
  const shareAsText = () => { const text = links.map(l => `Name: ${l.name}\nLink: ${l.link}\nNote: ${l.note}\n`).join('\n---\n'); const blob = new Blob([text], { type: 'text/plain' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); window.open(url); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); };
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"><h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Link Manager</h2><button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button></div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-4 space-y-3">
          {links.length === 0 ? <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8"><p>No links added yet</p><p className="text-sm">Use the form below to add links</p></div> : links.map(link => (
            <div key={link.id} className="p-3 rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/30">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between"><div className="flex-1"><p className="font-medium">{link.name}</p><a href={link.link} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline break-all">{link.link}</a>{link.note && <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{link.note}</p>}</div><div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2"><button onClick={() => navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${link.name}\n${link.link}\n${link.note}`)} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded" title="Copy"><Copy className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => deleteLink(link.id)} className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded" title="Delete"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 text-destructive" /></button></div></div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-border space-y-3">
          <Input placeholder="Link name (e.g., Documentation)" value={newLink.name} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, name: e.target.value })} />
          <Input placeholder="URL" value={newLink.link} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, link: e.target.value })} />
          <Textarea placeholder="Note (optional)" value={newLink.note} onChange={(e) => setNewLink({ ...newLink, note: e.target.value })} rows={2} />
          <Button onClick={addLink} disabled={!newLink.name || !newLink.link} className="w-full"><Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Add Link</Button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2 p-4 border-t border-border bg-muted/30"><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={copyAllLinks}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Copy All</Button><Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={shareAsText}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />Share as TXT</Button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptFileManager.tsx =====

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { useDragDrop } from '@/components/DragDrop/useDragDrop';
import { Folder, File, Plus, Pencil, Trash2, Archive, X, Check, Grid3X3, List, ChevronRight, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { MultiCompressPanel, CompressionProfile } from '@/components/DFOL/MultiCompressPanel';

export function PromptFileManager() {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const addFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.addFile);
  const deleteFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFile);
  const renameFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFile);
  const createFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.createFolder);
  const deleteFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteFolder);
  const renameFolder = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameFolder);
  const compressFile = usePromptStore((s) => s.compressFile);
  
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('list');
  const [newFolderName, setNewFolderName] = useState('');
  const [showNewFolderInput, setShowNewFolderInput] = useState(false);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const [showCompressPanel, setShowCompressPanel] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [expandedFolders, setExpandedFolders] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set(['root']));

  const folderStructure = currentSession?.folderStructure;
  const files = currentSession?.files || [];

  if (!currentSession) return null;

  const handleCreateFolder = () => {
    if (newFolderName.trim()) {
      createFolder(newFolderName.trim(), '/');
      setNewFolderName('');
      setShowNewFolderInput(false);
    }
  };

  const handleRename = (id: string, isFolder: boolean, currentName: string) => {
    if (renameValue.trim() && renameValue !== currentName) {
      if (isFolder) renameFolder(id, renameValue.trim());
      else renameFile(id, renameValue.trim());
    }
    setRenamingId(null);
    setRenameValue('');
  };

  const handleCompress = (fileId: string, profiles: CompressionProfile[]) => {
    // Store compression profiles in the file
    compressFile(fileId, profiles);
    setShowCompressPanel(null);
  };

  const toggleFolder = (folderId: string) => {
    setExpandedFolders(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(folderId)) next.delete(folderId);
      else next.add(folderId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const renderTreeItem = (item: any, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isFolder = 'children' in item;
    const isExpanded = expandedFolders.has(item.id);
    const isRenaming = renamingId === item.id;
    const fileObj = !isFolder ? files.find(f => f.id === item.id) : null;

    return (
      <div key={item.id}>
        <div
          className={cn(
            "flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-accent group",
            depth > 0 && "ml-4"
          )}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
        >
          {isFolder && (
            <button
              onClick={() => toggleFolder(item.id)}
              className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0"
            >
              {isExpanded ? (
                <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
              ) : (
                <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />
              )}
            </button>
          )}
          {!isFolder && <span className="w-4 shrink-0" />}
          
          {isFolder ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
          )}
          
          {isRenaming ? (
            <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-1">
              <Input
                value={renameValue}
                onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)}
                className="h-7 text-sm flex-1"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(item.id, isFolder, item.name);
                  if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null);
                }}
              />
              <button onClick={() => handleRename(item.id, isFolder, item.name)} className="p-1 text-green-500">
                <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
              <button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="p-1 text-destructive">
                <X className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              <span className="flex-1 text-sm truncate">{item.name}</span>
              {fileObj && fileObj.isCompressed && (
                <Archive className="w-3 h-3 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
              )}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 shrink-0">
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    setRenamingId(item.id);
                    setRenameValue(item.name);
                  }}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                >
                  <Pencil className="w-3 h-3" />
                </button>
                {!isFolder && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setShowCompressPanel(item.id)}
                    className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                  >
                    <Archive className="w-3 h-3" />
                  </button>
                )}
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (confirm(`Delete ${isFolder ? 'folder' : 'file'} "${item.name}"?`)) {
                      if (isFolder) deleteFolder(item.id);
                      else deleteFile(item.id);
                    }
                  }}
                  className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-destructive" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
        {isFolder && isExpanded && item.children && (
          <div>
            {item.children.map((child: any) => renderTreeItem(child, depth + 1))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  // Drop zone for drag-drop from main panels
  const handleDrop = useCallback(async (e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const dragData = JSON.parse(e.dataTransfer.getData('application/json'));
    if (dragData && dragData.item) {
      addFile({
        name: dragData.item.name,
        size: dragData.item.size || 0,
        type: dragData.item.type || 'application/octet-stream',
        source: 'drag-drop',
        sourcePath: dragData.item.path,
        sourcePanelId: dragData.panelId,
        folderPath: '/',
        isCompressed: false,
      });
    }
  }, [addFile]);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col bg-background">
      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(true)}>
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> New Folder
          </Button>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <button
            onClick={() => setViewMode('grid')}
            className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-l-md", viewMode === 'grid' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() => setViewMode('list')}
            className={cn("p-1.5 px-2 rounded-r-md", viewMode === 'list' && "bg-primary text-primary-foreground")}
          >
            <List className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* New Folder Input */}
      {showNewFolderInput && (
        <div className="p-2 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Input
              placeholder="Folder name"
              value={newFolderName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewFolderName(e.target.value)}
              autoFocus
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleCreateFolder()}
              className="h-8 text-sm"
            />
            <Button size="sm" onClick={handleCreateFolder}>Create</Button>
            <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setShowNewFolderInput(false)}>Cancel</Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* File Tree / Grid */}
      <div
        className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-2"
        onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
        onDrop={handleDrop}
      >
        {folderStructure && folderStructure.children.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <Folder className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">No files or folders</p>
            <p className="text-xs">Drag & drop from main panels or create a folder</p>
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
            {folderStructure?.children.map((item: any) => {
              const isFolder = 'children' in item;
              const fileObj = !isFolder ? files.find(f => f.id === item.id) : null;
              return (
                <div key={item.id} className="p-2 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-center group">
                  {isFolder ? <Folder className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto text-primary" /> : <File className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto text-muted-foreground" />}
                  <p className="text-xs truncate mt-1">{item.name}</p>
                  {fileObj?.isCompressed && <Archive className="w-3 h-3 mx-auto mt-1" />}
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 mt-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100">
                    <button onClick={() => { setRenamingId(item.id); setRenameValue(item.name); }}><Pencil className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
                    {!isFolder && <button onClick={() => setShowCompressPanel(item.id)}><Archive className="w-3 h-3" /></button>}
                    <button onClick={() => { if (confirm('Delete?')) isFolder ? deleteFolder(item.id) : deleteFile(item.id); }}><Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 text-destructive" /></button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-0.5">
            {folderStructure?.children.map((item: any) => renderTreeItem(item))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Multi-Compress Panel */}
      {showCompressPanel && (
        <MultiCompressPanel
          isOpen={true}
          onClose={() => setShowCompressPanel(null)}
          itemName={files.find(f => f.id === showCompressPanel)?.name || 'file'}
          onSave={(profiles) => handleCompress(showCompressPanel, profiles)}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptManagerPage.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession, usePromptSessions, usePromptIsOpen } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { PromptFileManager } from './PromptFileManager';
import { PromptWritingArea } from './PromptWritingArea';
import { PromptSessionList } from './PromptSessionList';
import { PromptNotesPanel } from './PromptNotesPanel';
import { PromptUploadPanel } from './PromptUploadPanel';
import { X, Save, FolderPlus, Check, Cloud, Settings, List, Files } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { Resizable } from 're-resizable';

export function PromptManagerPage() {
  const isOpen = usePromptIsOpen();
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const sessions = usePromptSessions();
  const closePromptManager = usePromptStore((s) => s.closePromptManager);
  const saveSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.saveSession);
  const createSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.createSession);
  const [showNotes, setShowNotes] = useState(false);
  const [showUpload, setShowUpload] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'files' | 'sessions'>('files');

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && !currentSession) {
      createSession('Untitled Session');
    }
  }, [isOpen, currentSession, createSession]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Prompt Manager</h1>
          {currentSession && (
            <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {currentSession.name}
              {currentSession.isCompleted && (
                <span className="ml-2 text-green-600">Ō£ō Completed</span>
              )}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowNotes(!showNotes)}>
            <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            Notes
          </Button>
          
          <Button 
            variant={currentSession?.isCompleted ? 'secondary' : 'default'}
            size="sm"
            onClick={() => setShowUpload(true)}
          >
            <Cloud className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
            {currentSession?.isCompleted ? 'Uploaded' : 'Complete'}
          </Button>
          
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={closePromptManager}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
        {/* Left Side - File Manager & Sessions */}
        <Resizable
          defaultSize={{ width: '40%', height: '100%' }}
          minWidth="20%"
          maxWidth="60%"
          enable={{ right: true }}
          className="flex flex-col border-r border-border"
        >
          {/* Tabs */}
          <div className="flex border-b border-border">
            <button
              className={cn(
                "flex-1 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2",
                activeTab === 'files' ? "bg-accent text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent/50"
              )}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('files')}
            >
              <Files className="w-4 h-4" />
              Files
            </button>
            <button
              className={cn(
                "flex-1 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2",
                activeTab === 'sessions' ? "bg-accent text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent/50"
              )}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('sessions')}
            >
              <List className="w-4 h-4" />
              Sessions ({sessions.length})
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Content */}
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
            {activeTab === 'files' ? (
              <PromptFileManager />
            ) : (
              <PromptSessionList />
            )}
          </div>
        </Resizable>

        {/* Right Side - Writing Area */}
        <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <PromptWritingArea />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Overlays */}
      {showNotes && (
        <PromptNotesPanel onClose={() => setShowNotes(false)} />
      )}
      
      {showUpload && (
        <PromptUploadPanel onClose={() => setShowUpload(false)} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptNotesPanel.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { X, Plus, Trash2, Edit2, Copy, Share2, Save } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface PromptNotesPanelProps {
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function PromptNotesPanel({ onClose }: PromptNotesPanelProps) {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const addNote = usePromptStore((s) => s.addNote);
  const updateNote = usePromptStore((s) => s.updateNote);
  const deleteNote = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteNote);
  const toggleNoteAttachment = usePromptStore((s) => s.toggleNoteAttachment);
  
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState('');
  const [editContent, setEditContent] = useState('');
  const [showAddForm, setShowAddForm] = useState(false);
  const [newTitle, setNewTitle] = useState('');
  const [newContent, setNewContent] = useState('');

  if (!currentSession) return null;

  const notes = currentSession.notes;

  const handleAddNote = () => {
    if (newTitle.trim()) {
      addNote(newTitle.trim(), newContent);
      setNewTitle('');
      setNewContent('');
      setShowAddForm(false);
    }
  };

  const handleUpdateNote = () => {
    if (editingId && editTitle.trim()) {
      updateNote(editingId, { title: editTitle.trim(), content: editContent });
      setEditingId(null);
    }
  };

  const copyAllNotes = async () => {
    const text = notes.map(n => `${n.title}\n${n.content}\n---`).join('\n');
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    alert('All notes copied');
  };

  const shareNotes = () => {
    const text = notes.map(n => `Title: ${n.title}\nNote: ${n.content}\n`).join('\n---\n');
    const blob = new Blob([text], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    window.open(url);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Notes & Links</h2>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={copyAllNotes}>
              <Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy All
            </Button>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={shareNotes}>
              <Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Share
            </Button>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose}>
              <X className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Notes List */}
        <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {notes.map((note) => (
              <div
                key={note.id}
                className={cn(
                  "p-3 rounded-lg border transition-all",
                  note.attachedToLink ? "border-primary bg-primary/5" : "border-border bg-muted/30"
                )}
              >
                {editingId === note.id ? (
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <Input
                      value={editTitle}
                      onChange={(e) => setEditTitle(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Title"
                      className="text-sm font-medium"
                    />
                    <Textarea
                      value={editContent}
                      onChange={(e) => setEditContent(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Note content"
                      rows={3}
                      className="text-sm"
                    />
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <Button size="sm" onClick={handleUpdateNote}>Save</Button>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setEditingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                      <h3 className="font-medium text-sm">{note.title}</h3>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <button
                          onClick={() => toggleNoteAttachment(note.id)}
                          className={cn(
                            "p-1 rounded text-xs",
                            note.attachedToLink ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground"
                          )}
                          title={note.attachedToLink ? "Attached to link" : "Not attached"}
                        >
                          ­¤öŚ
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => {
                            setEditingId(note.id);
                            setEditTitle(note.title);
                            setEditContent(note.content);
                          }}
                          className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded"
                        >
                          <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => deleteNote(note.id)}
                          className="p-1 hover:bg-destructive/10 rounded"
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-destructive" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">{note.content}</p>
                    <div className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-2">
                      {new Date(note.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Add New Note Form */}
          {showAddForm ? (
            <div className="mt-4 p-3 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-primary">
              <Input
                placeholder="Note title"
                value={newTitle}
                onChange={(e) => setNewTitle(e.target.value)}
                className="mb-2 text-sm"
                autoFocus
              />
              <Textarea
                placeholder="Note content"
                value={newContent}
                onChange={(e) => setNewContent(e.target.value)}
                rows={3}
                className="text-sm mb-2"
              />
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <Button size="sm" onClick={handleAddNote}>Add Note</Button>
                <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setShowAddForm(false)}>Cancel</Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowAddForm(true)}
              className="mt-4 w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-border hover:bg-accent transition-colors text-sm"
            >
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
              Add Note
            </button>
          )}
        </ScrollArea>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptSessionList.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptSessions, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { Clock, Copy, Trash2, Edit2, ExternalLink, FolderOpen, Cloud, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

export function PromptSessionList() {
  const sessions = usePromptSessions();
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const loadSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.loadSession);
  const deleteSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteSession);
  const duplicateSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.duplicateSession);
  const renameSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameSession);
  const completeAndUpload = usePromptStore((s) => s.completeAndUpload);
  const setUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.setUploadProvider);
  
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const [uploadingId, setUploadingId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const handleRename = (id: string) => {
    if (renameValue.trim()) renameSession(id, renameValue.trim());
    setRenamingId(null);
    setRenameValue('');
  };

  const handleUpload = async (sessionId: string) => {
    setUploadingId(sessionId);
    const provider = confirm('Upload to Google Drive? (OK = Drive, Cancel = GitHub)') ? 'drive' : 'github';
    setUploadProvider(provider);
    try {
      const result = await completeAndUpload();
      alert(`Uploaded! Share link: ${result.shareLink}`);
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Upload failed: ' + (err as Error).message);
    } finally {
      setUploadingId(null);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="p-3 border-b border-border">
        <h3 className="font-medium">All Sessions</h3>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{sessions.length} session(s) saved</p>
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-2 space-y-2">
        {sessions.length === 0 ? (
          <p className="text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm py-8">No sessions yet</p>
        ) : (
          sessions.map((session) => {
            const isActive = currentSession?.id === session.id;
            const isUploading = uploadingId === session.id;
            const isRenaming = renamingId === session.id;
            return (
              <div
                key={session.id}
                className={cn(
                  "group p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer",
                  isActive ? "border-primary bg-primary/5" : "border-border hover:bg-accent"
                )}
                onClick={() => loadSession(session.id)}
              >
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    {isRenaming ? (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Input
                          value={renameValue}
                          onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)}
                          className="h-8 text-sm"
                          autoFocus
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(session.id);
                            if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null);
                          }}
                        />
                        <button onClick={() => handleRename(session.id)} className="text-green-500">
                          <Check className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                        <button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="text-destructive">
                          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          <FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
                          <span className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{session.name}</span>
                          {session.isCompleted && (
                            <span className="text-[10px] bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                              Done
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                          <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                            {formatDistanceToNow(session.updatedAt, { addSuffix: true })}
                          </span>
                          <span>{session.files.length} files</span>
                          <span>{session.notes.length} notes</span>
                        </div>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        const newSession = duplicateSession(session.id);
                        loadSession(newSession.id);
                      }}
                      title="Duplicate"
                    >
                      <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        setRenamingId(session.id);
                        setRenameValue(session.name);
                      }}
                      title="Rename"
                    >
                      <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    </Button>
                    {!session.isCompleted && (
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          handleUpload(session.id);
                        }}
                        disabled={isUploading}
                        title="Complete & Upload"
                      >
                        {isUploading ? (
                          <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
                        ) : (
                          <Cloud className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                        )}
                      </Button>
                    )}
                    {session.uploadResult && (
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="icon"
                        className="h-7 w-7"
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          window.open(session.uploadResult!.shareLink, '_blank');
                        }}
                        title="Open in Cloud"
                      >
                        <ExternalLink className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Button>
                    )}
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive hover:text-destructive"
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        if (confirm(`Delete session "${session.name}"?`)) deleteSession(session.id);
                      }}
                      title="Delete"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptSessionManager.tsx =====

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Clock, Copy, Trash2, Edit2, ExternalLink, FolderOpen, Cloud, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptSessions, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';

export function PromptSessionManager() {
  const sessions = usePromptSessions();
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const loadSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.loadSession);
  const deleteSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.deleteSession);
  const duplicateSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.duplicateSession);
  const renameSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.renameSession);
  const completeAndUpload = usePromptStore((s) => s.completeAndUpload);
  const setUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.setUploadProvider);
  const [renamingId, setRenamingId] = useState<string|null>(null);
  const [renameValue, setRenameValue] = useState('');
  const [uploadingId, setUploadingId] = useState<string|null>(null);
  const handleRename = (id: string) => { if (renameValue.trim()) renameSession(id, renameValue.trim()); setRenamingId(null); setRenameValue(''); };
  const handleUpload = async (sessionId: string) => { setUploadingId(sessionId); const provider = confirm('Upload to Google Drive? (OK = Drive, Cancel = GitHub)') ? 'drive' : 'github'; setUploadProvider(provider); try { const result = await completeAndUpload(); alert(`Uploaded! Share link: ${result.shareLink}`); } catch (err) { alert('Upload failed: ' + (err as Error).message); } finally { setUploadingId(null); } };
  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="p-3 border-b border-border"><h3 className="font-medium">All Sessions</h3><p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{sessions.length} session(s) saved</p></div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-2 space-y-2">
        {sessions.length === 0 ? <p className="text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm py-8">No sessions yet</p> : sessions.map((session) => {
          const isActive = currentSession?.id === session.id;
          const isUploading = uploadingId === session.id;
          const isRenaming = renamingId === session.id;
          return (
            <div key={session.id} className={cn("group p-3 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer", isActive ? "border-primary bg-primary/5" : "border-border hover:bg-accent")} onClick={() => loadSession(session.id)}>
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  {isRenaming ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Input value={renameValue} onChange={(e) => setRenameValue(e.target.value)} className="h-8 text-sm" autoFocus onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRename(session.id); if (e.key === 'Escape') setRenamingId(null); }} /><button onClick={() => handleRename(session.id)} className="text-green-500"><Check className="w-4 h-4" /></button><button onClick={() => setRenamingId(null)} className="text-destructive"><X className="w-4 h-4" /></button></div>
                  ) : (
                    <><div className="flex items-center gap-2"><FolderOpen className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" /><span className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{session.name}</span>{session.isCompleted && <span className="text-[10px] bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">Done</span>}</div><div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground"><span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Clock className="w-3 h-3" />{formatDistanceToNow(session.updatedAt, { addSuffix: true })}</span><span>{session.files.length} files</span><span>{session.notes.length} notes</span></div></>
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); const newSession = duplicateSession(session.id); loadSession(newSession.id); }} title="Duplicate"><Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></Button>
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setRenamingId(session.id); setRenameValue(session.name); }} title="Rename"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></Button>
                  {!session.isCompleted && (<Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleUpload(session.id); }} disabled={isUploading} title="Complete & Upload">{isUploading ? <div className="w-3.5 h-3.5 border-2 border-primary border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" /> : <Cloud className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}</Button>)}
                  {session.uploadResult && (<Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); window.open(session.uploadResult!.shareLink, '_blank'); }} title="Open in Cloud"><ExternalLink className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></Button>)}
                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7 text-destructive hover:text-destructive" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); if (confirm(`Delete session "${session.name}"?`)) deleteSession(session.id); }} title="Delete"><Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptUploadPanel.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { X, Cloud, Upload, Check, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/radio-group';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface PromptUploadPanelProps {
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function PromptUploadPanel({ onClose }: PromptUploadPanelProps) {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const completeAndUpload = usePromptStore((s) => s.completeAndUpload);
  const selectedUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.selectedUploadProvider);
  const setUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.setUploadProvider);
  const isUploading = usePromptStore((s) => s.isUploading);
  const uploadProgress = usePromptStore((s) => s.uploadProgress);
  
  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
  
  const [selectedDriveAccount, setSelectedDriveAccount] = useState<string>('');
  const [selectedGitHubAccount, setSelectedGitHubAccount] = useState<string>('');
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [successLink, setSuccessLink] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (driveAccounts.length > 0 && !selectedDriveAccount) {
      setSelectedDriveAccount(driveAccounts[0].id);
    }
    if (githubAccounts.length > 0 && !selectedGitHubAccount) {
      setSelectedGitHubAccount(githubAccounts[0].id);
    }
  }, [driveAccounts, githubAccounts]);

  const handleUpload = async () => {
    setError(null);
    try {
      // Set the account before upload
      if (selectedUploadProvider === 'drive' && selectedDriveAccount) {
        useDriveStore.getState().setActiveAccount(selectedDriveAccount);
      } else if (selectedUploadProvider === 'github' && selectedGitHubAccount) {
        useGitHubStore.getState().setActiveAccount(selectedGitHubAccount);
      }
      const result = await completeAndUpload();
      setSuccessLink(result.shareLink);
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    }
  };

  if (!currentSession) return null;

  if (successLink) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
        <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-6 text-center">
          <Check className="w-12 h-12 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-2">Upload Complete!</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
            Your session has been uploaded successfully.
          </p>
          <div className="bg-muted p-2 rounded mb-4 break-all text-sm">
            <a href={successLink} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="text-primary underline">
              {successLink}
            </a>
          </div>
          <Button onClick={onClose}>Close</Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Cloud className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Complete & Upload</h2>
          </div>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose} disabled={isUploading}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
          {/* Session Summary */}
          <div className="bg-muted/30 p-3 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">Session: {currentSession.name}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
              {currentSession.files.length} files ŌĆó {currentSession.notes.length} notes
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* Provider Selection */}
          <div>
            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Upload to</Label>
            <RadioGroup
              value={selectedUploadProvider}
              onValueChange={(v) => setUploadProvider(v as 'drive' | 'github')}
              className="flex gap-4 mt-2"
              disabled={isUploading}
            >
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <RadioGroupItem value="drive" id="drive" />
                <Label htmlFor="drive">Google Drive</Label>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <RadioGroupItem value="github" id="github" />
                <Label htmlFor="github">GitHub</Label>
              </div>
            </RadioGroup>
          </div>

          {/* Account Selection */}
          {selectedUploadProvider === 'drive' && driveAccounts.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <Label>Google Account</Label>
              <select
                value={selectedDriveAccount}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedDriveAccount(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full mt-1 p-2 border rounded-md bg-background"
                disabled={isUploading}
              >
                {driveAccounts.map(acc => (
                  <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}

          {selectedUploadProvider === 'github' && githubAccounts.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <Label>GitHub Account</Label>
              <select
                value={selectedGitHubAccount}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedGitHubAccount(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full mt-1 p-2 border rounded-md bg-background"
                disabled={isUploading}
              >
                {githubAccounts.map(acc => (
                  <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Progress */}
          {isUploading && (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span>Uploading...</span>
                <span>{Math.round(uploadProgress)}%</span>
              </div>
              <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Error */}
          {error && (
            <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-destructive text-sm">
              <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
              {error}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Actions */}
          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isUploading} className="flex-1">
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button onClick={handleUpload} disabled={isUploading} className="flex-1">
              {isUploading ? (
                <>
                  <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                  Uploading...
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Complete & Upload
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromptWritingArea.tsx =====

import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { FileText, Clock, Hash, Save } from 'lucide-react';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

export function PromptWritingArea() {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const updatePromptText = usePromptStore((s) => s.updatePromptText);
  const saveSession = usePromptStore((s) => s.saveSession);
  const [lastSaved, setLastSaved] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (currentSession) {
        saveSession();
        setLastSaved(new Date());
      }
    }, 30000); // Auto-save every 30 seconds
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [currentSession, saveSession]);
  
  if (!currentSession) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground">
        <p>No active session</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const wordCount = currentSession.promptText.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  const charCount = currentSession.promptText.length;

  const handleSave = () => {
    saveSession();
    setLastSaved(new Date());
  };

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      {/* Stats Bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          <FileText className="w-3 h-3" />
          {wordCount} words
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          <Hash className="w-3 h-3" />
          {charCount} chars
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
          {new Date(currentSession.updatedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}
        </div>
        {lastSaved && (
          <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">
            Saved {lastSaved.toLocaleTimeString()}
          </div>
        )}
        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={handleSave} className="h-7">
          <Save className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
          Save
        </Button>
        {currentSession.isCompleted && (
          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-green-600 ml-auto">Completed</Badge>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Text Area */}
      <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
        <Textarea
          value={currentSession.promptText}
          onChange={(e) => updatePromptText(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="Start writing your prompt here..."
          className="w-full h-full min-h-[500px] resize-none border-0 rounded-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-base leading-relaxed p-4 font-mono"
        />
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PromptManager/PromtUploadPanel.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { usePromptStore, usePromptCurrentSession } from '@/stores/promptStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';
import { X, Cloud, Upload, Check, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/radio-group';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface PromptUploadPanelProps {
  onClose: () => void;
}

export function PromptUploadPanel({ onClose }: PromptUploadPanelProps) {
  const currentSession = usePromptCurrentSession();
  const completeAndUpload = usePromptStore((s) => s.completeAndUpload);
  const selectedUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.selectedUploadProvider);
  const setUploadProvider = usePromptStore((s) => s.setUploadProvider);
  const isUploading = usePromptStore((s) => s.isUploading);
  const uploadProgress = usePromptStore((s) => s.uploadProgress);
  
  const driveAccounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const githubAccounts = useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
  
  const [selectedDriveAccount, setSelectedDriveAccount] = useState<string>('');
  const [selectedGitHubAccount, setSelectedGitHubAccount] = useState<string>('');
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [successLink, setSuccessLink] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (driveAccounts.length > 0 && !selectedDriveAccount) {
      setSelectedDriveAccount(driveAccounts[0].id);
    }
    if (githubAccounts.length > 0 && !selectedGitHubAccount) {
      setSelectedGitHubAccount(githubAccounts[0].id);
    }
  }, [driveAccounts, githubAccounts]);

  const handleUpload = async () => {
    setError(null);
    try {
      // Set the account before upload
      if (selectedUploadProvider === 'drive' && selectedDriveAccount) {
        useDriveStore.getState().setActiveAccount(selectedDriveAccount);
      } else if (selectedUploadProvider === 'github' && selectedGitHubAccount) {
        useGitHubStore.getState().setActiveAccount(selectedGitHubAccount);
      }
      const result = await completeAndUpload();
      setSuccessLink(result.shareLink);
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    }
  };

  if (!currentSession) return null;

  if (successLink) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
        <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-6 text-center">
          <Check className="w-12 h-12 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-2">Upload Complete!</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-4">
            Your session has been uploaded successfully.
          </p>
          <div className="bg-muted p-2 rounded mb-4 break-all text-sm">
            <a href={successLink} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" className="text-primary underline">
              {successLink}
            </a>
          </div>
          <Button onClick={onClose}>Close</Button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 p-4">
      <div className="w-full max-w-md bg-card rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Cloud className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Complete & Upload</h2>
          </div>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onClose} disabled={isUploading}>
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
          {/* Session Summary */}
          <div className="bg-muted/30 p-3 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">Session: {currentSession.name}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
              {currentSession.files.length} files ŌĆó {currentSession.notes.length} notes
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* Provider Selection */}
          <div>
            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Upload to</Label>
            <RadioGroup
              value={selectedUploadProvider}
              onValueChange={(v) => setUploadProvider(v as 'drive' | 'github')}
              className="flex gap-4 mt-2"
              disabled={isUploading}
            >
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <RadioGroupItem value="drive" id="drive" />
                <Label htmlFor="drive">Google Drive</Label>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                <RadioGroupItem value="github" id="github" />
                <Label htmlFor="github">GitHub</Label>
              </div>
            </RadioGroup>
          </div>

          {/* Account Selection */}
          {selectedUploadProvider === 'drive' && driveAccounts.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <Label>Google Account</Label>
              <select
                value={selectedDriveAccount}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedDriveAccount(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full mt-1 p-2 border rounded-md bg-background"
                disabled={isUploading}
              >
                {driveAccounts.map(acc => (
                  <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}

          {selectedUploadProvider === 'github' && githubAccounts.length > 0 && (
            <div>
              <Label>GitHub Account</Label>
              <select
                value={selectedGitHubAccount}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedGitHubAccount(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full mt-1 p-2 border rounded-md bg-background"
                disabled={isUploading}
              >
                {githubAccounts.map(acc => (
                  <option key={acc.id} value={acc.id}>{acc.id}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Progress */}
          {isUploading && (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span>Uploading...</span>
                <span>{Math.round(uploadProgress)}%</span>
              </div>
              <Progress value={uploadProgress} className="h-2" />
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Error */}
          {error && (
            <div className="p-3 bg-destructive/10 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-destructive text-sm">
              <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
              {error}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Actions */}
          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2">
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={onClose} disabled={isUploading} className="flex-1">
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button onClick={handleUpload} disabled={isUploading} className="flex-1">
              {isUploading ? (
                <>
                  <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                  Uploading...
                </>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Complete & Upload
                </>
              )}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Rename/KeepReplaceDialog.tsx =====

import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

export function KeepReplaceDialog({ isOpen = false, onClose, fileName = 'file', onKeep, onReplace }: any) {
  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>File already exists</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>File "{fileName}" already exists.</DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <DialogFooter className="flex gap-2">
          <Button variant="outline" onClick={onKeep}>Keep Both</Button>
          <Button variant="destructive" onClick={onReplace}>Replace</Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Rename/InlineRenameInput.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Loader2, Check, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { conversionEngine } from '@/lib/conversionEngine';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';

interface InlineRenameInputProps {
  item: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    path: string;
    sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
    panelId: string;
    handle?: any;
    isDirectory?: boolean;
  };
  onComplete?: () => void;
}

export function InlineRenameInput({ item, onComplete }: InlineRenameInputProps) {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(item.name);
  const [isConverting, setIsConverting] = useState(false);
  const [conversionProgress, setConversionProgress] = useState(0);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const panelStore = usePanelStore();

  useEffect(() => {
    inputRef.current?.focus();
    inputRef.current?.select();
  }, []);

  const getExtension = (filename: string): string => {
    const lastDot = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
    return lastDot > 0 ? filename.slice(lastDot).toLowerCase() : '';
  };

  const getBaseName = (filename: string): string => {
    const lastDot = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
    return lastDot > 0 ? filename.slice(0, lastDot) : filename;
  };

  const handleConfirm = async () => {
    if (value === item.name) {
      onComplete?.();
      return;
    }

    const oldExt = getExtension(item.name);
    const newExt = getExtension(value);
    const isFolderToArchive = item.isDirectory && newExt !== '';

    // Case 1: Folder to archive (e.g., foldername ŌåÆ foldername.zip)
    if (isFolderToArchive && conversionEngine.canConvert('folder', newExt)) {
      setIsConverting(true);
      try {
        // Gather folder contents (simplified: we assume we can zip the folder)
        // In real implementation, you'd read all files recursively.
        // Here we show a mock conversion:
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
        // After conversion, we would save the archive and delete original if needed
        setConversionProgress(100);
        // Rename operation completed
        onComplete?.();
      } catch (err) {
        setError((err as Error).message);
        setIsConverting(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    // Case 2: File extension change ŌåÆ conversion
    if (!item.isDirectory && oldExt !== newExt && conversionEngine.canConvert(oldExt, newExt)) {
      setIsConverting(true);
      try {
        // Read original file as Blob
        let originalBlob: Blob;
        if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
          const file = await item.handle.getFile();
          originalBlob = file;
        } else {
          throw new Error('Unsupported source for conversion');
        }

        const result = await conversionEngine.convert(
          originalBlob,
          oldExt,
          newExt,
          (progress) => setConversionProgress(progress)
        );

        if (result.success && result.blob) {
          // Show keep/replace dialog (simplified: replace original)
          // For production, implement a proper dialog.
          const replace = confirm(`Converted to ${newExt}. Replace original?`);
          if (replace) {
            // Save converted file, delete original
            if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
              const parentHandle = await item.handle.getParent(); // Need proper parent retrieval
              // Write new file, delete old
            }
          } else {
            // Keep both: save as new file with new name
          }
        } else {
          throw new Error(result.error || 'Conversion failed');
        }
        onComplete?.();
      } catch (err) {
        setError((err as Error).message);
        setIsConverting(false);
      }
      return;
    }

    // Case 3: Simple rename (no conversion)
    try {
      // Perform rename via panel store or direct API
      if (item.sourceType === 'storage' && item.handle) {
        const parentHandle = await item.handle.getParent();
        if (parentHandle) {
          await parentHandle.moveEntry(item.handle, value);
        }
      }
      onComplete?.();
    } catch (err) {
      setError((err as Error).message);
    }
  };

  const handleCancel = () => {
    onComplete?.();
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') handleConfirm();
    if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCancel();
  };

  if (isConverting) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-muted rounded">
        <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin text-primary" />
        <span className="text-sm">Converting... {conversionProgress}%</span>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-destructive/10 rounded">
        <span className="text-sm text-destructive">{error}</span>
        <button onClick={handleCancel} className="ml-auto">
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
      <Input
        ref={inputRef}
        value={value}
        onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
        className="h-8 text-sm flex-1"
      />
      <button onClick={handleConfirm} className="p-1 text-green-500 hover:bg-accent rounded">
        <Check className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
      <button onClick={handleCancel} className="p-1 text-destructive hover:bg-accent rounded">
        <X className="w-4 h-4" />
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Rename/WebWorkerConverter.ts =====

// Web Worker for running conversions off main thread

const workerCode = `
self.onmessage = async (e) => {
  const { type, fileData, fromExt, toExt } = e.data;
  
  try {
    switch (type) {
      case 'ffmpeg':
        // FFmpeg operations would go here
        // Note: FFmpeg WASM can't easily run in worker due to SharedArrayBuffer
        self.postMessage({ type: 'progress', progress: 50 });
        break;
        
      case 'image':
        // Canvas-based image conversion
        const result = await convertImage(fileData, fromExt, toExt);
        self.postMessage({ type: 'complete', result });
        break;
        
      default:
        throw new Error('Unknown conversion type');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    self.postMessage({ type: 'error', error: error.message });
  }
};

async function convertImage(fileData: ArrayBuffer, fromExt: string, toExt: string): Promise<ArrayBuffer> {
  // Create blob from array buffer
  const blob = new Blob([fileData]);
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  
  try {
    const img = await loadImage(url);
    const canvas = new OffscreenCanvas(img.width, img.height);
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    if (!ctx) throw new Error('Canvas context not available');
    
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    
    const mimeType = toExt === '.jpg' || toExt === '.jpeg' 
      ? 'image/jpeg' 
      : toExt === '.webp' 
        ? 'image/webp' 
        : 'image/png';
    
    const outputBlob = await canvas.convertToBlob({ type: mimeType, quality: 0.9 });
    return await outputBlob.arrayBuffer();
  } catch (error) {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    throw error;
  }
}

function loadImage(url: string): Promise<ImageBitmap> {
  return fetch(url)
    .then(r => r.blob())
    .then(b => createImageBitmap(b));
}
`;

// Create worker from code string
export function createConverterWorker(): Worker {
  const blob = new Blob([workerCode], { type: 'application/javascript' });
  const workerUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  return new Worker(workerUrl);
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Search/FilterPanel.tsx =====

import { useSearchStore, useSearchFilters, useAvailableExtensions, useAvailableAccounts, useIsFilterPanelOpen } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { X, HardDrive, Github, FolderGit, Terminal, File, Folder, Eye, EyeOff, Calendar, HardDriveIcon, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';

const sourceIcons = {
  storage: HardDrive,
  drive: FolderGit,
  github: Github,
  terminal: Terminal,
};

export function FilterPanel() {
  const isOpen = useIsFilterPanelOpen();
  const filters = useSearchFilters();
  const extensions = useAvailableExtensions();
  const accounts = useAvailableAccounts();
  const setFilters = useSearchStore((s) => s.setFilters);
  const resetFilters = useSearchStore((s) => s.resetFilters);
  const toggleFilterPanel = useSearchStore((s) => s.toggleFilterPanel);
  const [extensionSearch, setExtensionSearch] = useState('');

  const filteredExtensions = useMemo(() => {
    if (!extensionSearch) return extensions.slice(0, 50);
    return extensions.filter(e => e.extension.toLowerCase().includes(extensionSearch.toLowerCase())).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
  }, [extensions, extensionSearch]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const toggleSource = (source: string) => {
    const newSources = filters.sources.includes(source as any) ? filters.sources.filter(s => s !== source) : [...filters.sources, source as any];
    setFilters({ sources: newSources });
  };

  const toggleAccount = (accountId: string) => {
