===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/FileGrid.tsx =====

import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';
import { FolderOpen, File } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

interface TerminalFileGridProps {
  entries: TerminalFileSystemEntry[];
  onEntryClick: (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry) => void;
}

export function FileGrid({ entries, onEntryClick }: TerminalFileGridProps) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 p-4">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div
          key={entry.path}
          className="flex flex-col items-center p-4 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer transition-colors"
          onClick={() => onEntryClick(entry)}
        >
          {entry.type === 'directory' ? (
            <FolderOpen className="w-12 h-12 text-primary mb-2" />
          ) : (
            <File className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground mb-2" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-center truncate w-full" title={entry.name}>
            {entry.name}
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            {entry.type === 'directory' ? 'Folder' : formatBytes(entry.size)}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/FileList.tsx =====

import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';
import { Folder, File, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';

interface TerminalFileListProps {
  entries: TerminalFileSystemEntry[];
  onEntryClick: (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry) => void;
}

export function FileList({ entries, onEntryClick }: TerminalFileListProps) {
  return (
    <div className="divide-y divide-border">
      {entries.map((entry) => (
        <div
          key={entry.path}
          className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent cursor-pointer group"
          onClick={() => onEntryClick(entry)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
            {entry.type === 'directory' ? (
              <Folder className="w-5 h-5 text-primary shrink-0" />
            ) : (
              <File className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{entry.name}</span>
            {entry.type === 'file' && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
                {formatBytes(entry.size)}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
            <span>{formatDistanceToNow(entry.lastModified, { addSuffix: true })}</span>
            <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/FileViewer.tsx =====

import { useTerminalStore, useTerminalSelectedFile } from '@/stores/terminalStore';
import { X, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';

export function FileViewer() {
  const selectedFile = useTerminalSelectedFile();
  const selectFile = useTerminalStore((s) => s.selectFile);

  if (!selectedFile) return null;

  const isText = selectedFile.name.match(/\.(txt|js|ts|jsx|tsx|json|md|css|html|xml|sh|py|rb|go|java|c|cpp|h|hpp)$/i);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col border-l border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium truncate">{selectedFile.name}</span>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-7 w-7" onClick={() => selectFile(null)}>
          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <ScrollArea className="flex-1 p-4">
        {isText ? (
          <pre className="text-sm font-mono whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
            {selectedFile.content || 'No content preview available'}
          </pre>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
            <FileText className="w-12 h-12 mb-2 opacity-50" />
            <p className="text-sm">Preview not available for binary files</p>
            <p className="text-xs">Size: {formatBytes(selectedFile.size)}</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </ScrollArea>
    </div>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/TerminalPanel.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { Terminal } from 'xterm';
import { FitAddon } from 'xterm-addon-fit';
import { WebLinksAddon } from 'xterm-addon-web-links';
import 'xterm/css/xterm.css';

export function TerminalPanel() {
  const terminalRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const term = useRef<Terminal | null>(null);
  const fitAddon = useRef<FitAddon | null>(null);
  const ws = useRef<WebSocket | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!terminalRef.current) return;

    // Initialize xterm
    term.current = new Terminal({
      cursorBlink: true,
      theme: {
        background: '#1e1e1e',
        foreground: '#d4d4d4',
      },
      fontSize: 14,
      fontFamily: 'Menlo, Monaco, "Courier New", monospace',
    });

    fitAddon.current = new FitAddon();
    term.current.loadAddon(fitAddon.current);
    term.current.loadAddon(new WebLinksAddon());
    term.current.open(terminalRef.current);
    fitAddon.current.fit();

    // Connect to WebSocket server
    ws.current = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:3001');

    ws.current.onopen = () => {
      console.log('Terminal WebSocket connected');
      // Send initial resize
      const dims = fitAddon.current?.proposeDimensions();
      if (dims) {
        ws.current?.send(JSON.stringify({ cols: dims.cols, rows: dims.rows }));
      }
    };

    ws.current.onmessage = (event) => {
      term.current?.write(event.data);
    };

    ws.current.onerror = (error) => {
      console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
      term.current?.writeln('\r\n\x1b[31mError: Could not connect to terminal server\x1b[0m');
    };

    ws.current.onclose = () => {
      term.current?.writeln('\r\n\x1b[33mConnection closed\x1b[0m');
    };

    // Forward terminal input to WebSocket
    term.current.onData((data) => {
      if (ws.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
        ws.current.send(data);
      }
    });

    // Handle resize
    const handleResize = () => {
      fitAddon.current?.fit();
      const dims = fitAddon.current?.proposeDimensions();
      if (dims && ws.current?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
        ws.current.send(JSON.stringify({ cols: dims.cols, rows: dims.rows }));
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);

    // Observe container size changes (for grid layout)
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      handleResize();
    });
    if (terminalRef.current) {
      resizeObserver.observe(terminalRef.current);
    }

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
      resizeObserver.disconnect();
      ws.current?.close();
      term.current?.dispose();
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <div
      ref={terminalRef}
      style={{
        height: '100%',
        width: '100%',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        position: 'relative',
      }}
    />
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/TerminalToolbar.tsx =====

import { Grid3X3, List, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, ArrowUpDown, Power, Activity } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Toggle } from '@/components/ui/toggle';
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { TerminalViewMode, TerminalSortBy } from '@/types/terminal';
import { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { PanelDialog } from '@/components/ui/PanelDialog';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';

interface TerminalToolbarProps {
  viewMode: TerminalViewMode;
  onViewModeChange: (mode: TerminalViewMode) => void;
  sortBy: TerminalSortBy;
  onSortChange: (sort: TerminalSortBy) => void;
  onNavigateBack: () => void;
  onRefresh: () => void;
  onShutdown: () => void;
  isLiveMode?: boolean;
  onToggleLiveMode?: (interval?: number) => void;
  pollInterval?: number;
}

export function TerminalToolbar({
  viewMode,
  onViewModeChange,
  sortBy,
  onSortChange,
  onNavigateBack,
  onRefresh,
  onShutdown,
  isLiveMode,
  onToggleLiveMode,
  pollInterval = 5000,
}: TerminalToolbarProps) {
  const [showLiveDialog, setShowLiveDialog] = useState(false);
  const [intervalSeconds, setIntervalSeconds] = useState(Math.max(5, Math.floor(pollInterval / 1000)));
  const longPressTimer = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const isLongPress = useRef(false);

  // Long press detection for refresh button
  const handleMouseDown = () => {
    isLongPress.current = false;
    longPressTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
      isLongPress.current = true;
      setShowLiveDialog(true);
    }, 500);
  };

  const handleMouseUp = () => {
    if (longPressTimer.current) {
      clearTimeout(longPressTimer.current);
      longPressTimer.current = null;
    }
  };

  const handleRefreshClick = () => {
    if (isLongPress.current) return;
    onRefresh();
  };

  const startLiveMode = () => {
    onToggleLiveMode?.(intervalSeconds * 1000);
    setShowLiveDialog(false);
  };

  const stopLiveMode = () => {
    onToggleLiveMode?.(0);
    setShowLiveDialog(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Button variant="outline" size="icon" onClick={onNavigateBack} className="h-8 w-8">
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        
        {/* Refresh with long press for live mode */}
        <Button 
          variant="outline" 
          size="icon" 
          onClick={handleRefreshClick}
          onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
          onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
          onMouseLeave={handleMouseUp}
          onTouchStart={handleMouseDown}
          onTouchEnd={handleMouseUp}
          className="h-8 w-8 relative"
          title={isLiveMode ? `Live ON (${pollInterval/1000}s) - Long press to change` : 'Refresh (Long press for live mode)'}
        >
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
          {isLiveMode && (
            <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
          )}
        </Button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8">
              <ArrowUpDown className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-asc')}>Name (A-Z)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('name-desc')}>Name (Z-A)</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('date')}>Date Modified</DropdownMenuItem>
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => onSortChange('size')}>Size</DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>

        <div className="flex items-center border rounded-md">
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'grid'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('grid')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-l-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <Grid3X3 className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
          <Toggle
            pressed={viewMode === 'list'}
            onPressedChange={() => onViewModeChange('list')}
            className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none rounded-r-md data-[state=on]:bg-primary data-[state=on]:text-primary-foreground"
          >
            <List className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Toggle>
        </div>

        <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={onShutdown} className="h-8 w-8 text-destructive">
          <Power className="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Live Mode Dialog */}
      <PanelDialog
        isOpen={showLiveDialog}
        onClose={() => setShowLiveDialog(false)}
        panelId="terminal"
        title="Live Auto-Refresh"
      >
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Activity className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span>Auto-refresh Termux files every X seconds</span>
          </div>
          
          <div>
            <Label>Interval (seconds)</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              value={intervalSeconds}
              onChange={(e) => setIntervalSeconds(Math.max(5, Number(e.target.value)))}
              min={5}
              className="mt-1"
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
              Minimum: 5s ŌĆó No maximum ŌĆó Lower = faster updates but more battery usage
            </p>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            {isLiveMode ? (
              <Button variant="destructive" onClick={stopLiveMode} className="flex-1">
                Stop Live Mode
              </Button>
            ) : (
              <Button onClick={startLiveMode} className="flex-1">
                Start Live Mode
              </Button>
            )}
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowLiveDialog(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </PanelDialog>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/TermuxFilePanel.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, memo } from 'react';
import { PanelState } from '@/types/panel';
import { FileGrid } from '../FileManager/FileGrid';
import { FileList } from '../FileManager/FileList';
import { usePanelStore } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { FileSystemEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { LRUCache } from 'lru-cache';

// Global cache for directories - persists across panel switches
const directoryCache = new LRUCache<string, FileSystemEntry[]>({
  max: 100,
  ttl: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
});

interface TermuxFilePanelProps {
  panel: PanelState;
  onRefresh?: () => void;
}

const API_BASE = 'http://localhost:3001';

export const TermuxFilePanel = memo(function TermuxFilePanel({ panel, onRefresh }: TermuxFilePanelProps) {
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState<FileSystemEntry[]>([]);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  const abortController = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);
  const setPanelPath = usePanelStore((s) => s.setPanelPath);
  
  const currentPath = panel.path || '/terminal/termux';
  
  const fetchDirectory = useCallback(async (path: string, forceRefresh = false) => {
    // Check cache first
    const cacheKey = `${panel.id}-${path}`;
    if (!forceRefresh) {
      const cached = directoryCache.get(cacheKey);
      if (cached) {
        setEntries(cached);
        return;
      }
    }
    
    // Abort previous request
    if (abortController.current) {
      abortController.current.abort();
    }
    abortController.current = new AbortController();
    
    setIsLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    
    try {
      // Resolve virtual path to real path
      const realPath = path.replace(/^\/terminal\/termux/, '/data/data/com.termux/files/home');
      
      const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/list?path=${encodeURIComponent(realPath)}&limit=500`, {
        signal: abortController.current.signal,
        headers: {
          'Cache-Control': forceRefresh ? 'no-cache' : 'default'
        }
      });
      
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${await response.text()}`);
      }
      
      const data = await response.json();
      
      // Map to FileSystemEntry format
      const mappedEntries: FileSystemEntry[] = data.entries.map((item: any) => ({
        name: item.name,
        kind: item.kind === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 'file',
        size: item.size || 0,
        lastModified: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : new Date(),
        path: `${path}/${item.name}`.replace(/\/+/g, '/'),
        handle: item.kind === 'directory' 
          ? { kind: 'directory' as const, name: item.name }
          : { kind: 'file' as const, name: item.name, getFile: async () => new Blob([]) },
      }));
      
      // Update cache
      directoryCache.set(cacheKey, mappedEntries);
      setEntries(mappedEntries);
      
      if (onRefresh) onRefresh();
    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err.name !== 'AbortError') {
        console.error('Failed to load directory:', err);
        setError(err.message);
      }
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }, [panel.id, onRefresh]);

  // Handle navigation
  const handleNavigate = useCallback((entry: any) => {
    if (entry.kind === 'directory') {
      const newPath = entry.path || `${currentPath}/${entry.name}`.replace(/\/+/g, '/');
      setPanelPath(panel.id, newPath);
    }
  }, [currentPath, panel.id, setPanelPath]);

  // Load on mount and path change
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchDirectory(currentPath);
    
    return () => {
      abortController.current?.abort();
    };
  }, [currentPath, fetchDirectory]);

  if (isLoading && entries.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex items-center justify-center">
        <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-primary" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-destructive p-4">
        <p className="text-center mb-4">{error}</p>
        <button 
          onClick={() => fetchDirectory(currentPath, true)}
          className="px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-primary/90"
        >
          Retry
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return panel.viewMode === 'grid' ? (
    <FileGrid entries={entries} onNavigate={handleNavigate} panelId={panel.id} />
  ) : (
    <FileList entries={entries} onNavigate={handleNavigate} panelId={panel.id} />
  );
});


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Terminal/server.js =====

import { createServer } from 'http';
import { readdir, readFile, stat, realpath, lstat } from 'fs/promises';
import { join, resolve, normalize, dirname } from 'path';
import crypto from 'crypto';

const PORT = 3001;

const ALLOWED_ROOTS = [
  '/data/data/com.termux',
  '/storage/emulated/0'
];

console.log('[Server] Allowed roots:', ALLOWED_ROOTS);

const CLIENT_ID = process.env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || '';
const CLIENT_SECRET = process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET || '';
const REDIRECT_URI = process.env.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI || 'http://localhost:5173/auth/callback';
const codeVerifiers = new Map();

async function parseBody(req) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    let body = '';
    req.on('data', chunk => body += chunk);
    req.on('end', () => {
      try { resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {}); } 
      catch (err) { reject(err); }
    });
    req.on('error', reject);
  });
}

function resolveVirtualPath(inputPath) {
  console.log('[Resolve] Input:', inputPath);
  let normalized = normalize(inputPath);
  if (normalized === '/' || normalized === '') return '/data/data/com.termux';
  if (normalized.startsWith('/storage/internal')) return normalized.replace('/storage/internal', '/storage/emulated/0');
  if (normalized.startsWith('/terminal/termux/files')) return normalized.replace('/terminal/termux/files', '/data/data/com.termux/files');
  if (normalized.startsWith('/terminal/termux')) return normalized.replace('/terminal/termux', '/data/data/com.termux');
  if (normalized === '/terminal') return '/data/data/com.termux';
  return normalized;
}

async function isPathAllowed(requestedPath) {
  if (!requestedPath || requestedPath === '/') return true;
  let real;
  try { real = await realpath(requestedPath); } 
  catch (err) { real = resolve(requestedPath); }
  console.log('[Security] Checking:', requestedPath, 'ŌåÆ real:', real);
  for (const root of ALLOWED_ROOTS) {
    const resolvedRoot = resolve(root);
    if (real === resolvedRoot || real.startsWith(resolvedRoot + '/')) {
      console.log('[Security] Allowed by root:', resolvedRoot);
      return true;
    }
  }
  console.log('[Security] Denied:', real);
  return false;
}

async function normalizePathForResponse(p) {
  const resolved = resolve(p);
  if (!(await isPathAllowed(resolved))) {
    throw new Error(`Access denied for path: ${p} (resolved: ${resolved})`);
  }
  return resolved;
}

/**
 * HARDCODED FIX: These paths should appear as directories in UI
 * even if stat/lstat reports them as files
 */
const DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES = {
  '/data/data/com.termux/bin': {
    target: '/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin',
    description: 'Termux bin directory (redirects to files/usr/bin)'
  }
};

/**
 * Check if path is a directory by trying to list it
 * Includes hardcoded overrides for special cases
 */
async function getEntryInfo(entryPath, entryName) {
  // HARDCODED FIX: Check if this is a known special directory
  const realPath = await realpath(entryPath).catch(() => entryPath);
  const override = DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES[realPath] || DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES[entryPath];
  
  if (override) {
    console.log(`[OVERRIDE] ${entryName} ŌåÆ treating as directory (redirects to ${override.target})`);
    try {
      const targetStats = await stat(override.target);
      return {
        kind: 'directory',
        size: targetStats.size,
        lastModified: targetStats.mtime,
        isSymlink: false,
        redirectTo: override.target
      };
    } catch (err) {
      console.log(`[OVERRIDE] Target ${override.target} not accessible, using fallback`);
      return {
        kind: 'directory',
        size: 0,
        lastModified: new Date(),
        isSymlink: false
      };
    }
  }

  // First, try to list the directory contents
  try {
    await readdir(entryPath);
    // If we can list it, it's a directory
    const stats = await stat(entryPath);
    return {
      kind: 'directory',
      size: stats.size,
      lastModified: stats.mtime,
      isSymlink: false
    };
  } catch (listErr) {
    // Cannot list - might be a file or broken symlink
  }

  // Try lstat to check if it's a symlink
  try {
    const lstatInfo = await lstat(entryPath);
    
    if (lstatInfo.isSymbolicLink()) {
      try {
        const targetInfo = await stat(entryPath);
        return {
          kind: targetInfo.isDirectory() ? 'directory' : 'file',
          size: targetInfo.size,
          lastModified: targetInfo.mtime,
          isSymlink: true
        };
      } catch (targetErr) {
        return {
          kind: 'file',
          size: 0,
          lastModified: lstatInfo.mtime,
          isSymlink: true
        };
      }
    }
    
    // Regular file or directory
    return {
      kind: lstatInfo.isDirectory() ? 'directory' : 'file',
      size: lstatInfo.size,
      lastModified: lstatInfo.mtime,
      isSymlink: false
    };
  } catch (err) {
    console.error(`[getEntryInfo] Error for ${entryPath}:`, err.message);
    return null;
  }
}

const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');

  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    res.writeHead(204);
    res.end();
    return;
  }

  const url = new URL(req.url, `http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  try {
    if (pathname === '/api/list' && req.method === 'GET') {
      let dirPath = url.searchParams.get('path');
      if (!dirPath || dirPath === '/' || dirPath === '') {
        dirPath = '/terminal';
      }

      console.log(`[API] List request for virtual path: ${dirPath}`);
      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(dirPath);
      console.log(`[API] Resolved real path: ${realPath}`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Access denied: ${err.message}`);
        res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      try {
        await stat(fullPath);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Path not found: ${fullPath}`);
        res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: `Directory not found: ${dirPath}` }));
        return;
      }

      const entryNames = await readdir(fullPath);
      console.log(`[API] Found ${entryNames.length} entries in ${fullPath}`);
      
      const result = await Promise.all(entryNames.map(async (name) => {
        const entryPath = join(fullPath, name);
        const info = await getEntryInfo(entryPath, name);
        
        if (!info) {
          console.error(`[API] Could not get info for: ${name}`);
          return null;
        }
        
        console.log(`[API] Entry: ${name}, kind: ${info.kind}, isSymlink: ${info.isSymlink}${info.redirectTo ? ' (redirects to: ' + info.redirectTo + ')' : ''}`);
        
        return {
          name: name,
          kind: info.kind,
          size: info.size,
          lastModified: info.lastModified,
          path: entryPath,
          redirectTo: info.redirectTo || undefined
        };
      }));

      const filteredResult = result.filter(Boolean);
      console.log(`[API] Returning ${filteredResult.length} entries`);
      
      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify(filteredResult));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/file' && req.method === 'GET') {
      const filePath = url.searchParams.get('path');
      if (!filePath) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing path' }));
        return;
      }

      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(filePath);
      console.log(`[API] Read file (virtual: ${filePath}, real: ${realPath})`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        res.writeHead(403);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      const content = await readFile(fullPath, 'utf-8');
      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain');
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(content);
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/health' && req.method === 'GET') {
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', roots: ALLOWED_ROOTS }));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/login' && req.method === 'GET') {
      const redirectUri = url.searchParams.get('redirect_uri') || REDIRECT_URI;
      const state = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');
      const codeVerifier = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('base64url');
      codeVerifiers.set(state, codeVerifier);

      const codeChallenge = crypto
        .createHash('sha256')
        .update(codeVerifier)
        .digest('base64url');

      const authUrl = new URL('https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('redirect_uri', redirectUri);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('response_type', 'code');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('scope', 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('access_type', 'offline');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('prompt', 'consent');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('state', state);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('code_challenge', codeChallenge);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('code_challenge_method', 'S256');

      res.writeHead(302, { Location: authUrl.toString() });
      res.end();
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/token' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { code, redirect_uri, state } = body;
      const codeVerifier = codeVerifiers.get(state);
      if (!codeVerifier) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid state' }));
        return;
      }
      codeVerifiers.delete(state);

      const tokenUrl = 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token';
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.append('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      params.append('client_secret', CLIENT_SECRET);
      params.append('code', code);
      params.append('redirect_uri', redirect_uri);
      params.append('grant_type', 'authorization_code');
      params.append('code_verifier', codeVerifier);

      const tokenRes = await fetch(tokenUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: params,
      });
      const data = await tokenRes.json();
      if (!tokenRes.ok) {
        res.writeHead(tokenRes.status);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: data.error_description || 'Token exchange failed' }));
        return;
      }
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({
        access_token: data.access_token,
        refresh_token: data.refresh_token,
        expires_in: data.expires_in,
      }));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/refresh' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { refresh_token } = body;
      if (!refresh_token) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing refresh_token' }));
        return;
      }

      const tokenUrl = 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token';
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.append('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      params.append('client_secret', CLIENT_SECRET);
      params.append('refresh_token', refresh_token);
      params.append('grant_type', 'refresh_token');

      const tokenRes = await fetch(tokenUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: params,
      });
      const data = await tokenRes.json();
      if (!tokenRes.ok) {
        res.writeHead(tokenRes.status);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: data.error_description || 'Refresh failed' }));
        return;
      }
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({
        access_token: data.access_token,
        expires_in: data.expires_in,
      }));
    }
    else {
      res.writeHead(404);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));
    }

  } catch (err) {
    console.error(`[API] Error: ${err.message}`);
    res.writeHead(500);
    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
  }
});

server.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Ō£ģ Backend server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  console.log(`­¤ōü Allowed roots (full Termux access):`, ALLOWED_ROOTS);
});


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Tree/TreeViewModal.tsx =====

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { X, Copy, Share2, FileText, Folder, ChevronRight, ChevronDown, Search, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Check } from 'lucide-react';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { jsPDF } from 'jspdf';
import autoTable from 'jspdf-autotable';

interface TreeNode {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'root';
  path: string;
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  children?: TreeNode[];
  parent?: TreeNode; // added for parent navigation
  properties?: Record<string, any>;
}

interface TreeViewModalProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  rootNode: TreeNode | null;
  title?: string;
}

export function TreeViewModal({ isOpen, onClose, rootNode, title = 'Structure Viewer' }: TreeViewModalProps) {
  const [expandedNodes, setExpandedNodes] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<TreeNode | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'tree' | 'properties'>('tree');
  const [filteredNodes, setFilteredNodes] = useState<TreeNode[]>([]);
  const [searchIndex, setSearchIndex] = useState(0);
  const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (rootNode && isOpen) {
      setExpandedNodes(new Set([rootNode.id]));
      setSelectedNode(rootNode);
      setSearchQuery('');
      setSearchIndex(0);
    }
  }, [rootNode, isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (searchQuery.trim() && rootNode) {
      const results: TreeNode[] = [];
      const search = (node: TreeNode) => {
        if (node.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) results.push(node);
        node.children?.forEach(search);
      };
      search(rootNode);
      setFilteredNodes(results);
      setSearchIndex(0);
      if (results.length > 0) expandToNode(results[0]);
    } else {
      setFilteredNodes([]);
    }
  }, [searchQuery, rootNode]);

  const expandToNode = (node: TreeNode) => {
    const newExpanded = new Set(expandedNodes);
    // Expand all parents using the parent reference
    let current = node;
    while (current.parent) {
      newExpanded.add(current.parent.id);
      current = current.parent;
    }
    newExpanded.add(node.id);
    setExpandedNodes(newExpanded);
    setSelectedNode(node);
  };

  const toggleNode = (nodeId: string) => {
    setExpandedNodes(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(nodeId)) next.delete(nodeId);
      else next.add(nodeId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const copyToClipboard = async (text: string, fieldName: string) => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedField(fieldName);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 1500);
  };

  const copyProperties = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const text = `Path: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n${props.mountPath ? `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}` : ''}\n${props.fileSystemType ? `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}` : ''}\n${props.permissions ? `Permissions: ${props.permissions}` : ''}\n${props.usedSpace !== undefined ? `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.freeSpace !== undefined ? `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}` : ''}\n${props.label ? `Label: ${props.label}` : ''}`.trim();
    await copyToClipboard(text, 'all-props');
  };

  const copyTreeStructure = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? 'ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ ' : 'Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : 'Ōöé   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    copyToClipboard(output, 'tree');
  };

  const copyBoth = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    let propsText = `PROPERTIES\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\nSize: ${formatBytes(selectedNode.size)}\nType: ${selectedNode.type}\nModified: ${selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()}\n`;
    if (props.mountPath) propsText += `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}\n`;
    if (props.fileSystemType) propsText += `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}\n`;
    if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) propsText += `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}\n`;
    if (props.label) propsText += `Label: ${props.label}\n`;
    propsText += `\nTREE STRUCTURE\n`;
    let treeText = '';
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? 'ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ ' : 'Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ ';
      treeText += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : 'Ōöé   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    await copyToClipboard(propsText + treeText, 'both');
  };

  const exportToTxt = () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    let output = `TREE STRUCTURE REPORT\nGenerated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\nRoot: ${selectedNode.name}\nPath: ${selectedNode.path}\n\n`;
    const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
      const connector = isLast ? 'ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ ' : 'Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ ';
      output += prefix + connector + node.name + (node.type === 'directory' ? '/' : '') + '\n';
      if (node.children) {
        const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : 'Ōöé   ');
        node.children.forEach((child, idx) => buildTree(child, newPrefix, idx === node.children!.length - 1));
      }
    };
    buildTree(selectedNode, '', true);
    const blob = new Blob([output], { type: 'text/plain' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.txt`;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const exportToPdf = async () => {
    if (!selectedNode) return;
    const doc = new jsPDF();
    doc.setFontSize(20);
    doc.text('Tree Structure Report', 14, 20);
    doc.setFontSize(10);
    doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 30);
    doc.text(`Root: ${selectedNode.name}`, 14, 36);
    doc.text(`Path: ${selectedNode.path}`, 14, 42);
    const tableData: string[][] = [];
    const buildTableData = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
      const indent = '  '.repeat(depth);
      tableData.push([indent + node.name, node.type, formatBytes(node.size), node.lastModified.toLocaleDateString()]);
      node.children?.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, depth + 1));
    };
    buildTableData(selectedNode, 0);
    autoTable(doc, {
      startY: 50,
      head: [['Name', 'Type', 'Size', 'Modified']],
      body: tableData,
      styles: { fontSize: 8, cellPadding: 2 },
      headStyles: { fillColor: [66, 139, 202] },
    });
    const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable?.finalY || 50;
    doc.setFontSize(12);
    doc.text('Properties', 14, finalY + 10);
    const props = selectedNode.properties || {};
    const propRows = Object.entries(props).map(([key, val]) => [key, String(val)]);
    if (propRows.length) {
      autoTable(doc, {
        startY: finalY + 15,
        body: propRows,
        styles: { fontSize: 8 },
        headStyles: { fillColor: [100, 100, 100] },
      });
    }
    doc.save(`tree_${selectedNode.name}_${Date.now()}.pdf`);
  };

  const navigateSearch = (direction: 'next' | 'prev') => {
    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) return;
    let newIndex = searchIndex;
    if (direction === 'next') newIndex = (searchIndex + 1) % filteredNodes.length;
    else newIndex = (searchIndex - 1 + filteredNodes.length) % filteredNodes.length;
    setSearchIndex(newIndex);
    expandToNode(filteredNodes[newIndex]);
  };

  const renderTreeNode = (node: TreeNode, depth: number = 0) => {
    const isExpanded = expandedNodes.has(node.id);
    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === node.id;
    const hasChildren = node.children && node.children.length > 0;
    return (
      <div key={node.id}>
        <div
          className={cn("flex items-center gap-1 py-1 px-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", isSelected && "bg-primary/10")}
          style={{ paddingLeft: `${depth * 16 + 8}px` }}
          onClick={() => setSelectedNode(node)}
        >
          {hasChildren ? (
            <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleNode(node.id); }} className="p-0.5">
              {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-3 h-3" />}
            </button>
          ) : <span className="w-4" />}
          {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? (
            <Folder className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
          ) : (
            <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          <span className="text-sm truncate">{node.name}</span>
          {node.type === 'file' && <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{formatBytes(node.size)}</span>}
        </div>
        {isExpanded && hasChildren && (
          <div>{node.children!.map(child => renderTreeNode(child, depth + 1))}</div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };

  if (!isOpen || !rootNode) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-4xl h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span>{title}</span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToTxt}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> TXT</Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={exportToPdf}><FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> PDF</Button>
            </div>
          </DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>

        {/* Search Bar */}
        <div className="relative mb-2">
          <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            placeholder="Search files/folders..."
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            className="pl-8 pr-24"
          />
          {searchQuery && filteredNodes.length > 0 && (
            <div className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex items-center gap-1">
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{searchIndex + 1}/{filteredNodes.length}</span>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('prev')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowLeft className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
              <button onClick={() => navigateSearch('next')} className="p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded"><ArrowRight className="w-3 h-3" /></button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as any)} className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
          <TabsList className="w-full"><TabsTrigger value="tree" className="flex-1">Tree Structure</TabsTrigger><TabsTrigger value="properties" className="flex-1">Properties</TabsTrigger></TabsList>
          <TabsContent value="tree" className="flex-1 overflow-hidden mt-2">
            <ScrollArea className="h-full">
              {searchQuery ? (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {filteredNodes.map((node, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={node.id}
                      className={cn("flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent", selectedNode?.id === node.id && "bg-primary/10", idx === searchIndex && "ring-2 ring-primary")}
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedNode(node); setSearchIndex(idx); expandToNode(node); }}
                    >
                      {node.type === 'directory' || node.type === 'root' ? <Folder className="w-4 h-4" /> : <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />}
                      <span className="text-sm">{node.name}</span>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">{node.path}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : renderTreeNode(rootNode)}
            </ScrollArea>
          </TabsContent>
          <TabsContent value="properties" className="flex-1 overflow-auto mt-2">
            {selectedNode ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Properties grid with one-tap copy */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                  <PropertyRow label="Name" value={selectedNode.name} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.name, 'name')} copied={copiedField === 'name'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Path" value={selectedNode.path} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.path, 'path')} copied={copiedField === 'path'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Type" value={selectedNode.type} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.type, 'type')} copied={copiedField === 'type'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Size" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.size)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.size), 'size')} copied={copiedField === 'size'} />
                  <PropertyRow label="Modified" value={selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString()} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.lastModified.toLocaleString(), 'modified')} copied={copiedField === 'modified'} />
                  {selectedNode.properties?.mountPath && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Mount Path" value={selectedNode.properties.mountPath} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.mountPath, 'mountPath')} copied={copiedField === 'mountPath'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.fileSystemType && (
                    <PropertyRow label="File System" value={selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.fileSystemType, 'fsType')} copied={copiedField === 'fsType'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.permissions && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Permissions" value={selectedNode.properties.permissions} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.permissions, 'perms')} copied={copiedField === 'perms'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.usedSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Used Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.usedSpace), 'used')} copied={copiedField === 'used'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.freeSpace !== undefined && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Free Space" value={formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace)} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(formatBytes(selectedNode.properties.freeSpace), 'free')} copied={copiedField === 'free'} />
                  )}
                  {selectedNode.properties?.label && (
                    <PropertyRow label="Label" value={selectedNode.properties.label} onCopy={() => copyToClipboard(selectedNode.properties.label, 'label')} copied={copiedField === 'label'} />
                  )}
                </div>
                {/* Action buttons */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 pt-3 border-t border-border flex-wrap">
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyProperties}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Properties</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyTreeStructure}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Tree</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={copyBoth}><Copy className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Copy Both</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToTxt}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export TXT</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={exportToPdf}><Share2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" /> Export PDF</Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center text-muted-foreground py-8">Select a node to view properties</div>
            )}
          </TabsContent>
        </Tabs>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// Helper component for property row with copy button
function PropertyRow({ label, value, onCopy, copied }: { label: string; value: string; onCopy: () => void; copied: boolean }) {
  return (
    <>
      <div className="text-muted-foreground">{label}:</div>
      <div className="font-mono text-xs break-all flex items-center gap-1 group">
        <span className="truncate">{value}</span>
        <button onClick={onCopy} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-0.5 hover:bg-accent rounded shrink-0">
          {copied ? <Check className="w-3 h-3 text-green-500" /> : <Copy className="w-3 h-3" />}
        </button>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) { size /= 1024; unitIndex++; }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/Tree/TreeIconButton.tsx =====

import { TreePine } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useTreeStore } from '@/stores/treeStore';
import { TreeNode, NodeProperties } from '@/types/tree';

interface TreeIconButtonProps {
  item: any;
  sourceType: 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';
  panelId: string;
  className?: string;
}

export function TreeIconButton({ item, sourceType, panelId, className }: TreeIconButtonProps) {
  const openTree = useTreeStore((s) => s.openTree);

  const handleClick = async () => {
    // Build tree node from item
    const treeNode = await buildTreeNode(item, sourceType, panelId);
    openTree(treeNode);
  };

  return (
    <Button
      variant="ghost"
      size="icon"
      className={className}
      onClick={handleClick}
      title="View Tree Structure"
    >
      <TreePine className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
    </Button>
  );
}

async function buildTreeNode(
  item: any, 
  sourceType: string, 
  panelId: string
): Promise<TreeNode> {
  const baseNode: TreeNode = {
    id: item.id || item.name || String(Date.now()),
    name: item.name || 'Unknown',
    type: getNodeType(item, sourceType),
    path: item.path || item.name || '/',
    size: item.size || 0,
    lastModified: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : new Date(),
    depth: 0,
    properties: await buildProperties(item, sourceType),
  };

  // Build children if it's a directory
  if (baseNode.type === 'directory' && item.children) {
    baseNode.children = item.children.map((child: any, index: number) => ({
      ...buildTreeNode(child, sourceType, panelId),
      parent: baseNode,
      depth: 1,
    }));
  }

  return baseNode;
}

function getNodeType(item: any, sourceType: string): 'file' | 'directory' | 'symlink' | 'root' {
  if (sourceType === 'storage' || sourceType === 'terminal') {
    return item.kind === 'directory' ? 'directory' : 
           item.type === 'symlink' ? 'symlink' : 'file';
  }
  if (sourceType === 'drive') {
    return item.mimeType === 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' ? 'directory' : 'file';
  }
  if (sourceType === 'github') {
    return item.type === 'dir' ? 'directory' : 
           item.type === 'symlink' ? 'symlink' : 'file';
  }
  return 'file';
}

async function buildProperties(item: any, sourceType: string): Promise<NodeProperties> {
  const props: NodeProperties = {
    createdAt: item.createdAt ? new Date(item.createdAt) : undefined,
    modifiedAt: item.lastModified ? new Date(item.lastModified) : undefined,
    mimeType: item.mimeType,
    isHidden: item.name?.startsWith('.'),
    isReadOnly: item.permissions && !item.permissions.includes('w'),
  };

  // Add source-specific properties
  switch (sourceType) {
    case 'storage':
      props.permissions = item.permissions;
      props.mountPath = item.path;
      break;
    case 'drive':
      props.fileSystemType = 'Google Drive';
      props.label = 'Cloud Storage';
      break;
    case 'github':
      props.fileSystemType = 'Git Repository';
      props.owner = item.owner;
      props.version = item.sha;
      break;
    case 'terminal':
      props.fileSystemType = 'WebContainer FS';
      props.permissions = item.permissions;
      props.owner = 'root';
      props.group = 'root';
      break;
  }

  return props;
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/PanelDialog.tsx =====

import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { X } from 'lucide-react';
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom';

interface PanelDialogProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  panelId: string;
  title: string;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  width?: string;
}

export function PanelDialog({ isOpen, onClose, panelId, title, children, width = '90%' }: PanelDialogProps) {
  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && dialogRef.current) {
      const panelElement = document.querySelector(`[data-panel-id="${panelId}"]`);
      if (panelElement) {
        const rect = panelElement.getBoundingClientRect();
        dialogRef.current.style.top = `${rect.top + rect.height / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.left = `${rect.left + rect.width / 2}px`;
        dialogRef.current.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%)';
      }
    }
  }, [isOpen, panelId]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  return createPortal(
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 pointer-events-none">
      <div
        ref={dialogRef}
        className="absolute pointer-events-auto bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden"
        style={{ width, maxWidth: 'min(90%, 400px)' }}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
          <h3 className="font-medium text-sm">{title}</h3>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-1 hover:bg-accent rounded">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4">{children}</div>
      </div>
    </div>,
    document.body
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/badge.tsx =====

import * as React from "react";

export function Badge({
  children,
  className = "",
  variant = "default",
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  variant?: "default" | "secondary" | "outline" | "destructive";
}) {
  const base =
    "inline-flex items-center rounded-md px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium";

  const variants: Record<string, string> = {
    default: "bg-primary text-white",
    secondary: "bg-gray-200 text-gray-800",
    outline: "border border-gray-300 text-gray-800",
    destructive: "bg-red-500 text-white",
  };

  return (
    <span className={`${base} ${variants[variant]} ${className}`}>
      {children}
    </span>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/button.tsx =====

import * as React from "react"
import { Slot } from "@radix-ui/react-slot"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const buttonVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
        destructive:
          "bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40 dark:bg-destructive/60",
        outline:
          "border bg-background shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:bg-input/30 dark:border-input dark:hover:bg-input/50",
        secondary:
          "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
        ghost:
          "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:hover:bg-accent/50",
        link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
      },
      size: {
        default: "h-9 px-4 py-2 has-[>svg]:px-3",
        sm: "h-8 rounded-md gap-1.5 px-3 has-[>svg]:px-2.5",
        lg: "h-10 rounded-md px-6 has-[>svg]:px-4",
        icon: "size-9",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Button({
  className,
  variant,
  size,
  asChild = false,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
    asChild?: boolean
  }) {
  const Comp = asChild ? Slot : "button"

  return (
    <Comp
      data-slot="button"
      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Button, buttonVariants }

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/radio-group.tsx =====

import * as React from "react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface RadioGroupContextValue {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

const RadioGroupContext = React.createContext<RadioGroupContextValue>({});

interface RadioGroupProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> {
  value?: string;
  onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
  name?: string;
}

export const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, RadioGroupProps>(
  ({ className, value, onValueChange, disabled, name, children, ...props }, ref) => {
    return (
      <RadioGroupContext.Provider value={{ value, onValueChange, disabled, name }}>
        <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex flex-wrap gap-4", className)} role="radiogroup" {...props}>
          {children}
        </div>
      </RadioGroupContext.Provider>
    );
  }
);
RadioGroup.displayName = "RadioGroup";

interface RadioGroupItemProps extends React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement> {
  value: string;
  id?: string;
}

export const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<HTMLInputElement, RadioGroupItemProps>(
  ({ className, value, id, disabled: itemDisabled, ...props }, ref) => {
    const context = React.useContext(RadioGroupContext);
    const isChecked = context.value === value;
    const isDisabled = itemDisabled ?? context.disabled;

    const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      if (!isDisabled && e.target.checked) {
        context.onValueChange?.(value);
      }
    };

    const inputId = id || `radio-${value}`;

    return (
      <input
        ref={ref}
        type="radio"
        id={inputId}
        name={context.name}
        value={value}
        checked={isChecked}
        onChange={handleChange}
        disabled={isDisabled}
        className={cn(
          "h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
          className
        )}
        {...props}
      />
    );
  }
);
RadioGroupItem.displayName = "RadioGroupItem";

import * as React from "react";

export function Switch({
  checked,
  onCheckedChange,
}: {
  checked?: boolean;
  onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={() => onCheckedChange?.(!checked)}
      className={`w-10 h-5 flex items-center rounded-full transition ${
        checked ? "bg-primary" : "bg-gray-300"
      }`}
    >
      <div
        className={`w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full shadow transform transition ${
          checked ? "translate-x-5" : "translate-x-1"
        }`}
      />
    </button>
  );
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ui/toggle.tsx =====

import * as React from "react"
import * as TogglePrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-toggle"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const toggleVariants = cva(
  "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=on]:bg-accent data-[state=on]:text-accent-foreground [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 transition-all outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-transparent",
        outline:
          "border border-input bg-transparent shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
      },
      size: {
        default: "h-9 px-3 min-w-9",
        sm: "h-8 px-2 min-w-8",
        lg: "h-10 px-3 min-w-10",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
      size: "default",
    },
  }
)

function Toggle({
  className,
  variant,
  size,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root> &
  VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) {
  return (
    <TogglePrimitive.Root
      data-slot="toggle"
      className={cn(toggleVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Toggle, toggleVariants }

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx =====

import React, { Component, ReactNode } from 'react';

interface Props {
  children: ReactNode;
}

interface State {
  hasError: boolean;
  error: Error | null;
}

export class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {
  constructor(props: Props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = { hasError: false, error: null };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {
    return { hasError: true, error };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: React.ErrorInfo) {
    console.error('Uncaught error:', error, errorInfo);
  }

  render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      return (
        <div style={{ padding: '20px', color: 'red', fontFamily: 'monospace' }}>
          <h2>Something went wrong</h2>
          <pre>{this.state.error?.stack || this.state.error?.message}</pre>
          <button onClick={() => window.location.reload()}>Reload</button>
        </div>
      );
    }
    return this.props.children;
  }
}
