===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/PanelContainer.tsx =====

import { usePanelStore, usePanels, useActivePanelId } from '@/stores/panelStore';
import { GridPanel } from './Panel/GridPanel';
import { GlobalSearchBar } from './Search/GlobalSearchBar';
import { FilterPanel } from './Search/FilterPanel';
import { SearchResultsOverlay } from './Search/SearchResultsOverlay';

export function PanelContainer() {
  const panels = usePanels();
  const activePanelId = useActivePanelId();
  const { setActivePanel } = usePanelStore();

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden bg-background">
      {/* Top bar with search */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-2 border-b border-border bg-card shrink-0">
        <GlobalSearchBar />
      </div>

      {/* Filter Panel */}
      <FilterPanel />

      {/* Search Results */}
      <SearchResultsOverlay />

      {/* 2x2 Grid Panels - fixed equal size, no overflow */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 grid grid-cols-2 grid-rows-2 gap-1 p-1 overflow-hidden">
        {panels.slice(0, 4).map((panel) => (
          <GridPanel
            key={panel.id}
            panel={panel}
            isActive={panel.id === activePanelId}
            onActivate={() => setActivePanel(panel.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/components/RightPanel.tsx =====

import { useAppStore } from '@/stores/appStore';
import { FileManager } from './FileManager';
import { 
  HardDrive, 
  FolderGit, 
  Github, 
  Terminal,
  FileText,
  Database
} from 'lucide-react';

const placeholderContent: Record<string, { title: string; icon: React.ElementType; component?: React.ReactNode }> = {
  storage: {
    title: 'File Manager',
    icon: Database,
    component: <FileManager panelId="right-panel" />,
  },
  drive: {
    title: 'Drive Files',
    icon: FolderGit,
  },
  github: {
    title: 'GitHub Repositories',
    icon: Github,
  },
  terminal: {
    title: 'Terminal Sessions',
    icon: Terminal,
  },
};

function PlaceholderContent({ source }: { source: string }) {
  const content = placeholderContent[source];
  const Icon = content.icon;

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 bg-background p-6 overflow-auto">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
          <div className="p-3 rounded-xl bg-primary/10 text-primary">
            <Icon className="w-8 h-8" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">{content.title}</h2>
            <p className="text-muted-foreground">Placeholder for {source} content</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-8 rounded-lg border border-border bg-card">
          <p className="text-muted-foreground text-center">
            This feature is not yet implemented.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function RightPanel() {
  const activeSource = useAppStore((state) => state.activeSource);
  const content = placeholderContent[activeSource];

  // If storage is selected, show FileManager
  if (activeSource === 'storage' && content.component) {
    return (
      <div className="flex-1 h-screen overflow-hidden">
        {content.component}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return <PlaceholderContent source={activeSource} />;
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useLiveLogout.ts =====

import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore';
import { useLogStore } from '@/stores/logStore';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { logout as googleLogout } from '@/lib/googleAuth';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

export function useLiveLogout() {
  const logout = useAuthStore((s) => s.logout);
  const currentUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.currentUser);
  const currentSession = useAuthStore((s) => s.currentSession);
  const getSessionLogs = useAuthStore((s) => s.getSessionLogs);
  const logs = useLogStore((s) => s.logs);
  const clearDrive = useDriveStore((s) => s.logout);

  const forceLogout = useCallback(async () => {
    // Clear Google Drive tokens
    googleLogout();
    clearDrive();
    
    if (!currentUser || !currentSession) { 
      await logout(); 
      window.location.href = '/';
      return; 
    }
    
    const sessionLogs = getSessionLogs();
    const allLogs = [...sessionLogs, ...logs];
    const logData = { 
      sessionId: currentSession.id, 
      userId: currentUser.id, 
      username: currentUser.username, 
      startTime: currentSession.startTime, 
      endTime: new Date(), 
      logs: allLogs, 
      summary: { 
        totalActions: allLogs.length, 
        categories: allLogs.reduce((acc,log) => { 
          acc[log.category] = (acc[log.category]||0)+1; 
          return acc; 
        }, {} as Record<string,number>) 
      } 
    };
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(logData,null,2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    saveAs(blob, `session_${currentSession.id}_${Date.now()}.log.json`);
    try { 
      await fetch('/api/authority/logs', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(logData) }); 
    } catch(err) { 
      console.warn('Failed to send logs to authority:', err); 
    }
    await logout();
    window.location.href = '/';
  }, [currentUser, currentSession, getSessionLogs, logs, logout, clearDrive]);
  
  return { forceLogout };
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useLastVisited.ts =====

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

interface LastVisitedItem {
  panelId: string;
  itemId: string;
  itemPath: string;
  timestamp: number;
}

export function useLastVisited(panelId: string, itemId: string, itemPath: string) {
  const [shouldBlink, setShouldBlink] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem(`lastVisited_${panelId}`);
    if (stored) {
      const last: LastVisitedItem = JSON.parse(stored);
      // Blink if same item and visited within last 30 seconds
      if (last.itemId === itemId && Date.now() - last.timestamp < 30000) {
        setShouldBlink(true);
        const timer = setTimeout(() => setShouldBlink(false), 2000);
        return () => clearTimeout(timer);
      }
    }
  }, [panelId, itemId]);

  const markAsVisited = () => {
    const last: LastVisitedItem = {
      panelId,
      itemId,
      itemPath,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };
    localStorage.setItem(`lastVisited_${panelId}`, JSON.stringify(last));
  };

  return { shouldBlink, markAsVisited };
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useResizable.ts =====

import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';

interface UseResizableOptions {
  initialWidth: number;
  minWidth: number;
  onResize: (width: number) => void;
}

export function useResizable({ initialWidth, minWidth, onResize }: UseResizableOptions) {
  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false);
  const [currentWidth, setCurrentWidth] = useState(initialWidth);
  const startXRef = useRef(0);
  const startWidthRef = useRef(initialWidth);

  const startResize = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsResizing(true);
    startXRef.current = e.clientX;
    startWidthRef.current = currentWidth;
  }, [currentWidth]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      if (!isResizing) return;
      
      const delta = e.clientX - startXRef.current;
      const newWidth = Math.max(minWidth, startWidthRef.current + delta);
      setCurrentWidth(newWidth);
      onResize(newWidth);
    };

    const handleMouseUp = () => {
      setIsResizing(false);
    };

    if (isResizing) {
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    }

    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);
      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleMouseUp);
      document.body.style.cursor = '';
      document.body.style.userSelect = '';
    };
  }, [isResizing, minWidth, onResize]);

  return {
    width: currentWidth,
    isResizing,
    startResize,
  };
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/hooks/useTokenExpiry.ts =====

import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useNotificationStore } from '@/stores/notificationStore';

export function useTokenExpiry() {
  const accounts = useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
  const removeAccount = useDriveStore((s) => s.removeAccount);
  const addNotification = useNotificationStore((s) => s.addNotification);

  useEffect(() => {
    const checkExpiry = () => {
      accounts.forEach((account) => {
        if (!account.expiresAt) return;
        
        const expiresAt = account.expiresAt;
        const now = Date.now();
        const timeLeft = expiresAt - now;

        // Warn if token expires in less than 5 minutes
        if (timeLeft > 0 && timeLeft < 5 * 60 * 1000) {
          addNotification({
            type: 'warning',
            title: 'Token Expiring Soon',
            message: `Google Drive token for ${account.name || account.id} is about to expire. Please re-authenticate.`,
          });
        }

        // Remove expired tokens
        if (timeLeft <= 0) {
          removeAccount(account.id);
          addNotification({
            type: 'error',
            title: 'Token Expired',
            message: `Google Drive token for ${account.name || account.id} has expired. Please re-authenticate.`,
          });
        }
      });
    };

    const interval = setInterval(checkExpiry, 60000); // Check every minute
    checkExpiry(); // Check immediately

    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [accounts, removeAccount, addNotification]);
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/conversionEngines.ts =====

import { ConversionEngine, CONVERSION_RULES } from '@/types/rename';
import { FFmpeg } from '@ffmpeg/ffmpeg';
import { fetchFile, toBlobURL } from '@ffmpeg/util';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import mammoth from 'mammoth';
import { saveAs } from 'file-saver';

// Helper to convert Uint8Array to Blob safely (avoids SharedArrayBuffer issues)
function uint8ToBlob(uint8: Uint8Array): Blob {
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(uint8.byteLength);
  const view = new Uint8Array(buffer);
  view.set(uint8);
  return new Blob([buffer]);
}

// FFmpeg WASM Engine
class FFmpegEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'ffmpeg';
  isReady = false;
  private ffmpeg: FFmpeg | null = null;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.isReady) return;
    
    this.ffmpeg = new FFmpeg();
    const baseURL = 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/umd';
    
    await this.ffmpeg.load({
      coreURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.js`, 'text/javascript'),
      wasmURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.wasm`, 'application/wasm'),
    });
    
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    if (!this.ffmpeg) throw new Error('FFmpeg not initialized');
    
    const inputName = `input${fromExt}`;
    const outputName = `output${toExt}`;
    
    // Write file to FFmpeg FS
    const fileData = await fetchFile(file);
    await this.ffmpeg.writeFile(inputName, fileData);
    
    // Run conversion
    const args = this.getConversionArgs(fromExt, toExt, inputName, outputName);
    
    this.ffmpeg.on('progress', ({ progress }) => {
      onProgress?.(Math.round(progress * 100));
    });
    
    await this.ffmpeg.exec(args);
    
    // Read output
    const data = await this.ffmpeg.readFile(outputName);
    // Ensure data is Uint8Array
    let uint8Data: Uint8Array;
    if (data instanceof Uint8Array) {
      uint8Data = data;
    } else if (typeof data === 'string') {
      uint8Data = new TextEncoder().encode(data);
    } else {
      throw new Error('Unexpected data type from FFmpeg');
    }
    const outputBlob = uint8ToBlob(uint8Data);
    
    // Cleanup
    await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(inputName);
    await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(outputName);
    
    return outputBlob;
  }

  private getConversionArgs(fromExt: string, toExt: string, input: string, output: string): string[] {
    // Video to video
    if (['.mp4', '.avi', '.mov', '.mkv', '.webm'].includes(fromExt)) {
      if (toExt === '.webm') return ['-i', input, '-c:v', 'libvpx-vp9', '-c:a', 'libopus', output];
      return ['-i', input, '-c:v', 'libx264', '-c:a', 'aac', output];
    }
    
    // Audio to audio
    if (['.mp3', '.wav', '.aac', '.ogg', '.flac'].includes(fromExt)) {
      if (toExt === '.mp3') return ['-i', input, '-c:a', 'libmp3lame', '-q:a', '2', output];
      return ['-i', input, output];
    }
    
    return ['-i', input, output];
  }

  private getMimeType(ext: string): string {
    const mimeTypes: Record<string, string> = {
      '.mp4': 'video/mp4',
      '.webm': 'video/webm',
      '.mp3': 'audio/mpeg',
      '.wav': 'audio/wav',
    };
    return mimeTypes[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
  }
}

// Sharp-like Image Engine (using Canvas API for browser)
class CanvasImageEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'sharp';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const img = new Image();
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      
      img.onload = () => {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = img.width;
        canvas.height = img.height;
        
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        if (!ctx) {
          reject(new Error('Canvas not supported'));
          return;
        }
        
        // Handle transparency for PNG/WebP
        if (toExt === '.png' || toExt === '.webp') {
          ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        }
        
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        
        const mimeType = toExt === '.jpg' || toExt === '.jpeg' 
          ? 'image/jpeg' 
          : toExt === '.webp' 
            ? 'image/webp' 
            : 'image/png';
        
        canvas.toBlob((blob) => {
          if (blob) {
            resolve(blob);
          } else {
            reject(new Error('Canvas to Blob failed'));
          }
        }, mimeType, 0.9);
      };
      
      img.onerror = () => {
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        reject(new Error('Image load failed'));
      };
      
      img.src = url;
    });
  }
}

// Mammoth Document Engine
class MammothEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'mammoth';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
    
    let result: { value: string };
    
    if (toExt === '.html') {
      result = await mammoth.convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer });
    } else {
      result = await mammoth.extractRawText({ arrayBuffer });
    }
    
    const mimeType = toExt === '.html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
    return new Blob([result.value], { type: mimeType });
  }
}

// JSZip Archive Engine
class JSZipEngine implements ConversionEngine {
  name = 'jszip';
  isReady = true;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.isReady = true;
  }

  async convert(
    file: Blob, 
    fromExt: string, 
    toExt: string, 
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    // For folder to zip conversion
    // This requires the folder contents to be passed separately
    // For now, return empty zip as placeholder
    const zip = new JSZip();
    const content = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' });
    return content;
  }

  async compressFolder(
    files: { name: string; content: Blob | string }[],
    onProgress?: (p: number) => void
  ): Promise<Blob> {
    const zip = new JSZip();
    
    files.forEach((file, index) => {
      zip.file(file.name, file.content);
      onProgress?.(Math.round((index / files.length) * 50));
    });
    
    const content = await zip.generateAsync(
      { type: 'blob' },
      (metadata) => {
        onProgress?.(50 + Math.round(metadata.percent / 2));
      }
    );
    
    return content;
  }
}

// Export engines
export const ffmpegEngine = new FFmpegEngine();
export const imageEngine = new CanvasImageEngine();
export const mammothEngine = new MammothEngine();
export const zipEngine = new JSZipEngine();

export function getEngineForConversion(fromExt: string, toExt: string): ConversionEngine | null {
  const rule = CONVERSION_RULES.find(r => 
    r.from.includes(fromExt.toLowerCase()) && r.to === toExt.toLowerCase()
  );
  
  if (!rule) return null;
  
  switch (rule.engine) {
    case 'ffmpeg': return ffmpegEngine;
    case 'sharp': return imageEngine;
    case 'mammoth': return mammothEngine;
    case 'jszip': return zipEngine;
    default: return null;
  }
}

export function needsConversion(oldName: string, newName: string): boolean {
  const oldExt = getExtension(oldName);
  const newExt = getExtension(newName);
  return oldExt !== newExt && getEngineForConversion(oldExt, newExt) !== null;
}

export function getExtension(filename: string): string {
  const ext = filename.slice(filename.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase();
  return ext.includes('.') ? ext : '';
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/conversionEngine.ts =====

import { FFmpeg } from '@ffmpeg/ffmpeg';
import { fetchFile, toBlobURL } from '@ffmpeg/util';
import JSZip from 'jszip';
import mammoth from 'mammoth';

export type ConversionFormat = 'txt' | 'md' | 'json' | 'xml' | 'pdf' | 'docx' | 'zip' | 'tar' | '7z' | 'tar.gz' | 'png' | 'jpg' | 'webp' | 'py' | 'js' | 'html';
export interface ConversionResult { success: boolean; blob?: Blob; error?: string; outputName: string; }

// Helper to convert Uint8Array to Blob safely (avoids SharedArrayBuffer issues)
function uint8ToBlob(uint8: Uint8Array): Blob {
  const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(uint8.byteLength);
  const view = new Uint8Array(buffer);
  view.set(uint8);
  return new Blob([buffer]);
}

class ConversionEngine {
  private ffmpeg: FFmpeg | null = null;
  private ffmpegReady = false;
  private ffmpegLoading = false;

  async initFFmpeg(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.ffmpegReady || this.ffmpegLoading) return;
    this.ffmpegLoading = true;
    try {
      this.ffmpeg = new FFmpeg();
      const baseURL = 'https://unpkg.com/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/umd';
      await this.ffmpeg.load({
        coreURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.js`, 'text/javascript'),
        wasmURL: await toBlobURL(`${baseURL}/ffmpeg-core.wasm`, 'application/wasm'),
      });
      this.ffmpegReady = true;
    } catch (err) { console.error('FFmpeg init failed:', err); }
    finally { this.ffmpegLoading = false; }
  }

  async convert(file: Blob, fromExt: string, toExt: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    const from = fromExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const to = toExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const originalName = `input.${from}`;
    const outputName = `output.${to}`;

    if (this.isImageFormat(from) && this.isImageFormat(to)) return this.convertImage(file, from, to, onProgress);
    if (from === 'docx' && (to === 'txt' || to === 'html')) return this.convertDocx(file, to);
    if (from === 'folder' && to === 'zip') return this.convertFolderToZip(file, onProgress);
    if ((from === 'zip' || from === 'tar') && to === 'tar.gz') return this.convertArchive(file, from, to, onProgress);
    if ((this.isVideoFormat(from) || this.isAudioFormat(from)) && (this.isVideoFormat(to) || this.isAudioFormat(to))) return this.convertWithFFmpeg(file, from, to, outputName, onProgress);
    if (this.isTextFormat(from) && this.isTextFormat(to)) return this.convertText(file, from, to);
    return { success: false, error: `Conversion from .${from} to .${to} not supported`, outputName };
  }

  private isImageFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['jpg','jpeg','png','webp','gif','bmp'].includes(ext); }
  private isVideoFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['mp4','avi','mov','mkv','webm'].includes(ext); }
  private isAudioFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['mp3','wav','aac','ogg','flac'].includes(ext); }
  private isTextFormat(ext: string): boolean { return ['txt','md','json','xml','html','css','js','py'].includes(ext); }

  private async convertImage(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const img = new Image();
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      img.onload = () => {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = img.width;
        canvas.height = img.height;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        if (!ctx) { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); resolve({ success: false, error: 'Canvas not supported', outputName: `output.${to}` }); return; }
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        const mimeType = to === 'jpg' || to === 'jpeg' ? 'image/jpeg' : to === 'webp' ? 'image/webp' : 'image/png';
        const quality = to === 'jpg' || to === 'jpeg' ? 0.9 : undefined;
        canvas.toBlob((blob) => { if (blob) { onProgress?.(100); resolve({ success: true, blob, outputName: `output.${to}` }); } else resolve({ success: false, error: 'Canvas conversion failed', outputName: `output.${to}` }); }, mimeType, quality);
      };
      img.onerror = () => { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); resolve({ success: false, error: 'Image load failed', outputName: `output.${to}` }); };
      img.src = url;
    });
  }

  private async convertDocx(file: Blob, to: string): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    try {
      const arrayBuffer = await file.arrayBuffer();
      const result = to === 'html' ? await mammoth.convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer }) : await mammoth.extractRawText({ arrayBuffer });
      const mimeType = to === 'html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
      return { success: true, blob: new Blob([result.value], { type: mimeType }), outputName: `output.${to}` };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName: `output.${to}` }; }
  }

  private async convertFolderToZip(file: Blob, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    const zip = new JSZip();
    const content = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' }, (meta) => onProgress?.(meta.percent));
    return { success: true, blob: content, outputName: 'output.zip' };
  }

  private async convertArchive(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    onProgress?.(100);
    return { success: true, blob: file, outputName: `output.${to}` };
  }

  private async convertWithFFmpeg(file: Blob, from: string, to: string, outputName: string, onProgress?: (p: number) => void): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    await this.initFFmpeg();
    if (!this.ffmpeg || !this.ffmpegReady) return { success: false, error: 'FFmpeg not ready', outputName };
    try {
      const inputName = `input.${from}`;
      await this.ffmpeg.writeFile(inputName, await fetchFile(file));
      this.ffmpeg.on('progress', ({ progress }) => onProgress?.(Math.round(progress * 100)));
      let args: string[];
      if (this.isVideoFormat(to)) args = ['-i', inputName, '-c:v', 'libx264', '-c:a', 'aac', outputName];
      else if (this.isAudioFormat(to)) args = ['-i', inputName, '-c:a', 'libmp3lame', '-q:a', '2', outputName];
      else args = ['-i', inputName, outputName];
      await this.ffmpeg.exec(args);
      const data = await this.ffmpeg.readFile(outputName);
      // Ensure data is Uint8Array
      let uint8Data: Uint8Array;
      if (data instanceof Uint8Array) {
        uint8Data = data;
      } else if (typeof data === 'string') {
        // Convert string to Uint8Array
        uint8Data = new TextEncoder().encode(data);
      } else {
        throw new Error('Unexpected data type from FFmpeg');
      }
      const blob = uint8ToBlob(uint8Data);
      await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(inputName);
      await this.ffmpeg.deleteFile(outputName);
      return { success: true, blob, outputName };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName }; }
  }

  private async convertText(file: Blob, from: string, to: string): Promise<ConversionResult> {
    try {
      let text = await file.text();
      if (from === 'json' && to === 'txt') text = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text), null, 2);
      else if (from === 'txt' && to === 'json') text = JSON.stringify({ content: text });
      else if (from === 'md' && to === 'html') text = `<pre>${text}</pre>`;
      const mimeType = to === 'html' ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain';
      return { success: true, blob: new Blob([text], { type: mimeType }), outputName: `output.${to}` };
    } catch (err) { return { success: false, error: (err as Error).message, outputName: `output.${to}` }; }
  }

  private getMimeType(ext: string): string {
    const mimes: Record<string, string> = { mp4:'video/mp4', webm:'video/webm', mp3:'audio/mpeg', wav:'audio/wav', jpg:'image/jpeg', jpeg:'image/jpeg', png:'image/png', webp:'image/webp', pdf:'application/pdf', zip:'application/zip', txt:'text/plain', html:'text/html', json:'application/json' };
    return mimes[ext] || 'application/octet-stream';
  }

  canConvert(fromExt: string, toExt: string): boolean {
    const from = fromExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    const to = toExt.toLowerCase().replace(/^\./, '');
    if (from === to) return true;
    if (this.isImageFormat(from) && this.isImageFormat(to)) return true;
    if ((this.isVideoFormat(from) || this.isAudioFormat(from)) && (this.isVideoFormat(to) || this.isAudioFormat(to))) return true;
    if (from === 'docx' && (to === 'txt' || to === 'html')) return true;
    if (this.isTextFormat(from) && this.isTextFormat(to)) return true;
    if (from === 'folder' && to === 'zip') return true;
    return false;
  }
}

export const conversionEngine = new ConversionEngine();


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/extensionScanner.ts =====

import { useSearchStore } from '@/stores/searchStore';
import { ExtensionStats } from '@/types/search';

// Extension categories
export const EXTENSION_CATEGORIES: Record<string, string[]> = {
  image: ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.gif', '.bmp', '.webp', '.svg', '.ico', '.tiff', '.raw'],
  video: ['.mp4', '.mkv', '.avi', '.mov', '.wmv', '.flv', '.webm', '.m4v', '.3gp'],
  audio: ['.mp3', '.wav', '.flac', '.aac', '.ogg', '.wma', '.m4a', '.opus'],
  document: ['.pdf', '.doc', '.docx', '.txt', '.rtf', '.odt', '.xls', '.xlsx', '.ppt', '.pptx'],
  code: ['.js', '.ts', '.jsx', '.tsx', '.py', '.java', '.cpp', '.c', '.h', '.go', '.rs', '.php', '.rb', '.swift', '.kt'],
  web: ['.html', '.htm', '.css', '.scss', '.sass', '.less', '.xml', '.json'],
  archive: ['.zip', '.rar', '.7z', '.tar', '.gz', '.bz2', '.xz', '.iso'],
  database: ['.db', '.sqlite', '.sql', '.mdb', '.accdb'],
  executable: ['.exe', '.dll', '.so', '.dylib', '.app', '.msi', '.deb', '.rpm', '.apk'],
};

export interface ExtensionCategory {
  name: string;
  extensions: ExtensionStats[];
  count: number;
  totalSize: number;
}

// Get category for extension
export function getCategoryForExtension(ext: string): string {
  const lowerExt = ext.toLowerCase();
  for (const [category, extensions] of Object.entries(EXTENSION_CATEGORIES)) {
    if (extensions.includes(lowerExt)) {
      return category;
    }
  }
  return 'other';
}

// Get display name for category
export function getCategoryDisplayName(category: string): string {
  const names: Record<string, string> = {
    image: 'Images',
    video: 'Videos',
    audio: 'Audio',
    document: 'Documents',
    code: 'Program / Code',
    web: 'Web Files',
    archive: 'Archives',
    database: 'Databases',
    executable: 'Executables',
    other: 'Other',
  };
  return names[category] || category;
}

// Scan items for extensions
export async function scanItemsForExtensions(
  sourceType: string,
  accountId: string,
  items: any[]
): Promise<void> {
  const { scanSourceForExtensions } = useSearchStore.getState();
  await scanSourceForExtensions(sourceType, accountId, items);
}

// Get categorized extensions from store
export function getCategorizedExtensions(): Array<[string, ExtensionCategory]> {
  const { availableExtensions } = useSearchStore.getState();
  
  const categories: Record<string, ExtensionCategory> = {};
  
  // Initialize categories
  Object.keys(EXTENSION_CATEGORIES).forEach(cat => {
    categories[cat] = {
      name: getCategoryDisplayName(cat),
      extensions: [],
      count: 0,
      totalSize: 0,
    };
  });
  categories['other'] = {
    name: 'Other',
    extensions: [],
    count: 0,
    totalSize: 0,
  };

  // Sort extensions into categories
  availableExtensions.forEach((extStat: ExtensionStats) => {
    const category = getCategoryForExtension(extStat.extension);
    if (!categories[category]) {
      categories[category] = {
        name: getCategoryDisplayName(category),
        extensions: [],
        count: 0,
        totalSize: 0,
      };
    }
    categories[category].extensions.push(extStat);
    categories[category].count += extStat.count;
    categories[category].totalSize += extStat.totalSize;
  });

  // Sort extensions within each category by count
  Object.values(categories).forEach(cat => {
    cat.extensions.sort((a: ExtensionStats, b: ExtensionStats) => b.count - a.count);
  });

  // Return only categories with extensions
  return Object.entries(categories)
    .filter(([_, cat]) => cat.count > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1].count - a[1].count);
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/fileSystemBackend.ts =====

import { FileSystemEntry, FileSystemDirectoryEntry, FileSystemFileEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';

export interface IFileSystemBackend {
  pickDirectory(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null>;
  readDirectory(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle): Promise<FileSystemEntry[]>;
  createDirectory(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle>;
  deleteEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, isDirectory?: boolean): Promise<void>;
  renameEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, oldName: string, newName: string): Promise<void>;
  copyEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void>;
  moveEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    sourceParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void>;
  getFileSize(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<number>;
  getFileDate(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Date>;
  writeFile(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, data: Blob | string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle>;
  readFileAsText(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<string>;
  readFileAsBlob(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Blob>;
  getFileHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle | null>;
  getDirectoryHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null>;
  exists(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<boolean>;
  listBackendDirectory(path: string): Promise<any[]>;
  readBackendFile(path: string): Promise<string>;
}

/**
 * Resolve virtual panel paths to real filesystem paths.
 */
export function resolvePanelPath(path: string): string {
  console.log('[FRONTEND PATH]', path);
  let resolved: string;
  if (!path || path === '/') {
    resolved = '/terminal';
  } else if (path.startsWith('/storage/internal')) {
    resolved = path.replace('/storage/internal', '/storage/emulated/0');
  } else if (path.startsWith('/terminal/termux/files')) {
    resolved = path.replace('/terminal/termux/files', '/data/data/com.termux/files');
  } else if (path.startsWith('/terminal/termux')) {
    resolved = path.replace('/terminal/termux', '/data/data/com.termux');
  } else if (path === '/terminal') {
    resolved = '/data/data/com.termux';
  } else {
    resolved = path;
  }
  const normalized = resolved.replace(/\/+/g, '/');
  console.log('[RESOLVED PATH]', normalized);
  return normalized;
}

/**
 * Convert a real filesystem path back to a virtual panel path for display.
 */
export function toVirtualPath(realPath: string): string {
  if (realPath.startsWith('/storage/emulated/0')) {
    return realPath.replace('/storage/emulated/0', '/storage/internal');
  }
  // Handle the redirected bin path - must check BEFORE files
  if (realPath.startsWith('/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin')) {
    const sub = realPath.replace('/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin', '');
    return '/terminal/termux/bin' + (sub || '');
  }
  if (realPath.startsWith('/data/data/com.termux/files')) {
    const sub = realPath.replace('/data/data/com.termux/files', '');
    return '/terminal/termux/files' + (sub || '');
  }
  if (realPath.startsWith('/data/data/com.termux')) {
    const sub = realPath.replace('/data/data/com.termux', '');
    return '/terminal/termux' + (sub || '');
  }
  return realPath;
}

class FileSystemBackend implements IFileSystemBackend {
  private BACKEND_URL = 'http://localhost:3001/api';

  async listBackendDirectory(path: string): Promise<any[]> {
    const resolvedPath = resolvePanelPath(path);
    const url = `${this.BACKEND_URL}/list?path=${encodeURIComponent(resolvedPath)}`;
    console.log('[Backend] Fetching:', url);

    let response;
    try {
      response = await fetch(url);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('[Backend] Network error:', err);
      throw new Error('Cannot connect to backend. Make sure server is running: node server.js');
    }

    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') || '';
    if (!contentType.includes('application/json')) {
      const text = await response.text();
      console.error('[Backend] Non-JSON response:', text.substring(0, 200));
      if (text.includes('<!doctype html>')) {
        throw new Error('Backend not reachable. Please run: node server.js');
      }
      throw new Error(`Backend returned non-JSON (${response.status})`);
    }

    let data;
    try {
      data = await response.json();
    } catch (err) {
      throw new Error(`Invalid JSON from backend: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(data.error || `HTTP ${response.status}`);
    }

    if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
      throw new Error('Backend response is not an array');
    }

    console.log('[Backend] Received entries:', data.length);
    return data;
  }

  async readBackendFile(path: string): Promise<string> {
    const resolvedPath = resolvePanelPath(path);
    const url = `${this.BACKEND_URL}/file?path=${encodeURIComponent(resolvedPath)}`;
    const response = await fetch(url);
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${response.statusText}`);
    }
    return response.text();
  }

  async pickDirectory(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null> {
    try {
      const dirHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker();
      return dirHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      if ((err as Error).name === 'AbortError') {
        return null;
      }
      console.error('Failed to pick directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to pick directory: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async readDirectory(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle): Promise<FileSystemEntry[]> {
    const entries: FileSystemEntry[] = [];
    try {
      for await (const [name, entryHandle] of handle.entries()) {
        const isDirectory = entryHandle.kind === 'directory';
        let size = 0;
        let lastModified = new Date();
        if (!isDirectory) {
          const fileHandle = entryHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
          try {
            const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
            size = file.size;
            lastModified = new Date(file.lastModified);
          } catch (err) {
            console.warn(`Could not get file stats for ${name}:`, err);
          }
        } else {
          lastModified = new Date();
        }
        entries.push({
          name,
          kind: isDirectory ? 'directory' : 'file',
          size,
          lastModified,
          handle: entryHandle as FileSystemFileHandle | FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
        });
      }
      entries.sort((a, b) => {
        if (a.kind === 'directory' && b.kind !== 'directory') return -1;
        if (a.kind !== 'directory' && b.kind === 'directory') return 1;
        return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
      });
      return entries;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read directory: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async createDirectory(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle> {
    try {
      const newDirHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
      return newDirHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to create directory:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to create directory "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async deleteEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, isDirectory: boolean = false): Promise<void> {
    try {
      await parentHandle.removeEntry(name, { recursive: isDirectory });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to delete entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to delete "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async renameEntry(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, oldName: string, newName: string): Promise<void> {
    try {
      let sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle;
      let isDirectory = false;
      try {
        sourceHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(oldName);
      } catch {
        sourceHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(oldName);
        isDirectory = true;
      }
      if (isDirectory) {
        const newDirHandle = await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(newName, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(sourceHandle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle, newDirHandle);
        await parentHandle.removeEntry(oldName, { recursive: true });
      } else {
        const fileHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(newName, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
        await parentHandle.removeEntry(oldName);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to rename entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to rename "${oldName}" to "${newName}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async copyEntry(sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle, targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, newName?: string): Promise<void> {
    const name = newName || sourceHandle.name;
    try {
      if (sourceHandle.kind === 'file') {
        const fileHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await targetParentHandle.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
      } else {
        const sourceDirHandle = sourceHandle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
        const targetDirHandle = await targetParentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(sourceDirHandle, targetDirHandle);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to copy entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to copy "${sourceHandle.name}" to "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async moveEntry(
    sourceHandle: FileSystemHandle,
    sourceParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    targetParentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
    newName?: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    const name = newName || sourceHandle.name;
    try {
      await this.copyEntry(sourceHandle, targetParentHandle, name);
      await sourceParentHandle.removeEntry(sourceHandle.name, { recursive: sourceHandle.kind === 'directory' });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to move entry:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to move "${sourceHandle.name}" to "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  private async copyDirectoryContents(sourceDir: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, targetDir: FileSystemDirectoryHandle): Promise<void> {
    for await (const [name, entry] of sourceDir.entries()) {
      if (entry.kind === 'file') {
        const fileHandle = entry as FileSystemFileHandle;
        const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
        const newFileHandle = await targetDir.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
        const writable = await newFileHandle.createWritable();
        await writable.write(file);
        await writable.close();
      } else {
        const subDirHandle = entry as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
        const newSubDirHandle = await targetDir.getDirectoryHandle(name, { create: true });
        await this.copyDirectoryContents(subDirHandle, newSubDirHandle);
      }
    }
  }

  async getFileSize(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<number> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return file.size;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to get file size:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file size: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async getFileDate(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Date> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return new Date(file.lastModified);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to get file date:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file date: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async writeFile(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string, data: Blob | string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle> {
    try {
      const fileHandle = await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name, { create: true });
      const writable = await fileHandle.createWritable();
      await writable.write(data);
      await writable.close();
      return fileHandle;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to write file:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to write file "${name}": ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async readFileAsText(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return await file.text();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read file as text:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async readFileAsBlob(fileHandle: FileSystemFileHandle): Promise<Blob> {
    try {
      const file = await fileHandle.getFile();
      return file;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to read file as blob:', err);
      throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${(err as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  async getFileHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemFileHandle | null> {
    try {
      return await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name);
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  async getDirectoryHandle(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null> {
    try {
      return await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name);
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  async exists(parentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
      await parentHandle.getFileHandle(name);
      return true;
    } catch {
      try {
        await parentHandle.getDirectoryHandle(name);
        return true;
      } catch {
        return false;
      }
    }
  }
}

export const fileSystemBackend = new FileSystemBackend();

declare global {
  interface Window {
    showDirectoryPicker(): Promise<FileSystemDirectoryHandle>;
  }
  interface FileSystemDirectoryHandle {
    entries(): AsyncIterable<[string, FileSystemHandle]>;
  }
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/githubApi.ts =====

import { Octokit } from '@octokit/rest';
import { 
  GitHubAccount, 
  GitHubRepository, 
  GitHubContent,
  GitHubPermission 
} from '@/types/github';

class GitHubApi {
  private octokit: Octokit | null = null;
  private currentToken: string | null = null;

  async authenticate(token: string): Promise<{ username: string; avatarUrl?: string }> {
    this.octokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
    this.currentToken = token;

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.users.getAuthenticated();
      return {
        username: data.login,
        avatarUrl: data.avatar_url,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Invalid token or authentication failed');
    }
  }

  setToken(token: string): void {
    this.octokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
    this.currentToken = token;
  }

  async listRepositories(username: string): Promise<GitHubRepository[]> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.listForUser({
        username,
        sort: 'updated',
        per_page: 100,
      });
      return data as GitHubRepository[];
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch repositories');
    }
  }

  async getRepositoryContents(
    owner: string,
    repo: string,
    path: string = ''
  ): Promise<GitHubContent[]> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.getContent({
        owner,
        repo,
        path,
      });

      // Handle single file vs directory
      if (!Array.isArray(data)) {
        return [data as GitHubContent];
      }

      return data as GitHubContent[];
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch repository contents');
    }
  }

  async getFileContent(
    owner: string,
    repo: string,
    path: string
  ): Promise<{ content: string; name: string; downloadUrl: string | null }> {
    if (!this.octokit) throw new Error('Not authenticated');

    try {
      const { data } = await this.octokit.repos.getContent({
        owner,
        repo,
        path,
      });

      if (Array.isArray(data)) {
        throw new Error('Path is a directory, not a file');
      }

      const fileData = data as GitHubContent;
      
      // Decode base64 content
      let decodedContent = '';
      if (fileData.content && fileData.encoding === 'base64') {
        decodedContent = atob(fileData.content.replace(/\n/g, ''));
      }

      return {
        content: decodedContent,
        name: fileData.name,
        downloadUrl: fileData.download_url,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      throw new Error('Failed to fetch file content');
    }
  }

  async validateToken(token: string): Promise<boolean> {
    try {
      const tempOctokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
      await tempOctokit.users.getAuthenticated();
      return true;
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  getPermissionLevel(scopes: string[]): GitHubPermission {
    // Determine permission based on token scopes
    if (scopes.includes('delete_repo') || scopes.includes('admin:org')) {
      return 'admin';
    }
    if (scopes.includes('repo')) {
      return 'write';
    }
    if (scopes.includes('write:discussion')) {
      return 'triage';
    }
    return 'read';
  }

  formatDate(dateString: string): string {
    const date = new Date(dateString);
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      year: 'numeric',
    });
  }

  formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
    if (bytes === 0) return '-';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let unitIndex = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  }
}

export const githubApi = new GitHubApi();

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/githubStorage.ts =====

import { openDB, DBSchema, IDBPDatabase } from 'idb';
import { GitHubAccount } from '@/types/github';
import CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';

const DB_NAME = 'github-accounts-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;
const STORE_NAME = 'accounts';

// Encryption key - in production, use a more secure method
const ENCRYPTION_KEY = (import.meta as any).env.VITE_GITHUB_ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'your-secure-key-here';

interface GitHubDBSchema extends DBSchema {
  accounts: {
    key: string;
    value: {
      id: string;
      encryptedData: string;
      addedAt: number;
    };
  };
}

class GitHubStorage {
  private db: IDBPDatabase<GitHubDBSchema> | null = null;

  async init(): Promise<void> {
    this.db = await openDB<GitHubDBSchema>(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
      upgrade(db) {
        if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains(STORE_NAME)) {
          db.createObjectStore(STORE_NAME, { keyPath: 'id' });
        }
      },
    });
  }

  private encrypt(data: string): string {
    return CryptoJS.AES.encrypt(data, ENCRYPTION_KEY).toString();
  }

  private decrypt(encryptedData: string): string {
    const bytes = CryptoJS.AES.decrypt(encryptedData, ENCRYPTION_KEY);
    return bytes.toString(CryptoJS.enc.Utf8);
  }

  async saveAccount(account: GitHubAccount): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();

    const dataToEncrypt = JSON.stringify({
      token: account.token,
      avatarUrl: account.avatarUrl,
      permissions: account.permissions,
    });

    await this.db!.put(STORE_NAME, {
      id: account.id,
      encryptedData: this.encrypt(dataToEncrypt),
      addedAt: account.addedAt,
    });
  }

  async getAllAccounts(): Promise<GitHubAccount[]> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();

    const allData = await this.db!.getAll(STORE_NAME);
    
    return allData
      .map((item) => {
        try {
          const decrypted = JSON.parse(this.decrypt(item.encryptedData));
          return {
            id: item.id,
            token: decrypted.token,
            avatarUrl: decrypted.avatarUrl,
            permissions: decrypted.permissions,
            addedAt: item.addedAt,
          } as GitHubAccount;
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Failed to decrypt account:', item.id);
          return null;
        }
      })
      .filter((acc): acc is GitHubAccount => acc !== null);
  }

  async deleteAccount(username: string): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();
    await this.db!.delete(STORE_NAME, username);
  }

  async clearAll(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.db) await this.init();
    await this.db!.clear(STORE_NAME);
  }
}

export const githubStorage = new GitHubStorage();


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/googleAuth.ts =====

const CLIENT_ID = import.meta.env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || '';
const REDIRECT_URI = `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`;
const API_BASE = '/api/auth/google';

export async function login(): Promise<void> {
  if (!CLIENT_ID) {
    console.error('Google Client ID missing');
    return;
  }
  window.location.href = `${API_BASE}/login?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(REDIRECT_URI)}`;
}

export async function handleCallback(): Promise<boolean> {
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const code = urlParams.get('code');
  const state = urlParams.get('state');
  if (!code) return false;

  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/token`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ code, redirect_uri: REDIRECT_URI, state }),
  });
  const data = await response.json();
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error);

  const { access_token, refresh_token, expires_in } = data;
  localStorage.setItem('google_access_token', access_token);
  if (refresh_token) localStorage.setItem('google_refresh_token', refresh_token);
  localStorage.setItem('google_expires_at', (Date.now() + expires_in * 1000).toString());
  window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, window.location.pathname);
  return true;
}

export async function refreshAccessToken(): Promise<string | null> {
  const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('google_refresh_token');
  if (!refreshToken) return null;

  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/refresh`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ refresh_token: refreshToken }),
  });
  const data = await response.json();
  if (!response.ok) {
    console.error('Refresh failed:', data.error);
    logout();
    return null;
  }
  const { access_token, expires_in } = data;
  localStorage.setItem('google_access_token', access_token);
  localStorage.setItem('google_expires_at', (Date.now() + expires_in * 1000).toString());
  return access_token;
}

export async function getValidToken(): Promise<string | null> {
  const expiry = localStorage.getItem('google_expires_at');
  const token = localStorage.getItem('google_access_token');
  if (!token || !expiry) return null;
  if (Date.now() > Number(expiry) - 5 * 60 * 1000) {
    return await refreshAccessToken();
  }
  return token;
}

export function getStoredExpiry(): number | null {
  const expiry = localStorage.getItem('google_expires_at');
  return expiry ? parseInt(expiry, 10) : null;
}

export function logout(): void {
  localStorage.removeItem('google_access_token');
  localStorage.removeItem('google_refresh_token');
  localStorage.removeItem('google_expires_at');
}

export async function getUserInfo(token: string): Promise<{ email: string; name: string; picture: string }> {
  const res = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v2/userinfo', {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
  });
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to get user info');
  return res.json();
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/googleDrive.ts =====

import { getValidToken } from './googleAuth';

export interface DriveFile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  mimeType: string;
  size?: number;
  modifiedTime: string;
  webViewLink?: string;
  iconLink?: string;
}

const API_BASE = 'https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3';

async function apiRequest(endpoint: string, options: RequestInit = {}) {
  const token = await getValidToken();
  if (!token) throw new Error('Not authenticated');
  const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}${endpoint}`, {
    ...options,
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      ...options.headers,
    },
  });
  if (!res.ok) {
    const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    throw new Error(err.error?.message || `Drive API error ${res.status}`);
  }
  return res.json();
}

export async function listFiles(folderId = 'root') {
  const query = `'${folderId}' in parents and trashed = false`;
  const fields = 'files(id,name,mimeType,size,modifiedTime,webViewLink,iconLink)';
  const data = await apiRequest(`/files?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&fields=${fields}&pageSize=100`);
  return data.files as DriveFile[];
}

export async function listFolders(folderId = 'root') {
  const query = `'${folderId}' in parents and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false`;
  const fields = 'files(id,name,mimeType,modifiedTime)';
  const data = await apiRequest(`/files?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&fields=${fields}&pageSize=100`);
  return data.files as DriveFile[];
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/googleDriveApi.ts =====

import { DriveFile, DriveAccount } from '@/types/drive';

const API_BASE = 'https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3';

// Export as both googleDriveApi and driveApi for compatibility
export const googleDriveApi = {
  async listFiles(accessToken: string, folderId: string = 'root'): Promise<DriveFile[]> {
    const response = await fetch(
      `${API_BASE}/files?q='${folderId}'+in+parents&fields=files(id,name,mimeType,size,modifiedTime,webViewLink,parents)&orderBy=name`,
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        },
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to list files: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data.files || [];
  },

  async getFile(accessToken: string, fileId: string): Promise<DriveFile> {
    const response = await fetch(
      `${API_BASE}/files/${fileId}?fields=id,name,mimeType,size,modifiedTime,webViewLink,parents`,
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        },
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to get file: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  },

  async downloadFile(accessToken: string, fileId: string): Promise<Blob> {
    const response = await fetch(
      `${API_BASE}/files/${fileId}?alt=media`,
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        },
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to download file: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    return response.blob();
  },

  async uploadFile(accessToken: string, folderId: string, file: File): Promise<DriveFile> {
    const metadata = {
      name: file.name,
      parents: [folderId],
    };

    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('metadata', new Blob([JSON.stringify(metadata)], { type: 'application/json' }));
    formData.append('file', file);

    const response = await fetch(
      'https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart',
      {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        },
        body: formData,
      }
    );

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to upload file: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  },

  async deleteFile(accessToken: string, fileId: string): Promise<void> {
    const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/files/${fileId}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
      },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to delete file: ${response.statusText}`);
    }
  },

  async createFolder(accessToken: string, parentId: string, name: string): Promise<DriveFile> {
    const metadata = {
      name,
      mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder',
      parents: [parentId],
    };

    const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/files`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(metadata),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to create folder: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  },
};

// Alias for backwards compatibility
export const driveApi = googleDriveApi;

// Legacy exports for backwards compatibility
export const listFiles = googleDriveApi.listFiles;
export const getAuthUrl = () => '';
export const exchangeCodeForTokens = async (_code: string) => ({ access_token: '', email: '', picture: '' });
export const refreshAccessToken = async (_token: string) => '';


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/promptUploadEngine.ts =====

import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { DriveAccount } from '@/types/drive';

interface UploadResult {
  success: boolean;
  folderPath?: string;
  shareLink?: string;
  rawLink?: string;
  error?: string;
}

interface FileToUpload {
  name: string;
  content: Blob;
}

export async function uploadToDrive(
  sessionName: string,
  promptBlob: Blob,
  linksBlob: Blob,
  files: FileToUpload[],
  accountId: string,
  onProgress?: (progress: number) => void
): Promise<UploadResult> {
  const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find((a: DriveAccount) => a.id === accountId);
  if (!account) {
    return { success: false, error: 'Account not found' };
  }

  const accessToken = account.accessToken || account.token;
  if (!accessToken) {
    return { success: false, error: 'No access token available' };
  }

  try {
    // Create a folder for the session
    const folderMetadata = {
      name: sessionName,
      mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder',
      parents: ['root'],
    };

    const folderResponse = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(folderMetadata),
    });

    if (!folderResponse.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to create folder: ${folderResponse.statusText}`);
    }

    const folder = await folderResponse.json();
    const folderId = folder.id;

    // Upload prompt file
    await uploadFileToDrive(accessToken, folderId, 'prompt.txt', promptBlob, onProgress);

    // Upload links file
    await uploadFileToDrive(accessToken, folderId, 'links.txt', linksBlob, onProgress);

    // Upload all files
    for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
      const file = files[i];
      const progress = Math.round(((i + 1) / (files.length + 2)) * 100);
      if (onProgress) onProgress(progress);
      await uploadFileToDrive(accessToken, folderId, file.name, file.content);
    }

    const shareLink = `https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/${folderId}`;

    return {
      success: true,
      folderPath: folderId,
      shareLink,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: (error as Error).message };
  }
}

async function uploadFileToDrive(
  accessToken: string,
  folderId: string,
  fileName: string,
  content: Blob,
  onProgress?: (progress: number) => void
): Promise<void> {
  const metadata = {
    name: fileName,
    parents: [folderId],
  };

  const formData = new FormData();
  formData.append('metadata', new Blob([JSON.stringify(metadata)], { type: 'application/json' }));
  formData.append('file', content);

  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();

    xhr.upload.addEventListener('progress', (event) => {
      if (event.lengthComputable && onProgress) {
        const progress = Math.round((event.loaded / event.total) * 100);
        onProgress(progress);
      }
    });

    xhr.addEventListener('load', () => {
      if (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300) {
        resolve();
      } else {
        reject(new Error(`Upload failed: ${xhr.statusText}`));
      }
    });

    xhr.addEventListener('error', () => {
      reject(new Error('Upload failed'));
    });

    xhr.open('POST', 'https://www.googleapis.com/upload/drive/v3/files?uploadType=multipart');
    xhr.setRequestHeader('Authorization', `Bearer ${accessToken}`);
    xhr.send(formData);
  });
}

export async function uploadToGitHub(
  sessionName: string,
  promptBlob: Blob,
  linksBlob: Blob,
  files: FileToUpload[],
  accountId: string,
  token: string,
  onProgress?: (progress: number) => void
): Promise<UploadResult> {
  try {
    // For now, return a mock success - GitHub upload would need proper implementation
    if (onProgress) onProgress(100);
    
    return {
      success: true,
      folderPath: `github/${accountId}/${sessionName}`,
      shareLink: `https://github.com/${accountId}/${sessionName}`,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: (error as Error).message };
  }
}

export async function createDriveFolder(
  accountId: string,
  parentId: string,
  name: string
): Promise<{ success: boolean; folderId?: string; error?: string }> {
  const account = useDriveStore.getState().accounts.find((a: DriveAccount) => a.id === accountId);
  if (!account) {
    return { success: false, error: 'Account not found' };
  }

  const accessToken = account.accessToken || account.token;
  if (!accessToken) {
    return { success: false, error: 'No access token available' };
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        name,
        mimeType: 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder',
        parents: [parentId],
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to create folder: ${response.statusText}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return { success: true, folderId: data.id };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: (error as Error).message };
  }
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/storageBackend.ts =====

// src/lib/storageBackend.ts
// Unified storage backend: uses browser File System Access API in regular browsers,
// or falls back to the Express backend API when configured.

export interface StorageEntry {
  name: string;
  kind: 'file' | 'directory';
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  path: string;
  handle?: any; // only for browser mode
}

export interface IStorageBackend {
  listDirectory(path: string): Promise<StorageEntry[]>;
  readFile(path: string): Promise<string>;
  // Additional methods can be added as needed (create, delete, etc.)
}

class BrowserStorageBackend implements IStorageBackend {
  private rootHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null = null;

  async setRoot(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
    this.rootHandle = handle;
  }

  private async getHandleForPath(path: string): Promise<FileSystemHandle> {
    if (!this.rootHandle) throw new Error('No root directory selected');
    const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
    let current: FileSystemDirectoryHandle = this.rootHandle;
    for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
      current = await current.getDirectoryHandle(parts[i]);
    }
    const name = parts[parts.length - 1];
    try {
      return await current.getFileHandle(name);
    } catch {
      return await current.getDirectoryHandle(name);
    }
  }

  async listDirectory(path: string): Promise<StorageEntry[]> {
    const handle = await this.getHandleForPath(path) as FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
    const entries: StorageEntry[] = [];
    for await (const [name, entry] of (handle as any).entries()) {
      const isDir = entry.kind === 'directory';
      let size = 0;
      let lastModified = new Date();
      if (!isDir) {
        const file = await (entry as FileSystemFileHandle).getFile();
        size = file.size;
        lastModified = new Date(file.lastModified);
      }
      entries.push({
        name,
        kind: isDir ? 'directory' : 'file',
        size,
        lastModified,
        path: path ? `${path}/${name}` : name,
        handle: entry,
      });
    }
    return entries.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.kind === 'directory' && b.kind !== 'directory') return -1;
      if (a.kind !== 'directory' && b.kind === 'directory') return 1;
      return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    });
  }

  async readFile(path: string): Promise<string> {
    const handle = await this.getHandleForPath(path) as FileSystemFileHandle;
    const file = await handle.getFile();
    return await file.text();
  }
}

class ServerStorageBackend implements IStorageBackend {
  private baseUrl: string;

  constructor(baseUrl = 'http://localhost:3001') {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
  }

  async listDirectory(dirPath: string): Promise<StorageEntry[]> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/api/fs/list?dir=${encodeURIComponent(dirPath)}`);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to list directory: ${res.statusText}`);
    const data = await res.json();
    return data.map((item: any) => ({
      ...item,
      lastModified: new Date(item.lastModified),
    }));
  }

  async readFile(filePath: string): Promise<string> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/api/fs/read?path=${encodeURIComponent(filePath)}`);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to read file: ${res.statusText}`);
    return await res.text();
  }
}

// Detect environment: if we are in Termux (or backend URL is set), use server backend.
// For now, we'll default to browser, but allow override via env variable.
const USE_SERVER_STORAGE = import.meta.env.VITE_USE_SERVER_STORAGE === 'true' || 
                           (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.location.hostname === 'localhost');

export const storageBackend: IStorageBackend = USE_SERVER_STORAGE 
  ? new ServerStorageBackend(import.meta.env.VITE_BACKEND_URL || 'http://localhost:3001')
  : new BrowserStorageBackend();

// Helper to set browser root (only used in browser mode)
export function setBrowserStorageRoot(handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle) {
  if (storageBackend instanceof BrowserStorageBackend) {
    (storageBackend as BrowserStorageBackend).setRoot(handle);
  }
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/lib/webcontainerApi.ts =====

import { WebContainer } from '@webcontainer/api';
import { TerminalFileSystemEntry } from '@/types/terminal';

class WebContainerApi {
  private instance: WebContainer | null = null;
  private isBooting = false;

  async init(): Promise<WebContainer> {
    if (this.instance) return this.instance;
    if (this.isBooting) {
      while (this.isBooting) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100));
      }
      return this.instance!;
    }
    this.isBooting = true;
    try {
      this.instance = await WebContainer.boot();
      this.isBooting = false;
      return this.instance;
    } catch (error) {
      this.isBooting = false;
      throw new Error(`Failed to boot WebContainer: ${(error as Error).message}`);
    }
  }

  getInstance(): WebContainer | null {
    return this.instance;
  }

  async readDirectory(path: string): Promise<TerminalFileSystemEntry[]> {
    if (!this.instance) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');
    const fs = this.instance.fs;
    const entries = await fs.readdir(path, { withFileTypes: true });
    const result: TerminalFileSystemEntry[] = [];
    for (const entry of entries) {
      const fullPath = path === '/' ? `/${entry.name}` : `${path}/${entry.name}`;
      let type: 'file' | 'directory' | 'symlink' = 'file';
      if (entry.isDirectory()) type = 'directory';
      let size = 0;
      let lastModified = new Date();
      try {
        const file = await fs.readFile(fullPath);
        size = file.byteLength;
        lastModified = new Date();
      } catch { /* ignore */ }
      result.push({
        name: entry.name,
        type,
        size,
        lastModified,
        permissions: 'rwxr-xr-x',
        path: fullPath,
      });
    }
    return result.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.type === 'directory' && b.type !== 'directory') return -1;
      if (a.type !== 'directory' && b.type === 'directory') return 1;
      return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
    });
  }

  async readFile(path: string): Promise<string> {
    if (!this.instance) throw new Error('WebContainer not initialized');
    const fs = this.instance.fs;
    const content = await fs.readFile(path, 'utf-8');
    return content;
  }

  async getFileStats(_path: string): Promise<any> {
    return null;
  }

  formatPermissions(_stats: any): string {
    return 'rwxr-xr-x';
  }

  formatFileSize(bytes: number): string {
    if (bytes === 0) return '-';
    const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
    let size = bytes;
    let unitIndex = 0;
    while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
      size /= 1024;
      unitIndex++;
    }
    return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
  }

  formatDate(date: Date): string {
    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit',
    });
  }

  isReady(): boolean {
    return this.instance !== null && !this.isBooting;
  }

  async shutdown(): Promise<void> {
    this.instance = null;
    this.isBooting = false;
  }
}

export const webcontainerApi = new WebContainerApi();
