===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/authStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import CryptoJS from 'crypto-js';
import { User, Session, ActionPassword, TokenExpiry } from '@/types/auth';
import { LogEntry } from '@/types/auth';
import { openDB } from 'idb';

const ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH = '5e884898da28047151d0e56f8dc6292773603d0d6aabbdd62a11ef721d1542d8'; // "password"

interface AuthState {
  currentUser: User | null;
  currentSession: Session | null;
  isAuthenticated: boolean;
  users: User[];
  actionPasswords: ActionPassword[];
  tokenExpiries: TokenExpiry[];
  isAdminRoute: boolean;
}

interface AuthActions {
  // Auth
  login: (username: string, password: string) => Promise<boolean>;
  logout: () => Promise<void>;
  adminLogin: (password: string) => boolean;
  adminLogout: () => void;
  
  // Users
  createUser: (username: string, password: string, role?: 'admin' | 'user') => Promise<void>;
  updateUser: (userId: string, updates: Partial<User>) => Promise<void>;
  deleteUser: (userId: string) => Promise<void>;
  getUsers: () => User[];
  
  // Action passwords
  setActionPassword: (action: string, password: string, required: boolean) => void;
  verifyActionPassword: (action: string, password: string) => boolean;
  
  // Token expiry
  addTokenExpiry: (expiry: TokenExpiry) => void;
  removeTokenExpiry: (accountId: string) => void;
  checkTokenExpiries: () => TokenExpiry[];
  
  // Session
  getSessionLogs: () => LogEntry[];
  exportSession: () => Promise<Blob>;
  
  // Admin check
  checkIsAdmin: () => boolean;
}

const hashPassword = (password: string): string => {
  return CryptoJS.SHA256(password).toString();
};

const DB_NAME = 'auth-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

export const useAuthStore = create<AuthState & AuthActions>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    currentUser: null,
    currentSession: null,
    isAuthenticated: false,
    users: [],
    actionPasswords: [],
    tokenExpiries: [],
    isAdminRoute: false,

    // Auth
    login: async (username, password) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const user = await db.get('users', username);
      
      if (!user || !user.isActive) return false;
      
      const passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
      if (user.passwordHash !== passwordHash) return false;
      
      // Create session
      const session: Session = {
        id: `session-${Date.now()}`,
        userId: user.id,
        username: user.username,
        startTime: new Date(),
        logs: [],
      };
      
      // Update last login
      user.lastLogin = new Date();
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = user;
        state.currentSession = session;
        state.isAuthenticated = true;
      });
      
      return true;
    },

    logout: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      
      if (currentSession && currentUser) {
        // Save session logs
        const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
        currentSession.endTime = new Date();
        await db.add('sessions', currentSession);
      }
      
      set((state) => {
        state.currentUser = null;
        state.currentSession = null;
        state.isAuthenticated = false;
      });
    },

    adminLogin: (password) => {
      const hash = hashPassword(password);
      if (hash === ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isAdminRoute = true;
        });
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    },

    adminLogout: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isAdminRoute = false;
      });
    },

    // Users
    createUser: async (username, password, role = 'user') => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      
      const existing = await db.get('users', username);
      if (existing) throw new Error('Username already exists');
      
      const user: User = {
        id: `user-${Date.now()}`,
        username,
        passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
        role,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        isActive: true,
      };
      
      await db.put('users', user);
      
      set((state) => {
        state.users.push(user);
      });
    },

    updateUser: async (userId, updates) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (!user) throw new Error('User not found');
      
      Object.assign(user, updates);
      
      await store.put(user);
      await tx.done;
    },

    deleteUser: async (userId) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('users', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('users');
      
      const users = await store.getAll();
      const user = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
      if (user) {
        user.isActive = false;
        await store.put(user);
      }
      
      await tx.done;
    },

    getUsers: () => {
      return get().users;
    },

    // Action passwords
    setActionPassword: (action, password, required) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
        if (existing) {
          existing.passwordHash = hashPassword(password);
          existing.required = required;
        } else {
          state.actionPasswords.push({
            action: action as any,
            passwordHash: hashPassword(password),
            required,
          });
        }
      });
    },

    verifyActionPassword: (action, password) => {
      const { actionPasswords } = get();
      const config = actionPasswords.find(p => p.action === action);
      
      if (!config || !config.required) return true;
      
      return config.passwordHash === hashPassword(password);
    },

    // Token expiry
    addTokenExpiry: (expiry) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existing = state.tokenExpiries.find(e => e.accountId === expiry.accountId);
        if (existing) {
          Object.assign(existing, expiry);
        } else {
          state.tokenExpiries.push(expiry);
        }
      });
    },

    removeTokenExpiry: (accountId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.tokenExpiries = state.tokenExpiries.filter(e => e.accountId !== accountId);
      });
    },

    checkTokenExpiries: () => {
      const now = new Date();
      const tenDaysFromNow = new Date(now.getTime() + 10 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
      
      return get().tokenExpiries.filter(e => {
        return e.expiresAt <= tenDaysFromNow && !e.warned;
      });
    },

    // Session
    getSessionLogs: () => {
      return get().currentSession?.logs || [];
    },

    exportSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession, currentUser } = get();
      if (!currentSession || !currentUser) throw new Error('No active session');
      
      const exportData = {
        session: currentSession,
        user: {
          id: currentUser.id,
          username: currentUser.username,
          role: currentUser.role,
        },
        exportedAt: new Date(),
      };
      
      return new Blob([JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
    },

    checkIsAdmin: () => {
      const { currentUser, isAdminRoute } = get();
      return isAdminRoute || currentUser?.role === 'admin';
    },
  }))
);

// Initialize DB
const initAuthDB = async () => {
  const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
    upgrade(db) {
      db.createObjectStore('users', { keyPath: 'username' });
      db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
      db.createObjectStore('logs', { keyPath: 'id' });
    },
  });
  
  // Create default admin if none exists
  const users = await db.getAll('users');
  if (users.length === 0) {
    await db.put('users', {
      id: 'admin-1',
      username: 'admin',
      passwordHash: ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH,
      role: 'admin',
      createdAt: new Date(),
      isActive: true,
    });
  }
  
  return db;
};

initAuthDB();

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dfolStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';

export type DFOLMode = 'folder' | 'txt' | 'pdf' | 'compress';
export interface DFOLItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  sourceType: string;
  panelId: string;
  path: string;
  type: string;
  size: number;
  operations: DFOLMode[];
}
export interface DFOLProfile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  format: string;
  compressionLevel: string;
}
export const DEFAULT_PROFILES: DFOLProfile[] = [];

interface DFOLStore {
  isDFOLMode: boolean;
  selectedItems: DFOLItem[];
  operations: any[];
  activeProfile: string;
  customProfiles: DFOLProfile[];
  outputDirectory: string;
  isExecuting: boolean;
  showProfilePanel: boolean;
  showExecutePanel: boolean;
  globalProgress: number;
  notifications: any[];
  enterDFOLMode: () => void;
  exitDFOLMode: () => void;
  selectItem: (item: DFOLItem, ops: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  clearSelection: () => void;
  setItemOperations: (id: string, ops: DFOLMode[]) => void;
  setActiveProfile: (id: string) => void;
  addCustomProfile: (profile: DFOLProfile) => void;
  removeCustomProfile: (id: string) => void;
  openProfilePanel: () => void;
  closeProfilePanel: () => void;
  openExecutePanel: () => void;
  closeExecutePanel: () => void;
  executeOperations: () => Promise<void>;
  updateOperationStatus: (id: string, status: string, progress?: number, msg?: string) => void;
  completeOperation: (id: string, result: any) => void;
  failOperation: (id: string, error: string) => void;
  addNotification: (notif: any) => void;
  dismissNotification: (id: string) => void;
  clearNotifications: () => void;
  getPendingOperations: () => any[];
  getOperationStats: () => any;
}

export const useDFOLStore = create<DFOLStore>()(immer((set, get) => ({
  isDFOLMode: false,
  selectedItems: [],
  operations: [],
  activeProfile: 'default',
  customProfiles: [],
  outputDirectory: '/DFOL',
  isExecuting: false,
  showProfilePanel: false,
  showExecutePanel: false,
  globalProgress: 0,
  notifications: [],
  enterDFOLMode: () => set({ isDFOLMode: true }),
  exitDFOLMode: () => set({ isDFOLMode: false, selectedItems: [] }),
  selectItem: (item, ops) => set((state) => {
    const existing = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === item.id);
    if (existing) existing.operations = ops;
    else state.selectedItems.push({ ...item, operations: ops });
  }),
  clearSelection: () => set({ selectedItems: [] }),
  setItemOperations: (id, ops) => set((state) => {
    const item = state.selectedItems.find(i => i.id === id);
    if (item) item.operations = ops;
  }),
  setActiveProfile: (id) => set({ activeProfile: id }),
  addCustomProfile: (profile) => set((state) => { state.customProfiles.push(profile); }),
  removeCustomProfile: (id) => set((state) => { state.customProfiles = state.customProfiles.filter(p => p.id !== id); }),
  openProfilePanel: () => set({ showProfilePanel: true }),
  closeProfilePanel: () => set({ showProfilePanel: false }),
  openExecutePanel: () => set({ showExecutePanel: true }),
  closeExecutePanel: () => set({ showExecutePanel: false }),
  executeOperations: async () => { console.log('Execute'); },
  updateOperationStatus: () => {},
  completeOperation: () => {},
  failOperation: () => {},
  addNotification: (notif) => set((state) => { state.notifications.push(notif); }),
  dismissNotification: (id) => set((state) => { state.notifications = state.notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id); }),
  clearNotifications: () => set({ notifications: [] }),
  getPendingOperations: () => [],
  getOperationStats: () => ({ total: 0, pending: 0, running: 0, completed: 0, failed: 0 }),
})));

export const useIsDFOLMode = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isDFOLMode);
export const useDFOLSelectedItems = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDFOLProfiles = () => useDFOLStore((s) => [...DEFAULT_PROFILES, ...s.customProfiles]);
export const useDFOLActiveProfile = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.activeProfile);
export const useDFOLOperations = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.operations);
export const useDFOLGlobalProgress = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.globalProgress);
export const useDFOLIsExecuting = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.isExecuting);
export const useDFOLNotifications = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.notifications);
export const useDFOLIsProfilePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.showProfilePanel);
export const useDFOLIsExecutePanelOpen = () => useDFOLStore((s) => s.showExecutePanel);


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/dragDropStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { DragDropState, DragDropActions, SelectedItem } from '@/types/dragDrop';

interface DragDropStore extends DragDropState, DragDropActions {}

export const useDragDropStore = create<DragDropStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    isDragging: false,
    isDragMode: false,
    selectedItems: [],
    dragSourcePanel: null,
    dragImagePosition: null,
    pendingOperation: null,
    targetPanel: null,
    showConfirmDialog: false,

    // Actions
    enterDragMode: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    exitDragMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragMode = false;
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.selectedItems = [];
        state.dragSourcePanel = null;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    toggleSelection: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        const existingIndex = state.selectedItems.findIndex(
          (i) => i.id === item.id && i.panelId === item.panelId
        );
        
        if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          state.selectedItems.splice(existingIndex, 1);
        } else {
          state.selectedItems.push(item);
        }
      });
    },

    clearSelection: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = [];
      });
    },

    selectAll: (items) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedItems = items;
      });
    },

    startDrag: (panelId, position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = true;
        state.dragSourcePanel = panelId;
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    endDrag: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },

    setDragImagePosition: (position) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.dragImagePosition = position;
      });
    },

    setTargetPanel: (panelId) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.targetPanel = panelId;
      });
    },

    showConfirm: (operation) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pendingOperation = operation;
        state.showConfirmDialog = true;
      });
    },

    hideConfirm: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
      });
    },

    confirmOperation: () => {
      // This will be handled by the panel that receives the drop
      set((state) => {
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
      });
    },

    cancelOperation: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isDragging = false;
        state.pendingOperation = null;
        state.targetPanel = null;
        state.showConfirmDialog = false;
        state.dragImagePosition = null;
      });
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useIsDragMode = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragMode);
export const useIsDragging = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.isDragging);
export const useSelectedItems = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.selectedItems);
export const useDragSourcePanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragSourcePanel);
export const useDragImagePosition = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.dragImagePosition);
export const usePendingOperation = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.pendingOperation);
export const useTargetPanel = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.targetPanel);
export const useShowConfirmDialog = () => useDragDropStore((s) => s.showConfirmDialog);

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/driveStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { 
  DriveAccount, 
  DriveFile, 
  DriveFolder,
  DriveViewMode,
  DriveSortBy,
  DrivePanelState
} from '@/types/drive';
import { googleDriveApi } from '@/lib/googleDriveApi';

interface DriveState {
  accounts: DriveAccount[];
  activeAccountId: string | null;
  panels: Record<string, DrivePanelState>;
  authReady: boolean;
}

interface DriveActions {
  // Account management
  addAccount: (account: DriveAccount) => void;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => void;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  getActiveAccount: () => DriveAccount | null;
  
  // Auth
  initiateAuth: () => Promise<string>;
  completeAuth: (code: string) => Promise<void>;
  refreshToken: (accountId: string) => Promise<string>;
  restoreToken: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  
  // Panel management
  initPanelState: (panelId: string) => void;
  setViewModeForPanel: (panelId: string, mode: DriveViewMode) => void;
  setSortByForPanel: (panelId: string, sortBy: DriveSortBy) => void;
  navigateToFolderForPanel: (panelId: string, folder: DriveFile | DriveFolder) => Promise<void>;
  navigateUpForPanel: (panelId: string) => void;
  refreshCurrentForPanel: (panelId: string) => Promise<void>;
  setPanelError: (panelId: string, error: string | null) => void;
  
  // Getters
  getPanelState: (panelId: string) => DrivePanelState;
}

type DriveStore = DriveState & DriveActions;

const defaultPanelState: DrivePanelState = {
  files: [],
  currentFolderId: 'root',
  folderStack: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
};

export const useDriveStore = create<DriveStore>()(
  persist(
    immer((set, get) => ({
      // State
      accounts: [],
      activeAccountId: null,
      panels: {},
      authReady: false,

      // Account management
      addAccount: (account) => {
        set((state) => {
          const existingIndex = state.accounts.findIndex(a => a.id === account.id);
          if (existingIndex >= 0) {
            state.accounts[existingIndex] = account;
          } else {
            state.accounts.push(account);
          }
          if (!state.activeAccountId) {
            state.activeAccountId = account.id;
          }
        });
      },

      removeAccount: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
          if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
            state.activeAccountId = state.accounts[0]?.id || null;
          }
        });
      },

      setActiveAccount: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          state.activeAccountId = id;
        });
      },

      getActiveAccount: () => {
        const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
        return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId) || null;
      },

      // Auth
      initiateAuth: async () => {
        // Use the actual google auth library
        return '';
      },

      completeAuth: async (code) => {
        // This would be implemented with actual Google OAuth
        set((state) => {
          state.authReady = true;
        });
      },

      refreshToken: async (accountId) => {
        const account = get().accounts.find(a => a.id === accountId);
        if (!account) throw new Error('Account not found');
        // Implement token refresh logic here
        return account.accessToken || account.token || '';
      },

      restoreToken: async () => {
        // Restore from storage if needed
        set((state) => {
          state.authReady = true;
        });
      },

      logout: () => {
        set((state) => {
          state.activeAccountId = null;
          state.authReady = false;
        });
      },

      // Panel management
      initPanelState: (panelId) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) {
            state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          }
        });
      },

      setViewModeForPanel: (panelId, mode) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          state.panels[panelId].viewMode = mode;
        });
      },

      setSortByForPanel: (panelId, sortBy) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          state.panels[panelId].sortBy = sortBy;
        });
      },

      navigateToFolderForPanel: async (panelId, folder) => {
        const account = get().getActiveAccount();
        if (!account) return;

        const accessToken = account.accessToken || account.token;
        if (!accessToken) return;

        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          state.panels[panelId].folderStack.push(state.panels[panelId].currentFolderId || 'root');
          state.panels[panelId].currentFolderId = folder.id;
          state.panels[panelId].isLoading = true;
          state.panels[panelId].error = null;
        });

        try {
          const files = await googleDriveApi.listFiles(accessToken, folder.id);
          set((state) => {
            state.panels[panelId].files = files;
            state.panels[panelId].isLoading = false;
          });
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.panels[panelId].error = (err as Error).message;
            state.panels[panelId].isLoading = false;
          });
        }
      },

      navigateUpForPanel: (panelId) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) return;
          const parentId = state.panels[panelId].folderStack.pop();
          if (parentId !== undefined) {
            state.panels[panelId].currentFolderId = parentId;
          }
        });
      },

      refreshCurrentForPanel: async (panelId) => {
        const account = get().getActiveAccount();
        if (!account) return;

        const accessToken = account.accessToken || account.token;
        if (!accessToken) return;

        const folderId = get().panels[panelId]?.currentFolderId || 'root';

        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          state.panels[panelId].isLoading = true;
          state.panels[panelId].error = null;
        });

        try {
          const files = await googleDriveApi.listFiles(accessToken, folderId);
          set((state) => {
            state.panels[panelId].files = files;
            state.panels[panelId].isLoading = false;
          });
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.panels[panelId].error = (err as Error).message;
            state.panels[panelId].isLoading = false;
          });
        }
      },

      setPanelError: (panelId, error) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panels[panelId]) state.panels[panelId] = { ...defaultPanelState };
          state.panels[panelId].error = error;
        });
      },

      getPanelState: (panelId) => {
        return get().panels[panelId] || defaultPanelState;
      },
    })),
    {
      name: 'drive-store',
      partialize: (state) => ({
        accounts: state.accounts,
        activeAccountId: state.activeAccountId,
        authReady: state.authReady,
      }),
    }
  )
);

// Selectors
export const useDriveAccounts = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useDriveActiveAccount = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useDriveAuthReady = () => useDriveStore((s) => s.authReady);

export const useDriveFilesForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.files || []);
export const useDriveViewModeForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.viewMode || 'list');
export const useDriveSortByForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.sortBy || 'name-asc');
export const useDriveIsLoadingForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.isLoading || false);
export const useDriveErrorForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.error || null);
export const useDriveCurrentFolderForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useDriveStore((s) => s.panels[panelId]?.currentFolderId || 'root');


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/fileSystemStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { 
  FileSystemEntry, 
  FileSystemDirectoryEntry,
  ViewMode, 
  SortBy,
  MountPoint 
} from '@/types/filesystem';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';

interface NavigationHistory {
  handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
  name: string;
}

interface FileSystemState {
  // Current state
  currentPath: string;
  currentHandle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null;
  entries: FileSystemEntry[];
  viewMode: ViewMode;
  sortBy: SortBy;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  
  // History for back navigation
  history: NavigationHistory[];
  
  // Mount points (fake root)
  mountPoints: MountPoint[];
  
  // Actions
  setViewMode: (mode: ViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: SortBy) => void;
  pickDirectory: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateTo: (entry: FileSystemDirectoryEntry) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  createFolder: (name: string) => Promise<void>;
  initMountPoints: () => void;
  selectMountPoint: (mountId: string) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Computed
  getSortedEntries: () => FileSystemEntry[];
}

const createFakeMountPoints = (): MountPoint[] => [
  {
    id: 'internal',
    name: 'Internal Storage',
    icon: 'hard-drive',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'sd-card',
    name: 'SD Card',
    icon: 'sd-card',
    handle: null,
    isFake: true,
  },
];

export const useFileSystemStore = create<FileSystemState>((set, get) => ({
  currentPath: '/',
  currentHandle: null,
  entries: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  history: [],
  mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints(),

  setViewMode: (mode) => set({ viewMode: mode }),
  
  setSortBy: (sort) => set({ sortBy: sort }),

  pickDirectory: async () => {
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({ 
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${handle.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
          isLoading: false 
        });
      } else {
        set({ isLoading: false });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateTo: async (entry) => {
    const { currentHandle, history, currentPath } = get();
    if (!currentHandle || entry.kind !== 'directory') return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const newEntries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle);
      set({
        currentHandle: entry.handle as FileSystemDirectoryHandle,
        currentPath: `${currentPath}/${entry.name}`,
        entries: newEntries,
        history: [...history, { handle: currentHandle, name: currentPath.split('/').pop() || 'root' }],
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateBack: async () => {
    const { history } = get();
    if (history.length === 0) {
      get().navigateToRoot();
      return;
    }

    const previous = history[history.length - 1];
    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(previous.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: previous.handle,
        currentPath: history.length === 1 ? '/' : `/${previous.name}`,
        entries,
        history: history.slice(0, -1),
        isLoading: false,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  navigateToRoot: () => {
    set({
      currentPath: '/',
      currentHandle: null,
      entries: [],
      history: [],
    });
  },

  refreshCurrent: async () => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(currentHandle);
      set({ entries, isLoading: false });
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  createFolder: async (name) => {
    const { currentHandle } = get();
    if (!currentHandle) return;

    set({ isLoading: true, error: null });
    try {
      await fileSystemBackend.createDirectory(currentHandle, name);
      await get().refreshCurrent();
    } catch (err) {
      set({ error: (err as Error).message, isLoading: false });
    }
  },

  initMountPoints: () => {
    set({ mountPoints: createFakeMountPoints() });
  },

  selectMountPoint: async (mountId) => {
    const { mountPoints } = get();
    const mount = mountPoints.find(m => m.id === mountId);
    
    if (!mount) return;
    
    // If mount has no handle yet, open picker
    if (!mount.handle) {
      const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
      if (handle) {
        // Update mount point with handle
        const updatedMounts = mountPoints.map(m => 
          m.id === mountId ? { ...m, handle, isFake: false } : m
        );
        const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(handle);
        set({
          mountPoints: updatedMounts,
          currentHandle: handle,
          currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
          entries,
          history: [],
        });
      }
    } else {
      // Use existing handle
      const entries = await fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(mount.handle);
      set({
        currentHandle: mount.handle,
        currentPath: `/${mount.name}`,
        entries,
        history: [],
      });
    }
  },

  getSortedEntries: () => {
    const { entries, sortBy } = get();
    const sorted = [...entries];
    
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'name-asc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      case 'name-desc':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
      case 'date':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified.getTime() - a.lastModified.getTime());
      case 'size':
        return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
      default:
        return sorted;
    }
  },
}));

// Selectors
export const useCurrentPath = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useCurrentHandle = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.currentHandle);
export const useEntries = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.getSortedEntries());
export const useViewMode = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useSortBy = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useIsLoading = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.isLoading);
export const useHistory = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.history);
export const useMountPoints = () => useFileSystemStore((s) => s.mountPoints);

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/githubStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { 
  GitHubAccount, 
  GitHubRepository, 
  GitHubContent,
  GitHubViewMode,
  GitHubSortBy,
  GitHubPanelState,
  GitHubPermission 
} from '@/types/github';
import { githubApi } from '@/lib/githubApi';
import { githubStorage } from '@/lib/githubStorage';

// Per-panel navigation state
export interface GitHubPanelInstance {
  currentRepository: string | null;
  currentPath: string;
  pathHistory: string[];
  contents: GitHubContent[];
  viewMode: GitHubViewMode;
  sortBy: GitHubSortBy;
  isLoading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
  fileContent: string | null;
  fileName: string | null;
}

interface GitHubStore extends GitHubPanelState {
  // Account management (global)
  loadAccounts: () => Promise<void>;
  addAccount: (username: string, token: string) => Promise<void>;
  removeAccount: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  setActiveAccount: (id: string | null) => void;
  getActiveAccount: () => GitHubAccount | undefined;
  
  // Per-panel state
  panelStates: Record<string, GitHubPanelInstance>;
  initPanelState: (panelId: string) => void;
  getPanelState: (panelId: string) => GitHubPanelInstance;
  
  // Per-panel navigation actions
  loadRepositoriesForPanel: (panelId: string) => Promise<void>;
  selectRepositoryForPanel: (panelId: string, repo: GitHubRepository) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToPathForPanel: (panelId: string, path: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBackForPanel: (panelId: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRootForPanel: (panelId: string) => void;
  openFileForPanel: (panelId: string, file: GitHubContent) => Promise<void>;
  closeFileForPanel: (panelId: string) => void;
  setViewModeForPanel: (panelId: string, mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  setSortByForPanel: (panelId: string, sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrentForPanel: (panelId: string) => Promise<void>;
  clearPanelError: (panelId: string) => void;
  
  // Global repositories list (for account)
  loadRepositories: () => Promise<void>;
  getSortedRepositories: () => GitHubRepository[];
  
  // Getters for panel
  getSortedContentsForPanel: (panelId: string) => GitHubContent[];
  getCurrentBreadcrumbForPanel: (panelId: string) => string[];
  canGoBackForPanel: (panelId: string) => boolean;
  
  // Legacy methods (kept for compatibility)
  selectRepository: (repo: GitHubRepository) => Promise<void>;
  navigateToPath: (path: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => void;
  openFile: (file: GitHubContent) => Promise<void>;
  closeFile: () => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: GitHubViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: GitHubSortBy) => void;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  logout: () => void;
  _restoreNavigationState: () => Promise<void>;
  getSortedContents: () => GitHubContent[];
  getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => string[];
  canGoBack: () => boolean;
}

const createInitialPanelState = (): GitHubPanelInstance => ({
  currentRepository: null,
  currentPath: '',
  pathHistory: [],
  contents: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'updated',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  fileContent: null,
  fileName: null,
});

const createInitialState = (): GitHubPanelState => ({
  accounts: [],
  activeAccountId: null,
  currentRepository: null,
  currentPath: '',
  pathHistory: [],
  repositories: [],
  contents: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'updated',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  fileContent: null,
  fileName: null,
});

export const useGitHubStore = create<GitHubStore>()(
  persist(
    immer((set, get) => ({
      ...createInitialState(),
      panelStates: {},

      initPanelState: (panelId) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panelStates[panelId]) {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = createInitialPanelState();
          }
        });
      },

      getPanelState: (panelId) => {
        const state = get().panelStates[panelId];
        if (!state) {
          get().initPanelState(panelId);
          return get().panelStates[panelId];
        }
        return state;
      },

      loadAccounts: async () => {
        const accounts = await githubStorage.getAllAccounts();
        set((state) => {
          state.accounts = accounts;
        });
      },

      addAccount: async (username, token) => {
        set((state) => {
          state.isLoading = true;
          state.error = null;
        });
        try {
          const userInfo = await githubApi.authenticate(token);
          const existing = get().accounts.find(a => a.id === userInfo.username);
          if (existing) throw new Error('Account already exists');
          const account: GitHubAccount = {
            id: userInfo.username,
            token,
            avatarUrl: userInfo.avatarUrl,
            permissions: 'read',
            addedAt: Date.now(),
          };
          await githubStorage.saveAccount(account);
          set((state) => {
            state.accounts.push(account);
            state.activeAccountId = account.id;
            state.isLoading = false;
          });
          await get().loadRepositories();
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.error = (err as Error).message;
            state.isLoading = false;
          });
          throw err;
        }
      },

      removeAccount: async (id) => {
        await githubStorage.deleteAccount(id);
        set((state) => {
          state.accounts = state.accounts.filter(a => a.id !== id);
          if (state.activeAccountId === id) {
            state.activeAccountId = null;
          }
        });
      },

      setActiveAccount: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          state.activeAccountId = id;
        });
      },

      getActiveAccount: () => {
        const { accounts, activeAccountId } = get();
        return accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
      },

      loadRepositories: async () => {
        const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
        if (!activeAccountId) return;
        const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
        if (!account) return;
        set((state) => {
          state.isLoading = true;
          state.error = null;
        });
        try {
          githubApi.setToken(account.token);
          const repos = await githubApi.listRepositories(account.id);
          set((state) => {
            state.repositories = repos;
            state.isLoading = false;
          });
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.error = (err as Error).message;
            state.isLoading = false;
          });
        }
      },

      getSortedRepositories: () => {
        const { repositories, sortBy } = get();
        const sorted = [...repositories];
        switch (sortBy) {
          case 'name-asc':
            return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
          case 'name-desc':
            return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
          case 'updated':
            return sorted.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.pushed_at).getTime() - new Date(a.pushed_at).getTime());
          case 'stars':
            return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.stargazers_count - a.stargazers_count);
          default:
            return sorted;
        }
      },

      // Per-panel navigation actions
      loadRepositoriesForPanel: async (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelState, isLoading: true, error: null };
        });
        try {
          await get().loadRepositories();
          const panelStateAfter = get().getPanelState(panelId);
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelStateAfter, isLoading: false };
          });
        } catch (err) {
          const panelStateErr = get().getPanelState(panelId);
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelStateErr, isLoading: false, error: (err as Error).message };
          });
        }
      },

      selectRepositoryForPanel: async (panelId, repo) => {
        const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
        if (!activeAccountId) return;
        const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
        if (!account) return;
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            isLoading: true,
            error: null,
            currentRepository: repo.name,
            currentPath: '',
            pathHistory: [],
            fileContent: null,
            fileName: null,
          };
        });
        try {
          githubApi.setToken(account.token);
          const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, repo.name, '');
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              contents,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
          
          // Sync panelStore path
          const { usePanelStore } = await import('./panelStore');
          const panel = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(panelId);
          if (panel) {
            const basePath = `/github/${account.id}`;
            usePanelStore.getState().setPanelPath(panelId, `${basePath}/${repo.name}`);
          }
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              error: (err as Error).message,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
        }
      },

      navigateToPathForPanel: async (panelId, path) => {
        const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        if (!activeAccountId || !panelState.currentRepository) return;
        const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
        if (!account) return;
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            isLoading: true,
            error: null,
            pathHistory: [...panelState.pathHistory, panelState.currentPath],
            currentPath: path,
            fileContent: null,
            fileName: null,
          };
        });
        try {
          githubApi.setToken(account.token);
          const contents = await githubApi.getRepositoryContents(account.id, panelState.currentRepository, path);
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              contents,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
          
          // Sync panelStore path
          const { usePanelStore } = await import('./panelStore');
          const panel = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(panelId);
          if (panel) {
            const basePath = `/github/${account.id}/${panelState.currentRepository}`;
            const newPath = path ? `${basePath}/${path}` : basePath;
            usePanelStore.getState().setPanelPath(panelId, newPath);
          }
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              error: (err as Error).message,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
        }
      },

      navigateBackForPanel: async (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        if (panelState.pathHistory.length === 0) {
          // Go back to repository list
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...panelState,
              currentRepository: null,
              currentPath: '',
              pathHistory: [],
              contents: [],
              fileContent: null,
              fileName: null,
            };
          });
          
          // Sync panelStore path
          const { usePanelStore } = require('./panelStore');
          const panel = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(panelId);
          if (panel) {
            const basePath = `/github/${panel.accountId}`;
            usePanelStore.getState().setPanelPath(panelId, basePath);
          }
          await get().loadRepositoriesForPanel(panelId);
          return;
        }
        const previousPath = panelState.pathHistory[panelState.pathHistory.length - 1];
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            isLoading: true,
            error: null,
            pathHistory: panelState.pathHistory.slice(0, -1),
            currentPath: previousPath,
            fileContent: null,
            fileName: null,
          };
        });
        await get().navigateToPathForPanel(panelId, previousPath);
      },

      navigateToRootForPanel: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            currentRepository: null,
            currentPath: '',
            pathHistory: [],
            contents: [],
            fileContent: null,
            fileName: null,
          };
        });
        
        // Sync panelStore path
        const { usePanelStore } = require('./panelStore');
        const panel = usePanelStore.getState().getPanel(panelId);
        if (panel) {
          const basePath = `/github/${panel.accountId}`;
          usePanelStore.getState().setPanelPath(panelId, basePath);
        }
        get().loadRepositoriesForPanel(panelId);
      },

      openFileForPanel: async (panelId, file) => {
        const { activeAccountId, accounts } = get();
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        if (!activeAccountId || !panelState.currentRepository || file.type !== 'file') return;
        const account = accounts.find(a => a.id === activeAccountId);
        if (!account) return;
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            isLoading: true,
            error: null,
          };
        });
        try {
          githubApi.setToken(account.token);
          const fileData = await githubApi.getFileContent(account.id, panelState.currentRepository, file.path);
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              fileContent: fileData.content,
              fileName: fileData.name,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.panelStates[panelId] = {
              ...state.panelStates[panelId],
              error: (err as Error).message,
              isLoading: false,
            };
          });
        }
      },

      closeFileForPanel: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = {
            ...panelState,
            fileContent: null,
            fileName: null,
          };
        });
      },

      setViewModeForPanel: (panelId, mode) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelState, viewMode: mode };
        });
      },

      setSortByForPanel: (panelId, sort) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelState, sortBy: sort };
        });
      },

      refreshCurrentForPanel: async (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        if (panelState.currentRepository) {
          await get().navigateToPathForPanel(panelId, panelState.currentPath);
        } else {
          await get().loadRepositoriesForPanel(panelId);
        }
      },

      clearPanelError: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        set((state) => {
          state.panelStates[panelId] = { ...panelState, error: null };
        });
      },

      getSortedContentsForPanel: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        const { contents, sortBy } = panelState;
        const sorted = [...contents];
        const folders = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'dir');
        const files = sorted.filter(c => c.type === 'file');
        const sortFn = (a: GitHubContent, b: GitHubContent) => {
          switch (sortBy) {
            case 'name-asc':
              return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
            case 'name-desc':
              return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
            default:
              return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
          }
        };
        return [...folders.sort(sortFn), ...files.sort(sortFn)];
      },

      getCurrentBreadcrumbForPanel: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        if (!panelState.currentPath) return [];
        return panelState.currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
      },

      canGoBackForPanel: (panelId) => {
        const panelState = get().getPanelState(panelId);
        return !!panelState.currentRepository && (panelState.currentPath !== '' || panelState.pathHistory.length > 0);
      },

      // Legacy methods (for compatibility with old components)
      selectRepository: async (repo) => {},
      navigateToPath: async (path) => {},
      navigateBack: async () => {},
      navigateToRoot: () => {},
      openFile: async (file) => {},
      closeFile: () => {},
      setViewMode: (mode) => {},
      setSortBy: (sort) => {},
      refreshCurrent: async () => {},
      logout: () => {},
      _restoreNavigationState: async () => {},
      getSortedContents: () => [],
      getCurrentBreadcrumb: () => [],
      canGoBack: () => false,
    })),
    {
      name: 'github-store',
      partialize: (state) => ({
        accounts: state.accounts,
        activeAccountId: state.activeAccountId,
        panelStates: state.panelStates, // persist panel states
      }),
      onRehydrateStorage: () => (state) => {
        if (state) {
          setTimeout(async () => {
            await state.loadAccounts();
          }, 0);
        }
      },
    }
  )
);

// Selectors for panel-specific state
export const useGitHubAccounts = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.accounts);
export const useGitHubActiveAccount = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getActiveAccount());
export const useGitHubRepositories = () => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedRepositories());
export const useGitHubContentsForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getSortedContentsForPanel(panelId));
export const useGitHubViewModeForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).viewMode);
export const useGitHubSortByForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).sortBy);
export const useGitHubCurrentRepoForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).currentRepository);
export const useGitHubFileContentForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).fileContent);
export const useGitHubFileNameForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).fileName);
export const useGitHubErrorForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).error);
export const useGitHubIsLoadingForPanel = (panelId: string) => useGitHubStore((s) => s.getPanelState(panelId).isLoading);

export {
