===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/logStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';

interface LogEntry {
  id: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  level: 'info' | 'warn' | 'error';
  action: string;
  details: any;
  category: string;
}

interface LogStore {
  logs: LogEntry[];
  isLiveLogOpen: boolean;
  logLevel: string;
  logCategories: string[];
  toggleLiveLog: () => void;
  setLogLevel: (level: string) => void;
  toggleCategory: (cat: string) => void;
  clearLogs: () => void;
  exportLogs: () => Promise<Blob>;
  logAction: (action: string, details: any, category: string) => void;
}

export const useLogStore = create<LogStore>((set, get) => ({
  logs: [],
  isLiveLogOpen: false,
  logLevel: 'debug',
  logCategories: ['auth', 'file', 'system', 'network', 'ui'],
  toggleLiveLog: () => set((state) => ({ isLiveLogOpen: !state.isLiveLogOpen })),
  setLogLevel: (level) => set({ logLevel: level }),
  toggleCategory: (cat) => set((state) => ({
    logCategories: state.logCategories.includes(cat)
      ? state.logCategories.filter(c => c !== cat)
      : [...state.logCategories, cat]
  })),
  clearLogs: () => set({ logs: [] }),
  exportLogs: async () => {
    const { logs } = get();
    return new Blob([JSON.stringify(logs, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
  },
  logAction: (action, details, category) => {
    const log: LogEntry = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      timestamp: new Date(),
      level: 'info',
      action,
      details,
      category,
    };
    set((state) => ({ logs: [...state.logs, log] }));
  },
}));

export const useLogFilteredLogs = () => useLogStore((s) => s.logs);
export const useLogIsLiveLogOpen = () => useLogStore((s) => s.isLiveLogOpen);
export const useLogNotifications = () => useLogStore((s) => []);
export const useLogUnreadCount = () => useLogStore((s) => 0);


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/notificationStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';

export interface Notification {
  id: string;
  type: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error';
  title: string;
  message: string;
  timestamp: number;
  read: boolean;
}

interface NotificationState {
  notifications: Notification[];
}

interface NotificationActions {
  addNotification: (notification: Omit<Notification, 'id' | 'timestamp' | 'read'>) => void;
  removeNotification: (id: string) => void;
  markAsRead: (id: string) => void;
  markAllAsRead: () => void;
  clearNotifications: () => void;
}

export const useNotificationStore = create<NotificationState & NotificationActions>()(
  immer((set) => ({
    notifications: [],

    addNotification: (notification) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications.unshift({
          ...notification,
          id: Math.random().toString(36).substring(7),
          timestamp: Date.now(),
          read: false,
        });
      });
    },

    removeNotification: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = state.notifications.filter((n) => n.id !== id);
      });
    },

    markAsRead: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        const notification = state.notifications.find((n) => n.id === id);
        if (notification) {
          notification.read = true;
        }
      });
    },

    markAllAsRead: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications.forEach((n) => {
          n.read = true;
        });
      });
    },

    clearNotifications: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.notifications = [];
      });
    },
  }))
);


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/promptStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { openDB } from 'idb';
import { uploadToDrive, uploadToGitHub } from '@/lib/promptUploadEngine';
import { useDriveStore } from '@/stores/driveStore';
import { useGitHubStore } from '@/stores/githubStore';

export interface PromptNote {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  content: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  attachedToLink?: boolean;
}

export interface PromptFile {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  size: number;
  type: string;
  source: 'upload' | 'drag-drop' | 'reference';
  sourcePath?: string;
  sourcePanelId?: string;
  content?: Blob;
  folderPath: string;
  isCompressed: boolean;
  compressionProfile?: any;
}

export interface PromptFolder {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  path: string;
  children: (PromptFolder | PromptFile)[];
  parent?: PromptFolder;
}

export interface PromptSession {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  updatedAt: Date;
  promptText: string;
  notes: PromptNote[];
  files: PromptFile[];
  folderStructure: PromptFolder;
  isCompleted: boolean;
  uploadResult?: {
    provider: 'drive' | 'github';
    folderPath: string;
    shareLink: string;
    rawLink?: string;
    uploadedAt: Date;
  };
}

interface PromptStore {
  sessions: PromptSession[];
  currentSession: PromptSession | null;
  isPromptManagerOpen: boolean;
  selectedUploadProvider: 'drive' | 'github';
  isUploading: boolean;
  uploadProgress: number;
  
  createSession: (name: string) => PromptSession;
  loadSession: (id: string) => void;
  saveSession: () => Promise<void>;
  deleteSession: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  duplicateSession: (id: string) => PromptSession;
  renameSession: (id: string, newName: string) => void;
  updatePromptText: (text: string) => void;
  addNote: (title: string, content: string) => void;
  updateNote: (id: string, updates: Partial<PromptNote>) => void;
  deleteNote: (id: string) => void;
  toggleNoteAttachment: (id: string) => void;
  addFile: (file: Omit<PromptFile, 'id'>, folderPath?: string) => void;
  renameFile: (fileId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFile: (fileId: string) => void;
  createFolder: (name: string, parentPath: string) => void;
  renameFolder: (folderId: string, newName: string) => void;
  deleteFolder: (folderId: string) => void;
  compressFile: (fileId: string, profiles: any[]) => void;
  completeAndUpload: () => Promise<{ shareLink: string }>;
  setUploadProvider: (provider: 'drive' | 'github') => void;
  openPromptManager: () => void;
  closePromptManager: () => void;
}

const DB_NAME = 'prompt-manager-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

const createDefaultFolder = (): PromptFolder => ({
  id: 'root',
  name: 'root',
  path: '/',
  children: [],
});

const createEmptySession = (name: string): PromptSession => ({
  id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
  name,
  createdAt: new Date(),
  updatedAt: new Date(),
  promptText: '',
  notes: [],
  files: [],
  folderStructure: createDefaultFolder(),
  isCompleted: false,
});

export const usePromptStore = create<PromptStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    sessions: [],
    currentSession: null,
    isPromptManagerOpen: false,
    selectedUploadProvider: 'drive',
    isUploading: false,
    uploadProgress: 0,

    createSession: (name) => {
      const session = createEmptySession(name);
      set((state) => {
        state.sessions.push(session);
        state.currentSession = session;
      });
      return session;
    },

    loadSession: (id) => {
      const session = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (session) set({ currentSession: session });
    },

    saveSession: async () => {
      const { currentSession } = get();
      if (!currentSession) return;
      currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
        upgrade(db) {
          if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions')) {
            db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id' });
          }
        },
      });
      await db.put('sessions', currentSession);
      set((state) => {
        const idx = state.sessions.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSession.id);
        if (idx >= 0) state.sessions[idx] = currentSession;
      });
    },

    deleteSession: async (id) => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      await db.delete('sessions', id);
      set((state) => {
        state.sessions = state.sessions.filter(s => s.id !== id);
        if (state.currentSession?.id === id) state.currentSession = null;
      });
    },

    duplicateSession: (id) => {
      const original = get().sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
      if (!original) throw new Error('Session not found');
      const copy: PromptSession = {
        ...original,
        id: `session-${uuidv4()}`,
        name: `${original.name} (Copy)`,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        updatedAt: new Date(),
        isCompleted: false,
        uploadResult: undefined,
      };
      set((state) => { state.sessions.push(copy); });
      return copy;
    },

    renameSession: (id, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        const session = state.sessions.find(s => s.id === id);
        if (session) session.name = newName;
        if (state.currentSession?.id === id) state.currentSession.name = newName;
      });
    },

    updatePromptText: (text) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.promptText = text;
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    addNote: (title, content) => {
      const note: PromptNote = {
        id: `note-${uuidv4()}`,
        title,
        content,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        attachedToLink: false,
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes.push(note);
          state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
        }
      });
    },

    updateNote: (id, updates) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) Object.assign(note, updates);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteNote: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          state.currentSession.notes = state.currentSession.notes.filter(n => n.id !== id);
        }
      });
    },

    toggleNoteAttachment: (id) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const note = state.currentSession.notes.find(n => n.id === id);
          if (note) note.attachedToLink = !note.attachedToLink;
        }
      });
    },

    addFile: (fileData, folderPath = '/') => {
      const file: PromptFile = {
        id: `file-${uuidv4()}`,
        ...fileData,
        folderPath,
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        state.currentSession.files.push(file);
        const addToFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (folder.path === folderPath) {
            folder.children.push(file);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && addToFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          addToFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
        state.currentSession.updatedAt = new Date();
      });
    },

    renameFile: (fileId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
        if (file) file.name = newName;
        const updateInFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if (!('children' in child) && child.id === fileId) {
              child.name = newName;
              return true;
            }
            if ('children' in child && updateInFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          updateInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFile: (fileId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(f => f.id !== fileId);
        const removeFromFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          const idx = folder.children.findIndex(c => !('children' in c) && c.id === fileId);
          if (idx >= 0) {
            folder.children.splice(idx, 1);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && removeFromFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          removeFromFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    createFolder: (name, parentPath) => {
      const folder: PromptFolder = {
        id: `folder-${uuidv4()}`,
        name,
        path: parentPath === '/' ? `/${name}` : `${parentPath}/${name}`,
        children: [],
      };
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const addToParent = (current: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (current.path === parentPath) {
            current.children.push(folder);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of current.children) {
            if ('children' in child && addToParent(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          addToParent(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    renameFolder: (folderId, newName) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const renameInFolder = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          if (folder.id === folderId) {
            folder.name = newName;
            folder.path = folder.path.split('/').slice(0, -1).concat(newName).join('/');
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && renameInFolder(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          renameInFolder(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
      });
    },

    deleteFolder: (folderId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (!state.currentSession) return;
        const removeFromParent = (folder: PromptFolder): boolean => {
          const idx = folder.children.findIndex(c => 'children' in c && c.id === folderId);
          if (idx >= 0) {
            folder.children.splice(idx, 1);
            return true;
          }
          for (const child of folder.children) {
            if ('children' in child && removeFromParent(child)) return true;
          }
          return false;
        };
        if (state.currentSession.folderStructure) {
          removeFromParent(state.currentSession.folderStructure);
        }
        // Find folder path to remove its files
        let folderPath: string | null = null;
        const findPath = (f: PromptFolder): void => {
          if (f.id === folderId) folderPath = f.path;
          else f.children.forEach(c => { if ('children' in c) findPath(c); });
        };
        findPath(state.currentSession!.folderStructure);
        if (folderPath) {
          state.currentSession.files = state.currentSession.files.filter(
            f => !f.folderPath.startsWith(folderPath!)
          );
        }
      });
    },

    compressFile: (fileId, profiles) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.currentSession) {
          const file = state.currentSession.files.find(f => f.id === fileId);
          if (file) {
            file.isCompressed = true;
            file.compressionProfile = profiles;
          }
        }
      });
    },

    completeAndUpload: async () => {
      const { currentSession, selectedUploadProvider } = get();
      if (!currentSession) throw new Error('No active session');
      set({ isUploading: true, uploadProgress: 0 });
      try {
        const promptBlob = new Blob([currentSession.promptText], { type: 'text/plain' });
        const linksContent = currentSession.notes
          .filter(n => n.attachedToLink)
          .map(n => `${n.title}\n${n.content}`)
          .join('\n---\n');
        const linksBlob = new Blob([linksContent], { type: 'text/plain' });
        const files = currentSession.files.map(f => ({
          name: f.name,
          content: f.content || new Blob([`Reference: ${f.sourcePath || f.name}`], { type: 'text/plain' }),
        }));
        let result;
        if (selectedUploadProvider === 'drive') {
          const activeAccount = useDriveStore.getState().getActiveAccount();
          if (!activeAccount) throw new Error('No Drive account selected');
          result = await uploadToDrive(
            currentSession.name, promptBlob, linksBlob, files, activeAccount.id,
            (p) => set({ uploadProgress: p })
          );
        } else {
          const activeAccount = useGitHubStore.getState().getActiveAccount();
          if (!activeAccount) throw new Error('No GitHub account selected');
          result = await uploadToGitHub(
            currentSession.name, promptBlob, linksBlob, files, activeAccount.id, activeAccount.token,
            (p) => set({ uploadProgress: p })
          );
        }
        set((state) => {
          if (state.currentSession) {
            state.currentSession.isCompleted = true;
            state.currentSession.uploadResult = {
              provider: selectedUploadProvider,
              folderPath: result.folderPath,
              shareLink: result.shareLink,
              rawLink: result.rawLink,
              uploadedAt: new Date(),
            };
          }
          state.isUploading = false;
        });
        return { shareLink: result.shareLink };
      } catch (error) {
        set({ isUploading: false });
        throw error;
      }
    },

    setUploadProvider: (provider) => set({ selectedUploadProvider: provider }),
    openPromptManager: () => set({ isPromptManagerOpen: true }),
    closePromptManager: () => set({ isPromptManagerOpen: false }),
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const usePromptSessions = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.sessions);
export const usePromptCurrentSession = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.currentSession);
export const usePromptIsOpen = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.isPromptManagerOpen);
export const usePromptUploadProgress = () => usePromptStore((s) => s.uploadProgress);

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/panelStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { 
  PanelState, 
  PanelLayout, 
  createDefaultPanel,
  MIN_PANEL_WIDTH,
  MAX_PANELS,
} from '@/types/panel';
import { SourceType } from './appStore';
import { ViewMode, SortBy } from '@/types/filesystem';
import { fileSystemBackend } from '@/lib/fileSystemBackend';
import { FileSystemEntry } from '@/types/filesystem';

interface PanelStore extends PanelLayout {
  // Panel management - DISABLED for fixed 4 panels
  addPanel: () => void;
  removePanel: (id: string) => void;
  setActivePanel: (id: string) => void;
  
  // Panel-specific actions
  setPanelSource: (id: string, source: SourceType) => void;
  setPanelPath: (id: string, path: string) => void;
  setPanelHandle: (id: string, handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle | null) => void;
  setPanelAccountId: (id: string, accountId: string) => void;
  navigatePanelForward: (id: string, handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle, name: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigatePanelBack: (id: string) => void;
  setPanelViewMode: (id: string, mode: ViewMode) => void;
  setPanelSortBy: (id: string, sort: SortBy) => void;
  setPanelWidth: (id: string, width: number) => void;
  togglePanelMinimize: (id: string) => void;
  
  // Storage operations
  pickDirectoryForPanel: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  refreshPanelDirectory: (id: string) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Getters
  getPanel: (id: string) => PanelState | undefined;
  getPanelEntries: (id: string) => Promise<FileSystemEntry[]>;
}

export const usePanelStore = create<PanelStore>()(
  persist(
    immer((set, get) => ({
      // Exactly 4 fixed panels ŌĆō never change count
      panels: [
        createDefaultPanel('panel-1', 0),
        createDefaultPanel('panel-2', 1),
        createDefaultPanel('panel-3', 2),
        createDefaultPanel('panel-4', 3),
      ],
      activePanelId: 'panel-1',

      // Disable add/remove completely
      addPanel: () => {
        console.warn('addPanel is disabled ŌĆō exactly 4 panels are fixed');
      },

      removePanel: (id) => {
        console.warn('removePanel is disabled ŌĆō exactly 4 panels are fixed');
      },

      setActivePanel: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          state.activePanelId = id;
        });
      },

      setPanelSource: (id, source) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) {
            panel.source = source;
            panel.path = '/';
            panel.handle = null;
            panel.history = [];
            panel.accountId = undefined;
          }
        });
      },

      setPanelPath: (id, path) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) {
            // Normalize path
            panel.path = path.replace(/\/+/g, '/');
          }
        });
      },

      setPanelHandle: (id, handle) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) panel.handle = handle;
        });
      },

      setPanelAccountId: (id, accountId) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) panel.accountId = accountId;
        });
      },

      navigatePanelForward: async (id, handle, name) => {
        const panel = get().getPanel(id);
        if (!panel || !panel.handle) return;

        try {
          const subHandle = await panel.handle.getDirectoryHandle(name);
          set((state) => {
            const p = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
            if (p && p.handle) {
              p.history.push({ 
                handle: p.handle, 
                name: p.path.split('/').pop() || 'root' 
              });
              p.handle = subHandle;
              p.path = `${p.path}/${name}`.replace('//', '/');
            }
          });
        } catch (err) {
          console.error('Failed to navigate into folder:', err);
          throw err;
        }
      },

      // FIXED: navigatePanelBack now works for both handle-based and path-based navigation
      navigatePanelBack: (id) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (!panel) return;

          // Handle-based navigation (native storage)
          if (panel.handle && panel.history.length > 0) {
            const previous = panel.history.pop()!;
            panel.handle = previous.handle;
            panel.path = panel.history.length === 0 ? '/' : `/${previous.name}`;
            return;
          }

          // Path-based navigation (Termux, backend storage)
          const currentPath = panel.path || '/';
          const parts = currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);
          
          if (parts.length > 1) {
            // Remove last segment
            const newPath = '/' + parts.slice(0, -1).join('/');
            panel.path = newPath;
          } else if (parts.length === 1) {
            // At root segment, go to source root
            if (panel.source === 'terminal') {
              panel.path = '/terminal/termux';
            } else {
              panel.path = '/';
            }
          }
          // If already at root, do nothing
        });
      },

      setPanelViewMode: (id, mode) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) panel.viewMode = mode;
        });
      },

      setPanelSortBy: (id, sort) => {
        set((state) => {
          const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
          if (panel) panel.sortBy = sort;
        });
      },

      setPanelWidth: (id, width) => {
        // Width changes ignored ŌĆō fixed grid layout
      },

      togglePanelMinimize: (id) => {
        // Minimize disabled ŌĆō panels always visible
        console.debug('togglePanelMinimize disabled');
      },

      pickDirectoryForPanel: async (id) => {
        const handle = await fileSystemBackend.pickDirectory();
        if (handle) {
          set((state) => {
            const panel = state.panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
            if (panel) {
              panel.handle = handle;
              panel.path = `/${handle.name}`;
              panel.history = [];
            }
          });
        }
      },

      refreshPanelDirectory: async (id) => {
        // Components handle their own refresh via useEffect on path change
        // This is a placeholder for future centralized refresh logic
        console.log('Refresh requested for panel:', id);
      },

      getPanel: (id) => {
        return get().panels.find((p) => p.id === id);
      },

      getPanelEntries: async (id) => {
        const panel = get().getPanel(id);
        if (!panel?.handle) return [];
        return fileSystemBackend.readDirectory(panel.handle);
      },
    })),
    {
      name: 'panel-store',
      partialize: (state) => ({
        panels: state.panels.map(p => ({
          ...p,
          handle: null,
          history: [],
        })),
        activePanelId: state.activePanelId,
      }),
      merge: (persistedState, currentState) => {
        const typedPersisted = persistedState as any;
        const defaultPanels = [
          createDefaultPanel('panel-1', 0),
          createDefaultPanel('panel-2', 1),
          createDefaultPanel('panel-3', 2),
          createDefaultPanel('panel-4', 3),
        ];
        
        const mergedPanels = typedPersisted.panels?.map((p: any, index: number) => ({
          ...defaultPanels[index],
          ...p,
          handle: null,
          history: [],
        })) || defaultPanels;

        return {
          ...currentState,
          ...typedPersisted,
          panels: mergedPanels,
        };
      },
    }
  )
);

export const usePanels = () => usePanelStore((s) => s.panels);
export const useActivePanelId = () => usePanelStore((s) => s.activePanelId);
export const usePanel = (id: string) => usePanelStore((s) => s.getPanel(id));


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/recentSourcesStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';

export type SourceType = 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';

export interface RecentSource {
  type: SourceType;
  subType?: string;
  id: string;
  label: string;
  locked: boolean;
  timestamp: number;
  icon?: string;
}

interface RecentSourcesState {
  panelRecents: Record<string, RecentSource[]>;
}

interface RecentSourcesStore extends RecentSourcesState {
  getRecentsForPanel: (panelId: string) => RecentSource[];
  addRecent: (panelId: string, source: Omit<RecentSource, 'timestamp' | 'locked'>) => void;
  removeRecent: (panelId: string, type: SourceType, id: string) => void;
  toggleLock: (panelId: string, index: number) => void;
  clearRecents: (panelId: string) => void;
  isLocked: (panelId: string, type: SourceType, id: string) => boolean;
}

const MAX_RECENTS = 5;

export const useRecentSourcesStore = create<RecentSourcesStore>()(
  persist(
    immer((set, get) => ({
      panelRecents: {},

      getRecentsForPanel: (panelId) => {
        return get().panelRecents[panelId] || [];
      },

      addRecent: (panelId, source) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panelRecents[panelId]) {
            state.panelRecents[panelId] = [];
          }

          const recents = state.panelRecents[panelId];
          
          // Check if already exists
          const existingIndex = recents.findIndex(
            r => r.type === source.type && r.id === source.id
          );
          
          if (existingIndex >= 0) {
            // If locked, just update timestamp and keep position
            if (recents[existingIndex].locked) {
              recents[existingIndex].timestamp = Date.now();
              return;
            }
            // Remove existing to re-add at front
            recents.splice(existingIndex, 1);
          }

          const newEntry: RecentSource = {
            ...source,
            locked: false,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
          };

          // Find position after last locked item
          let lastLockedIndex = -1;
          for (let i = recents.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (recents[i].locked) {
              lastLockedIndex = i;
              break;
            }
          }
          
          // Insert after locked items
          recents.splice(lastLockedIndex + 1, 0, newEntry);

          // Remove excess unlocked items from the end
          while (recents.length > MAX_RECENTS) {
            const firstUnlocked = recents.findIndex(r => !r.locked);
            if (firstUnlocked >= 0 && recents.length > MAX_RECENTS) {
              recents.splice(firstUnlocked, 1);
            } else {
              break;
            }
          }
        });
      },

      removeRecent: (panelId, type, id) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panelRecents[panelId]) return;
          state.panelRecents[panelId] = state.panelRecents[panelId].filter(
            r => !(r.type === type && r.id === id)
          );
        });
      },

      toggleLock: (panelId, index) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (!state.panelRecents[panelId]) return;
          const recents = state.panelRecents[panelId];
          if (index >= 0 && index < recents.length) {
            recents[index].locked = !recents[index].locked;
            // Reorder: locked items first, then unlocked
            const locked = recents.filter(r => r.locked);
            const unlocked = recents.filter(r => !r.locked);
            state.panelRecents[panelId] = [...locked, ...unlocked];
          }
        });
      },

      clearRecents: (panelId) => {
        set((state) => {
          if (state.panelRecents[panelId]) {
            state.panelRecents[panelId] = state.panelRecents[panelId].filter(r => r.locked);
          }
        });
      },

      isLocked: (panelId, type, id) => {
        const recents = get().panelRecents[panelId] || [];
        return recents.some(r => r.type === type && r.id === id && r.locked);
      },
    })),
    {
      name: 'recent-sources-store',
    }
  )
);

export const useRecentsForPanel = (panelId: string) => 
  useRecentSourcesStore((s) => s.getRecentsForPanel(panelId));


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/renameStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { RenameState } from '@/types/rename';
import { getEngineForConversion, needsConversion, getExtension } from '@/lib/conversionEngines';

interface RenameStore extends RenameState {
  // Actions
  startRename: (item: RenameState['renamingItem']) => void;
  updateNewName: (name: string) => void;
  cancelRename: () => void;
  confirmRename: () => Promise<void>;
  setConversionProgress: (progress: number) => void;
  openKeepReplaceDialog: (result: RenameState['pendingConversion']) => void;
  keepBoth: () => Promise<void>;
  replaceOriginal: () => Promise<void>;
  skipConversion: () => Promise<void>;
}

export const useRenameStore = create<RenameStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    renamingItem: null,
    newName: '',
    isConverting: false,
    conversionProgress: 0,
    conversionResult: null,
    showKeepReplaceDialog: false,
    pendingConversion: null,

    startRename: (item) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.renamingItem = item;
        state.newName = item.name;
        state.isConverting = false;
        state.conversionProgress = 0;
        state.conversionResult = null;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = false;
        state.pendingConversion = null;
      });
    },

    updateNewName: (name) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.newName = name;
      });
    },

    cancelRename: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.renamingItem = null;
        state.newName = '';
        state.isConverting = false;
        state.conversionProgress = 0;
        state.conversionResult = null;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = false;
        state.pendingConversion = null;
      });
    },

    confirmRename: async () => {
      const { renamingItem, newName } = get();
      if (!renamingItem) return;

      const oldExt = getExtension(renamingItem.name);
      const newExt = getExtension(newName);

      if (oldExt !== newExt && needsConversion(renamingItem.name, newName)) {
        set((state) => {
          state.isConverting = true;
          state.conversionProgress = 0;
        });

        try {
          const engine = getEngineForConversion(oldExt, newExt);
          if (!engine) {
            throw new Error('Conversion not supported');
          }

          if (!engine.isReady) {
            await engine.init();
          }

          const originalBlob = await getOriginalFileBlob(renamingItem);
          
          const convertedBlob = await engine.convert(
            originalBlob,
            oldExt,
            newExt,
            (progress) => {
              set((state) => {
                state.conversionProgress = progress;
              });
            }
          );

          set((state) => {
            state.isConverting = false;
            state.pendingConversion = {
              originalName: renamingItem.name,
              newName,
              originalBlob,
              convertedBlob,
            };
            state.showKeepReplaceDialog = true;
          });

        } catch (error) {
          set((state) => {
            state.isConverting = false;
            state.conversionResult = {
              success: false,
              message: (error as Error).message,
            };
          });
        }
      } else {
        await performSimpleRename(renamingItem, newName);
        get().cancelRename();
      }
    },

    setConversionProgress: (progress) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.conversionProgress = progress;
      });
    },

    openKeepReplaceDialog: (result) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pendingConversion = result;
        state.showKeepReplaceDialog = true;
      });
    },

    keepBoth: async () => {
      const { pendingConversion, renamingItem } = get();
      if (!pendingConversion || !renamingItem) return;

      await saveFile(pendingConversion.originalBlob, pendingConversion.originalName, renamingItem);
      await saveFile(pendingConversion.convertedBlob, pendingConversion.newName, renamingItem);
      
      get().cancelRename();
    },

    replaceOriginal: async () => {
      const { pendingConversion, renamingItem } = get();
      if (!pendingConversion || !renamingItem) return;

      await deleteFile(renamingItem);
      await saveFile(pendingConversion.convertedBlob, pendingConversion.newName, renamingItem);
      
      get().cancelRename();
    },

    skipConversion: async () => {
      const { renamingItem, newName } = get();
      if (!renamingItem) return;

      await performSimpleRename(renamingItem, newName);
      get().cancelRename();
    },
  }))
);

async function getOriginalFileBlob(item: any): Promise<Blob> {
  switch (item.sourceType) {
    case 'storage':
      if (item.handle) {
        const file = await item.handle.getFile();
        return file;
      }
      break;
    case 'drive':
      break;
    case 'github':
      break;
    case 'terminal':
      break;
  }
  throw new Error('Cannot read file from source');
}

async function saveFile(blob: Blob, name: string, context: any): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Saving file:', name, 'Size:', blob.size);
}

async function deleteFile(item: any): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Deleting file:', item.name);
}

async function performSimpleRename(item: any, newName: string): Promise<void> {
  console.log('Renaming', item.name, 'to', newName);
}


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/searchStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import MiniSearch from 'minisearch';
import { openDB } from 'idb';
import {
  SearchState,
  SearchFilter,
  SearchResult,
  SearchIndexEntry,
  ExtensionStats,
  BoundPanel,
} from '@/types/search';
import Fuse, { IFuseOptions } from 'fuse.js';

interface SearchStore extends SearchState {
  // Search engine instances
  fuse: Fuse<SearchIndexEntry> | null;
  miniSearch: MiniSearch | null;
  
  // Actions
  initializeSearch: () => Promise<void>;
  setQuery: (query: string) => void;
  executeSearch: () => void;
  toggleFilterPanel: () => void;
  setFilters: (filters: Partial<SearchFilter>) => void;
  resetFilters: () => void;
  toggleGlobalMode: () => void;
  setBoundPanels: (panels: BoundPanel[]) => void;
  
  // Index management
  addToIndex: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  removeFromIndex: (ids: string[]) => Promise<void>;
  clearIndex: () => Promise<void>;
  scanSourceForExtensions: (sourceType: string, accountId: string, items: any[]) => Promise<void>;
  updateExtensionStats: (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => Promise<void>;
  
  // Recent searches
  addRecentSearch: (query: string) => void;
  clearRecentSearches: () => void;
  
  // Getters
  getFilteredResults: () => SearchResult[];
  getExtensionSuggestions: (query: string) => ExtensionStats[];
  getTopExtensions: (limit?: number) => ExtensionStats[];
}

const DEFAULT_FILTERS: SearchFilter = {
  sources: ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'],
  accounts: [],
  extensions: [],
  type: 'all',
  includeHidden: false,
};

const FUSE_CONFIG: IFuseOptions<SearchIndexEntry> = {
  keys: [
    { name: 'name', weight: 0.5 },
    { name: 'path', weight: 0.3 },
    { name: 'extension', weight: 0.2 },
  ],
  threshold: 0.3,
  distance: 100,
  includeScore: true,
  includeMatches: true,
  minMatchCharLength: 2,
  useExtendedSearch: true,
};

const MINI_SEARCH_CONFIG = {
  fields: ['name', 'path', 'extension'],
  storeFields: ['id', 'name', 'path', 'sourceType', 'accountId', 'type', 'size', 'lastModified', 'extension'],
  searchOptions: {
    boost: { name: 2, path: 1.5, extension: 1 },
    fuzzy: 0.3,
    prefix: true,
  },
};

// IndexedDB for persistent index
const DB_NAME = 'search-index-db';
const DB_VERSION = 1;

export const useSearchStore = create<SearchStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    // State
    query: '',
    isSearching: false,
    results: [],
    filters: { ...DEFAULT_FILTERS },
    isFilterPanelOpen: false,
    availableExtensions: [],
    availableAccounts: [],
    recentSearches: [],
    searchHistory: [],
    isGlobalMode: true,
    indexedCount: 0,
    lastIndexUpdate: null,
    boundPanels: [],
    fuse: null,
    miniSearch: null,

    initializeSearch: async () => {
      // Initialize MiniSearch for fast prefix matching
      const miniSearch = new MiniSearch(MINI_SEARCH_CONFIG);
      
      // Load existing index from IndexedDB
      try {
        const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION, {
          upgrade(db) {
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('entries')) {
              db.createObjectStore('entries', { keyPath: 'id' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('extensions')) {
              db.createObjectStore('extensions', { keyPath: 'extension' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('accounts')) {
              db.createObjectStore('accounts', { keyPath: 'id' });
            }
            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('metadata')) {
              db.createObjectStore('metadata', { keyPath: 'key' });
            }
          },
        });

        const entries = await db.getAll('entries');
        if (entries.length > 0) {
          miniSearch.addAll(entries);
          
          const extensions = await db.getAll('extensions');
          const accounts = await db.getAll('accounts');
          
          // Rebuild Fuse index
          const fuse = new Fuse(entries, FUSE_CONFIG);
          
          set((state) => {
            state.fuse = fuse as any;
            state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
            state.availableExtensions = extensions.map((e: any) => ({
              ...e,
              sources: new Set(e.sources || []),
              accounts: new Set(e.accounts || []),
            }));
            state.availableAccounts = accounts;
            state.indexedCount = entries.length;
            state.lastIndexUpdate = new Date();
          });
        } else {
          set((state) => {
            state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
          });
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to initialize search:', error);
        set((state) => {
          state.miniSearch = miniSearch;
        });
      }
    },

    setQuery: (query) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.query = query;
      });
      
      // Debounced search
      const { executeSearch } = get();
      clearTimeout((window as any).searchTimeout);
      (window as any).searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        executeSearch();
      }, 150);
    },

    executeSearch: () => {
      const { query, fuse, miniSearch, filters, boundPanels } = get();
      
      if (!query.trim() || (!fuse && !miniSearch)) {
        set((state) => {
          state.results = [];
          state.isSearching = false;
        });
        return;
      }

      set((state) => {
        state.isSearching = true;
      });

      let results: SearchResult[] = [];

      // Use MiniSearch for fast prefix/fuzzy matching
      if (miniSearch) {
        const miniResults = miniSearch.search(query, {
          boost: { name: 2, path: 1.5 },
          fuzzy: 0.2,
          prefix: true,
        });

        results = miniResults.map((r: any) => ({
          item: r as SearchIndexEntry,
          score: r.score,
          matches: [],
        }));
      }

      // Use Fuse for advanced fuzzy matching if MiniSearch results are insufficient
      if (fuse && results.length < 20) {
        const fuseResults = fuse.search(query);
        
        // Merge and deduplicate
        const existingIds = new Set(results.map(r => r.item.id));
        const additionalResults = fuseResults
          .filter(r => !existingIds.has(r.item.id))
          .map(r => ({
            item: r.item,
            score: r.score || 0,
            matches: (r.matches || []).map((m: any) => ({
              key: m.key,
              value: m.value,
              indices: m.indices,
            })),
          }));
        
        results = [...results, ...additionalResults];
      }

      // Apply filters
      results = results.filter(r => {
        const item = r.item;
        
        // Source filter
        if (!filters.sources.includes(item.sourceType)) return false;
        
        // Account filter
        if (filters.accounts.length > 0 && !filters.accounts.includes(item.accountId)) return false;
        
        // Extension filter
        if (filters.extensions.length > 0 && !filters.extensions.includes(item.extension)) return false;
        
        // Type filter
        if (filters.type !== 'all' && item.type !== filters.type) return false;
        
        // Size filter
        if (filters.minSize !== undefined && item.size < filters.minSize) return false;
        if (filters.maxSize !== undefined && item.size > filters.maxSize) return false;
        
        // Date filter
        if (filters.dateFrom && item.lastModified < filters.dateFrom) return false;
        if (filters.dateTo && item.lastModified > filters.dateTo) return false;
        
        // Hidden filter
        if (!filters.includeHidden && item.metadata?.isHidden) return false;
        
        return true;
      });

      // Apply boundPanels filter
      if (boundPanels.length > 0) {
        results = results.filter(r => {
          return boundPanels.some(bp => 
            bp.source === r.item.sourceType &&
            (bp.accountId === null || bp.accountId === r.item.accountId)
          );
        });
      }

      // Sort by score
      results.sort((a, b) => a.score - b.score);

      set((state) => {
        state.results = results.slice(0, 100); // Limit to top 100
        state.isSearching = false;
      });
    },

    toggleFilterPanel: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isFilterPanelOpen = !state.isFilterPanelOpen;
      });
    },

    setFilters: (newFilters) => {
      set((state) => {
        Object.assign(state.filters, newFilters);
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    resetFilters: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.filters = { ...DEFAULT_FILTERS };
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    toggleGlobalMode: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isGlobalMode = !state.isGlobalMode;
        if (state.isGlobalMode) {
          state.filters.sources = ['storage', 'drive', 'github', 'terminal'];
          state.filters.accounts = [];
        }
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    setBoundPanels: (panels) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.boundPanels = panels;
      });
      get().executeSearch();
    },

    addToIndex: async (entries) => {
      const { miniSearch } = get();
      
      // Add to search engines
      miniSearch?.addAll(entries);
      
      // Get all documents from MiniSearch for Fuse rebuild
      const allDocs = miniSearch 
        ? Array.from((miniSearch as any)._documentStore?.docs?.values() || [])
        : entries;
      
      // Rebuild Fuse index
      const newFuse = new Fuse(allDocs, FUSE_CONFIG);

      // Persist to IndexedDB
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('entries', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('entries');
      
      for (const entry of entries) {
        await store.put(entry);
      }
      
      await tx.done;

      // Update extension stats
      await get().updateExtensionStats(entries);

      set((state) => {
        state.fuse = newFuse as any;
        state.indexedCount = (state.indexedCount || 0) + entries.length;
        state.lastIndexUpdate = new Date();
      });
    },

    removeFromIndex: async (ids) => {
      const { miniSearch } = get();
      
      ids.forEach(id => miniSearch?.remove({ id }));
      
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('entries', 'readwrite');
      const store = tx.objectStore('entries');
      
      for (const id of ids) {
        await store.delete(id);
      }
      
      await tx.done;

      set((state) => {
        state.indexedCount = Math.max(0, (state.indexedCount || 0) - ids.length);
      });
    },

    clearIndex: async () => {
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      
      await db.clear('entries');
      await db.clear('extensions');
      await db.clear('accounts');
      
      set((state) => {
        state.fuse = null;
        state.miniSearch = null;
        state.availableExtensions = [];
        state.availableAccounts = [];
        state.indexedCount = 0;
        state.results = [];
      });
    },

    scanSourceForExtensions: async (sourceType, accountId, items) => {
      const extensionMap = new Map<string, ExtensionStats>();
      const accountSet = new Set<string>();

      const processItem = (item: any, path: string = '') => {
        const ext = item.name?.includes('.') 
          ? item.name.slice(item.name.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase()
          : '';
        
        if (ext) {
          const existing = extensionMap.get(ext);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += item.size || 0;
            existing.sources.add(sourceType);
            existing.accounts.add(accountId);
          } else {
            extensionMap.set(ext, {
              extension: ext,
              count: 1,
              totalSize: item.size || 0,
              sources: new Set([sourceType]),
              accounts: new Set([accountId]),
            });
          }
        }

        accountSet.add(accountId);

        // Process children
        if (item.children) {
          item.children.forEach((child: any) => 
            processItem(child, `${path}/${item.name}`)
          );
        }
      };

      items.forEach((item: any) => processItem(item));

      // Update store
      const extensions = Array.from(extensionMap.values());
      
      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction(['extensions', 'accounts'], 'readwrite');
      
      for (const ext of extensions) {
        const existing = await tx.objectStore('extensions').get(ext.extension);
        if (existing) {
          existing.count += ext.count;
          existing.totalSize += ext.totalSize;
          ext.sources.forEach(s => existing.sources.add(s));
          ext.accounts.forEach(a => existing.accounts.add(a));
          await tx.objectStore('extensions').put({
            ...existing,
            sources: Array.from(existing.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(existing.accounts),
          });
        } else {
          await tx.objectStore('extensions').put({
            ...ext,
            sources: Array.from(ext.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(ext.accounts),
          });
        }
      }

      // Add account
      await tx.objectStore('accounts').put({
        id: accountId,
        sourceType,
        name: accountId,
      });

      await tx.done;

      // Reload from DB
      const allExtensions = await db.getAll('extensions');
      const allAccounts = await db.getAll('accounts');

      set((state) => {
        state.availableExtensions = allExtensions.map((e: any) => ({
          ...e,
          sources: new Set(e.sources || []),
          accounts: new Set(e.accounts || []),
        }));
        state.availableAccounts = allAccounts;
      });
    },

    updateExtensionStats: async (entries: SearchIndexEntry[]) => {
      const extensionMap = new Map<string, ExtensionStats>();

      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.extension) {
          const existing = extensionMap.get(entry.extension);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += entry.size || 0;
            existing.sources.add(entry.sourceType);
            existing.accounts.add(entry.accountId);
          } else {
            extensionMap.set(entry.extension, {
              extension: entry.extension,
              count: 1,
              totalSize: entry.size || 0,
              sources: new Set([entry.sourceType]),
              accounts: new Set([entry.accountId]),
            });
          }
        }
      });

      const db = await openDB(DB_NAME, DB_VERSION);
      const tx = db.transaction('extensions', 'readwrite');

      for (const [ext, stats] of extensionMap) {
        const existing = await tx.store.get(ext);
        if (existing) {
          existing.count += stats.count;
          existing.totalSize += stats.totalSize;
          stats.sources.forEach(s => existing.sources.add(s));
          stats.accounts.forEach(a => existing.accounts.add(a));
          await tx.store.put({
            ...existing,
            sources: Array.from(existing.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(existing.accounts),
          });
        } else {
          await tx.store.put({
            ...stats,
            sources: Array.from(stats.sources),
            accounts: Array.from(stats.accounts),
          });
        }
      }

      await tx.done;
    },

    addRecentSearch: (query) => {
      if (!query.trim()) return;
      
      set((state) => {
        state.recentSearches = [
          query,
          ...state.recentSearches.filter(s => s !== query),
        ].slice(0, 10);
      });
    },

    clearRecentSearches: () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.recentSearches = [];
      });
    },

    getFilteredResults: () => {
      return get().results;
    },

    getExtensionSuggestions: (query) => {
      const { availableExtensions } = get();
      if (!query) return [];
      
      return availableExtensions.filter(e => 
        e.extension.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())
      ).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
    },

    getTopExtensions: (limit = 20) => {
      return get().availableExtensions
        .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
        .slice(0, limit);
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useSearchQuery = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.query);
export const useSearchResults = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.results);
export const useIsSearching = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isSearching);
export const useSearchFilters = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.filters);
export const useIsFilterPanelOpen = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isFilterPanelOpen);
export const useAvailableExtensions = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.availableExtensions);
export const useAvailableAccounts = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.availableAccounts);
export const useIsGlobalMode = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.isGlobalMode);
export const useRecentSearches = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.recentSearches);
export const useIndexedCount = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.indexedCount);
export const useBoundPanels = () => useSearchStore((s) => s.boundPanels);


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/terminalStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { 
  TerminalFileSystemEntry, 
  TerminalFile,
  TerminalViewMode,
  TerminalSortBy,
  TerminalPanelState 
} from '@/types/terminal';
import { webcontainerApi } from '@/lib/webcontainerApi';

interface TerminalStore extends TerminalPanelState {
  initialize: () => Promise<void>;
  shutdown: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateTo: (path: string) => Promise<void>;
  navigateBack: () => Promise<void>;
  navigateToRoot: () => Promise<void>;
  selectFile: (entry: TerminalFileSystemEntry | null) => Promise<void>;
  refreshCurrent: () => Promise<void>;
  setViewMode: (mode: TerminalViewMode) => void;
  setSortBy: (sort: TerminalSortBy) => void;
  getSortedEntries: () => TerminalFileSystemEntry[];
  getBreadcrumb: () => string[];
  canGoBack: () => boolean;
}

const createInitialState = (): TerminalPanelState => ({
  isInitialized: false,
  isBooting: false,
  bootProgress: 0,
  currentPath: '/',
  pathHistory: [],
  entries: [],
  viewMode: 'list',
  sortBy: 'name-asc',
  selectedFile: null,
  error: null,
  webcontainerInstance: null,
});

export const useTerminalStore = create<TerminalStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    initialize: async () => {
      const { isInitialized, isBooting } = get();
      if (isInitialized || isBooting) return;
      
      set((state) => {
        state.isBooting = true;
        state.bootProgress = 0;
        state.error = null;
      });

      try {
        const instance = await webcontainerApi.init();
        set((state) => {
          state.isInitialized = true;
          state.isBooting = false;
          state.bootProgress = 100;  // done instantly
          state.webcontainerInstance = instance;
        });
        await get().navigateTo('/');
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isBooting = false;
          state.bootProgress = 0;
        });
      }
    },

    shutdown: async () => {
      await webcontainerApi.shutdown();
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    navigateTo: async (path) => {
      const { currentPath, pathHistory } = get();
      set((state) => {
        state.isBooting = true;
        state.error = null;
        state.selectedFile = null;
      });
      try {
        const entries = await webcontainerApi.readDirectory(path);
        set((state) => {
          if (path !== currentPath) {
            state.pathHistory.push(currentPath);
          }
          state.currentPath = path;
          state.entries = entries;
          state.isBooting = false;
        });
      } catch (err) {
        set((state) => {
          state.error = (err as Error).message;
          state.isBooting = false;
        });
      }
    },

    navigateBack: async () => {
      const { pathHistory } = get();
      if (pathHistory.length === 0) {
        await get().navigateToRoot();
        return;
      }
      const previousPath = pathHistory[pathHistory.length - 1];
      set((state) => {
        state.pathHistory.pop();
        state.selectedFile = null;
      });
      await get().navigateTo(previousPath);
    },

    navigateToRoot: async () => {
      set((state) => {
        state.pathHistory = [];
        state.selectedFile = null;
      });
      await get().navigateTo('/');
    },

    selectFile: async (entry) => {
      if (!entry) {
        set((state) => { state.selectedFile = null; });
        return;
      }
      if (entry.type === 'directory') {
        await get().navigateTo(entry.path);
      } else {
        set((state) => { state.isBooting = true; });
        try {
          const content = await webcontainerApi.readFile(entry.path);
          const file: TerminalFile = {
            ...entry,
            type: 'file',
            content,
          };
          set((state) => {
            state.selectedFile = file;
            state.isBooting = false;
          });
        } catch (err) {
          set((state) => {
            state.error = (err as Error).message;
            state.isBooting = false;
          });
        }
      }
    },

    refreshCurrent: async () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      await get().navigateTo(currentPath);
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => { state.viewMode = mode; });
    },

    setSortBy: (sort) => {
      set((state) => { state.sortBy = sort; });
    },

    getSortedEntries: () => {
      const { entries, sortBy } = get();
      const sorted = [...entries];
      switch (sortBy) {
        case 'name-asc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
        case 'name-desc':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
        case 'date':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified.getTime() - a.lastModified.getTime());
        case 'size':
          return sorted.sort((a, b) => b.size - a.size);
        default:
          return sorted;
      }
    },

    getBreadcrumb: () => {
      const { currentPath } = get();
      if (currentPath === '/') return ['root'];
      return ['root', ...currentPath.split('/').filter(Boolean)];
    },

    canGoBack: () => {
      const { pathHistory, currentPath } = get();
      return pathHistory.length > 0 || currentPath !== '/';
    },
  }))
);

// Selectors
export const useTerminalInitialized = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.isInitialized);
export const useTerminalBooting = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.isBooting);
export const useTerminalBootProgress = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.bootProgress);
export const useTerminalCurrentPath = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.currentPath);
export const useTerminalEntries = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.getSortedEntries());
export const useTerminalViewMode = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.viewMode);
export const useTerminalSortBy = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.sortBy);
export const useTerminalSelectedFile = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.selectedFile);
export const useTerminalError = () => useTerminalStore((s) => s.error);


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/stores/treeStore.ts =====

import { create } from 'zustand';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import { TreeViewState, TreeNode, TreeStats, NodeProperties } from '@/types/tree';

interface TreeStore extends TreeViewState {
  // Actions
  openTree: (node: TreeNode) => void;
  closeTree: () => void;
  toggleNode: (nodeId: string) => void;
  expandAll: () => void;
  collapseAll: () => void;
  expandToNode: (nodeId: string) => void;
  setViewMode: (mode: TreeViewState['viewMode']) => void;
  setSearchQuery: (query: string) => void;
  updateNodeProperties: (nodeId: string, properties: Partial<NodeProperties>) => void;
  selectNode: (node: TreeNode) => void;
  calculateStats: () => TreeStats;
  exportToTxt: () => string;
  exportToPdf: () => Promise<Blob>;
  copyToClipboard: (type: 'properties' | 'tree' | 'both') => Promise<void>;
}

const createInitialState = (): TreeViewState => ({
  isOpen: false,
  selectedNode: null,
  rootNode: null,
  expandedNodes: new Set(),
  viewMode: 'hierarchy',
  searchQuery: '',
  isLoading: false,
  error: null,
  exportFormat: null,
});

export const useTreeStore = create<TreeStore>()(
  immer((set, get) => ({
    ...createInitialState(),

    openTree: (node) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.isOpen = true;
        state.selectedNode = node;
        state.rootNode = node;
        state.expandedNodes = new Set([node.id]);
      });
    },

    closeTree: () => {
      set(createInitialState());
    },

    toggleNode: (nodeId) => {
      set((state) => {
        if (state.expandedNodes.has(nodeId)) {
          state.expandedNodes.delete(nodeId);
        } else {
          state.expandedNodes.add(nodeId);
        }
      });
    },

    expandAll: () => {
      const { rootNode } = get();
      if (!rootNode) return;

      const allIds = new Set<string>();
      const collectIds = (node: TreeNode) => {
        allIds.add(node.id);
        node.children?.forEach(collectIds);
      };
      collectIds(rootNode);

      set((state) => {
        state.expandedNodes = allIds;
      });
    },

    collapseAll: () => {
      const { rootNode } = get();
      if (!rootNode) return;

      set((state) => {
        state.expandedNodes = new Set([rootNode.id]);
      });
    },

    expandToNode: (nodeId) => {
      set((state) => {
        // Expand all parents of the target node
        let current = state.selectedNode;
        while (current?.parent) {
          state.expandedNodes.add(current.parent.id);
          current = current.parent;
        }
        state.expandedNodes.add(nodeId);
      });
    },

    setViewMode: (mode) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.viewMode = mode;
      });
    },

    setSearchQuery: (query) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.searchQuery = query;
      });
    },

    updateNodeProperties: (nodeId, properties) => {
      set((state) => {
        const updateNode = (node: TreeNode): boolean => {
          if (node.id === nodeId) {
            node.properties = { ...node.properties, ...properties };
            return true;
          }
          return node.children?.some(updateNode) || false;
        };
        if (state.rootNode) updateNode(state.rootNode);
      });
    },

    selectNode: (node) => {
      set((state) => {
        state.selectedNode = node;
      });
    },

    calculateStats: () => {
      const { rootNode } = get();
      if (!rootNode) {
        return {
          totalFiles: 0,
          totalDirectories: 0,
          totalSize: 0,
          maxDepth: 0,
          averageFileSize: 0,
        };
      }

      let totalFiles = 0;
      let totalDirectories = 0;
      let totalSize = 0;
      let maxDepth = 0;
      const fileSizes: number[] = [];

      const traverse = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
        maxDepth = Math.max(maxDepth, depth);
        
        if (node.type === 'file') {
          totalFiles++;
          totalSize += node.size;
          fileSizes.push(node.size);
        } else if (node.type === 'directory') {
          totalDirectories++;
        }

        node.children?.forEach(child => traverse(child, depth + 1));
      };

      traverse(rootNode, 0);

      return {
        totalFiles,
        totalDirectories,
        totalSize,
        maxDepth,
        averageFileSize: fileSizes.length > 0 
          ? fileSizes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / fileSizes.length 
          : 0,
      };
    },

    exportToTxt: () => {
      const { rootNode, selectedNode } = get();
      const targetNode = selectedNode || rootNode;
      if (!targetNode) return '';

      let output = '';
      output += `TREE STRUCTURE REPORT\n`;
      output += `=====================\n\n`;
      output += `Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}\n`;
      output += `Root: ${targetNode.name}\n`;
      output += `Path: ${targetNode.path}\n\n`;

      const buildTree = (node: TreeNode, prefix: string, isLast: boolean) => {
        const connector = isLast ? 'ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ ' : 'Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ ';
        const line = prefix + connector + node.name;
        output += line + '\n';

        if (node.children) {
          const newPrefix = prefix + (isLast ? '    ' : 'Ōöé   ');
          node.children.forEach((child, index) => {
            buildTree(child, newPrefix, index === node.children!.length - 1);
          });
        }
      };

      if (targetNode.children) {
        targetNode.children.forEach((child, index) => {
          buildTree(child, '', index === targetNode.children!.length - 1);
        });
      }

      // Add properties section
      output += `\n\nPROPERTIES\n`;
      output += `==========\n`;
      output += formatProperties(targetNode.properties);

      return output;
    },

    exportToPdf: async () => {
      const { jsPDF } = await import('jspdf');
      const { rootNode, selectedNode } = get();
      const targetNode = selectedNode || rootNode;
      
      if (!targetNode) throw new Error('No node selected');

      const doc = new jsPDF();
      
      // Title
      doc.setFontSize(20);
      doc.text('Tree Structure Report', 14, 20);
      
      // Metadata
      doc.setFontSize(10);
      doc.text(`Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}`, 14, 30);
      doc.text(`Root: ${targetNode.name}`, 14, 36);
      doc.text(`Path: ${targetNode.path}`, 14, 42);

      // Tree table
      const tableData: string[][] = [];
      const buildTableData = (node: TreeNode, depth: number) => {
        const indent = '  '.repeat(depth);
        tableData.push([
          indent + node.name,
          node.type,
          formatBytes(node.size),
          node.lastModified.toLocaleDateString(),
        ]);

        node.children?.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, depth + 1));
      };

      if (targetNode.children) {
        targetNode.children.forEach(child => buildTableData(child, 0));
      }

      // @ts-ignore - jspdf-autotable
      doc.autoTable({
        startY: 50,
        head: [['Name', 'Type', 'Size', 'Modified']],
        body: tableData,
        styles: { fontSize: 8, cellPadding: 2 },
        headStyles: { fillColor: [66, 139, 202] },
      });

      // Properties section
      const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable?.finalY || 50;
      doc.setFontSize(12);
      doc.text('Properties', 14, finalY + 10);

      const props = formatPropertiesForPdf(targetNode.properties);
      // @ts-ignore
      doc.autoTable({
        startY: finalY + 15,
        body: props,
        styles: { fontSize: 8 },
      });

      return doc.output('blob');
    },

    copyToClipboard: async (type) => {
      const { exportToTxt, selectedNode, rootNode } = get();
      const targetNode = selectedNode || rootNode;
      if (!targetNode) return;

      let text = '';

      switch (type) {
        case 'properties':
          text = formatProperties(targetNode.properties);
          break;
        case 'tree':
          text = exportToTxt();
          break;
        case 'both':
          text = exportToTxt();
          break;
      }

      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    },
  }))
);

// Helper functions
function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes === 0) return '-';
  const units = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
  let size = bytes;
  let unitIndex = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && unitIndex < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    unitIndex++;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[unitIndex]}`;
}

function formatProperties(props: NodeProperties): string {
  let output = '';
  if (props.mountPath) output += `Mount Path: ${props.mountPath}\n`;
  if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) output += `Used Space: ${formatBytes(props.usedSpace)}\n`;
  if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) output += `Free Space: ${formatBytes(props.freeSpace)}\n`;
  if (props.totalSpace !== undefined) output += `Total Space: ${formatBytes(props.totalSpace)}\n`;
  if (props.fileSystemType) output += `File System: ${props.fileSystemType}\n`;
  if (props.label) output += `Label: ${props.label}\n`;
  if (props.createdAt) output += `Created: ${props.createdAt.toLocaleString()}\n`;
  if (props.modifiedAt) output += `Modified: ${props.modifiedAt.toLocaleString()}\n`;
  if (props.accessedAt) output += `Accessed: ${props.accessedAt.toLocaleString()}\n`;
  if (props.permissions) output += `Permissions: ${props.permissions}\n`;
  if (props.owner) output += `Owner: ${props.owner}\n`;
  if (props.group) output += `Group: ${props.group}\n`;
  if (props.mimeType) output += `MIME Type: ${props.mimeType}\n`;
  if (props.isHidden !== undefined) output += `Hidden: ${props.isHidden}\n`;
  if (props.isReadOnly !== undefined) output += `Read Only: ${props.isReadOnly}\n`;
  if (props.isSystem !== undefined) output += `System: ${props.isSystem}\n`;
  if (props.linkTarget) output += `Link Target: ${props.linkTarget}\n`;
  if (props.checksum) output += `Checksum: ${props.checksum}\n`;
  if (props.version) output += `Version: ${props.version}\n`;
  if (props.tags?.length) output += `Tags: ${props.tags.join(', ')}\n`;
  return output;
}

function formatPropertiesForPdf(props: NodeProperties): string[][] {
  const result: string[][] = [];
  if (props.mountPath) result.push(['Mount Path', props.mountPath]);
  if (props.usedSpace !== undefined) result.push(['Used Space', formatBytes(props.usedSpace)]);
  if (props.freeSpace !== undefined) result.push(['Free Space', formatBytes(props.freeSpace)]);
  if (props.totalSpace !== undefined) result.push(['Total Space', formatBytes(props.totalSpace)]);
  if (props.fileSystemType) result.push(['File System', props.fileSystemType]);
  if (props.label) result.push(['Label', props.label]);
  if (props.createdAt) result.push(['Created', props.createdAt.toLocaleString()]);
  if (props.modifiedAt) result.push(['Modified', props.modifiedAt.toLocaleString()]);
  if (props.permissions) result.push(['Permissions', props.permissions]);
  if (props.owner) result.push(['Owner', props.owner]);
  return result;
}

import { FileSystemEntry } from './filesystem';
import { DriveFile } from './drive';

export type SourceType = 'storage' | 'drive' | 'github' | 'terminal';

export type DragItem = 
  | { type: 'storage'; item: FileSystemEntry; panelId: string }
  | { type: 'drive'; item: DriveFile; panelId: string }
  | { type: 'github'; item: GitHubContent; panelId: string }
  | { type: 'terminal'; item: TerminalFileSystemEntry; panelId: string };

export interface SelectedItem {
  parentHandle?: any;
  id: string;
  sourceType: SourceType;
  item: any;
  panelId: string;
}

export interface DragDropState {
  isDragging: boolean;
  isDragMode: boolean;
  selectedItems: SelectedItem[];
  dragSourcePanel: string | null;
  dragImagePosition: { x: number; y: number } | null;
  pendingOperation: 'copy' | 'move' | null;
  targetPanel: string | null;
  showConfirmDialog: boolean;
}

export interface DragDropActions {
  enterDragMode: (panelId: string) => void;
  exitDragMode: () => void;
  toggleSelection: (item: SelectedItem) => void;
  clearSelection: () => void;
  selectAll: (items: SelectedItem[]) => void;
  startDrag: (panelId: string, position: { x: number; y: number }) => void;
  endDrag: () => void;
  setDragImagePosition: (position: { x: number; y: number }) => void;
  setTargetPanel: (panelId: string | null) => void;
  showConfirm: (operation: 'copy' | 'move') => void;
  hideConfirm: () => void;
  confirmOperation: () => void;
  cancelOperation: () => void;
}

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/types/filesystem.ts =====

// File System Access API Types
// Abstraction layer for easy backend swap later

export interface FileSystemEntry {
  name: string;
  kind: 'file' | 'directory';
  size: number;
  lastModified: Date;
  handle: FileSystemFileHandle | FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
  path?: string; // Optional path for backend navigation (Termux/Android) - CRITICAL for grid navigation
  
  // Extended metadata from Termux (max metadata)
  permissions?: string;        // rwxrwxrwx format
  owner?: string;              // UID or username
  group?: string;              // GID or groupname
  isSymlink?: boolean;         // Is this a symlink
  symlinkTarget?: string | null; // Target if symlink
  isHidden?: boolean;          // Hidden file (starts with .)
  mimeType?: string;           // MIME type detection
  createdAt?: Date;            // Birth time
  accessedAt?: Date;           // Last access time
  inode?: number;              // Inode number
  hardLinks?: number;          // Number of hard links
  blocks?: number;             // Blocks allocated
  blockSize?: number;          // Block size
}

export interface FileSystemFileEntry extends FileSystemEntry {
  kind: 'file';
  handle: FileSystemFileHandle;
}

export interface FileSystemDirectoryEntry extends FileSystemEntry {
  kind: 'directory';
  handle: FileSystemDirectoryHandle;
}

export const CONVERSION_RULES: ConversionRule[] = [
  // Document conversions
  { from: ['.docx', '.doc'], to: '.txt', engine: 'mammoth', description: 'Word to Text' },
  { from: ['.docx', '.doc'], to: '.html', engine: 'mammoth', description: 'Word to HTML' },
  
  // Image conversions (via Sharp WASM or canvas)
  { from: ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp', '.gif', '.bmp'], to: '.png', engine: 'sharp', description: 'To PNG' },
  { from: ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp', '.gif', '.bmp'], to: '.jpg', engine: 'sharp', description: 'To JPEG' },
  { from: ['.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.webp', '.gif', '.bmp'], to: '.webp', engine: 'sharp', description: 'To WebP' },
  
  // Video/Audio conversions (via FFmpeg WASM)
  { from: ['.mp4', '.avi', '.mov', '.mkv', '.webm'], to: '.mp4', engine: 'ffmpeg', description: 'To MP4' },
  { from: ['.mp4', '.avi', '.mov', '.mkv', '.webm'], to: '.webm', engine: 'ffmpeg', description: 'To WebM' },
  { from: ['.mp3', '.wav', '.aac', '.ogg', '.flac'], to: '.mp3', engine: 'ffmpeg', description: 'To MP3' },
  
  // Archive conversions
  { from: ['.folder'], to: '.zip', engine: 'jszip', description: 'Folder to ZIP' },
];
