===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/workers/extensionScanner.worker.ts =====

import { expose } from 'comlink';

interface ScanResult {
  extensions: Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>;
  totalFiles: number;
  totalSize: number;
}

class ExtensionScanner {
  async scan(items: any[]): Promise<ScanResult> {
    const extensions = new Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>();
    let totalFiles = 0;
    let totalSize = 0;

    const processItem = (item: any) => {
      const ext = this.getExtension(item.name);
      
      if (item.type === 'file' || item.kind === 'file') {
        totalFiles++;
        totalSize += item.size || 0;

        if (ext) {
          const existing = extensions.get(ext);
          if (existing) {
            existing.count++;
            existing.totalSize += item.size || 0;
          } else {
            extensions.set(ext, {
              count: 1,
              totalSize: item.size || 0,
            });
          }
        }
      }

      // Recursively process children
      if (item.children) {
        item.children.forEach(processItem);
      }
    };

    items.forEach(processItem);

    return {
      extensions,
      totalFiles,
      totalSize,
    };
  }

  private getExtension(filename: string): string | null {
    if (!filename || !filename.includes('.')) return null;
    const ext = filename.slice(filename.lastIndexOf('.')).toLowerCase();
    return ext.length > 1 ? ext : null;
  }

  async incrementalScan(
    existingExtensions: Map<string, { count: number; totalSize: number }>,
    newItems: any[]
  ): Promise<ScanResult> {
    const result = await this.scan(newItems);
    
    // Merge with existing
    for (const [ext, stats] of result.extensions) {
      const existing = existingExtensions.get(ext);
      if (existing) {
        existing.count += stats.count;
        existing.totalSize += stats.totalSize;
      } else {
        existingExtensions.set(ext, stats);
      }
    }

    return {
      extensions: existingExtensions,
      totalFiles: result.totalFiles,
      totalSize: result.totalSize,
    };
  }
}

expose(ExtensionScanner);

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/workers/compression.worker.ts =====

import { expose } from 'comlink';
import { ZipWriter, BlobWriter, BlobReader } from '@zip.js/zip.js';
import * as fflate from 'fflate';

interface CompressionTask {
  item: any;
  profile: {
    format: string;
    compressionLevel: string;
    password?: string;
  };
  outputDir: string;
}

async function compress(task: CompressionTask, onProgress: (progress: number) => void): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  const { item, profile } = task;
  
  // Initialize based on format
  switch (profile.format) {
    case 'zip':
      return await compressZip(item, profile, onProgress);
    case 'tar.gz':
    case 'tar.bz2':
      return await compressTar(item, profile, onProgress);
    default:
      throw new Error(`Format ${profile.format} not yet supported`);
  }
}

async function compressZip(
  item: any, 
  profile: any, 
  onProgress: (p: number) => void
): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  const zipWriter = new ZipWriter(new BlobWriter('application/zip'), {
    level: getCompressionLevel(profile.compressionLevel),
    password: profile.password,
  });

  // Add files to zip
  // This is a simplified version - actual implementation would traverse and add all files
  
  const blob = await zipWriter.close();
  const arrayBuffer = await blob.arrayBuffer();
  
  // Calculate checksum
  const checksum = await calculateChecksum(arrayBuffer);
  
  onProgress(100);
  
  return {
    size: blob.size,
    checksum,
  };
}

async function compressTar(
  item: any,
  profile: any,
  onProgress: (p: number) => void
): Promise<{ size: number; checksum: string }> {
  // Use fflate for gzip/bzip2 compression
  const compression = profile.format === 'tar.gz' ? fflate.gzipSync : fflate.strToU8;
  const level = getCompressionLevel(profile.compressionLevel);
  
  // Build tar archive then compress
  // Simplified implementation
  
  onProgress(100);
  
  return {
    size: 0,
    checksum: '',
  };
}

function getCompressionLevel(level: string): number {
  switch (level) {
    case 'store': return 0;
    case 'fast': return 3;
    case 'normal': return 6;
    case 'maximum': return 9;
    default: return 6;
  }
}

async function calculateChecksum(data: ArrayBuffer): Promise<string> {
  const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', data);
  const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));
  return hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
}

// Web Worker message handler
self.onmessage = async (e) => {
  const { item, profile, outputDir } = e.data as CompressionTask;
  
  try {
    const result = await compress(
      { item, profile, outputDir },
      (progress) => {
        self.postMessage({ type: 'progress', progress });
      }
    );
    
    self.postMessage({ type: 'complete', result });
  } catch (error) {
    self.postMessage({ type: 'error', error: (error as Error).message });
  }
};

export {};

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/App.tsx =====

import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { DndProvider } from 'react-dnd';
import { HTML5Backend } from 'react-dnd-html5-backend';
import { GoogleOAuthProvider } from '@react-oauth/google';
import { MainApp } from './MainApp';
import { AdminPanel } from './components/Admin/AdminPanel';
import { NotificationBell } from './components/Notification/NotificationBell';
import { LiveLogPanel } from './components/Log/LiveLogPanel';
import { DragDropProvider } from './components/DragDrop/DragDropProvider';
import { handleCallback } from './lib/googleAuth';
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useDriveStore } from './stores/driveStore';

const GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID = (import.meta as any).env?.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || 'dummy-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com';

function App() {
  const [isRestoring, setIsRestoring] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const init = async () => {
      // Check if we have a code in URL (OAuth callback)
      const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const code = urlParams.get('code');
      if (code) {
        try {
          await handleCallback();
        } catch (err) {
          console.error('OAuth callback failed:', err);
        }
      }
      await useDriveStore.getState().restoreToken();
      setIsRestoring(false);
    };
    init();
  }, []);

  if (isRestoring) {
    return <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-screen">Loading...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <GoogleOAuthProvider clientId={GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}>
      <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
        <BrowserRouter>
          <DragDropProvider>
            <Routes>
              <Route path="/" element={<MainApp />} />
              <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
              <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
            </Routes>
            <NotificationBell />
            <LiveLogPanel />
          </DragDropProvider>
        </BrowserRouter>
      </DndProvider>
    </GoogleOAuthProvider>
  );
}

export default App;


===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/src/App.tsx.backup =====

import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { MainApp } from './MainApp';
import { AdminPanel } from './components/Admin/AdminPanel';
import { NotificationBell } from './components/Notification/NotificationBell';
import { LiveLogPanel } from './components/Log/LiveLogPanel';
import { useLogStore } from './stores/logStore';

function App() {
  // Initialize logging
  useEffect(() => {
    const { logAction } = useLogStore.getState();
    
    // Log app start
    logAction('app_start', {
      userAgent: navigator.userAgent,
      platform: navigator.platform,
    }, 'system');

    // Setup global error handler
    window.onerror = (message, source, lineno, colno, error) => {
      logAction('uncaught_error', {
        message,
        source,
        lineno,
        colno,
        stack: error?.stack,
      }, 'system');
      return false;
    };

    // Setup unhandled promise rejection handler
    window.onunhandledrejection = (event) => {
      logAction('unhandled_rejection', {
        reason: event.reason?.toString(),
      }, 'system');
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<MainApp />} />
        <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
        <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
      </Routes>
      
      {/* Global overlays */}
      <NotificationBell />
      <LiveLogPanel />
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

export default App;

export function MainApp() {
  const toggleLiveLog = useLogStore((s) => s.toggleLiveLog);
  const { currentUser } = useAuthStore();
  const { forceLogout } = useLiveLogout();
  const openPromptManager = usePromptStore((s) => s.openPromptManager);
  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
  const [showLanguageSettings, setShowLanguageSettings] = useState(false);

    <DragDropProvider>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden bg-background flex">

              )}

                <FileText className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Prompt Manager
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowLanguageSettings(true)}>
                <Languages className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Language
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}>
                <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Settings
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={toggleLiveLog}>
                <Bell className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Live Log
              </Button>
              <Link to="/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
                  <Settings className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Admin
                </Button>
              </Link>
              {currentUser && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={forceLogout}>
                  <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Logout
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* NEW Panel Container - All 4 panels with new design */}
          <NewPanelContainer />
        </div>
      </div>
      
      {/* Global Components */}
      <DragModeIndicator />
      <DFOLModeIndicator />
      <NotificationPanel />
      <GlobalSearchOverlay />
      <NotificationCenter />
      <KeepReplaceDialog />
      <TreeViewModal isOpen={false} onClose={() => {}} rootNode={null} />
      <ProfilePanel />
      <ExecutePanel />
      <SettingsPanel isOpen={showSettings} onClose={() => setShowSettings(false)} />
      <LanguageSettings isOpen={showLanguageSettings} onClose={() => setShowLanguageSettings(false)} onLanguageChange={() => {}} />
      <PromptManagerPage />
    </DragDropProvider>
  );
}

        <div class="form-group"><label>Global Action Password (Format)</label><input type="password" id="globalFormatPassword" placeholder="Set global format password"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Global Action Password (DFOL)</label><input type="password" id="globalDfolPassword" placeholder="Set global DFOL password"></div>

    <div class="modal-content">
        <h3 style="margin-bottom:16px">Create New User</h3>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Username</label><input id="newUsername" placeholder="username"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Login Password</label><input type="password" id="newLoginPassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Delete Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newDeletePassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>Format Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newFormatPassword"></div>
        <div class="form-group"><label>DFOL Password (optional)</label><input type="password" id="newDfolPassword"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:flex-end"><button class="secondary" id="cancelAddUser">Cancel</button><button id="confirmAddUser">Create</button></div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
    let users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_users') || '[{"id":"1","username":"admin","role":"admin","deletePassword":"admin123","formatPassword":"admin123","dfolPassword":"admin123"}]');
    let sessions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_sessions') || '[]');
    let logs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('authority_logs') || '[]');
    function saveAll() { localStorage.setItem('authority_users', JSON.stringify(users)); localStorage.setItem('authority_sessions', JSON.stringify(sessions)); localStorage.setItem('authority_logs', JSON.stringify(logs)); }
    function renderUsers() {
        document.getElementById('usersTable').innerHTML = users.map(u => `<tr><td>${u.username}</td><td>${u.role}</td><td>${u.deletePassword ? 'ŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅ' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.formatPassword ? 'ŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅ' : 'Not set'}</td><td>${u.dfolPassword ? 'ŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅŌŚÅ' : 'Not set'}</td><td class="action-buttons"><button class="secondary" onclick="editUser('${u.id}')">Edit</button><button class="danger" onclick="deleteUser('${u.id}')">Delete</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('totalUsers').innerText = users.length;
    }
    function renderSessions() {
        document.getElementById('sessionsTable').innerHTML = sessions.map(s => `<tr><td>${s.username}</td><td>${s.sessionId.substring(0,8)}...</td><td>${new Date(s.startTime).toLocaleString()}</td><td>${s.logs?.length || 0}</td><td><button class="secondary" onclick="viewSessionLogs('${s.sessionId}')">View Logs</button></td></tr>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('activeSessions').innerText = sessions.length;
    }
    function renderLogs(filterUser='', filterLevel='') {
        let filtered = logs;
        if(filterUser) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.username === filterUser);
        if(filterLevel) filtered = filtered.filter(l => l.level === filterLevel);
        const viewer = document.getElementById('logViewer');
        if(filtered.length === 0) { viewer.innerText = 'No logs to display.'; return; }
        viewer.innerText = filtered.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] [${l.level.toUpperCase()}] [${l.username}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
        document.getElementById('totalLogs').innerText = logs.length;
    }
    function populateUserFilter() {
        const select = document.getElementById('logUserFilter');
        const uniqueUsers = [...new Set(logs.map(l => l.username).filter(Boolean))];
        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">All Users</option>' + uniqueUsers.map(u => `<option value="${u}">${u}</option>`).join('');
    }
    window.receiveSessionLog = (sessionData) => {
        sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.sessionId !== sessionData.sessionId);
        sessions.push(sessionData);
        logs.push(...sessionData.logs);
        saveAll();
        renderSessions();
        populateUserFilter();
        renderLogs();
    };
    window.editUser = (id) => {
        const user = users.find(u => u.id === id);
        if(!user) return;
        const newDelete = prompt('New delete password (leave empty to keep)', user.deletePassword);
        const newFormat = prompt('New format password', user.formatPassword);
        const newDfol = prompt('New DFOL password', user.dfolPassword);
        if(newDelete !== null) user.deletePassword = newDelete || '';
        if(newFormat !== null) user.formatPassword = newFormat || '';
        if(newDfol !== null) user.dfolPassword = newDfol || '';
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
    };
    window.deleteUser = (id) => {
        if(confirm('Delete user? This will also delete all sessions and logs for this user.')) {
            users = users.filter(u => u.id !== id);
            sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.userId !== id);
            logs = logs.filter(l => l.userId !== id);
            saveAll();
            renderUsers();
            renderSessions();
            populateUserFilter();
            renderLogs();
        }
    };
    window.viewSessionLogs = (sessionId) => {
        const session = sessions.find(s => s.sessionId === sessionId);
        if(session && session.logs) {
            document.getElementById('logViewer').innerText = session.logs.map(l => `[${new Date(l.timestamp).toISOString()}] ${l.action} - ${JSON.stringify(l.details)}`).join('\n');
            document.querySelector('.tab-btn[data-tab="logs"]').click();
        }
    };
    document.getElementById('addUserBtn').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('cancelAddUser').onclick = () => document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('confirmAddUser').onclick = () => {
        const username = document.getElementById('newUsername').value.trim();
        const loginPass = document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value;
        if(!username || !loginPass) { alert('Username and login password required'); return; }
        users.push({ id: Date.now().toString(), username, role: 'user', deletePassword: document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value, formatPassword: document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value, dfolPassword: document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value });
        saveAll();
        renderUsers();
        document.getElementById('addUserModal').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('newUsername').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newLoginPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDeletePassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newFormatPassword').value = '';
        document.getElementById('newDfolPassword').value = '';
    };
    document.getElementById('saveSecuritySettings').onclick = () => {
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_delete', document.getElementById('globalDeletePassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_format', document.getElementById('globalFormatPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_global_dfol', document.getElementById('globalDfolPassword').value);
        localStorage.setItem('authority_log_retention', document.getElementById('logRetention').value);
        alert('Security settings saved');
    };
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.onclick = () => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(tc => tc.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(`tab-${btn.dataset.tab}`).classList.add('active');
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'logs') renderLogs();
            if(btn.dataset.tab === 'sessions') renderSessions();
        };
    });
    document.getElementById('refreshLogsBtn').onclick = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('exportLogsBtn').onclick = () => {
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(logs, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = url;
        a.download = `authority_logs_${Date.now()}.json`;
        a.click();
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    };
    document.getElementById('logUserFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').onchange = () => renderLogs(document.getElementById('logUserFilter').value, document.getElementById('logLevelFilter').value);
    renderUsers();
    renderSessions();
    populateUserFilter();
    renderLogs();
    console.log('Authority Panel ready. Listen on port 3001');
</script>
</body>
</html>

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/auto-setup.js =====

// auto-setup.js
import { execSync, spawn } from 'child_process';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url';

const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const packageJsonPath = path.join(__dirname, 'package.json');
const nodeModulesPath = path.join(__dirname, 'node_modules');

// Read package.json
const packageJson = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(packageJsonPath, 'utf8'));
const requiredDeps = {
  ...packageJson.dependencies,
  ...packageJson.devDependencies,
};

// Check which dependencies are missing
const missing = [];
for (const dep in requiredDeps) {
  const depPath = path.join(nodeModulesPath, dep);
  if (!fs.existsSync(depPath)) {
    missing.push(`${dep}@${requiredDeps[dep]}`);
  }
}

if (missing.length > 0) {
  console.log('\x1b[33m%s\x1b[0m', 'ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ  Missing dependencies detected. Installing...');
  console.log('Missing:', missing.map(m => m.split('@')[0]).join(', '));
  try {
    execSync(`npm install ${missing.join(' ')} --legacy-peer-deps`, { stdio: 'inherit' });
    console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', 'Ō£ģ All dependencies installed successfully.');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('\x1b[31m%s\x1b[0m', 'ŌØī Failed to install dependencies:', error.message);
    process.exit(1);
  }
} else {
  console.log('\x1b[32m%s\x1b[0m', 'Ō£ģ All dependencies are already installed.');
}

// Start Vite directly (NOT npm run dev again)
console.log('\x1b[36m%s\x1b[0m', '­¤ÜĆ Starting development server...');
const vite = spawn('npx', ['vite', '--host', '0.0.0.0'], { 
  stdio: 'inherit', 
  shell: true 
});

vite.on('close', (code) => {
  process.exit(code);
});

===== FILE: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/ufe/server.js =====

import { createServer } from 'http';
import { readdir, readFile, stat, realpath, lstat, mkdir, writeFile } from 'fs/promises';
import { join, resolve, normalize, dirname } from 'path';
import crypto from 'crypto';

const PORT = 3001;

const ALLOWED_ROOTS = [
  '/data/data/com.termux',
  '/storage/emulated/0'
];

console.log('[Server] Allowed roots:', ALLOWED_ROOTS);

const CLIENT_ID = process.env.VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID || '';
const CLIENT_SECRET = process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET || '';
const REDIRECT_URI = process.env.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI || 'http://localhost:5173/auth/callback';
const codeVerifiers = new Map();

async function parseBody(req) {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    let body = '';
    req.on('data', chunk => body += chunk);
    req.on('end', () => {
      try { resolve(body ? JSON.parse(body) : {}); } 
      catch (err) { reject(err); }
    });
    req.on('error', reject);
  });
}

/**
 * HARDCODED PATH REDIRECTS: Virtual paths that redirect to actual paths
 */
const PATH_REDIRECTS = {
  '/data/data/com.termux/bin': '/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin'
};

function resolveVirtualPath(inputPath) {
  console.log('[Resolve] Input:', inputPath);
  let normalized = normalize(inputPath);
  
  if (PATH_REDIRECTS[normalized]) {
    const redirected = PATH_REDIRECTS[normalized];
    console.log('[Resolve] Redirect:', normalized, 'ŌåÆ', redirected);
    return redirected;
  }
  
  if (normalized === '/' || normalized === '') return '/data/data/com.termux';
  if (normalized.startsWith('/storage/internal')) return normalized.replace('/storage/internal', '/storage/emulated/0');
  if (normalized.startsWith('/terminal/termux/files')) return normalized.replace('/terminal/termux/files', '/data/data/com.termux/files');
  if (normalized.startsWith('/terminal/termux')) return normalized.replace('/terminal/termux', '/data/data/com.termux');
  if (normalized === '/terminal') return '/data/data/com.termux';
  
  if (PATH_REDIRECTS[normalized]) {
    console.log('[Resolve] Post-normalize redirect:', normalized, 'ŌåÆ', PATH_REDIRECTS[normalized]);
    return PATH_REDIRECTS[normalized];
  }
  
  return normalized;
}

async function isPathAllowed(requestedPath) {
  if (!requestedPath || requestedPath === '/') return true;
  let real;
  try { real = await realpath(requestedPath); } 
  catch (err) { real = resolve(requestedPath); }
  console.log('[Security] Checking:', requestedPath, 'ŌåÆ real:', real);
  for (const root of ALLOWED_ROOTS) {
    const resolvedRoot = resolve(root);
    if (real === resolvedRoot || real.startsWith(resolvedRoot + '/')) {
      console.log('[Security] Allowed by root:', resolvedRoot);
      return true;
    }
  }
  console.log('[Security] Denied:', real);
  return false;
}

async function normalizePathForResponse(p) {
  const resolved = resolve(p);
  if (!(await isPathAllowed(resolved))) {
    throw new Error(`Access denied for path: ${p} (resolved: ${resolved})`);
  }
  return resolved;
}

/**
 * Get REAL file metadata (size, dates, permissions)
 */
async function getRealFileStats(entryPath) {
  try {
    // Try real stat first (follows symlinks)
    const stats = await stat(entryPath);
    const lstats = await lstat(entryPath).catch(() => stats);
    
    return {
      size: stats.size,
      lastModified: stats.mtime,
      createdAt: stats.birthtime || stats.ctime,
      accessedAt: stats.atime,
      isSymlink: lstats.isSymbolicLink(),
      mode: stats.mode,
      permissions: formatPermissions(stats.mode),
      uid: stats.uid,
      gid: stats.gid,
      inode: stats.ino,
      hardLinks: stats.nlink,
      blocks: stats.blocks,
      blockSize: stats.blksize
    };
  } catch (err) {
    // Fallback for broken symlinks or permission errors
    try {
      const lstats = await lstat(entryPath);
      return {
        size: 0,
        lastModified: lstats.mtime,
        createdAt: lstats.birthtime || lstats.ctime,
        accessedAt: lstats.atime,
        isSymlink: true,
        isBrokenSymlink: true,
        mode: lstats.mode,
        permissions: formatPermissions(lstats.mode),
        uid: lstats.uid,
        gid: lstats.gid
      };
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }
}

function formatPermissions(mode) {
  if (!mode) return '---------';
  const perms = [
    (mode & 0o400) ? 'r' : '-',
    (mode & 0o200) ? 'w' : '-',
    (mode & 0o100) ? 'x' : '-',
    (mode & 0o040) ? 'r' : '-',
    (mode & 0o020) ? 'w' : '-',
    (mode & 0o010) ? 'x' : '-',
    (mode & 0o004) ? 'r' : '-',
    (mode & 0o002) ? 'w' : '-',
    (mode & 0o001) ? 'x' : '-'
  ];
  return perms.join('');
}

/**
 * HARDCODED FIX: These paths should appear as directories in UI
 */
const DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES = {
  '/data/data/com.termux/bin': {
    target: '/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin',
    description: 'Termux bin directory'
  }
};

async function getEntryInfo(entryPath, entryName) {
  const realPath = await realpath(entryPath).catch(() => entryPath);
  const override = DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES[realPath] || DIRECTORY_OVERRIDES[entryPath];
  
  if (override) {
    console.log(`[OVERRIDE] ${entryName} ŌåÆ treating as directory`);
    try {
      const targetStats = await getRealFileStats(override.target);
      return {
        kind: 'directory',
        ...targetStats,
        isSymlink: false
      };
    } catch (err) {
      return {
        kind: 'directory',
        size: 0,
        lastModified: new Date(),
        permissions: 'rwxr-xr-x',
        isSymlink: false
      };
    }
  }

  // Try to list the directory contents
  try {
    await readdir(entryPath);
    const stats = await getRealFileStats(entryPath);
    return {
      kind: 'directory',
      ...stats
    };
  } catch (listErr) {
    // Cannot list - might be a file or broken symlink
  }

  // Check if it's a file
  try {
    const stats = await getRealFileStats(entryPath);
    if (stats) {
      return {
        kind: 'file',
        ...stats
      };
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.error(`[getEntryInfo] Error for ${entryPath}:`, err.message);
    return null;
  }
}

const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');

  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    res.writeHead(204);
    res.end();
    return;
  }

  const url = new URL(req.url, `http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  try {
    if (pathname === '/api/list' && req.method === 'GET') {
      let dirPath = url.searchParams.get('path');
      if (!dirPath || dirPath === '/' || dirPath === '') {
        dirPath = '/terminal';
      }

      console.log(`[API] List request for virtual path: ${dirPath}`);
      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(dirPath);
      console.log(`[API] Resolved real path: ${realPath}`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Access denied: ${err.message}`);
        res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      try {
        const pathStat = await stat(fullPath);
        if (!pathStat.isDirectory()) {
          res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
          res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not a directory' }));
          return;
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Path not found: ${fullPath}`);
        res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' });
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: `Directory not found: ${dirPath}` }));
        return;
      }

      const entryNames = await readdir(fullPath);
      console.log(`[API] Found ${entryNames.length} entries in ${fullPath}`);
      
      const result = await Promise.all(entryNames.map(async (name) => {
        const entryPath = join(fullPath, name);
        const info = await getEntryInfo(entryPath, name);
        
        if (!info) {
          console.error(`[API] Could not get info for: ${name}`);
          return null;
        }
        
        console.log(`[API] Entry: ${name}, kind: ${info.kind}, size: ${info.size}, date: ${info.lastModified}`);
        
        return {
          name: name,
          kind: info.kind,
          size: info.size || 0,
          lastModified: info.lastModified,
          createdAt: info.createdAt,
          accessedAt: info.accessedAt,
          permissions: info.permissions,
          owner: info.uid?.toString(),
          group: info.gid?.toString(),
          isSymlink: info.isSymlink,
          isHidden: name.startsWith('.'),
          inode: info.inode,
          hardLinks: info.hardLinks,
          blocks: info.blocks,
          blockSize: info.blockSize,
          path: entryPath
        };
      }));

      const filteredResult = result.filter(Boolean);
      console.log(`[API] Returning ${filteredResult.length} entries with full metadata`);
      
      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify(filteredResult));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/file' && req.method === 'GET') {
      const filePath = url.searchParams.get('path');
      if (!filePath) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing path' }));
        return;
      }

      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(filePath);
      console.log(`[API] Read file (virtual: ${filePath}, real: ${realPath})`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        res.writeHead(403);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      const content = await readFile(fullPath, 'utf-8');
      res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain');
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(content);
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/mkdir' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { path: dirPath, name } = body;
      
      if (!dirPath || !name) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing path or name' }));
        return;
      }

      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(dirPath);
      console.log(`[API] Mkdir (virtual: ${dirPath}, real: ${realPath}, name: ${name})`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        res.writeHead(403);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      const newDirPath = join(fullPath, name);
      
      try {
        await mkdir(newDirPath, { recursive: true });
        console.log(`[API] Created directory: ${newDirPath}`);
        res.writeHead(200);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ success: true, path: newDirPath }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Mkdir error: ${err.message}`);
        res.writeHead(500);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
      }
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/write' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { path: dirPath, name, content = '' } = body;
      
      if (!dirPath || !name) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing path or name' }));
        return;
      }

      const realPath = resolveVirtualPath(dirPath);
      console.log(`[API] Write file (virtual: ${dirPath}, real: ${realPath}, name: ${name})`);

      let fullPath;
      try {
        fullPath = await normalizePathForResponse(realPath);
      } catch (err) {
        res.writeHead(403);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
        return;
      }

      const filePath = join(fullPath, name);
      
      try {
        await writeFile(filePath, content, 'utf-8');
        console.log(`[API] Created file: ${filePath}`);
        res.writeHead(200);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ success: true, path: filePath }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[API] Write error: ${err.message}`);
        res.writeHead(500);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
      }
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/health' && req.method === 'GET') {
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', roots: ALLOWED_ROOTS }));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/login' && req.method === 'GET') {
      const redirectUri = url.searchParams.get('redirect_uri') || REDIRECT_URI;
      const state = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');
      const codeVerifier = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('base64url');
      codeVerifiers.set(state, codeVerifier);

      const codeChallenge = crypto
        .createHash('sha256')
        .update(codeVerifier)
        .digest('base64url');

      const authUrl = new URL('https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('redirect_uri', redirectUri);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('response_type', 'code');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('scope', 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('access_type', 'offline');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('prompt', 'consent');
      authUrl.searchParams.set('state', state);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('code_challenge', codeChallenge);
      authUrl.searchParams.set('code_challenge_method', 'S256');

      res.writeHead(302, { Location: authUrl.toString() });
      res.end();
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/token' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { code, redirect_uri, state } = body;
      const codeVerifier = codeVerifiers.get(state);
      if (!codeVerifier) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid state' }));
        return;
      }
      codeVerifiers.delete(state);

      const tokenUrl = 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token';
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.append('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      params.append('client_secret', CLIENT_SECRET);
      params.append('code', code);
      params.append('redirect_uri', redirect_uri);
      params.append('grant_type', 'authorization_code');
      params.append('code_verifier', codeVerifier);

      const tokenRes = await fetch(tokenUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: params,
      });
      const data = await tokenRes.json();
      if (!tokenRes.ok) {
        res.writeHead(tokenRes.status);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: data.error_description || 'Token exchange failed' }));
        return;
      }
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({
        access_token: data.access_token,
        refresh_token: data.refresh_token,
        expires_in: data.expires_in,
      }));
    }
    else if (pathname === '/api/auth/google/refresh' && req.method === 'POST') {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      const { refresh_token } = body;
      if (!refresh_token) {
        res.writeHead(400);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing refresh_token' }));
        return;
      }

      const tokenUrl = 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token';
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.append('client_id', CLIENT_ID);
      params.append('client_secret', CLIENT_SECRET);
      params.append('refresh_token', refresh_token);
      params.append('grant_type', 'refresh_token');

      const tokenRes = await fetch(tokenUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: params,
      });
      const data = await tokenRes.json();
      if (!tokenRes.ok) {
        res.writeHead(tokenRes.status);
        res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: data.error_description || 'Refresh failed' }));
        return;
      }
      res.writeHead(200);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({
        access_token: data.access_token,
        expires_in: data.expires_in,
      }));
    }
    else {
      res.writeHead(404);
      res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }));
    }

  } catch (err) {
    console.error(`[API] Error: ${err.message}`);
    res.writeHead(500);
    res.end(JSON.stringify({ error: err.message }));
  }
});

server.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Ō£ģ Backend server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  console.log(`­¤ōü Allowed roots (full Termux access):`, ALLOWED_ROOTS);
});

  plugins: [react(), tailwindcss()],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      "@": path.resolve(__dirname, "./src"),
    },
  },
  server: {
    host: true,
    port: 5173,
    strictPort: true,
  },
  optimizeDeps: {
    exclude: ['@webcontainer/api'],
  },
});
